authors_text: P. N. Deelaka
title: Neural Artistic Style Transfer with Conditional Adversaria
title_zh: 具有条件对抗的神经艺术风格迁移
comment: Conditional Adversarial Generative Network based novel style transfer model
comments: Conditional Adversarial Generative Network based novel style transfer model
abstract: A neural artistic style transformation (NST) model can modify the appearance of a simple image by adding the style of a famous image. Even though the transformed images do not look precisely like artworks by the same artist of the respective style images, the generated images are appealing. Generally, a trained NST model specialises in a style, and a single image represents that style. However, generating an image under a new style is a tedious process, which includes full model training. In this paper, we present two methods that step toward the style image independent neural style transfer model. In other words, the trained model could generate semantically accurate generated image under any content, style image input pair. Our novel contribution is a unidirectional-GAN model that ensures the Cyclic consistency by the model architecture.Furthermore, this leads to much smaller model size and an efficient training and validation phase.
summary: A neural artistic style transformation (NST) model can modify the appearance of a simple image by adding the style of a famous image. Even though the transformed images do not look precisely like artworks by the same artist of the respective style images, the generated images are appealing. Generally, a trained NST model specialises in a style, and a single image represents that style. However, generating an image under a new style is a tedious process, which includes full model training. In this paper, we present two methods that step toward the style image independent neural style transfer model. In other words, the trained model could generate semantically accurate generated image under any content, style image input pair. Our novel contribution is a unidirectional-GAN model that ensures the Cyclic consistency by the model architecture.Furthermore, this leads to much smaller model size and an efficient training and validation phase.
abstract_zh: 神经艺术风格转换（NST）模型可以通过添加著名图像的风格来修改简单图像的外观。尽管转换后的图像看起来并不完全像同一位艺术家各自风格图像的艺术作品，但生成的图像很吸引人。一般来说，经过训练的 NST 模型专门研究一种风格，并且单个图像代表该风格。然而，生成新风格的图像是一个繁琐的过程，其中包括完整的模型训练。在本文中，我们提出了两种迈向风格图像独立神经风格迁移模型的方法。换句话说，训练后的模型可以在任何内容、风格图像输入对下生成语义准确的生成图像。我们的新颖贡献是一个单向 GAN 模型，它通过模型架构确保循环一致性。此外，这导致模型尺寸小得多，训练和验证阶段更高效。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需依赖特定风格图像的神经艺术风格迁移模型，可处理任意内容与风格图像对。
AI.motivation: 现有风格迁移模型需针对单一风格进行训练，生成新风格图像需重新训练模型，过程繁琐且效率低下。
AI.method: 设计一种单向生成对抗网络（unidirectional-GAN），通过模型架构确保循环一致性，减少模型规模并提升训练效率。
AI.result: 实现了一个可处理任意内容-风格图像对的模型，显著降低模型大小并优化训练验证阶段效率。
AI.conclusion: 该方法推动了无需风格图像依赖的神经风格迁移发展，为通用化风格迁移提供了新思路。

authors_text: P. N. Deelaka,D. R. Jayakodi,D. Y. Silva
title: Geometric Perception based Efficient Text Recognition
title_zh: 基于几何感知的高效文本识别
comment: high efficient scene text recognition model introduction
comments: high efficient scene text recognition model introduction
abstract: Every Scene Text Recognition (STR) task consists of text localization \& text recognition as the prominent sub-tasks. However, in real-world applications with fixed camera positions such as equipment monitor reading, image-based data entry, and printed document data extraction, the underlying data tends to be regular scene text. Hence, in these tasks, the use of generic, bulky models comes up with significant disadvantages compared to customized, efficient models in terms of model deployability, data privacy \& model reliability. Therefore, this paper introduces the underlying concepts, theory, implementation, and experiment results to develop models, which are highly specialized for the task itself, to achieve not only the SOTA performance but also to have minimal model weights, shorter inference time, and high model reliability. We introduce a novel deep learning architecture (GeoTRNet), trained to identify digits in a regular scene image, only using the geometrical features present, mimicking human perception over text recognition. The code is publicly available at https://github.com/ACRA-FL/GeoTRNet
summary: Every Scene Text Recognition (STR) task consists of text localization \& text recognition as the prominent sub-tasks. However, in real-world applications with fixed camera positions such as equipment monitor reading, image-based data entry, and printed document data extraction, the underlying data tends to be regular scene text. Hence, in these tasks, the use of generic, bulky models comes up with significant disadvantages compared to customized, efficient models in terms of model deployability, data privacy \& model reliability. Therefore, this paper introduces the underlying concepts, theory, implementation, and experiment results to develop models, which are highly specialized for the task itself, to achieve not only the SOTA performance but also to have minimal model weights, shorter inference time, and high model reliability. We introduce a novel deep learning architecture (GeoTRNet), trained to identify digits in a regular scene image, only using the geometrical features present, mimicking human perception over text recognition. The code is publicly available at https://github.com/ACRA-FL/GeoTRNet
abstract_zh: 每个场景文本识别（STR）任务都包含文本定位和文本识别作为突出的子任务。然而，在具有固定相机位置的实际应用中，例如设备监视器读取、基于图像的数据输入和打印文档数据提取，底层数据往往是常规场景文本。因此，在这些任务中，与定制的高效模型相比，使用通用的庞大模型在模型可部署性、数据隐私和模型可靠性方面存在显着的缺点。因此，本文介绍了基本概念、理论、实现和实验结果来开发针对任务本身高度专业化的模型，不仅实现 SOTA 性能，而且具有最小的模型权重、更短的推理时间和高模型可靠性。我们引入了一种新颖的深度学习架构（GeoTRNet），经过训练可以识别常规场景图像中的数字，仅使用存在的几何特征，模仿人类对文本识别的感知。该代码可在 https://github.com/ACRA-FL/GeoTRNet 上公开获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于几何感知的高效文本识别模型GeoTRNet，专门用于规则场景中的数字识别，以提高模型效率和可靠性。
AI.motivation: 在固定摄像头场景中，传统通用模型存在部署复杂、隐私风险高和可靠性不足的问题，需定制化高效模型满足实际需求。
AI.method: 设计GeoTRNet架构，仅利用几何特征模仿人类文本识别感知机制，专注于规则场景数字识别，减少模型参数和计算量。
AI.result: 实现与现有最优方法相当的性能，同时显著降低模型权重、缩短推理时间，并提升在固定场景下的可靠性。
AI.conclusion: GeoTRNet通过几何感知机制有效平衡了文本识别的精度与效率，适用于设备监控、文档提取等实际场景，代码已开源。

authors_text: Adrian Celaya,Beatrice Riviere,David Fuentes
title: A Generalized Surface Loss for Reducing the Hausdorff Distance in Medical Imaging Segmentation
title_zh: 医学成像分割中减少豪斯多夫距离的广义表面损失
abstract: Within medical imaging segmentation, the Dice coefficient and Hausdorff-based metrics are standard measures of success for deep learning models. However, modern loss functions for medical image segmentation often only consider the Dice coefficient or similar region-based metrics during training. As a result, segmentation architectures trained over such loss functions run the risk of achieving high accuracy for the Dice coefficient but low accuracy for Hausdorff-based metrics. Low accuracy on Hausdorff-based metrics can be problematic for applications such as tumor segmentation, where such benchmarks are crucial. For example, high Dice scores accompanied by significant Hausdorff errors could indicate that the predictions fail to detect small tumors. We propose the Generalized Surface Loss function, a novel loss function to minimize Hausdorff-based metrics with more desirable numerical properties than current methods and with weighting terms for class imbalance. Our loss function outperforms other losses when tested on the LiTS and BraTS datasets using the state-of-the-art nnUNet architecture. These results suggest we can improve medical imaging segmentation accuracy with our novel loss function.
summary: Within medical imaging segmentation, the Dice coefficient and Hausdorff-based metrics are standard measures of success for deep learning models. However, modern loss functions for medical image segmentation often only consider the Dice coefficient or similar region-based metrics during training. As a result, segmentation architectures trained over such loss functions run the risk of achieving high accuracy for the Dice coefficient but low accuracy for Hausdorff-based metrics. Low accuracy on Hausdorff-based metrics can be problematic for applications such as tumor segmentation, where such benchmarks are crucial. For example, high Dice scores accompanied by significant Hausdorff errors could indicate that the predictions fail to detect small tumors. We propose the Generalized Surface Loss function, a novel loss function to minimize Hausdorff-based metrics with more desirable numerical properties than current methods and with weighting terms for class imbalance. Our loss function outperforms other losses when tested on the LiTS and BraTS datasets using the state-of-the-art nnUNet architecture. These results suggest we can improve medical imaging segmentation accuracy with our novel loss function.
abstract_zh: 在医学成像分割中，Dice 系数和基于 Hausdorff 的指标是深度学习模型成功的标准衡量标准。然而，用于医学图像分割的现代损失函数通常在训练期间仅考虑 Dice 系数或类似的基于区域的指标。因此，在此类损失函数上训练的分割架构存在 Dice 系数精度较高但基于 Hausdorff 的指标精度较低的风险。基于 Hausdorff 的指标精度较低，对于肿瘤分割等应用来说可能会出现问题，而此类基准在这些应用中至关重要。例如，高 Dice 分数伴随着显着的 Hausdorff 误差可能表明预测无法检测到小肿瘤。我们提出了广义表面损失函数，这是一种新颖的损失函数，可以最小化基于豪斯多夫的度量，具有比当前方法更理想的数值属性，并且具有类别不平衡的加权项。当使用最先进的 nnUNet 架构在 LiTS 和 BraTS 数据集上进行测试时，我们的损失函数优于其他损失。这些结果表明我们可以通过新的损失函数来提高医学成像分割的准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通用表面损失函数，旨在减少医学影像分割中的Hausdorff距离，提升分割精度。
AI.motivation: 现有医学影像分割模型多依赖Dice系数等区域指标，忽视Hausdorff度量，导致小肿瘤等关键结构检测不足，影响临床应用。
AI.method: 设计通用表面损失函数，通过优化Hausdorff度量数值特性并引入类别不平衡加权项，改进分割模型训练过程。
AI.result: 在LiTS和BraTS数据集上，使用nnUNet架构验证表明，新损失函数显著提升分割精度，优于传统损失函数。
AI.conclusion: 通用表面损失函数可有效改善医学影像分割的Hausdorff度量表现，为关键结构检测提供更可靠解决方案。

tldr: 本文提出一种通用表面损失函数，旨在减少医学影像分割中的Hausdorff距离，提升分割精度。
motivation: 现有医学影像分割模型多依赖Dice系数等区域指标，忽视Hausdorff度量，导致小肿瘤等关键结构检测不足，影响临床应用。
method: 设计通用表面损失函数，通过优化Hausdorff度量数值特性并引入类别不平衡加权项，改进分割模型训练过程。
result: 在LiTS和BraTS数据集上，使用nnUNet架构验证表明，新损失函数显著提升分割精度，优于传统损失函数。
conclusion: 通用表面损失函数可有效改善医学影像分割的Hausdorff度量表现，为关键结构检测提供更可靠解决方案。
search_text: A Generalized Surface Loss for Reducing the Hausdorff Distance in Medical Imaging Segmentation 医学成像分割中减少豪斯多夫距离的广义表面损失 Within medical imaging segmentation, the Dice coefficient and Hausdorff-based metrics are standard measures of success for deep learning models. However, modern loss functions for medical image segmentation often only consider the Dice coefficient or similar region-based metrics during training. As a result, segmentation architectures trained over such loss functions run the risk of achieving high accuracy for the Dice coefficient but low accuracy for Hausdorff-based metrics. Low accuracy on Hausdorff-based metrics can be problematic for applications such as tumor segmentation, where such benchmarks are crucial. For example, high Dice scores accompanied by significant Hausdorff errors could indicate that the predictions fail to detect small tumors. We propose the Generalized Surface Loss function, a novel loss function to minimize Hausdorff-based metrics with more desirable numerical properties than current methods and with weighting terms for class imbalance. Our loss function outperforms other losses when tested on the LiTS and BraTS datasets using the state-of-the-art nnUNet architecture. These results suggest we can improve medical imaging segmentation accuracy with our novel loss function. 在医学成像分割中，Dice 系数和基于 Hausdorff 的指标是深度学习模型成功的标准衡量标准。然而，用于医学图像分割的现代损失函数通常在训练期间仅考虑 Dice 系数或类似的基于区域的指标。因此，在此类损失函数上训练的分割架构存在 Dice 系数精度较高但基于 Hausdorff 的指标精度较低的风险。基于 Hausdorff 的指标精度较低，对于肿瘤分割等应用来说可能会出现问题，而此类基准在这些应用中至关重要。例如，高 Dice 分数伴随着显着的 Hausdorff 误差可能表明预测无法检测到小肿瘤。我们提出了广义表面损失函数，这是一种新颖的损失函数，可以最小化基于豪斯多夫的度量，具有比当前方法更理想的数值属性，并且具有类别不平衡的加权项。当使用最先进的 nnUNet 架构在 LiTS 和 BraTS 数据集上进行测试时，我们的损失函数优于其他损失。这些结果表明我们可以通过新的损失函数来提高医学成像分割的准确性。 本文提出一种通用表面损失函数，旨在减少医学影像分割中的Hausdorff距离，提升分割精度。 Adrian Celaya,Beatrice Riviere,David Fuentes eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Thai-Hoang Nguyen,Muhammad Imran,Jaehyuk Choi,Joon-Sung Yang
title: CRAFT: Criticality-Aware Fault-Tolerance Enhancement Techniques for Emerging Memories-Based Deep Neural Networks
title_zh: CRAFT：新兴基于记忆的深度神经网络的临界感知容错增强技术
comment: to be published in IEEE Transactions on Computer-Aided Design of Integrated Circuits and Systems
comments: to be published in IEEE Transactions on Computer-Aided Design of Integrated Circuits and Systems
abstract: Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) have emerged as the most effective programming paradigm for computer vision and natural language processing applications. With the rapid development of DNNs, efficient hardware architectures for deploying DNN-based applications on edge devices have been extensively studied. Emerging Non-Volatile Memories (NVMs), with their better scalability, non-volatility and good read performance, are found to be promising candidates for deploying DNNs. However, despite the promise, emerging NVMs often suffer from reliability issues such as stuck-at faults, which decrease the chip yield/memory lifetime and severely impact the accuracy of DNNs. A stuck-at cell can be read but not reprogrammed, thus, stuck-at faults in NVMs may or may not result in errors depending on the data to be stored. By reducing the number of errors caused by stuck-at faults, the reliability of a DNN-based system can be enhanced. This paper proposes CRAFT, i.e., Criticality-Aware Fault-Tolerance Enhancement Techniques to enhance the reliability of NVM-based DNNs in the presence of stuck-at faults. A data block remapping technique is used to reduce the impact of stuck-at faults on DNNs accuracy. Additionally, by performing bit-level criticality analysis on various DNNs, the critical-bit positions in network parameters that can significantly impact the accuracy are identified. Based on this analysis, we propose an encoding method which effectively swaps the critical bit positions with that of non-critical bits when more errors (due to stuck-at faults) are present in the critical bits.
summary: Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) have emerged as the most effective programming paradigm for computer vision and natural language processing applications. With the rapid development of DNNs, efficient hardware architectures for deploying DNN-based applications on edge devices have been extensively studied. Emerging Non-Volatile Memories (NVMs), with their better scalability, non-volatility and good read performance, are found to be promising candidates for deploying DNNs. However, despite the promise, emerging NVMs often suffer from reliability issues such as stuck-at faults, which decrease the chip yield/memory lifetime and severely impact the accuracy of DNNs. A stuck-at cell can be read but not reprogrammed, thus, stuck-at faults in NVMs may or may not result in errors depending on the data to be stored. By reducing the number of errors caused by stuck-at faults, the reliability of a DNN-based system can be enhanced. This paper proposes CRAFT, i.e., Criticality-Aware Fault-Tolerance Enhancement Techniques to enhance the reliability of NVM-based DNNs in the presence of stuck-at faults. A data block remapping technique is used to reduce the impact of stuck-at faults on DNNs accuracy. Additionally, by performing bit-level criticality analysis on various DNNs, the critical-bit positions in network parameters that can significantly impact the accuracy are identified. Based on this analysis, we propose an encoding method which effectively swaps the critical bit positions with that of non-critical bits when more errors (due to stuck-at faults) are present in the critical bits.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络 (DNN) 已成为计算机视觉和自然语言处理应用程序最有效的编程范例。随着 DNN 的快速发展，在边缘设备上部署基于 DNN 的应用程序的高效硬件架构已得到广泛研究。新兴的非易失性存储器（NVM）具有更好的可扩展性、非易失性和良好的读取性能，被认为是部署 DNN 的有希望的候选者。然而，尽管有这样的前景，新兴的 NVM 经常会遇到可靠性问题，例如固定故障，这会降低芯片产量/存储器寿命，并严重影响 DNN 的准确性。固定单元可以读取，但不能重新编程，因此，NVM 中的固定故障可能会也可能不会导致错误，具体取决于要存储的数据。通过减少由固定故障引起的错误数量，可以增强基于 DNN 的系统的可靠性。本文提出了 CRAFT，即临界感知容错增强技术，以增强基于 NVM 的 DNN 在出现固定故障时的可靠性。数据块重新映射技术用于减少卡住故障对 DNN 准确性的影响。此外，通过对各种 DNN 执行位级关键性分析，可以识别网络参数中可显着影响准确性的关键位位置。基于此分析，我们提出了一种编码方法，当关键位中存在更多错误（由于固定故障）时，该方法可以有效地将关键位位置与非关键位位置交换。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CRAFT技术，通过关键性感知的容错方法提升基于新兴存储器的深度神经网络可靠性。
AI.motivation: 新兴非易失性存储器在部署深度神经网络时面临可靠性问题，如固定故障会导致精度下降，需针对性容错方案。
AI.method: 采用数据块重映射降低故障影响，并通过位级关键性分析识别参数中影响精度的关键位，利用编码方法在故障发生时交换关键位与非关键位。
AI.result: 有效减少固定故障引起的误差，提升基于新兴存储器的DNN系统可靠性与精度。
AI.conclusion: CRAFT通过关键位识别与动态位交换机制，为新兴存储器中的DNN提供了高效的容错解决方案。

authors_text: Gary Y. Li,Junyu Chen,Se-In Jang,Kuang Gong,Quanzheng Li
title: SwinCross: Cross-modal Swin Transformer for Head-and-Neck Tumor Segmentation in PET/CT Images
title_zh: SwinCross：用于 PET/CT 图像中头颈肿瘤分割的跨模态 Swin Transformer
abstract: Radiotherapy (RT) combined with cetuximab is the standard treatment for patients with inoperable head and neck cancers. Segmentation of head and neck (H&N) tumors is a prerequisite for radiotherapy planning but a time-consuming process. In recent years, deep convolutional neural networks have become the de facto standard for automated image segmentation. However, due to the expensive computational cost associated with enlarging the field of view in DCNNs, their ability to model long-range dependency is still limited, and this can result in sub-optimal segmentation performance for objects with background context spanning over long distances. On the other hand, Transformer models have demonstrated excellent capabilities in capturing such long-range information in several semantic segmentation tasks performed on medical images. Inspired by the recent success of Vision Transformers and advances in multi-modal image analysis, we propose a novel segmentation model, debuted, Cross-Modal Swin Transformer (SwinCross), with cross-modal attention (CMA) module to incorporate cross-modal feature extraction at multiple resolutions.To validate the effectiveness of the proposed method, we performed experiments on the HECKTOR 2021 challenge dataset and compared it with the nnU-Net (the backbone of the top-5 methods in HECKTOR 2021) and other state-of-the-art transformer-based methods such as UNETR, and Swin UNETR. The proposed method is experimentally shown to outperform these comparing methods thanks to the ability of the CMA module to capture better inter-modality complimentary feature representations between PET and CT, for the task of head-and-neck tumor segmentation.
summary: Radiotherapy (RT) combined with cetuximab is the standard treatment for patients with inoperable head and neck cancers. Segmentation of head and neck (H&N) tumors is a prerequisite for radiotherapy planning but a time-consuming process. In recent years, deep convolutional neural networks have become the de facto standard for automated image segmentation. However, due to the expensive computational cost associated with enlarging the field of view in DCNNs, their ability to model long-range dependency is still limited, and this can result in sub-optimal segmentation performance for objects with background context spanning over long distances. On the other hand, Transformer models have demonstrated excellent capabilities in capturing such long-range information in several semantic segmentation tasks performed on medical images. Inspired by the recent success of Vision Transformers and advances in multi-modal image analysis, we propose a novel segmentation model, debuted, Cross-Modal Swin Transformer (SwinCross), with cross-modal attention (CMA) module to incorporate cross-modal feature extraction at multiple resolutions.To validate the effectiveness of the proposed method, we performed experiments on the HECKTOR 2021 challenge dataset and compared it with the nnU-Net (the backbone of the top-5 methods in HECKTOR 2021) and other state-of-the-art transformer-based methods such as UNETR, and Swin UNETR. The proposed method is experimentally shown to outperform these comparing methods thanks to the ability of the CMA module to capture better inter-modality complimentary feature representations between PET and CT, for the task of head-and-neck tumor segmentation.
abstract_zh: 放射治疗（RT）联合西妥昔单抗是无法手术的头颈癌患者的标准治疗方法。头颈 (H&N) 肿瘤的分割是放射治疗计划的先决条件，但却是一个耗时的过程。近年来，深度卷积神经网络已成为自动图像分割的事实上的标准。然而，由于与扩大 DCNN 视场相关的昂贵计算成本，它们对远程依赖性进行建模的能力仍然有限，这可能会导致背景上下文跨越长距离的对象的分割性能不佳。另一方面，Transformer 模型在对医学图像执行的多个语义分割任务中展示了捕获此类远程信息的出色能力。受 Vision Transformers 最近成功和多模态图像分析进展的启发，我们提出了一种新颖的分割模型，首次亮相，跨模态 Swin Transformer (SwinCross)，具有跨模态注意力 (CMA) 模块，可在多个分辨率下合并跨模态特征提取。为了验证所提出方法的有效性，我们在 HECKTOR 2021 挑战数据集上进行了实验，并将其与 nnU-Net（前 5 个方法的骨干）进行了比较。 HECKTOR 2021）以及其他最先进的基于变压器的方法，例如 UNETR 和 Swin UNETR。实验表明，在头颈肿瘤分割任务中，由于 CMA 模块能够捕获 PET 和 CT 之间更好的模态间互补特征表示，因此所提出的方法优于这些比较方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SwinCross的跨模态Swin Transformer模型，用于PET/CT图像中的头颈肿瘤分割。
AI.motivation: 传统卷积神经网络在处理长距离依赖关系时存在局限性，而Transformer模型在捕捉跨模态特征方面表现优异，因此需要开发一种结合多模态信息的新型分割模型。
AI.method: 设计了包含跨模态注意力（CMA）模块的SwinCross模型，通过多尺度跨模态特征提取，融合PET和CT模态的互补信息。
AI.result: 在HECKTOR 2021数据集上，SwinCross优于nnU-Net、UNETR等现有方法，验证了CMA模块在跨模态特征学习中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: SwinCross通过跨模态注意力机制有效提升了头颈肿瘤分割性能，为多模态医学图像分析提供了新思路。

search_text: SwinCross: Cross-modal Swin Transformer for Head-and-Neck Tumor Segmentation in PET/CT Images SwinCross：用于 PET/CT 图像中头颈肿瘤分割的跨模态 Swin Transformer Radiotherapy (RT) combined with cetuximab is the standard treatment for patients with inoperable head and neck cancers. Segmentation of head and neck (H&N) tumors is a prerequisite for radiotherapy planning but a time-consuming process. In recent years, deep convolutional neural networks have become the de facto standard for automated image segmentation. However, due to the expensive computational cost associated with enlarging the field of view in DCNNs, their ability to model long-range dependency is still limited, and this can result in sub-optimal segmentation performance for objects with background context spanning over long distances. On the other hand, Transformer models have demonstrated excellent capabilities in capturing such long-range information in several semantic segmentation tasks performed on medical images. Inspired by the recent success of Vision Transformers and advances in multi-modal image analysis, we propose a novel segmentation model, debuted, Cross-Modal Swin Transformer (SwinCross), with cross-modal attention (CMA) module to incorporate cross-modal feature extraction at multiple resolutions.To validate the effectiveness of the proposed method, we performed experiments on the HECKTOR 2021 challenge dataset and compared it with the nnU-Net (the backbone of the top-5 methods in HECKTOR 2021) and other state-of-the-art transformer-based methods such as UNETR, and Swin UNETR. The proposed method is experimentally shown to outperform these comparing methods thanks to the ability of the CMA module to capture better inter-modality complimentary feature representations between PET and CT, for the task of head-and-neck tumor segmentation. 放射治疗（RT）联合西妥昔单抗是无法手术的头颈癌患者的标准治疗方法。头颈 (H&N) 肿瘤的分割是放射治疗计划的先决条件，但却是一个耗时的过程。近年来，深度卷积神经网络已成为自动图像分割的事实上的标准。然而，由于与扩大 DCNN 视场相关的昂贵计算成本，它们对远程依赖性进行建模的能力仍然有限，这可能会导致背景上下文跨越长距离的对象的分割性能不佳。另一方面，Transformer 模型在对医学图像执行的多个语义分割任务中展示了捕获此类远程信息的出色能力。受 Vision Transformers 最近成功和多模态图像分析进展的启发，我们提出了一种新颖的分割模型，首次亮相，跨模态 Swin Transformer (SwinCross)，具有跨模态注意力 (CMA) 模块，可在多个分辨率下合并跨模态特征提取。为了验证所提出方法的有效性，我们在 HECKTOR 2021 挑战数据集上进行了实验，并将其与 nnU-Net（前 5 个方法的骨干）进行了比较。 HECKTOR 2021）以及其他最先进的基于变压器的方法，例如 UNETR 和 Swin UNETR。实验表明，在头颈肿瘤分割任务中，由于 CMA 模块能够捕获 PET 和 CT 之间更好的模态间互补特征表示，因此所提出的方法优于这些比较方法。 本文提出了一种名为SwinCross的跨模态Swin Transformer模型，用于PET/CT图像中的头颈肿瘤分割。 Gary Y. Li,Junyu Chen,Se-In Jang,Kuang Gong,Quanzheng Li eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Peilun Shi,Jiachuan Peng,Jianing Qiu,Xinwei Ju,Frank Po Wen Lo,Benny Lo
title: EVEN: An Event-Based Framework for Monocular Depth Estimation at Adverse Night Conditions
title_zh: EVEN：恶劣夜间条件下单眼深度估计的基于事件的框架
abstract: Accurate depth estimation under adverse night conditions has practical impact and applications, such as on autonomous driving and rescue robots. In this work, we studied monocular depth estimation at night time in which various adverse weather, light, and different road conditions exist, with data captured in both RGB and event modalities. Event camera can better capture intensity changes by virtue of its high dynamic range (HDR), which is particularly suitable to be applied at adverse night conditions in which the amount of light is limited in the scene. Although event data can retain visual perception that conventional RGB camera may fail to capture, the lack of texture and color information of event data hinders its applicability to accurately estimate depth alone. To tackle this problem, we propose an event-vision based framework that integrates low-light enhancement for the RGB source, and exploits the complementary merits of RGB and event data. A dataset that includes paired RGB and event streams, and ground truth depth maps has been constructed. Comprehensive experiments have been conducted, and the impact of different adverse weather combinations on the performance of framework has also been investigated. The results have shown that our proposed framework can better estimate monocular depth at adverse nights than six baselines.
summary: Accurate depth estimation under adverse night conditions has practical impact and applications, such as on autonomous driving and rescue robots. In this work, we studied monocular depth estimation at night time in which various adverse weather, light, and different road conditions exist, with data captured in both RGB and event modalities. Event camera can better capture intensity changes by virtue of its high dynamic range (HDR), which is particularly suitable to be applied at adverse night conditions in which the amount of light is limited in the scene. Although event data can retain visual perception that conventional RGB camera may fail to capture, the lack of texture and color information of event data hinders its applicability to accurately estimate depth alone. To tackle this problem, we propose an event-vision based framework that integrates low-light enhancement for the RGB source, and exploits the complementary merits of RGB and event data. A dataset that includes paired RGB and event streams, and ground truth depth maps has been constructed. Comprehensive experiments have been conducted, and the impact of different adverse weather combinations on the performance of framework has also been investigated. The results have shown that our proposed framework can better estimate monocular depth at adverse nights than six baselines.
abstract_zh: 恶劣夜间条件下的准确深度估计具有实际影响和应用，例如自动驾驶和救援机器人。在这项工作中，我们研究了夜间的单目深度估计，其中存在各种恶劣天气、光线和不同的道路条件，并以 RGB 和事件模式捕获数据。事件摄像机凭借其高动态范围（HDR）可以更好地捕捉强度变化，特别适合在场景中光量有限的恶劣夜间条件下应用。尽管事件数据可以保留传统 RGB 相机可能无法捕获的视觉感知，但事件数据缺乏纹理和颜色信息阻碍了其单独准确估计深度的适用性。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种基于事件视觉的框架，该框架集成了 RGB 源的低光增强功能，并利用了 RGB 和事件数据的互补优点。已构建了包含成对 RGB 和事件流以及地面实况深度图的数据集。进行了综合实验，并研究了不同恶劣天气组合对框架性能的影响。结果表明，我们提出的框架比六个基线能够更好地估计恶劣夜晚的单眼深度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于事件相机的单目深度估计框架EVEN，用于解决夜间恶劣条件下的深度估计问题。
AI.motivation: 夜间恶劣环境下的深度估计对自动驾驶和救援机器人等应用至关重要。传统RGB相机在低光条件下表现不佳，而事件相机虽具高动态范围但缺乏纹理和颜色信息，需结合两者优势。
AI.method: 提出融合RGB低光增强与事件数据互补特性的框架，构建包含RGB-事件配对及深度图的夜间数据集，并分析不同天气组合对模型性能的影响。
AI.result: 实验表明，该框架在六种基线方法中表现最佳，能更准确估计夜间恶劣条件下的单目深度。
AI.conclusion: 通过整合RGB与事件数据的优势，所提框架有效提升了夜间复杂环境下的深度估计精度。

In this work, we studied monocular depth estimation at night time in which various adverse weather, light, and different road conditions exist, with data captured in both RGB and event modalities. authors_text: Jiankai Tang,Kequan Chen,Yuntao Wang,Yuanchun Shi,Shwetak Patel,Daniel McDuff,Xin Liu
title: MMPD: Multi-Domain Mobile Video Physiology Dataset
title_zh: MMPD：多域移动视频生理学数据集
abstract: Remote photoplethysmography (rPPG) is an attractive method for noninvasive, convenient and concomitant measurement of physiological vital signals. Public benchmark datasets have served a valuable role in the development of this technology and improvements in accuracy over recent years.However, there remain gaps in the public datasets.First, despite the ubiquity of cameras on mobile devices, there are few datasets recorded specifically with mobile phone cameras. Second, most datasets are relatively small and therefore are limited in diversity, both in appearance (e.g., skin tone), behaviors (e.g., motion) and environment (e.g., lighting conditions). In an effort to help the field advance, we present the Multi-domain Mobile Video Physiology Dataset (MMPD), comprising 11 hours of recordings from mobile phones of 33 subjects. The dataset is designed to capture videos with greater representation across skin tone, body motion, and lighting conditions. MMPD is comprehensive with eight descriptive labels and can be used in conjunction with the rPPG-toolbox. The reliability of the dataset is verified by mainstream unsupervised methods and neural methods. The GitHub repository of our dataset: https://github.com/THU-CS-PI/MMPD_rPPG_dataset.
summary: Remote photoplethysmography (rPPG) is an attractive method for noninvasive, convenient and concomitant measurement of physiological vital signals. Public benchmark datasets have served a valuable role in the development of this technology and improvements in accuracy over recent years.However, there remain gaps in the public datasets.First, despite the ubiquity of cameras on mobile devices, there are few datasets recorded specifically with mobile phone cameras. Second, most datasets are relatively small and therefore are limited in diversity, both in appearance (e.g., skin tone), behaviors (e.g., motion) and environment (e.g., lighting conditions). In an effort to help the field advance, we present the Multi-domain Mobile Video Physiology Dataset (MMPD), comprising 11 hours of recordings from mobile phones of 33 subjects. The dataset is designed to capture videos with greater representation across skin tone, body motion, and lighting conditions. MMPD is comprehensive with eight descriptive labels and can be used in conjunction with the rPPG-toolbox. The reliability of the dataset is verified by mainstream unsupervised methods and neural methods. The GitHub repository of our dataset: https://github.com/THU-CS-PI/MMPD_rPPG_dataset.
abstract_zh: 远程光电体积描记法 (rPPG) 是一种非常有吸引力的无创、方便、伴随测量生理生命信号的方法。近年来，公共基准数据集在这项技术的发展和准确性的提高中发挥了宝贵的作用。然而，公共数据集仍然存在差距。首先，尽管移动设备上的摄像头无处不在，但专门用手机摄像头记录的数据集却很少。其次，大多数数据集相对较小，因此在外观（例如肤色）、行为（例如运动）和环境（例如照明条件）方面的多样性都受到限制。为了帮助该领域取得进展，我们推出了多域移动视频生理学数据集 (MMPD)，其中包含 33 名受试者的手机 11 小时的录制内容。该数据集旨在捕获更具代表性的肤色、身体运动和照明条件的视频。 MMPD 非常全面，具有八个描述性标签，可以与 rPPG 工具箱结合使用。通过主流的无监督方法和神经方法验证了数据集的可靠性。我们数据集的 GitHub 存储库：https://github.com/THU-CS-PI/MMPD_rPPG_dataset。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了多领域移动视频生理学数据集MMPD，旨在通过移动设备摄像头收集更丰富的生理信号数据以改进远程光电容积描记法(rPPG)研究。
AI.motivation: 现有公开数据集存在两大缺陷：1) 缺乏专门使用手机摄像头录制的数据；2) 数据集规模小且多样性不足，无法覆盖肤色、运动状态和光照条件等关键变量。
AI.method: 采集33名受试者11小时的手机视频数据，涵盖多种肤色、身体运动和光照条件，标注八类描述性标签，并通过无监督方法和神经网络验证数据可靠性。
AI.result: 构建包含11小时视频数据的MMPD数据集，支持与rPPG-toolbox工具箱结合使用，验证方法包括主流无监督算法和神经网络模型。
AI.conclusion: MMPD数据集通过提升移动设备数据多样性和规模，为rPPG技术研究提供了更全面的基础，有助于推动非接触式生理信号监测的发展。

MMPD is comprehensive with eight descriptive labels and can be used in conjunction with the rPPG-toolbox. The reliability of the dataset is verified by mainstream unsupervised methods and neural methods. The GitHub repository of our dataset: https://github.com/THU-CS-PI/MMPD_rPPG_dataset. 远程光电体积描记法 (rPPG) 是一种非常有吸引力的无创、方便、伴随测量生理生命信号的方法。近年来，公共基准数据集在这项技术的发展和准确性的提高中发挥了宝贵的作用。然而，公共数据集仍然存在差距。首先，尽管移动设备上的摄像头无处不在，但专门用手机摄像头记录的数据集却很少。其次，大多数数据集相对较小，因此在外观（例如肤色）、行为（例如运动）和环境（例如照明条件）方面的多样性都受到限制。为了帮助该领域取得进展，我们推出了多域移动视频生理学数据集 (MMPD)，其中包含 33 名受试者的手机 11 小时的录制内容。该数据集旨在捕获更具代表性的肤色、身体运动和照明条件的视频。 MMPD 非常全面，具有八个描述性标签，可以与 rPPG 工具箱结合使用。通过主流的无监督方法和神经方法验证了数据集的可靠性。我们数据集的 GitHub 存储库：https://github.com/THU-CS-PI/MMPD_rPPG_dataset。 本文介绍了多领域移动视频生理学数据集MMPD，旨在通过移动设备摄像头收集更丰富的生理信号数据以改进远程光电容积描记法(rPPG)研究。 Jiankai Tang,Kequan Chen,Yuntao Wang,Yuanchun Shi,Shwetak Patel,Daniel McDuff,Xin Liu cs.CV

authors_text: Muhammad Hassan,Hao Zhang,Ahmed Fateh Ameen,Home Wu Zeng,Shuye Ma,Wen Liang,Dingqi Shang,Jiaming Ding,Ziheng Zhan,Tsz Kwan Lam,Ming Xu,Qiming Huang,Dongmei Wu,Can Yang Zhang,Zhou You,Awiwu Ain,Pei Wu Qin
title: Futuristic Variations and Analysis in Fundus Images Corresponding to Biological Traits
title_zh: 与生物特征对应的眼底图像的未来变化与分析
abstract: Fundus image captures rear of an eye, and which has been studied for the diseases identification, classification, segmentation, generation, and biological traits association using handcrafted, conventional, and deep learning methods. In biological traits estimation, most of the studies have been carried out for the age prediction and gender classification with convincing results. However, the current study utilizes the cutting-edge deep learning (DL) algorithms to estimate biological traits in terms of age and gender together with associating traits to retinal visuals. For the traits association, our study embeds aging as the label information into the proposed DL model to learn knowledge about the effected regions with aging. Our proposed DL models, named FAG-Net and FGC-Net, correspondingly estimate biological traits (age and gender) and generates fundus images. FAG-Net can generate multiple variants of an input fundus image given a list of ages as conditions. Our study analyzes fundus images and their corresponding association with biological traits, and predicts of possible spreading of ocular disease on fundus images given age as condition to the generative model. Our proposed models outperform the randomly selected state of-the-art DL models.
summary: Fundus image captures rear of an eye, and which has been studied for the diseases identification, classification, segmentation, generation, and biological traits association using handcrafted, conventional, and deep learning methods. In biological traits estimation, most of the studies have been carried out for the age prediction and gender classification with convincing results. However, the current study utilizes the cutting-edge deep learning (DL) algorithms to estimate biological traits in terms of age and gender together with associating traits to retinal visuals. For the traits association, our study embeds aging as the label information into the proposed DL model to learn knowledge about the effected regions with aging. Our proposed DL models, named FAG-Net and FGC-Net, correspondingly estimate biological traits (age and gender) and generates fundus images. FAG-Net can generate multiple variants of an input fundus image given a list of ages as conditions. Our study analyzes fundus images and their corresponding association with biological traits, and predicts of possible spreading of ocular disease on fundus images given age as condition to the generative model. Our proposed models outperform the randomly selected state of-the-art DL models.
abstract_zh: 眼底图像捕获眼睛的后部，并使用手工、传统和深度学习方法对其进行了疾病识别、分类、分割、生成和生物特征关联的研究。在生物性状估计方面，大部分研究都是针对年龄预测和性别分类进行的，并取得了令人信服的结果。然而，当前的研究利用尖端的深度学习（DL）算法来估计年龄和性别方面的生物特征，并将特征与视网膜视觉相关联。对于特征关联，我们的研究将衰老作为标签信息嵌入到所提出的深度学习模型中，以了解有关衰老影响区域的知识。我们提出的深度学习模型，名为 FAG-Net 和 FGC-Net，相应地估计生物特征（年龄和性别）并生成眼底图像。给定年龄列表作为条件，FAG-Net 可以生成输入眼底图像的多个变体。我们的研究分析了眼底图像及其与生物特征的相应关联，并预测以年龄作为生成模型条件的眼底图像上眼部疾病可能的传播。我们提出的模型优于随机选择的最先进的深度学习模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种深度学习模型FAG-Net和FGC-Net，用于从眼底图像中联合估计年龄和性别生物特征，并生成对应的眼底图像变体。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多关注单一生物特征（如年龄或性别）预测，缺乏将年龄与眼底图像视觉特征关联的系统性分析，且未有效预测年龄条件下的疾病传播风险。
AI.method: 设计FAG-Net嵌入年龄标签学习老化区域特征，FGC-Net生成条件化眼底图像；通过年龄条件生成多种图像变体并分析生物特征与眼底病变的关联性。
AI.result: 所提模型在年龄预测、性别分类及图像生成任务上均优于随机选择的前沿深度学习模型。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效建立了生物特征与眼底图像的关联，为基于年龄条件的疾病传播预测提供了新视角。

authors_text: Ali Zia,Abdelwahed Khamis,James Nichols,Zeeshan Hayder,Vivien Rolland,Lars Petersson
title: Topological Deep Learning: A Review of an Emerging Paradigm
title_zh: 拓扑深度学习：新兴范式回顾
abstract: Topological data analysis (TDA) provides insight into data shape. The summaries obtained by these methods are principled global descriptions of multi-dimensional data whilst exhibiting stable properties such as robustness to deformation and noise. Such properties are desirable in deep learning pipelines but they are typically obtained using non-TDA strategies. This is partly caused by the difficulty of combining TDA constructs (e.g. barcode and persistence diagrams) with current deep learning algorithms. Fortunately, we are now witnessing a growth of deep learning applications embracing topologically-guided components. In this survey, we review the nascent field of topological deep learning by first revisiting the core concepts of TDA. We then explore how the use of TDA techniques has evolved over time to support deep learning frameworks, and how they can be integrated into different aspects of deep learning. Furthermore, we touch on TDA usage for analyzing existing deep models; deep topological analytics. Finally, we discuss the challenges and future prospects of topological deep learning.
summary: Topological data analysis (TDA) provides insight into data shape. The summaries obtained by these methods are principled global descriptions of multi-dimensional data whilst exhibiting stable properties such as robustness to deformation and noise. Such properties are desirable in deep learning pipelines but they are typically obtained using non-TDA strategies. This is partly caused by the difficulty of combining TDA constructs (e.g. barcode and persistence diagrams) with current deep learning algorithms. Fortunately, we are now witnessing a growth of deep learning applications embracing topologically-guided components. In this survey, we review the nascent field of topological deep learning by first revisiting the core concepts of TDA. We then explore how the use of TDA techniques has evolved over time to support deep learning frameworks, and how they can be integrated into different aspects of deep learning. Furthermore, we touch on TDA usage for analyzing existing deep models; deep topological analytics. Finally, we discuss the challenges and future prospects of topological deep learning.
abstract_zh: 拓扑数据分析 (TDA) 提供对数据形状的洞察。通过这些方法获得的摘要是多维数据的原则性全局描述，同时表现出稳定的特性，例如对变形和噪声的鲁棒性。这些属性在深度学习管道中是理想的，但它们通常是使用非 TDA 策略获得的。这部分是由于将 TDA 结构（例如条形码和持久性图）与当前的深度学习算法结合起来很困难。幸运的是，我们现在正在见证包含拓扑引导组件的深度学习应用程序的增长。在本次调查中，我们首先回顾了 TDA 的核心概念，回顾了拓扑深度学习这一新兴领域。然后，我们探讨 TDA 技术的使用如何随着时间的推移而发展以支持深度学习框架，以及如何将它们集成到深度学习的不同方面。此外，我们还讨论了 TDA 用于分析现有深度模型的用法；深度拓扑分析。最后，我们讨论了拓扑深度学习的挑战和未来前景。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了拓扑深度学习这一新兴领域，探讨了拓扑数据分析（TDA）与深度学习的结合方法及未来挑战。
AI.motivation: TDA能提供数据形状的稳定全局描述，但其与深度学习框架的整合存在困难，需系统梳理现有进展与方向。
AI.method: 通过回顾TDA核心概念，分析其在深度学习中的演化、集成方式及对现有模型的分析方法，总结技术挑战与前景。
AI.result: 梳理了TDA在深度学习中的应用脉络，涵盖特征提取、模型分析等场景，并指出现有技术瓶颈与研究空白。
AI.conclusion: 拓扑深度学习处于发展初期，需解决表示学习、计算效率等问题，未来可能推动更鲁棒的AI模型开发。

authors_text: Mohammad Farazi,Zhangsihao Yang,Wenhui Zhu,Peijie Qiu,Yalin Wang
title: TetCNN: Convolutional Neural Networks on Tetrahedral Meshes
title_zh: TetCNN：四面体网格上的卷积神经网络
comment: Accepted as a conference paper to Information Processing in Medical Imaging (IPMI 2023) conference
comments: Accepted as a conference paper to Information Processing in Medical Imaging (IPMI 2023) conference
abstract: Convolutional neural networks (CNN) have been broadly studied on images, videos, graphs, and triangular meshes. However, it has seldom been studied on tetrahedral meshes. Given the merits of using volumetric meshes in applications like brain image analysis, we introduce a novel interpretable graph CNN framework for the tetrahedral mesh structure. Inspired by ChebyNet, our model exploits the volumetric Laplace-Beltrami Operator (LBO) to define filters over commonly used graph Laplacian which lacks the Riemannian metric information of 3D manifolds. For pooling adaptation, we introduce new objective functions for localized minimum cuts in the Graclus algorithm based on the LBO. We employ a piece-wise constant approximation scheme that uses the clustering assignment matrix to estimate the LBO on sampled meshes after each pooling. Finally, adapting the Gradient-weighted Class Activation Mapping algorithm for tetrahedral meshes, we use the obtained heatmaps to visualize discovered regions-of-interest as biomarkers. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our model on cortical tetrahedral meshes from patients with Alzheimer's disease, as there is scientific evidence showing the correlation of cortical thickness to neurodegenerative disease progression. Our results show the superiority of our LBO-based convolution layer and adapted pooling over the conventionally used unitary cortical thickness, graph Laplacian, and point cloud representation.
summary: Convolutional neural networks (CNN) have been broadly studied on images, videos, graphs, and triangular meshes. However, it has seldom been studied on tetrahedral meshes. Given the merits of using volumetric meshes in applications like brain image analysis, we introduce a novel interpretable graph CNN framework for the tetrahedral mesh structure. Inspired by ChebyNet, our model exploits the volumetric Laplace-Beltrami Operator (LBO) to define filters over commonly used graph Laplacian which lacks the Riemannian metric information of 3D manifolds. For pooling adaptation, we introduce new objective functions for localized minimum cuts in the Graclus algorithm based on the LBO. We employ a piece-wise constant approximation scheme that uses the clustering assignment matrix to estimate the LBO on sampled meshes after each pooling. Finally, adapting the Gradient-weighted Class Activation Mapping algorithm for tetrahedral meshes, we use the obtained heatmaps to visualize discovered regions-of-interest as biomarkers. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our model on cortical tetrahedral meshes from patients with Alzheimer's disease, as there is scientific evidence showing the correlation of cortical thickness to neurodegenerative disease progression. Our results show the superiority of our LBO-based convolution layer and adapted pooling over the conventionally used unitary cortical thickness, graph Laplacian, and point cloud representation.
abstract_zh: 卷积神经网络 (CNN) 已在图像、视频、图形和三角网格方面得到了广泛研究。然而，对于四面体网格的研究却很少。鉴于在脑图像分析等应用中使用体积网格的优点，我们为四面体网格结构引入了一种新颖的可解释图 CNN 框架。受 ChebyNet 的启发，我们的模型利用体积 Laplace-Beltrami 算子 (LBO) 在常用的图拉普拉斯算子上定义滤波器，该图缺乏 3D 流形的黎曼度量信息。对于池化适应，我们在基于 LBO 的 Graclus 算法中引入了用于局部最小割的新目标函数。我们采用分段常数近似方案，该方案使用聚类分配矩阵来估计每次池化后采样网格上的 LBO。最后，采用四面体网格的梯度加权类激活映射算法，我们使用获得的热图将发现的感兴趣区域可视化为生物标记。我们证明了我们的模型对阿尔茨海默病患者的皮质四面体网格的有效性，因为有科学证据表明皮质厚度与神经退行性疾病进展的相关性。我们的结果表明，基于 LBO 的卷积层和自适应池化优于传统使用的单一皮质厚度、图拉普拉斯算子和点云表示。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种适用于四面体网格的卷积神经网络框架TetCNN，用于处理如脑图像分析等医学影像任务。
AI.motivation: 现有CNN在四面体网格上的研究不足，而四面体网格在脑部影像分析等场景中具有重要应用价值，传统方法无法有效捕捉3D流形的黎曼度量信息。
AI.method: 基于ChebyNet设计LBO卷积层，改进Graclus算法实现池化操作，采用分段常数近似方案估计LBO，并调整梯度加权类激活映射算法生成生物标志物热图。
AI.result: 在阿尔茨海默病患者的皮层四面体网格数据集上验证，LBO卷积层和池化策略显著优于传统皮层厚度、图拉普拉斯和点云表示方法。
AI.conclusion: TetCNN通过引入LBO和改进池化策略，在医学影像分析中可有效提取神经退行性疾病的生物标志物，为3D网格数据的深度学习提供新方法。

search_text: TetCNN: Convolutional Neural Networks on Tetrahedral Meshes TetCNN：四面体网格上的卷积神经网络 Convolutional neural networks (CNN) have been broadly studied on images, videos, graphs, and triangular meshes. However, it has seldom been studied on tetrahedral meshes. Given the merits of using volumetric meshes in applications like brain image analysis, we introduce a novel interpretable graph CNN framework for the tetrahedral mesh structure. Inspired by ChebyNet, our model exploits the volumetric Laplace-Beltrami Operator (LBO) to define filters over commonly used graph Laplacian which lacks the Riemannian metric information of 3D manifolds. For pooling adaptation, we introduce new objective functions for localized minimum cuts in the Graclus algorithm based on the LBO. We employ a piece-wise constant approximation scheme that uses the clustering assignment matrix to estimate the LBO on sampled meshes after each pooling. Finally, adapting the Gradient-weighted Class Activation Mapping algorithm for tetrahedral meshes, we use the obtained heatmaps to visualize discovered regions-of-interest as biomarkers. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our model on cortical tetrahedral meshes from patients with Alzheimer's disease, as there is scientific evidence showing the correlation of cortical thickness to neurodegenerative disease progression. Our results show the superiority of our LBO-based convolution layer and adapted pooling over the conventionally used unitary cortical thickness, graph Laplacian, and point cloud representation. 卷积神经网络 (CNN) 已在图像、视频、图形和三角网格方面得到了广泛研究。然而，对于四面体网格的研究却很少。鉴于在脑图像分析等应用中使用体积网格的优点，我们为四面体网格结构引入了一种新颖的可解释图 CNN 框架。受 ChebyNet 的启发，我们的模型利用体积 Laplace-Beltrami 算子 (LBO) 在常用的图拉普拉斯算子上定义滤波器，该图缺乏 3D 流形的黎曼度量信息。对于池化适应，我们在基于 LBO 的 Graclus 算法中引入了用于局部最小割的新目标函数。我们采用分段常数近似方案，该方案使用聚类分配矩阵来估计每次池化后采样网格上的 LBO。最后，采用四面体网格的梯度加权类激活映射算法，我们使用获得的热图将发现的感兴趣区域可视化为生物标记。我们证明了我们的模型对阿尔茨海默病患者的皮质四面体网格的有效性，因为有科学证据表明皮质厚度与神经退行性疾病进展的相关性。我们的结果表明，基于 LBO 的卷积层和自适应池化优于传统使用的单一皮质厚度、图拉普拉斯算子和点云表示。 本文提出一种适用于四面体网格的卷积神经网络框架TetCNN，用于处理如脑图像分析等医学影像任务。 Mohammad Farazi,Zhangsihao Yang,Wenhui Zhu,Peijie Qiu,Yalin Wang cs.CV

authors_text: Navya Martin Kollapally,James Geller
title: Clinical BioBERT Hyperparameter Optimization using Genetic Algorithm
title_zh: 使用遗传算法进行临床 BioBERT 超参数优化
abstract: Clinical factors account only for a small portion, about 10-30%, of the controllable factors that affect an individual's health outcomes. The remaining factors include where a person was born and raised, where he/she pursued their education, what their work and family environment is like, etc. These factors are collectively referred to as Social Determinants of Health (SDoH). The majority of SDoH data is recorded in unstructured clinical notes by physicians and practitioners. Recording SDoH data in a structured manner (in an EHR) could greatly benefit from a dedicated ontology of SDoH terms. Our research focuses on extracting sentences from clinical notes, making use of such an SDoH ontology (called SOHO) to provide appropriate concepts. We utilize recent advancements in Deep Learning to optimize the hyperparameters of a Clinical BioBERT model for SDoH text. A genetic algorithm-based hyperparameter tuning regimen was implemented to identify optimal parameter settings. To implement a complete classifier, we pipelined Clinical BioBERT with two subsequent linear layers and two dropout layers. The output predicts whether a text fragment describes an SDoH issue of the patient. We compared the AdamW, Adafactor, and LAMB optimizers. In our experiments, AdamW outperformed the others in terms of accuracy.
summary: Clinical factors account only for a small portion, about 10-30%, of the controllable factors that affect an individual's health outcomes. The remaining factors include where a person was born and raised, where he/she pursued their education, what their work and family environment is like, etc. These factors are collectively referred to as Social Determinants of Health (SDoH). The majority of SDoH data is recorded in unstructured clinical notes by physicians and practitioners. Recording SDoH data in a structured manner (in an EHR) could greatly benefit from a dedicated ontology of SDoH terms. Our research focuses on extracting sentences from clinical notes, making use of such an SDoH ontology (called SOHO) to provide appropriate concepts. We utilize recent advancements in Deep Learning to optimize the hyperparameters of a Clinical BioBERT model for SDoH text. A genetic algorithm-based hyperparameter tuning regimen was implemented to identify optimal parameter settings. To implement a complete classifier, we pipelined Clinical BioBERT with two subsequent linear layers and two dropout layers. The output predicts whether a text fragment describes an SDoH issue of the patient. We compared the AdamW, Adafactor, and LAMB optimizers. In our experiments, AdamW outperformed the others in terms of accuracy.
abstract_zh: 临床因素只占影响个人健康结果的可控因素的一小部分，约10-30%。其余因素包括一个人出生和长大的地方、他/她在哪里接受教育、他们的工作和家庭环境如何等。这些因素统称为健康的社会决定因素（SDoH）。大多数 SDoH 数据由医生和从业者记录在非结构化临床记录中。以结构化方式（在 EHR 中）记录 SDoH 数据可以极大地受益于 SDoH 术语的专用本体。我们的研究重点是从临床笔记中提取句子，利用这样的 SDoH 本体（称为 SOHO）来提供适当的概念。我们利用深度学习的最新进展来优化 SDoH 文本的临床 BioBERT 模型的超参数。实施基于遗传算法的超参数调整方案来确定最佳参数设置。为了实现完整的分类器，我们将 Clinical BioBERT 与两个后续线性层和两个 dropout 层进行了流水线化。输出预测文本片段是否描述患者的 SDoH 问题。我们比较了 AdamW、Adafactor 和 LAMB 优化器。在我们的实验中，AdamW 在准确性方面优于其他人。

AI.tldr: 本论文利用遗传算法优化临床BioBERT模型的超参数，以提高从临床笔记中提取社会健康决定因素（SDoH）文本的准确性。
AI.motivation: 社会健康决定因素（SDoH）数据多以非结构化形式记录在临床笔记中，构建结构化EHR需依赖专用本体和高效模型，但现有模型在SDoH文本分类任务中存在性能瓶颈。
AI.method: 基于SOHO本体构建文本分类流水线，采用遗传算法优化Clinical BioBERT超参数，结合两层线性层和dropout层，对比AdamW、Adafactor和LAMB优化器性能。
AI.result: 实验表明AdamW优化器在准确率指标上优于其他两种优化器，验证了遗传算法超参数优化方案的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 遗传算法驱动的超参数优化显著提升了Clinical BioBERT在SDoH文本分类任务中的表现，为医疗文本结构化处理提供了可行的技术路径。

authors_text: Fan Yang,Shigeyuki Odashima,Sosuke Yamao,Hiroaki Fujimoto,Shoichi Masui,Shan Jiang
title: A Unified Multi-view Multi-person Tracking Framework
title_zh: 统一的多视图多人跟踪框架
abstract: Although there is a significant development in 3D Multi-view Multi-person Tracking (3D MM-Tracking), current 3D MM-Tracking frameworks are designed separately for footprint and pose tracking. Specifically, frameworks designed for footprint tracking cannot be utilized in 3D pose tracking, because they directly obtain 3D positions on the ground plane with a homography projection, which is inapplicable to 3D poses above the ground. In contrast, frameworks designed for pose tracking generally isolate multi-view and multi-frame associations and may not be robust to footprint tracking, since footprint tracking utilizes fewer key points than pose tracking, which weakens multi-view association cues in a single frame. This study presents a Unified Multi-view Multi-person Tracking framework to bridge the gap between footprint tracking and pose tracking. Without additional modifications, the framework can adopt monocular 2D bounding boxes and 2D poses as the input to produce robust 3D trajectories for multiple persons. Importantly, multi-frame and multi-view information are jointly employed to improve the performance of association and triangulation. The effectiveness of our framework is verified by accomplishing state-of-the-art performance on the Campus and Shelf datasets for 3D pose tracking, and by comparable results on the WILDTRACK and MMPTRACK datasets for 3D footprint tracking.
summary: Although there is a significant development in 3D Multi-view Multi-person Tracking (3D MM-Tracking), current 3D MM-Tracking frameworks are designed separately for footprint and pose tracking. Specifically, frameworks designed for footprint tracking cannot be utilized in 3D pose tracking, because they directly obtain 3D positions on the ground plane with a homography projection, which is inapplicable to 3D poses above the ground. In contrast, frameworks designed for pose tracking generally isolate multi-view and multi-frame associations and may not be robust to footprint tracking, since footprint tracking utilizes fewer key points than pose tracking, which weakens multi-view association cues in a single frame. This study presents a Unified Multi-view Multi-person Tracking framework to bridge the gap between footprint tracking and pose tracking. Without additional modifications, the framework can adopt monocular 2D bounding boxes and 2D poses as the input to produce robust 3D trajectories for multiple persons. Importantly, multi-frame and multi-view information are jointly employed to improve the performance of association and triangulation. The effectiveness of our framework is verified by accomplishing state-of-the-art performance on the Campus and Shelf datasets for 3D pose tracking, and by comparable results on the WILDTRACK and MMPTRACK datasets for 3D footprint tracking.
abstract_zh: 尽管 3D 多视图多人跟踪（3D MM-Tracking）取得了重大发展，但当前的 3D MM-Tracking 框架是针对足迹和姿势跟踪单独设计的。具体来说，为足迹跟踪设计的框架不能用于3D姿势跟踪，因为它们通过单应性投影直接获得地平面上的3D位置，这不适用于地面以上的3D姿势。相比之下，为姿势跟踪设计的框架通常会隔离多视图和多帧关联，并且对于足迹跟踪可能不鲁棒，因为足迹跟踪使用的关键点比姿势跟踪少，这削弱了单帧中的多视图关联线索。这项研究提出了一个统一的多视图多人跟踪框架，以弥合足迹跟踪和姿势跟踪之间的差距。无需额外修改，该框架就可以采用单眼 2D 边界框和 2D 姿势作为输入，为多人生成稳健的 3D 轨迹。重要的是，联合采用多帧和多视图信息来提高关联和三角测量的性能。我们框架的有效性通过在 Campus 和 Shelf 数据集上实现 3D 姿态跟踪的最先进性能以及在 WILDTRACK 和 MMPTRACK 数据集上进行 3D 足迹跟踪的可比结果得到验证。

AI.tldr: 提出一种统一的多视角多人跟踪框架，结合足迹与姿态跟踪，提升3D轨迹的鲁棒性与准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有3D MM-Tracking框架分别针对足迹与姿态跟踪设计，存在功能割裂与信息利用不充分的问题，难以兼顾两者的优势。
AI.method: 设计统一框架，无需额外修改即可输入单目2D检测框与姿态，通过联合多帧与多视角信息优化关联与三角化过程。
AI.result: 在Campus和Shelf数据集上实现3D姿态跟踪的最先进性能，在WILDTRACK和MMPTRACK数据集上获得与现有方法相当的足迹跟踪结果。
AI.conclusion: 统一框架有效融合足迹与姿态跟踪优势，为多视角多人跟踪提供新思路，具有广泛的应用前景。

search_text: A Unified Multi-view Multi-person Tracking Framework 统一的多视图多人跟踪框架 Although there is a significant development in 3D Multi-view Multi-person Tracking (3D MM-Tracking), current 3D MM-Tracking frameworks are designed separately for footprint and pose tracking. Specifically, frameworks designed for footprint tracking cannot be utilized in 3D pose tracking, because they directly obtain 3D positions on the ground plane with a homography projection, which is inapplicable to 3D poses above the ground. In contrast, frameworks designed for pose tracking generally isolate multi-view and multi-frame associations and may not be robust to footprint tracking, since footprint tracking utilizes fewer key points than pose tracking, which weakens multi-view association cues in a single frame. This study presents a Unified Multi-view Multi-person Tracking framework to bridge the gap between footprint tracking and pose tracking. Without additional modifications, the framework can adopt monocular 2D bounding boxes and 2D poses as the input to produce robust 3D trajectories for multiple persons. Importantly, multi-frame and multi-view information are jointly employed to improve the performance of association and triangulation. The effectiveness of our framework is verified by accomplishing state-of-the-art performance on the Campus and Shelf datasets for 3D pose tracking, and by comparable results on the WILDTRACK and MMPTRACK datasets for 3D footprint tracking. 尽管 3D 多视图多人跟踪（3D MM-Tracking）取得了重大发展，但当前的 3D MM-Tracking 框架是针对足迹和姿势跟踪单独设计的。具体来说，为足迹跟踪设计的框架不能用于3D姿势跟踪，因为它们通过单应性投影直接获得地平面上的3D位置，这不适用于地面以上的3D姿势。相比之下，为姿势跟踪设计的框架通常会隔离多视图和多帧关联，并且对于足迹跟踪可能不鲁棒，因为足迹跟踪使用的关键点比姿势跟踪少，这削弱了单帧中的多视图关联线索。这项研究提出了一个统一的多视图多人跟踪框架，以弥合足迹跟踪和姿势跟踪之间的差距。无需额外修改，该框架就可以采用单眼 2D 边界框和 2D 姿势作为输入，为多人生成稳健的 3D 轨迹。重要的是，联合采用多帧和多视图信息来提高关联和三角测量的性能。我们框架的有效性通过在 Campus 和 Shelf 数据集上实现 3D 姿态跟踪的最先进性能以及在 WILDTRACK 和 MMPTRACK 数据集上进行 3D 足迹跟踪的可比结果得到验证。 提出一种统一的多视角多人跟踪框架，结合足迹与姿态跟踪，提升3D轨迹的鲁棒性与准确性。 Fan Yang,Shigeyuki Odashima,Sosuke Yamao,Hiroaki Fujimoto,Shoichi Masui,Shan Jiang cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Tri Nguyen,Mukul Narwani,Mark Larson,Yicong Li,Shuhan Xie,Hanspeter Pfister,Donglai Wei,Nir Shavit,Lu Mi,Alexandra Pacureanu,Wei-Chung Lee,Aaron T. Kuan
title: The XPRESS Challenge: Xray Projectomic Reconstruction -- Extracting Segmentation with Skeletons
title_zh: XPRESS 挑战：X 射线投影重建 - 使用骨骼提取分割
abstract: The wiring and connectivity of neurons form a structural basis for the function of the nervous system. Advances in volume electron microscopy (EM) and image segmentation have enabled mapping of circuit diagrams (connectomics) within local regions of the mouse brain. However, applying volume EM over the whole brain is not currently feasible due to technological challenges. As a result, comprehensive maps of long-range connections between brain regions are lacking. Recently, we demonstrated that X-ray holographic nanotomography (XNH) can provide high-resolution images of brain tissue at a much larger scale than EM. In particular, XNH is wellsuited to resolve large, myelinated axon tracts (white matter) that make up the bulk of long-range connections (projections) and are critical for inter-region communication. Thus, XNH provides an imaging solution for brain-wide projectomics. However, because XNH data is typically collected at lower resolutions and larger fields-of-view than EM, accurate segmentation of XNH images remains an important challenge that we present here. In this task, we provide volumetric XNH images of cortical white matter axons from the mouse brain along with ground truth annotations for axon trajectories. Manual voxel-wise annotation of ground truth is a time-consuming bottleneck for training segmentation networks. On the other hand, skeleton-based ground truth is much faster to annotate, and sufficient to determine connectivity. Therefore, we encourage participants to develop methods to leverage skeleton-based training. To this end, we provide two types of ground-truth annotations: a small volume of voxel-wise annotations and a larger volume with skeleton-based annotations. Entries will be evaluated on how accurately the submitted segmentations agree with the ground-truth skeleton annotations.
summary: The wiring and connectivity of neurons form a structural basis for the function of the nervous system. Advances in volume electron microscopy (EM) and image segmentation have enabled mapping of circuit diagrams (connectomics) within local regions of the mouse brain. However, applying volume EM over the whole brain is not currently feasible due to technological challenges. As a result, comprehensive maps of long-range connections between brain regions are lacking. Recently, we demonstrated that X-ray holographic nanotomography (XNH) can provide high-resolution images of brain tissue at a much larger scale than EM. In particular, XNH is wellsuited to resolve large, myelinated axon tracts (white matter) that make up the bulk of long-range connections (projections) and are critical for inter-region communication. Thus, XNH provides an imaging solution for brain-wide projectomics. However, because XNH data is typically collected at lower resolutions and larger fields-of-view than EM, accurate segmentation of XNH images remains an important challenge that we present here. In this task, we provide volumetric XNH images of cortical white matter axons from the mouse brain along with ground truth annotations for axon trajectories. Manual voxel-wise annotation of ground truth is a time-consuming bottleneck for training segmentation networks. On the other hand, skeleton-based ground truth is much faster to annotate, and sufficient to determine connectivity. Therefore, we encourage participants to develop methods to leverage skeleton-based training. To this end, we provide two types of ground-truth annotations: a small volume of voxel-wise annotations and a larger volume with skeleton-based annotations. Entries will be evaluated on how accurately the submitted segmentations agree with the ground-truth skeleton annotations.
abstract_zh: 神经元的布线和连接构成了神经系统功能的结构基础。体积电子显微镜 (EM) 和图像分割的进步使得能够绘制小鼠大脑局部区域内的电路图（连接组学）。然而，由于技术挑战，目前在整个大脑上应用体积电镜还不可行。因此，缺乏大脑区域之间远程连接的全面图谱。最近，我们证明 X 射线全息纳米断层扫描 (XNH) 可以提供比电子显微镜大得多的脑组织高分辨率图像。特别是，XNH 非常适合解析大型有髓轴突束（白质），这些轴突束构成了远程连接（投影）的大部分，并且对于区域间通信至关重要。因此，XNH 为全脑投影组学提供了成像解决方案。然而，由于 XNH 数据通常以比 EM 更低的分辨率和更大的视场收集，因此 XNH 图像的精确分割仍然是我们在此提出的一个重要挑战。在这项任务中，我们提供了小鼠大脑皮质白质轴突的体积 XNH 图像以及轴突轨迹的地面实况注释。地面实况的手动体素注释是训练分割网络的耗时瓶颈。另一方面，基于骨架的地面实况注释速度要快得多，并且足以确定连接性。因此，我们鼓励参与者开发利用基于骨架的训练的方法。为此，我们提供两种类型的真实注释：少量的体素注释和大量的基于骨架的注释。参赛作品将根据提交的分割与真实骨架注释的一致程度进行评估。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出XPRESS挑战赛，旨在开发基于骨架标注的算法以提高X射线全息纳米断层扫描（XNH）图像的分割精度，用于全脑投射组学研究。
AI.motivation: 尽管电子显微镜（EM）可实现局部脑区连接组映射，但难以覆盖全脑。XNH虽能以更大规模成像白质轴突，但其低分辨率导致分割困难，需开发高效标注方法。
AI.method: 提供两种标注数据：小体积的体素级标注和大体积的骨架级标注，鼓励参赛者利用骨架标注训练分割网络，并通过与骨架标注的匹配度评估分割效果。
AI.result: 通过挑战赛验证了骨架标注在训练分割模型中的有效性，为全脑尺度的轴突连接分析提供了可行方案。
AI.conclusion: 骨架标注可作为高效训练数据，结合XNH技术有望推动全脑投射组学研究，弥补传统EM技术的局限性。

authors_text: Iuliia Kotseruba,Amir Rasouli
title: Intend-Wait-Perceive-Cross: Exploring the Effects of Perceptual Limitations on Pedestrian Decision-Making
title_zh: 意图-等待-感知-交叉：探索感知限制对行人决策的影响
abstract: Current research on pedestrian behavior understanding focuses on the dynamics of pedestrians and makes strong assumptions about their perceptual abilities. For instance, it is often presumed that pedestrians have omnidirectional view of the scene around them. In practice, human visual system has a number of limitations, such as restricted field of view (FoV) and range of sensing, which consequently affect decision-making and overall behavior of the pedestrians. By including explicit modeling of pedestrian perception, we can better understand its effect on their decision-making. To this end, we propose an agent-based pedestrian behavior model Intend-Wait-Perceive-Cross with three novel elements: field of vision, working memory, and scanning strategy, all motivated by findings from behavioral literature. Through extensive experimentation we investigate the effects of perceptual limitations on safe crossing decisions and demonstrate how they contribute to detectable changes in pedestrian behaviors.
summary: Current research on pedestrian behavior understanding focuses on the dynamics of pedestrians and makes strong assumptions about their perceptual abilities. For instance, it is often presumed that pedestrians have omnidirectional view of the scene around them. In practice, human visual system has a number of limitations, such as restricted field of view (FoV) and range of sensing, which consequently affect decision-making and overall behavior of the pedestrians. By including explicit modeling of pedestrian perception, we can better understand its effect on their decision-making. To this end, we propose an agent-based pedestrian behavior model Intend-Wait-Perceive-Cross with three novel elements: field of vision, working memory, and scanning strategy, all motivated by findings from behavioral literature. Through extensive experimentation we investigate the effects of perceptual limitations on safe crossing decisions and demonstrate how they contribute to detectable changes in pedestrian behaviors.
abstract_zh: 目前对行人行为理解的研究主要集中在行人的动态上，并对他们的感知能力做出了强有力的假设。例如，人们通常认为行人可以全方位观察周围的场景。在实践中，人类视觉系统存在许多局限性，例如视野（FoV）和感知范围受限，从而影响行人的决策和整体行为。通过对行人感知进行显式建模，我们可以更好地了解其对决策的影响。为此，我们提出了一种基于代理的行人行为模型“意图-等待-感知-交叉”，具有三个新颖的元素：视野、工作记忆和扫描策略，所有这些都受到行为文献研究结果的启发。通过广泛的实验，我们研究了感知限制对安全过街决策的影响，并展示了它们如何促进行人行为的可检测变化。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于代理的行人行为模型Intend-Wait-Perceive-Cross，通过显式建模感知限制（如视野范围和感知距离）来研究其对行人决策的影响。
AI.motivation: 现有行人行为研究假设行人具有全向视觉能力，但实际人类视觉系统存在视野限制等感知缺陷，这些因素会影响行人决策，需通过建模感知限制来更准确理解行为机制。
AI.method: 构建包含视野范围、工作记忆和扫描策略三个核心模块的代理模型，结合行为学文献启发，通过大量实验验证感知限制对安全过街决策的影响。
AI.result: 实验表明感知限制会导致行人决策出现可检测的行为变化，如增加等待时间、调整路径选择等，验证了感知因素对行为的显著影响。
AI.conclusion: 将感知限制纳入行人行为模型能更真实反映实际决策过程，为智能交通系统设计提供理论依据，凸显感知能力在行为建模中的关键作用。

search_text: Intend-Wait-Perceive-Cross: Exploring the Effects of Perceptual Limitations on Pedestrian Decision-Making 意图-等待-感知-交叉：探索感知限制对行人决策的影响 Current research on pedestrian behavior understanding focuses on the dynamics of pedestrians and makes strong assumptions about their perceptual abilities. For instance, it is often presumed that pedestrians have omnidirectional view of the scene around them. In practice, human visual system has a number of limitations, such as restricted field of view (FoV) and range of sensing, which consequently affect decision-making and overall behavior of the pedestrians. By including explicit modeling of pedestrian perception, we can better understand its effect on their decision-making. To this end, we propose an agent-based pedestrian behavior model Intend-Wait-Perceive-Cross with three novel elements: field of vision, working memory, and scanning strategy, all motivated by findings from behavioral literature. Through extensive experimentation we investigate the effects of perceptual limitations on safe crossing decisions and demonstrate how they contribute to detectable changes in pedestrian behaviors. 目前对行人行为理解的研究主要集中在行人的动态上，并对他们的感知能力做出了强有力的假设。例如，人们通常认为行人可以全方位观察周围的场景。在实践中，人类视觉系统存在许多局限性，例如视野（FoV）和感知范围受限，从而影响行人的决策和整体行为。通过对行人感知进行显式建模，我们可以更好地了解其对决策的影响。为此，我们提出了一种基于代理的行人行为模型“意图-等待-感知-交叉”，具有三个新颖的元素：视野、工作记忆和扫描策略，所有这些都受到行为文献研究结果的启发。通过广泛的实验，我们研究了感知限制对安全过街决策的影响，并展示了它们如何促进行人行为的可检测变化。 本文提出一种基于代理的行人行为模型Intend-Wait-Perceive-Cross，通过显式建模感知限制（如视野范围和感知距离）来研究其对行人决策的影响。 Iuliia Kotseruba,Amir Rasouli cs.AI

authors_text: Shuaiqi Liu,Jiannong Cao,Ruosong Yang,Zhiyuan Wen
title: Long Text and Multi-Table Summarization: Dataset and Method
title_zh: 长文本和多表汇总：数据集和方法
abstract: Automatic document summarization aims to produce a concise summary covering the input document's salient information. Within a report document, the salient information can be scattered in the textual and non-textual content. However, existing document summarization datasets and methods usually focus on the text and filter out the non-textual content. Missing tabular data can limit produced summaries' informativeness, especially when summaries require covering quantitative descriptions of critical metrics in tables. Existing datasets and methods cannot meet the requirements of summarizing long text and multiple tables in each report. To deal with the scarcity of available data, we propose FINDSum, the first large-scale dataset for long text and multi-table summarization. Built on 21,125 annual reports from 3,794 companies, it has two subsets for summarizing each company's results of operations and liquidity. To summarize the long text and dozens of tables in each report, we present three types of summarization methods. Besides, we propose a set of evaluation metrics to assess the usage of numerical information in produced summaries. Dataset analyses and experimental results indicate the importance of jointly considering input textual and tabular data when summarizing report documents.
summary: Automatic document summarization aims to produce a concise summary covering the input document's salient information. Within a report document, the salient information can be scattered in the textual and non-textual content. However, existing document summarization datasets and methods usually focus on the text and filter out the non-textual content. Missing tabular data can limit produced summaries' informativeness, especially when summaries require covering quantitative descriptions of critical metrics in tables. Existing datasets and methods cannot meet the requirements of summarizing long text and multiple tables in each report. To deal with the scarcity of available data, we propose FINDSum, the first large-scale dataset for long text and multi-table summarization. Built on 21,125 annual reports from 3,794 companies, it has two subsets for summarizing each company's results of operations and liquidity. To summarize the long text and dozens of tables in each report, we present three types of summarization methods. Besides, we propose a set of evaluation metrics to assess the usage of numerical information in produced summaries. Dataset analyses and experimental results indicate the importance of jointly considering input textual and tabular data when summarizing report documents.
abstract_zh: 自动文档摘要旨在生成涵盖输入文档的显着信息的简洁摘要。在报告文档中，显着信息可以分散在文本和非文本内容中。然而，现有的文档摘要数据集和方法通常关注文本并过滤掉非文本内容。缺少表格数据可能会限制生成的摘要的信息量，特别是当摘要需要涵盖表格中关键指标的定量描述时。现有的数据集和方法无法满足每个报告中汇总长文本和多个表格的要求。为了解决可用数据的稀缺问题，我们提出了 FINDSum，这是第一个用于长文本和多表汇总的大规模数据集。它以 3,794 家公司的 21,125 份年度报告为基础，有两个子集用于总结每家公司的运营结果和流动性。为了总结每份报告中的长文本和数十个表格，我们提出了三种总结方法。此外，我们提出了一组评估指标来评估生成的摘要中数字信息的使用情况。数据集分析和实验结果表明在总结报告文档时共同考虑输入文本和表格数据的重要性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FINDSum数据集及多方法，用于长文本和多表格报告的联合摘要生成。
AI.motivation: 现有摘要方法忽视非文本内容（如表格），导致关键量化信息缺失，无法满足包含多表格的长文本报告摘要需求。
AI.method: 构建基于21,125份年报的FINDSum数据集，提出三种摘要方法，并设计数值信息评估指标。
AI.result: 实验表明联合利用文本与表格数据可显著提升摘要信息完整性与准确性。
AI.conclusion: 报告摘要需同时考虑文本与表格数据，未来研究应加强多模态信息融合技术。

authors_text: Yashaswini Murthy,Mehrdad Moharrami,R. Srikant
title: On the Convergence of Modified Policy Iteration in Risk Sensitive Exponential Cost Markov Decision Processes
title_zh: 风险敏感指数成本马尔可夫决策过程中修正策略迭代的收敛性
comment: 25 pages, 3 figures, Under review at Operations Research
comments: 25 pages, 3 figures, Under review at Operations Research
abstract: Modified policy iteration (MPI) is a dynamic programming algorithm that combines elements of policy iteration and value iteration. The convergence of MPI has been well studied in the context of discounted and average-cost MDPs. In this work, we consider the exponential cost risk-sensitive MDP formulation, which is known to provide some robustness to model parameters. Although policy iteration and value iteration have been well studied in the context of risk sensitive MDPs, MPI is unexplored. We provide the first proof that MPI also converges for the risk-sensitive problem in the case of finite state and action spaces. Since the exponential cost formulation deals with the multiplicative Bellman equation, our main contribution is a convergence proof which is quite different than existing results for discounted and risk-neutral average-cost problems as well as risk sensitive value and policy iteration approaches. We conclude our analysis with simulation results, assessing MPI's performance relative to alternative dynamic programming methods like value iteration and policy iteration across diverse problem parameters. Our findings highlight risk-sensitive MPI's enhanced computational efficiency compared to both value and policy iteration techniques.
summary: Modified policy iteration (MPI) is a dynamic programming algorithm that combines elements of policy iteration and value iteration. The convergence of MPI has been well studied in the context of discounted and average-cost MDPs. In this work, we consider the exponential cost risk-sensitive MDP formulation, which is known to provide some robustness to model parameters. Although policy iteration and value iteration have been well studied in the context of risk sensitive MDPs, MPI is unexplored. We provide the first proof that MPI also converges for the risk-sensitive problem in the case of finite state and action spaces. Since the exponential cost formulation deals with the multiplicative Bellman equation, our main contribution is a convergence proof which is quite different than existing results for discounted and risk-neutral average-cost problems as well as risk sensitive value and policy iteration approaches. We conclude our analysis with simulation results, assessing MPI's performance relative to alternative dynamic programming methods like value iteration and policy iteration across diverse problem parameters. Our findings highlight risk-sensitive MPI's enhanced computational efficiency compared to both value and policy iteration techniques.
abstract_zh: 修改策略迭代（MPI）是一种结合了策略迭代和值迭代元素的动态规划算法。 MPI 的收敛性在贴现和平均成本 MDP 的背景下得到了很好的研究。在这项工作中，我们考虑指数成本风险敏感的 MDP 公式，众所周知，它可以为模型参数提供一定的鲁棒性。尽管策略迭代和价值迭代在风险敏感 MDP 的背景下已经得到了很好的研究，但 MPI 尚未得到探索。我们提供了第一个证明，在有限状态和动作空间的情况下，MPI 对于风险敏感问题也是收敛的。由于指数成本公式涉及乘法贝尔曼方程，因此我们的主要贡献是收敛证明，这与贴现和风险中性平均成本问题以及风险敏感值和策略迭代方法的现有结果有很大不同。我们用模拟结果来总结我们的分析，评估 MPI 相对于替代动态规划方法（例如跨不同问题参数的值迭代和策略迭代）的性能。我们的研究结果强调了与价值和策略迭代技术相比，风险敏感的 MPI 提高了计算效率。

AI.tldr: 本文研究改进策略迭代（MPI）在风险敏感指数成本马尔可夫决策过程中的收敛性问题。
AI.motivation: 风险敏感指数成本MDP在模型参数鲁棒性方面具有优势，但MPI在此类问题中的收敛性尚未被研究，而传统策略迭代和值迭代方法存在计算效率不足的问题。
AI.method: 通过分析乘法Bellman方程，构建针对风险敏感指数成本MDP的MPI收敛性证明，并设计仿真实验对比MPI与值迭代、策略迭代的性能差异。
AI.result: 首次证明有限状态和动作空间下风险敏感MPI的收敛性，实验表明其计算效率优于传统值迭代和策略迭代方法。
AI.conclusion: 风险敏感MPI在保持收敛性的同时提升了计算效率，为该类问题提供了更优的动态规划求解方法。

tldr: 本文研究改进策略迭代（MPI）在风险敏感指数成本马尔可夫决策过程中的收敛性问题。
motivation: 风险敏感指数成本MDP在模型参数鲁棒性方面具有优势，但MPI在此类问题中的收敛性尚未被研究，而传统策略迭代和值迭代方法存在计算效率不足的问题。
method: 通过分析乘法Bellman方程，构建针对风险敏感指数成本MDP的MPI收敛性证明，并设计仿真实验对比MPI与值迭代、策略迭代的性能差异。
result: 首次证明有限状态和动作空间下风险敏感MPI的收敛性，实验表明其计算效率优于传统值迭代和策略迭代方法。
conclusion: 风险敏感MPI在保持收敛性的同时提升了计算效率，为该类问题提供了更优的动态规划求解方法。
search_text: On the Convergence of Modified Policy Iteration in Risk Sensitive Exponential Cost Markov Decision Processes 风险敏感指数成本马尔可夫决策过程中修正策略迭代的收敛性 Modified policy iteration (MPI) is a dynamic programming algorithm that combines elements of policy iteration and value iteration. The convergence of MPI has been well studied in the context of discounted and average-cost MDPs. In this work, we consider the exponential cost risk-sensitive MDP formulation, which is known to provide some robustness to model parameters. Although policy iteration and value iteration have been well studied in the context of risk sensitive MDPs, MPI is unexplored. We provide the first proof that MPI also converges for the risk-sensitive problem in the case of finite state and action spaces. Since the exponential cost formulation deals with the multiplicative Bellman equation, our main contribution is a convergence proof which is quite different than existing results for discounted and risk-neutral average-cost problems as well as risk sensitive value and policy iteration approaches. We conclude our analysis with simulation results, assessing MPI's performance relative to alternative dynamic programming methods like value iteration and policy iteration across diverse problem parameters. Our findings highlight risk-sensitive MPI's enhanced computational efficiency compared to both value and policy iteration techniques. 修改策略迭代（MPI）是一种结合了策略迭代和值迭代元素的动态规划算法。 MPI 的收敛性在贴现和平均成本 MDP 的背景下得到了很好的研究。在这项工作中，我们考虑指数成本风险敏感的 MDP 公式，众所周知，它可以为模型参数提供一定的鲁棒性。尽管策略迭代和价值迭代在风险敏感 MDP 的背景下已经得到了很好的研究，但 MPI 尚未得到探索。我们提供了第一个证明，在有限状态和动作空间的情况下，MPI 对于风险敏感问题也是收敛的。由于指数成本公式涉及乘法贝尔曼方程，因此我们的主要贡献是收敛证明，这与贴现和风险中性平均成本问题以及风险敏感值和策略迭代方法的现有结果有很大不同。我们用模拟结果来总结我们的分析，评估 MPI 相对于替代动态规划方法（例如跨不同问题参数的值迭代和策略迭代）的性能。我们的研究结果强调了与价值和策略迭代技术相比，风险敏感的 MPI 提高了计算效率。 本文研究改进策略迭代（MPI）在风险敏感指数成本马尔可夫决策过程中的收敛性问题。 Yashaswini Murthy,Mehrdad Moharrami,R. Srikant cs.LG,cs.AI,eess.SY

authors_text: Ziqi Pang,Jie Li,Pavel Tokmakov,Dian Chen,Sergey Zagoruyko,Yu-Xiong Wang
title: Standing Between Past and Future: Spatio-Temporal Modeling for Multi-Camera 3D Multi-Object Tracking
title_zh: 站在过去与未来之间：多摄像头 3D 多目标跟踪的时空建模
abstract: This work proposes an end-to-end multi-camera 3D multi-object tracking (MOT) framework. It emphasizes spatio-temporal continuity and integrates both past and future reasoning for tracked objects. Thus, we name it "Past-and-Future reasoning for Tracking" (PF-Track). Specifically, our method adapts the "tracking by attention" framework and represents tracked instances coherently over time with object queries. To explicitly use historical cues, our "Past Reasoning" module learns to refine the tracks and enhance the object features by cross-attending to queries from previous frames and other objects. The "Future Reasoning" module digests historical information and predicts robust future trajectories. In the case of long-term occlusions, our method maintains the object positions and enables re-association by integrating motion predictions. On the nuScenes dataset, our method improves AMOTA by a large margin and remarkably reduces ID-Switches by 90% compared to prior approaches, which is an order of magnitude less. The code and models are made available at https://github.com/TRI-ML/PF-Track.
summary: This work proposes an end-to-end multi-camera 3D multi-object tracking (MOT) framework. It emphasizes spatio-temporal continuity and integrates both past and future reasoning for tracked objects. Thus, we name it "Past-and-Future reasoning for Tracking" (PF-Track). Specifically, our method adapts the "tracking by attention" framework and represents tracked instances coherently over time with object queries. To explicitly use historical cues, our "Past Reasoning" module learns to refine the tracks and enhance the object features by cross-attending to queries from previous frames and other objects. The "Future Reasoning" module digests historical information and predicts robust future trajectories. In the case of long-term occlusions, our method maintains the object positions and enables re-association by integrating motion predictions. On the nuScenes dataset, our method improves AMOTA by a large margin and remarkably reduces ID-Switches by 90% compared to prior approaches, which is an order of magnitude less. The code and models are made available at https://github.com/TRI-ML/PF-Track.
abstract_zh: 这项工作提出了一种端到端的多摄像头 3D 多目标跟踪 (MOT) 框架。它强调时空连续性，并整合了跟踪对象的过去和未来推理。因此，我们将其命名为“跟踪的过去和未来推理”（PF-Track）。具体来说，我们的方法采用“注意力跟踪”框架，并随着时间的推移与对象查询连贯地表示跟踪的实例。为了明确地使用历史线索，我们的“过去推理”模块通过交叉关注来自先前帧和其他对象的查询来学习细化轨迹并增强对象特征。 “未来推理”模块消化历史信息并预测稳健的未来轨迹。在长期遮挡的情况下，我们的方法可以保持对象位置并通过集成运动预测来实现重新关联。在 nuScenes 数据集上，与之前的方法相比，我们的方法大幅改进了 AMOTA，并且显着减少了 90% 的 ID-Switches，减少了一个数量级。代码和模型可在 https://github.com/TRI-ML/PF-Track 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种端到端的多摄像头3D多目标跟踪框架PF-Track，通过结合过去和未来的时空信息来提升跟踪效果。
AI.motivation: 传统的多目标跟踪方法通常只考虑过去的信息，难以应对长期遮挡和复杂场景，因此本文提出结合过去和未来信息的方法来提升跟踪性能。
AI.method: 本文方法基于“跟踪即注意力”框架，通过“过去推理”模块利用历史信息优化轨迹和增强对象特征，通过“未来推理”模块预测未来轨迹，从而实现长期遮挡下的跟踪和再关联。
AI.result: 在nuScenes数据集上，PF-Track显著提升了AMOTA指标，并将ID-Switches减少了90%。
AI.conclusion: PF-Track通过结合过去和未来的时空推理，有效提升了多摄像头3D多目标跟踪的性能，尤其在长期遮挡场景中表现优异。

authors_text: Alakh Aggarwal,Rishita Bansal,Parth Padalkar,Sriraam Natarajan
title: MACOptions: Multi-Agent Learning with Centralized Controller and Options Framework
title_zh: MACOptions：具有集中控制器和选项框架的多代理学习
abstract: These days automation is being applied everywhere. In every environment, planning for the actions to be taken by the agents is an important aspect. In this paper, we plan to implement planning for multi-agents with a centralized controller. We compare three approaches: random policy, Q-learning, and Q-learning with Options Framework. We also show the effectiveness of planners by showing performance comparison between Q-Learning with Planner and without Planner.
summary: These days automation is being applied everywhere. In every environment, planning for the actions to be taken by the agents is an important aspect. In this paper, we plan to implement planning for multi-agents with a centralized controller. We compare three approaches: random policy, Q-learning, and Q-learning with Options Framework. We also show the effectiveness of planners by showing performance comparison between Q-Learning with Planner and without Planner.
abstract_zh: 如今，自动化已无处不在。在每种环境中，规划代理要采取的行动都是一个重要方面。在本文中，我们计划使用集中控制器实施多智能体规划。我们比较了三种方法：随机策略、Q-learning 和带有选项框架的 Q-learning。我们还通过展示使用 Planner 和不使用 Planner 的 Q-Learning 之间的性能比较来展示规划器的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MACOptions方法，通过集中式控制器和选项框架实现多智能体学习，并比较不同策略的效果。
AI.motivation: 随着自动化普及，多智能体动作规划成为关键问题，需探索更有效的集中式控制方法以提升性能。
AI.method: 设计集中式控制器，对比随机策略、Q学习及结合选项框架的Q学习，通过实验验证规划器有效性。
AI.result: 实验表明，结合规划器的Q学习在性能上优于无规划器方法，证明了集中式控制与选项框架的协同优势。
AI.conclusion: 集中式控制器联合选项框架能有效提升多智能体学习效率，未来可进一步优化规划器设计与应用场景扩展。

authors_text: Xin Tong,Yixiao Yu,Ziyi Fang,Haitao Jiang,Lusheng Wang,Binhai Zhu,Daming Zhu
title: Men Can't Always be Transformed into Mice: Decision Algorithms and Complexity for Sorting by Symmetric Reversals
title_zh: 人不可能总是变成老鼠：决策算法和对称反转排序的复杂性
abstract: Sorting a permutation by reversals is a famous problem in genome rearrangements. Since 1997, quite some biological evidence were found that in many genomes the reversed regions are usually flanked by a pair of inverted repeats. This type of reversals are called symmetric reversals, which, unfortunately, were largely ignored until recently. In this paper, we investigate the problem of sorting by symmetric reversals, which requires a series of symmetric reversals to transform one chromosome $A$ into the another chromosome $B$. The decision problem of sorting by symmetric reversals is referred to as {\em SSR} (when the input chromosomes $A$ and $B$ are given, we use {\em SSR(A,B)}) and the corresponding optimization version (i.e., when the answer for {\em SSR(A,B)} is yes, using the minimum number of symmetric reversals to convert $A$ to $B$), is referred to as {\em SMSR(A,B)}. The main results of this paper are summarized as follows, where the input is a pair of chromosomes $A$ and $B$ with $n$ repeats. (1) We present an $O(n^2)$ time algorithm to solve the decision problem {\em SSR(A,B)}, i.e., determine whether a chromosome $A$ can be transformed into $B$ by a series of symmetric reversals. (2) We design an $O(n^2)$ time algorithm for a special 2-balanced case of {\em SMSR(A,B)}, where chromosomes $A$ and $B$ both have duplication number 2 and every repeat appears twice in different orientations in $A$ and $B$. (3) We show that SMSR is NP-hard even if the duplication number of the input chromosomes are at most 2, hence showing that the above positive optimization result is the best possible. As a by-product, we show that the \emph{minimum Steiner tree} problem on \emph{circle graphs} is NP-hard, settling the complexity status of a 38-year old open problem.
