(3) We show that SMSR is NP-hard even if the duplication number of the input chromosomes are at most 2, hence showing that the above positive optimization result is the best possible. As a by-product, we show that the \emph{minimum Steiner tree} problem on \emph{circle graphs} is NP-hard, settling the complexity status of a 38-year old open problem.
abstract_zh: 通过反转对排列进行排序是基因组重排中的一个著名问题。自1997年以来，已经发现相当多的生物学证据表明，在许多基因组中，反向区域的两侧通常有一对反向重复序列。这种类型的反转被称为对称反转，不幸的是，直到最近它才被很大程度上忽视。在本文中，我们研究了对称反转排序问题，这需要一系列对称反转将一条染色体 $A$ 转换为另一条染色体 $B$。通过对称反转排序的决策问题被称为 {\em SSR}（当给定输入染色体 $A$ 和 $B$ 时，我们使用 {\em SSR(A,B)}）和相应的优化版本（即，当 {\em SSR(A,B)} 的答案为是时，使用最小数量的对称反转将 $A$ 转换为 $B$），被称为 {\em SMSR(A,B)}。本文的主要结果总结如下，其中输入是一对具有$n$重复的染色体$A$和$B$。 (1) 我们提出了一个 $O(n^2)$ 时间算法来解决决策问题 {\em SSR(A,B)}，即确定染色体 $A$ 是否可以通过一系列对称反转转化为 $B$。 (2) 我们为 {\em SMSR(A,B)} 的特殊 2 平衡情况设计了 $O(n^2)$ 时间算法，其中染色体 $A$ 和 $B$ 的重复数均为 2，并且每个重复在 $A$ 和 $B$ 中以不同方向出现两次。 (3)我们证明，即使输入染色体的重复数最多为2，SMSR也是NP难的，因此表明上述正优化结果是最好的。作为副产品，我们证明了 \emph{圆图} 上的 \emph{最小斯坦纳树} 问题是 NP 困难的，解决了 38 年历史的开放问题的复杂性状态。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了通过对称反转排序染色体的决策和优化问题，分析其算法复杂性。
AI.motivation: 生物证据表明许多基因组中的反转区域通常由反向重复序列包围，但对称反转的研究长期被忽视，需探索其计算复杂性及算法。
AI.method: 提出O(n²)时间算法解决SSR决策问题，设计特殊2-平衡情况下的SMSR优化算法，并证明SMSR在重复数≤2时的NP难性。
AI.result: 实现SSR决策问题的O(n²)算法，解决特定SMSR子问题，证明SMSR的NP难性，并证明圆图Steiner树问题的NP难性。
AI.conclusion: 对称反转排序问题在特定条件下可高效求解，但一般情况具有计算复杂性，同时解决了图论领域长期未决的问题。

search_text: Men Can't Always be Transformed into Mice: Decision Algorithms and Complexity for Sorting by Symmetric Reversals 人不可能总是变成老鼠：决策算法和对称反转排序的复杂性 Sorting a permutation by reversals is a famous problem in genome rearrangements. Since 1997, quite some biological evidence were found that in many genomes the reversed regions are usually flanked by a pair of inverted repeats. This type of reversals are called symmetric reversals, which, unfortunately, were largely ignored until recently. In this paper, we investigate the problem of sorting by symmetric reversals, which requires a series of symmetric reversals to transform one chromosome $A$ into the another chromosome $B$. The decision problem of sorting by symmetric reversals is referred to as {\em SSR} (when the input chromosomes $A$ and $B$ are given, we use {\em SSR(A,B)}) and the corresponding optimization version (i.e., when the answer for {\em SSR(A,B)} is yes, using the minimum number of symmetric reversals to convert $A$ to $B$), is referred to as {\em SMSR(A,B)}. The main results of this paper are summarized as follows, where the input is a pair of chromosomes $A$ and $B$ with $n$ repeats. (1) We present an $O(n^2)$ time algorithm to solve the decision problem {\em SSR(A,B)}, i.e., determine whether a chromosome $A$ can be transformed into $B$ by a series of symmetric reversals. (2) We design an $O(n^2)$ time algorithm for a special 2-balanced case of {\em SMSR(A,B)}, where chromosomes $A$ and $B$ both have duplication number 2 and every repeat appears twice in different orientations in $A$ and $B$. (3) We show that SMSR is NP-hard even if the duplication number of the input chromosomes are at most 2, hence showing that the above positive optimization result is the best possible. As a by-product, we show that the \emph{minimum Steiner tree} problem on \emph{circle graphs} is NP-hard, settling the complexity status of a 38-year old open problem. 通过反转对排列进行排序是基因组重排中的一个著名问题。自1997年以来，已经发现相当多的生物学证据表明，在许多基因组中，反向区域的两侧通常有一对反向重复序列。这种类型的反转被称为对称反转，不幸的是，直到最近它才被很大程度上忽视。在本文中，我们研究了对称反转排序问题，这需要一系列对称反转将一条染色体 $A$ 转换为另一条染色体 $B$。通过对称反转排序的决策问题被称为 {\em SSR}（当给定输入染色体 $A$ 和 $B$ 时，我们使用 {\em SSR(A,B)}）和相应的优化版本（即，当 {\em SSR(A,B)} 的答案为是时，使用最小数量的对称反转将 $A$ 转换为 $B$），被称为 {\em SMSR(A,B)}。本文的主要结果总结如下，其中输入是一对具有$n$重复的染色体$A$和$B$。 (1) 我们提出了一个 $O(n^2)$ 时间算法来解决决策问题 {\em SSR(A,B)}，即确定染色体 $A$ 是否可以通过一系列对称反转转化为 $B$。 (2) 我们为 {\em SMSR(A,B)} 的特殊 2 平衡情况设计了 $O(n^2)$ 时间算法，其中染色体 $A$ 和 $B$ 的重复数均为 2，并且每个重复在 $A$ 和 $B$ 中以不同方向出现两次。 (3)我们证明，即使输入染色体的重复数最多为2，SMSR也是NP难的，因此表明上述正优化结果是最好的。作为副产品，我们证明了 \emph{圆图} 上的 \emph{最小斯坦纳树} 问题是 NP 困难的，解决了 38 年历史的开放问题的复杂性状态。 本文研究了通过对称反转排序染色体的决策和优化问题，分析其算法复杂性。 Xin Tong,Yixiao Yu,Ziyi Fang,Haitao Jiang,Lusheng Wang,Binhai Zhu,Daming Zhu cs.DS

authors_text: Yangxiao Lu,Ninad Khargonkar,Zesheng Xu,Charles Averill,Kamalesh Palanisamy,Kaiyu Hang,Yunhui Guo,Nicholas Ruozzi,Yu Xiang
title: Self-Supervised Unseen Object Instance Segmentation via Long-Term Robot Interaction
title_zh: 通过长期机器人交互进行自我监督的看不见的对象实例分割
abstract: We introduce a novel robotic system for improving unseen object instance segmentation in the real world by leveraging long-term robot interaction with objects. Previous approaches either grasp or push an object and then obtain the segmentation mask of the grasped or pushed object after one action. Instead, our system defers the decision on segmenting objects after a sequence of robot pushing actions. By applying multi-object tracking and video object segmentation on the images collected via robot pushing, our system can generate segmentation masks of all the objects in these images in a self-supervised way. These include images where objects are very close to each other, and segmentation errors usually occur on these images for existing object segmentation networks. We demonstrate the usefulness of our system by fine-tuning segmentation networks trained on synthetic data with real-world data collected by our system. We show that, after fine-tuning, the segmentation accuracy of the networks is significantly improved both in the same domain and across different domains. In addition, we verify that the fine-tuned networks improve top-down robotic grasping of unseen objects in the real world.
summary: We introduce a novel robotic system for improving unseen object instance segmentation in the real world by leveraging long-term robot interaction with objects. Previous approaches either grasp or push an object and then obtain the segmentation mask of the grasped or pushed object after one action. Instead, our system defers the decision on segmenting objects after a sequence of robot pushing actions. By applying multi-object tracking and video object segmentation on the images collected via robot pushing, our system can generate segmentation masks of all the objects in these images in a self-supervised way. These include images where objects are very close to each other, and segmentation errors usually occur on these images for existing object segmentation networks. We demonstrate the usefulness of our system by fine-tuning segmentation networks trained on synthetic data with real-world data collected by our system. We show that, after fine-tuning, the segmentation accuracy of the networks is significantly improved both in the same domain and across different domains. In addition, we verify that the fine-tuned networks improve top-down robotic grasping of unseen objects in the real world.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了一种新颖的机器人系统，通过利用机器人与物体的长期交互来改善现实世界中看不见的物体实例分割。先前的方法要么抓住或推动一个对象，然后在一个动作后获得所抓住或推动的对象的分割掩模。相反，我们的系统在一系列机器人推动动作之后推迟了分割对象的决定。通过对机器人推送收集的图像应用多对象跟踪和视频对象分割，我们的系统可以以自我监督的方式生成这些图像中所有对象的分割掩模。这些包括对象彼此非常接近的图像，对于现有的对象分割网络，这些图像上通常会出现分割错误。我们通过使用我们的系统收集的真实世界数据对合成数据训练的分割网络进行微调来证明我们系统的实用性。我们表明，经过微调后，网络的分割精度在同一域和不同域中均得到显着提高。此外，我们验证了微调网络可以改善机器人对现实世界中看不见的物体的自上而下的抓取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过长期机器人交互实现自监督未见物体实例分割的新系统，利用多物体跟踪和视频分割技术提升分割精度。
AI.motivation: 传统分割方法在处理紧密接触物体或未见物体时存在误差，且依赖人工标注数据，难以适应现实场景的动态变化。
AI.method: 系统通过序列机器人推动动作收集图像，结合多物体跟踪与视频对象分割技术，自监督生成分割掩码，并用真实数据微调合成数据训练的分割网络。
AI.result: 微调后网络在相同及跨领域任务中分割准确率显著提升，且增强了机器人对未见物体的抓取能力。
AI.conclusion: 长期交互与自监督学习有效提升未见物体分割性能，为现实场景的机器人视觉任务提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Jacopo Teneggi,Matthew Tivnan,J. Webster Stayman,Jeremias Sulam
title: How to Trust Your Diffusion Model: A Convex Optimization Approach to Conformal Risk Control
title_zh: 如何信任您的扩散模型：保形风险控制的凸优化方法
abstract: Score-based generative modeling, informally referred to as diffusion models, continue to grow in popularity across several important domains and tasks. While they provide high-quality and diverse samples from empirical distributions, important questions remain on the reliability and trustworthiness of these sampling procedures for their responsible use in critical scenarios. Conformal prediction is a modern tool to construct finite-sample, distribution-free uncertainty guarantees for any black-box predictor. In this work, we focus on image-to-image regression tasks and we present a generalization of the Risk-Controlling Prediction Sets (RCPS) procedure, that we term $K$-RCPS, which allows to $(i)$ provide entrywise calibrated intervals for future samples of any diffusion model, and $(ii)$ control a certain notion of risk with respect to a ground truth image with minimal mean interval length. Differently from existing conformal risk control procedures, ours relies on a novel convex optimization approach that allows for multidimensional risk control while provably minimizing the mean interval length. We illustrate our approach on two real-world image denoising problems: on natural images of faces as well as on computed tomography (CT) scans of the abdomen, demonstrating state of the art performance.
summary: Score-based generative modeling, informally referred to as diffusion models, continue to grow in popularity across several important domains and tasks. While they provide high-quality and diverse samples from empirical distributions, important questions remain on the reliability and trustworthiness of these sampling procedures for their responsible use in critical scenarios. Conformal prediction is a modern tool to construct finite-sample, distribution-free uncertainty guarantees for any black-box predictor. In this work, we focus on image-to-image regression tasks and we present a generalization of the Risk-Controlling Prediction Sets (RCPS) procedure, that we term $K$-RCPS, which allows to $(i)$ provide entrywise calibrated intervals for future samples of any diffusion model, and $(ii)$ control a certain notion of risk with respect to a ground truth image with minimal mean interval length. Differently from existing conformal risk control procedures, ours relies on a novel convex optimization approach that allows for multidimensional risk control while provably minimizing the mean interval length. We illustrate our approach on two real-world image denoising problems: on natural images of faces as well as on computed tomography (CT) scans of the abdomen, demonstrating state of the art performance.
abstract_zh: 基于分数的生成模型（非正式地称为扩散模型）在几个重要领域和任务中继续流行。虽然它们提供了来自经验分布的高质量和多样化的样本，但重要的问题仍然是这些采样程序在关键场景中负责任使用的可靠性和可信度。保形预测是一种现代工具，可为任何黑盒预测器构建有限样本、无分布的不确定性保证。在这项工作中，我们专注于图像到图像的回归任务，并提出了风险控制预测集（RCPS）过程的概括，我们称之为 $K$-RCPS，它允许 $(i)$ 为任何扩散模型的未来样本提供逐项校准间隔，并且 $(ii)$ 控制相对于具有最小平均间隔长度的地面实况图像的特定风险概念。与现有的共形风险控制程序不同，我们的程序依赖于一种新颖的凸优化方法，该方法允许多维风险控制，同时可证明最小化平均间隔长度。我们展示了我们针对两个现实世界图像去噪问题的方法：面部自然图像以及腹部计算机断层扫描 (CT) 扫描，展示了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于凸优化的符合风险控制方法，用于提高扩散模型在图像到图像回归任务中的可靠性。
AI.motivation: 扩散模型虽能生成高质量样本，但其在关键场景中的可靠性和可信赖性尚未得到充分保障，需通过不确定性量化方法提升其可信度。
AI.method: 提出一种名为K-RCPS的通用风险控制方法，通过凸优化实现多维风险控制，在保证风险控制的同时最小化平均区间长度。
AI.result: 在人脸自然图像和腹部CT扫描的去噪任务中验证了方法有效性，取得当前最优性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过凸优化框架实现了对扩散模型输出的可靠风险控制，为关键场景下的模型应用提供了理论保障。

search_text: How to Trust Your Diffusion Model: A Convex Optimization Approach to Conformal Risk Control 如何信任您的扩散模型：保形风险控制的凸优化方法 Score-based generative modeling, informally referred to as diffusion models, continue to grow in popularity across several important domains and tasks. While they provide high-quality and diverse samples from empirical distributions, important questions remain on the reliability and trustworthiness of these sampling procedures for their responsible use in critical scenarios. Conformal prediction is a modern tool to construct finite-sample, distribution-free uncertainty guarantees for any black-box predictor. In this work, we focus on image-to-image regression tasks and we present a generalization of the Risk-Controlling Prediction Sets (RCPS) procedure, that we term $K$-RCPS, which allows to $(i)$ provide entrywise calibrated intervals for future samples of any diffusion model, and $(ii)$ control a certain notion of risk with respect to a ground truth image with minimal mean interval length. Differently from existing conformal risk control procedures, ours relies on a novel convex optimization approach that allows for multidimensional risk control while provably minimizing the mean interval length. We illustrate our approach on two real-world image denoising problems: on natural images of faces as well as on computed tomography (CT) scans of the abdomen, demonstrating state of the art performance. 基于分数的生成模型（非正式地称为扩散模型）在几个重要领域和任务中继续流行。虽然它们提供了来自经验分布的高质量和多样化的样本，但重要的问题仍然是这些采样程序在关键场景中负责任使用的可靠性和可信度。保形预测是一种现代工具，可为任何黑盒预测器构建有限样本、无分布的不确定性保证。在这项工作中，我们专注于图像到图像的回归任务，并提出了风险控制预测集（RCPS）过程的概括，我们称之为 $K$-RCPS，它允许 $(i)$ 为任何扩散模型的未来样本提供逐项校准间隔，并且 $(ii)$ 控制相对于具有最小平均间隔长度的地面实况图像的特定风险概念。与现有的共形风险控制程序不同，我们的程序依赖于一种新颖的凸优化方法，该方法允许多维风险控制，同时可证明最小化平均间隔长度。我们展示了我们针对两个现实世界图像去噪问题的方法：面部自然图像以及腹部计算机断层扫描 (CT) 扫描，展示了最先进的性能。 本文提出一种基于凸优化的符合风险控制方法，用于提高扩散模型在图像到图像回归任务中的可靠性。 Jacopo Teneggi,Matthew Tivnan,J. Webster Stayman,Jeremias Sulam stat.ML,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: David N. Palacio,Alejandro Velasco,Nathan Cooper,Alvaro Rodriguez,Kevin Moran,Denys Poshyvanyk
title: Toward a Theory of Causation for Interpreting Neural Code Models
title_zh: 走向解释神经代码模型的因果理论
comment: Accepted to appear in IEEE Transactions on Software Engineering
comments: Accepted to appear in IEEE Transactions on Software Engineering
abstract: Neural Language Models of Code, or Neural Code Models (NCMs), are rapidly progressing from research prototypes to commercial developer tools. As such, understanding the capabilities and limitations of such models is becoming critical. However, the abilities of these models are typically measured using automated metrics that often only reveal a portion of their real-world performance. While, in general, the performance of NCMs appears promising, currently much is unknown about how such models arrive at decisions. To this end, this paper introduces $do_{code}$, a post hoc interpretability method specific to NCMs that is capable of explaining model predictions. $do_{code}$ is based upon causal inference to enable programming language-oriented explanations. While the theoretical underpinnings of $do_{code}$ are extensible to exploring different model properties, we provide a concrete instantiation that aims to mitigate the impact of spurious correlations by grounding explanations of model behavior in properties of programming languages. To demonstrate the practical benefit of $do_{code}$, we illustrate the insights that our framework can provide by performing a case study on two popular deep learning architectures and ten NCMs. The results of this case study illustrate that our studied NCMs are sensitive to changes in code syntax. All our NCMs, except for the BERT-like model, statistically learn to predict tokens related to blocks of code (\eg brackets, parenthesis, semicolon) with less confounding bias as compared to other programming language constructs. These insights demonstrate the potential of $do_{code}$ as a useful method to detect and facilitate the elimination of confounding bias in NCMs.
summary: Neural Language Models of Code, or Neural Code Models (NCMs), are rapidly progressing from research prototypes to commercial developer tools. As such, understanding the capabilities and limitations of such models is becoming critical. However, the abilities of these models are typically measured using automated metrics that often only reveal a portion of their real-world performance. While, in general, the performance of NCMs appears promising, currently much is unknown about how such models arrive at decisions. To this end, this paper introduces $do_{code}$, a post hoc interpretability method specific to NCMs that is capable of explaining model predictions. $do_{code}$ is based upon causal inference to enable programming language-oriented explanations. While the theoretical underpinnings of $do_{code}$ are extensible to exploring different model properties, we provide a concrete instantiation that aims to mitigate the impact of spurious correlations by grounding explanations of model behavior in properties of programming languages. To demonstrate the practical benefit of $do_{code}$, we illustrate the insights that our framework can provide by performing a case study on two popular deep learning architectures and ten NCMs. The results of this case study illustrate that our studied NCMs are sensitive to changes in code syntax. All our NCMs, except for the BERT-like model, statistically learn to predict tokens related to blocks of code (\eg brackets, parenthesis, semicolon) with less confounding bias as compared to other programming language constructs. These insights demonstrate the potential of $do_{code}$ as a useful method to detect and facilitate the elimination of confounding bias in NCMs.
abstract_zh: 代码的神经语言模型或神经代码模型 (NCM) 正在从研究原型快速发展为商业开发工具。因此，了解此类模型的功能和局限性变得至关重要。然而，这些模型的能力通常是使用自动化指标来衡量的，这些指标通常只能揭示其真实世界性能的一部分。虽然总体而言，NCM 的表现似乎很有希望，但目前对于此类模型如何做出决策还知之甚少。为此，本文引入了 $do_{code}$，这是一种特定于 NCM 的事后可解释性方法，能够解释模型预测。 $do_{code}$ 基于因果推理来实现面向编程语言的解释。虽然 $do_{code}$ 的理论基础可以扩展到探索不同的模型属性，但我们提供了一个具体的实例，旨在通过将模型行为的解释建立在编程语言属性的基础上来减轻虚假相关性的影响。为了展示 $do_{code}$ 的实际好处，我们通过对两种流行的深度学习架构和十个 NCM 进行案例研究来说明我们的框架可以提供的见解。本案例研究的结果表明，我们研究的 NCM 对代码语法的变化很敏感。与其他编程语言结构相比，除了类似 BERT 的模型之外，我们所有的 NCM 都通过统计方式学习预测与代码块（例如括号、圆括号、分号）相关的标记，并且具有更少的混杂偏差。这些见解证明了 $do_{code}$ 作为检测和促进消除 NCM 中混杂偏差的有用方法的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于因果推理的后验可解释性方法$do_{code}$，用于解释神经代码模型（NCMs）的决策过程。
AI.motivation: 神经代码模型的性能评估依赖自动化指标，但其决策机制尚不明确，需探索如何减少模型对代码中虚假相关性的依赖。
AI.method: 通过因果推断框架设计$do_{code}$，结合编程语言特性解释模型行为，具体实现聚焦于消除代码语法变化带来的混淆偏差。
AI.result: 案例研究显示所有NCMs对代码语法敏感，除BERT类模型外，其他模型在预测代码块标记时表现出更少的混淆偏差。
AI.conclusion: $do_{code}$能有效检测并减少NCMs中的混淆偏差，为模型解释和优化提供了新方法。

As such, understanding the capabilities and limitations of such models is becoming critical. However, the abilities of these models are typically measured using automated metrics that often only reveal a portion of their real-world performance. All our NCMs, except for the BERT-like model, statistically learn to predict tokens related to blocks of code (\eg brackets, parenthesis, semicolon) with less confounding bias as compared to other programming language constructs. authors_text: Miao Bai,Carlos Cardonha
title: Cardinality-Constrained Continuous Knapsack Problem with Concave Piecewise-Linear Utilities
title_zh: 具有凹分段线性效用的基数约束连续背包问题
abstract: We study an extension of the cardinality-constrained knapsack problem wherein each item has a concave piecewise linear utility structure (CCKP), which is motivated by applications such as resource management problems in monitoring and surveillance tasks. Our main contributions are combinatorial algorithms for the offline CCKP and an online version of the CCKP. For the offline problem, we present a fully polynomial-time approximation scheme and show that it can be cast as the maximization of a submodular function with cardinality constraints; the latter property allows us to derive a greedy $(1 - \frac{1}{e})$-approximation algorithm. For the online CCKP in the random order model, we derive a $\frac{10.427}α$-competitive algorithm based on $α$-approximation algorithms for the offline CCKP; moreover, we derive stronger guarantees for the cases wherein the cardinality capacity is very small or relatively large. Finally, we investigate the empirical performance of the proposed algorithms in numerical experiments.
summary: We study an extension of the cardinality-constrained knapsack problem wherein each item has a concave piecewise linear utility structure (CCKP), which is motivated by applications such as resource management problems in monitoring and surveillance tasks. Our main contributions are combinatorial algorithms for the offline CCKP and an online version of the CCKP. For the offline problem, we present a fully polynomial-time approximation scheme and show that it can be cast as the maximization of a submodular function with cardinality constraints; the latter property allows us to derive a greedy $(1 - \frac{1}{e})$-approximation algorithm. For the online CCKP in the random order model, we derive a $\frac{10.427}α$-competitive algorithm based on $α$-approximation algorithms for the offline CCKP; moreover, we derive stronger guarantees for the cases wherein the cardinality capacity is very small or relatively large. Finally, we investigate the empirical performance of the proposed algorithms in numerical experiments.
abstract_zh: 我们研究了基数约束背包问题的扩展，其中每个项目都有一个凹分段线性效用结构（CCKP），这是由监视和监视任务中的资源管理问题等应用程序激发的。我们的主要贡献是离线 CCKP 和在线版本 CCKP 的组合算法。对于离线问题，我们提出了一个完全多项式时间近似方案，并证明它可以被转换为具有基数约束的子模函数的最大化；后一个属性允许我们导出贪婪的 $(1 - \frac{1}{e})$ 近似算法。对于随机顺序模型中的在线CCKP，我们基于离线CCKP的$α$-近似算法推导了$\frac{10.427}α$-竞争算法；此外，对于基数容量非常小或相对较大的情况，我们得到了更强的保证。最后，我们在数值实验中研究了所提出算法的实证性能。

AI.tldr: 本文研究具有凹型分段线性效用函数的容量约束连续背包问题（CCKP），提出离线和在线场景下的组合优化算法。
AI.motivation: 该问题源于监控与侦察任务中的资源管理需求，需在容量限制下优化分段线性效用函数的决策。
AI.method: 针对离线CCKP设计全多项式时间近似方案（FPTAS），并转化为子模函数最大化问题以获得贪心算法；在线场景下基于α-近似算法构建竞争比算法，特别处理小/大容量约束情形。
AI.result: 离线算法达到(1-1/e)近似比，在线算法竞争比为10.427/α，数值实验验证了算法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的算法在理论保证与实际性能上均表现良好，为资源分配问题提供了新方法。

ai_content.tldr: 本文研究具有凹型分段线性效用函数的容量约束连续背包问题（CCKP），提出离线和在线场景下的组合优化算法。
ai_content.motivation: 该问题源于监控与侦察任务中的资源管理需求，需在容量限制下优化分段线性效用函数的决策。
ai_content.method: 针对离线CCKP设计全多项式时间近似方案（FPTAS），并转化为子模函数最大化问题以获得贪心算法；在线场景下基于α-近似算法构建竞争比算法，特别处理小/大容量约束情形。

search_text: Cardinality-Constrained Continuous Knapsack Problem with Concave Piecewise-Linear Utilities 具有凹分段线性效用的基数约束连续背包问题 We study an extension of the cardinality-constrained knapsack problem wherein each item has a concave piecewise linear utility structure (CCKP), which is motivated by applications such as resource management problems in monitoring and surveillance tasks. Our main contributions are combinatorial algorithms for the offline CCKP and an online version of the CCKP. For the offline problem, we present a fully polynomial-time approximation scheme and show that it can be cast as the maximization of a submodular function with cardinality constraints; the latter property allows us to derive a greedy $(1 - \frac{1}{e})$-approximation algorithm. For the online CCKP in the random order model, we derive a $\frac{10.427}α$-competitive algorithm based on $α$-approximation algorithms for the offline CCKP; moreover, we derive stronger guarantees for the cases wherein the cardinality capacity is very small or relatively large. Finally, we investigate the empirical performance of the proposed algorithms in numerical experiments. 我们研究了基数约束背包问题的扩展，其中每个项目都有一个凹分段线性效用结构（CCKP），这是由监视和监视任务中的资源管理问题等应用程序激发的。我们的主要贡献是离线 CCKP 和在线版本 CCKP 的组合算法。对于离线问题，我们提出了一个完全多项式时间近似方案，并证明它可以被转换为具有基数约束的子模函数的最大化；后一个属性允许我们导出贪婪的 $(1 - \frac{1}{e})$ 近似算法。对于随机顺序模型中的在线CCKP，我们基于离线CCKP的$α$-近似算法推导了$\frac{10.427}α$-竞争算法；此外，对于基数容量非常小或相对较大的情况，我们得到了更强的保证。最后，我们在数值实验中研究了所提出算法的实证性能。 本文研究具有凹型分段线性效用函数的容量约束连续背包问题（CCKP），提出离线和在线场景下的组合优化算法。 Miao Bai,Carlos Cardonha cs.DS

authors_text: Abhiramon Rajasekharan,Yankai Zeng,Parth Padalkar,Gopal Gupta
title: Reliable Natural Language Understanding with Large Language Models and Answer Set Programming
title_zh: 通过大型语言模型和答案集编程实现可靠的自然语言理解
abstract: Humans understand language by extracting information (meaning) from sentences, combining it with existing commonsense knowledge, and then performing reasoning to draw conclusions. While large language models (LLMs) such as GPT-3 and ChatGPT are able to leverage patterns in the text to solve a variety of NLP tasks, they fall short in problems that require reasoning. They also cannot reliably explain the answers generated for a given question. In order to emulate humans better, we propose STAR, a framework that combines LLMs with Answer Set Programming (ASP). We show how LLMs can be used to effectively extract knowledge -- represented as predicates -- from language. Goal-directed ASP is then employed to reliably reason over this knowledge. We apply the STAR framework to three different NLU tasks requiring reasoning: qualitative reasoning, mathematical reasoning, and goal-directed conversation. Our experiments reveal that STAR is able to bridge the gap of reasoning in NLU tasks, leading to significant performance improvements, especially for smaller LLMs, i.e., LLMs with a smaller number of parameters. NLU applications developed using the STAR framework are also explainable: along with the predicates generated, a justification in the form of a proof tree can be produced for a given output.
summary: Humans understand language by extracting information (meaning) from sentences, combining it with existing commonsense knowledge, and then performing reasoning to draw conclusions. While large language models (LLMs) such as GPT-3 and ChatGPT are able to leverage patterns in the text to solve a variety of NLP tasks, they fall short in problems that require reasoning. They also cannot reliably explain the answers generated for a given question. In order to emulate humans better, we propose STAR, a framework that combines LLMs with Answer Set Programming (ASP). We show how LLMs can be used to effectively extract knowledge -- represented as predicates -- from language. Goal-directed ASP is then employed to reliably reason over this knowledge. We apply the STAR framework to three different NLU tasks requiring reasoning: qualitative reasoning, mathematical reasoning, and goal-directed conversation. Our experiments reveal that STAR is able to bridge the gap of reasoning in NLU tasks, leading to significant performance improvements, especially for smaller LLMs, i.e., LLMs with a smaller number of parameters. NLU applications developed using the STAR framework are also explainable: along with the predicates generated, a justification in the form of a proof tree can be produced for a given output.
abstract_zh: 人类理解语言是通过从句子中提取信息（意义），与已有的常识知识相结合，然后进行推理得出结论。虽然 GPT-3 和 ChatGPT 等大型语言模型 (LLM) 能够利用文本中的模式来解决各种 NLP 任务，但它们在需要推理的问题上存在不足。他们也无法可靠地解释针对给定问题生成的答案。为了更好地模拟人类，我们提出了 STAR，一个将法学硕士与答案集编程（ASP）相结合的框架。我们展示了如何使用法学硕士从语言中有效地提取知识（表示为谓词）。然后采用目标导向的 ASP 来可靠地推理这些知识。我们将 STAR 框架应用于需要推理的三种不同的 NLU 任务：定性推理、数学推理和目标导向对话。我们的实验表明，STAR 能够弥合 NLU 任务中推理的差距，从而显着提高性能，特别是对于较小的 LLM，即参数数量较少的 LLM。使用 STAR 框架开发的 NLU 应用程序也是可解释的：与生成的谓词一起，可以为给定的输出生成证明树形式的理由。

AI.tldr: 本文提出STAR框架，结合大语言模型（LLM）与答案集编程（ASP），以提升自然语言理解任务中的推理能力和可解释性。
AI.motivation: 现有大语言模型在需要推理的任务中表现不足，且无法可靠解释生成答案的逻辑，需通过结构化方法增强推理能力。
AI.method: 利用LLM从文本中提取谓词知识，再通过目标导向的ASP进行可靠推理，应用于定性推理、数学推理和目标导向对话任务。
AI.result: STAR在多个NLU任务中显著提升性能，尤其对参数较少的LLM效果更明显，并能生成证明树以解释输出。
AI.conclusion: STAR框架通过融合LLM与ASP，有效弥补了传统NLU模型的推理缺陷，实现了可解释的可靠自然语言理解。

authors_text: Rachel Horne,Tom Putland,Mark Brady
title: Regulating trusted autonomous systems in Australia
title_zh: 监管澳大利亚的可信自治系统
abstract: Australia is a leader in autonomous systems technology, particularly in the mining industry, borne from necessity in a geographically dispersed and complex natural environment. Increasingly advanced autonomous systems are becoming more prevalent in Australia, particularly as the safety, environmental and efficiency benefits become better understood, and the increasing sophistication of technology improves capability and availability. Increasing use of these systems, including in the maritime domain and air domain, is placing pressure on the national safety regulators, who must either continue to apply their traditional regulatory approach requiring exemptions to enable operation of emerging technology, or seize the opportunity to put in place an agile and adaptive approach better suited to the rapid developments of the twenty first century. In Australia the key national safety regulators have demonstrated an appetite for working with industry to facilitate innovation, but their limited resources mean progress is slow. There is a critical role to be played by third parties from industry, government, and academia who can work together to develop, test and publish new assurance and accreditation frameworks for trusted autonomous systems, and assist in the transition to an adaptive and agile regulatory philosophy. This is necessary to ensure the benefits of autonomous systems can be realised, without compromising safety. This paper will identify the growing use cases for autonomous systems in Australia, in the maritime, air and land domains, assess the current regulatory framework, argue that Australia's regulatory approach needs to become more agile and anticipatory, and investigate how third party projects could positively impact the assurance and accreditation process for autonomous systems in the future.

abstract_zh: 澳大利亚是自主系统技术的领先者，特别是在采矿业，这是由于地理位置分散且复杂的自然环境而产生的。日益先进的自主系统在澳大利亚变得越来越普遍，特别是随着安全、环境和效率效益得到更好的理解，并且技术的日益成熟提高了能力和可用性。这些系统的使用越来越多，包括在海事领域和空中领域，给国家安全监管机构带来了压力，他们必须要么继续应用传统的监管方法，要求豁免以实现新兴技术的运行，要么抓住机会采取更适合二十一世纪快速发展的敏捷和适应性方法。在澳大利亚，主要的国家安全监管机构已表现出与行业合作促进创新的意愿，但其资源有限意味着进展缓慢。来自行业、政府和学术界的第三方可以发挥关键作用，他们可以共同努力为可信自治系统开发、测试和发布新的保证和认证框架，并协助向适应性和敏捷的监管理念过渡。这是确保在不影响安全的情况下实现自主系统优势的必要条件。本文将确定澳大利亚自主系统在海事、空中和陆地领域不断增长的用例，评估当前的监管框架，认为澳大利亚的监管方法需要变得更加灵活和具有前瞻性，并研究第三方项目如何对未来自主系统的保证和认证流程产生积极影响。

AI.tldr: 本文分析澳大利亚自主系统应用现状，评估现有监管框架，并提出更灵活的监管方法，探讨第三方项目对自主系统认证的影响。
AI.motivation: 澳大利亚在矿业等领域的自主系统应用需求增长，但传统监管框架难以适应技术快速发展，需建立敏捷监管体系以确保安全与创新平衡。
AI.method: 通过案例分析、文献研究及利益相关者访谈，评估当前监管框架，论证监管改革必要性，并探讨第三方协作模式。
AI.result: 识别了海陆空领域自主系统应用案例，指出监管滞后问题，提出需构建多方协作的适应性监管框架以加速技术落地。
AI.conclusion: 需政府、行业与学术界合作开发新型认证体系，推动监管向敏捷化转型，确保自主系统安全可控的同时释放技术潜力。

Increasingly advanced autonomous systems are becoming more prevalent in Australia, particularly as the safety, environmental and efficiency benefits become better understood, and the increasing sophistication of technology improves capability and availability. Increasing use of these systems, including in the maritime domain and air domain, is placing pressure on the national safety regulators, who must either continue to apply their traditional regulatory approach requiring exemptions to enable operation of emerging technology, or seize the opportunity to put in place an agile and adaptive approach better suited to the rapid developments of the twenty first century. In Australia the key national safety regulators have demonstrated an appetite for working with industry to facilitate innovation, but their limited resources mean progress is slow. There is a critical role to be played by third parties from industry, government, and academia who can work together to develop, test and publish new assurance and accreditation frameworks for trusted autonomous systems, and assist in the transition to an adaptive and agile regulatory philosophy. This is necessary to ensure the benefits of autonomous systems can be realised, without compromising safety. This paper will identify the growing use cases for autonomous systems in Australia, in the maritime, air and land domains, assess the current regulatory framework, argue that Australia's regulatory approach needs to become more agile and anticipatory, and investigate how third party projects could positively impact the assurance and accreditation process for autonomous systems in the future. 澳大利亚是自主系统技术的领先者，特别是在采矿业，这是由于地理位置分散且复杂的自然环境而产生的。日益先进的自主系统在澳大利亚变得越来越普遍，特别是随着安全、环境和效率效益得到更好的理解，并且技术的日益成熟提高了能力和可用性。这些系统的使用越来越多，包括在海事领域和空中领域，给国家安全监管机构带来了压力，他们必须要么继续应用传统的监管方法，要求豁免以实现新兴技术的运行，要么抓住机会采取更适合二十一世纪快速发展的敏捷和适应性方法。在澳大利亚，主要的国家安全监管机构已表现出与行业合作促进创新的意愿，但其资源有限意味着进展缓慢。来自行业、政府和学术界的第三方可以发挥关键作用，他们可以共同努力为可信自治系统开发、测试和发布新的保证和认证框架，并协助向适应性和敏捷的监管理念过渡。这是确保在不影响安全的情况下实现自主系统优势的必要条件。本文将确定澳大利亚自主系统在海事、空中和陆地领域不断增长的用例，评估当前的监管框架，认为澳大利亚的监管方法需要变得更加灵活和具有前瞻性，并研究第三方项目如何对未来自主系统的保证和认证流程产生积极影响。 本文分析澳大利亚自主系统应用现状，评估现有监管框架，并提出更灵活的监管方法，探讨第三方项目对自主系统认证的影响。 Rachel Horne,Tom Putland,Mark Brady cs.CY,cs.ET

authors_text: Doug Markant,Milad Rogha,Alireza Karduni,Ryan Wesslen,Wenwen Dou
title: When do data visualizations persuade? The impact of prior attitudes on learning about correlations from scatterplot visualizations
title_zh: 数据可视化何时具有说服力？先前态度对从散点图可视化中了解相关性的影响
abstract: Data visualizations are vital to scientific communication on critical issues such as public health, climate change, and socioeconomic policy. They are often designed not just to inform, but to persuade people to make consequential decisions (e.g., to get vaccinated). Are such visualizations persuasive, especially when audiences have beliefs and attitudes that the data contradict? In this paper we examine the impact of existing attitudes (e.g., positive or negative attitudes toward COVID-19 vaccination) on changes in beliefs about statistical correlations when viewing scatterplot visualizations with different representations of statistical uncertainty. We find that strong prior attitudes are associated with smaller belief changes when presented with data that contradicts existing views, and that visual uncertainty representations may amplify this effect. Finally, even when participants' beliefs about correlations shifted their attitudes remained unchanged, highlighting the need for further research on whether data visualizations can drive longer-term changes in views and behavior.
summary: Data visualizations are vital to scientific communication on critical issues such as public health, climate change, and socioeconomic policy. They are often designed not just to inform, but to persuade people to make consequential decisions (e.g., to get vaccinated). Are such visualizations persuasive, especially when audiences have beliefs and attitudes that the data contradict? In this paper we examine the impact of existing attitudes (e.g., positive or negative attitudes toward COVID-19 vaccination) on changes in beliefs about statistical correlations when viewing scatterplot visualizations with different representations of statistical uncertainty. We find that strong prior attitudes are associated with smaller belief changes when presented with data that contradicts existing views, and that visual uncertainty representations may amplify this effect. Finally, even when participants' beliefs about correlations shifted their attitudes remained unchanged, highlighting the need for further research on whether data visualizations can drive longer-term changes in views and behavior.
abstract_zh: 数据可视化对于公共卫生、气候变化和社会经济政策等关键问题的科学交流至关重要。它们的设计目的通常不仅是为了提供信息，而且是为了说服人们做出重要的决定（例如，接种疫苗）。这种可视化是否有说服力，尤其是当观众的信念和态度与数据相矛盾时？在本文中，我们研究了在查看具有不同统计不确定性表示的散点图可视化时，现有态度（例如，对 COVID-19 疫苗接种的积极或消极态度）对统计相关性信念变化的影响。我们发现，当呈现与现有观点相矛盾的数据时，强烈的先验态度与较小的信念变化相关，并且视觉不确定性表示可能会放大这种效应。最后，即使参与者对相关性的信念发生了变化，他们的态度也保持不变，这凸显了需要进一步研究数据可视化是否可以推动观点和行为的长期变化。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了先验态度对从散点图可视化中学习相关性的影响，探讨数据可视化在说服受众时的效果。
AI.motivation: 数据可视化在科学传播中至关重要，但当受众的既有信念与数据矛盾时，其说服效果存疑。需明确可视化能否改变信念或态度。
AI.method: 通过实验，让持有不同先验态度（如对新冠疫苗的正负面态度）的参与者观看包含不同统计不确定性的散点图，测量其信念变化。
AI.result: 强先验态度会抑制与既有观点矛盾的数据带来的信念变化，可视化不确定性可能加剧此效应。信念变化未引发态度转变。
AI.conclusion: 数据可视化对信念的影响有限，且难以改变既有态度，需进一步研究其对长期行为改变的潜力及优化策略。

authors_text: Hanlin Zhu,Amy Zhang
title: Provably Efficient Offline Goal-Conditioned Reinforcement Learning with General Function Approximation and Single-Policy Concentrability
title_zh: 具有通用函数逼近和单策略集中性的可证明高效的离线目标条件强化学习
abstract: Goal-conditioned reinforcement learning (GCRL) refers to learning general-purpose skills that aim to reach diverse goals. In particular, offline GCRL only requires purely pre-collected datasets to perform training tasks without additional interactions with the environment. Although offline GCRL has become increasingly prevalent and many previous works have demonstrated its empirical success, the theoretical understanding of efficient offline GCRL algorithms is not well established, especially when the state space is huge and the offline dataset only covers the policy we aim to learn. In this paper, we provide a rigorous theoretical analysis of an existing empirically successful offline GCRL algorithm. We prove that under slight modification, this algorithm enjoys an $\widetilde{O}(\text{poly}(1/ε))$ sample complexity (where $ε$ is the desired suboptimality of the learned policy) with general function approximation thanks to the property of (semi-)strong convexity of the objective functions. We only require nearly minimal assumptions on the dataset (single-policy concentrability) and the function class (realizability). Moreover, this algorithm consists of two uninterleaved optimization steps, which we refer to as $V$-learning and policy learning, and is computationally stable since it does not involve minimax optimization. We also empirically validate our theory by showing that the modified algorithm outperforms the previous algorithm in various real-world environments. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first algorithm that is both provably efficient with general function approximation and single-policy concentrability, and empirically successful without requiring solving minimax optimization problems.
summary: Goal-conditioned reinforcement learning (GCRL) refers to learning general-purpose skills that aim to reach diverse goals. In particular, offline GCRL only requires purely pre-collected datasets to perform training tasks without additional interactions with the environment. Although offline GCRL has become increasingly prevalent and many previous works have demonstrated its empirical success, the theoretical understanding of efficient offline GCRL algorithms is not well established, especially when the state space is huge and the offline dataset only covers the policy we aim to learn. In this paper, we provide a rigorous theoretical analysis of an existing empirically successful offline GCRL algorithm. We prove that under slight modification, this algorithm enjoys an $\widetilde{O}(\text{poly}(1/ε))$ sample complexity (where $ε$ is the desired suboptimality of the learned policy) with general function approximation thanks to the property of (semi-)strong convexity of the objective functions. We only require nearly minimal assumptions on the dataset (single-policy concentrability) and the function class (realizability). Moreover, this algorithm consists of two uninterleaved optimization steps, which we refer to as $V$-learning and policy learning, and is computationally stable since it does not involve minimax optimization. We also empirically validate our theory by showing that the modified algorithm outperforms the previous algorithm in various real-world environments. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first algorithm that is both provably efficient with general function approximation and single-policy concentrability, and empirically successful without requiring solving minimax optimization problems.
abstract_zh: 目标条件强化学习（GCRL）是指学习旨在实现不同目标的通用技能。特别是，离线GCRL仅需要纯粹预先收集的数据集来执行训练任务，而无需与环境进行额外的交互。尽管离线 GCRL 已经变得越来越流行，并且许多先前的工作已经证明了其实证上的成功，但对高效离线 GCRL 算法的理论理解还没有很好地建立，特别是当状态空间巨大且离线数据集仅涵盖我们想要学习的策略时。在本文中，我们对现有的经验上成功的离线 GCRL 算法进行了严格的理论分析。我们证明，在稍加修改的情况下，由于目标函数的（半）强凸性，该算法具有 $\widetilde{O}(\text{poly}(1/ε))$ 样本复杂度（其中 $ε$ 是学习策略的期望次优性）和一般函数逼近。我们只需要对数据集（单策略集中性）和函数类（可实现性）进行几乎最小的假设。此外，该算法由两个非交错的优化步骤组成，我们将其称为$V$学习和策略学习，并且由于不涉及极小极大优化，因此计算稳定。我们还通过证明修改后的算法在各种现实环境中优于以前的算法来实证验证我们的理论。据我们所知，这是第一个既能在通用函数逼近和单策略集中性方面被证明有效的算法，又能在不需要解决极小极大优化问题的情况下获得经验上的成功。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种改进的离线目标条件强化学习算法，通过理论分析证明其在大规模状态空间和有限数据集下的高效性，并验证了其在实际环境中的优越性。
AI.motivation: 离线目标条件强化学习（GCRL）在实际应用中依赖预收集数据集，但现有算法缺乏理论保证，尤其在状态空间巨大且数据集覆盖有限时效率不足。
AI.method: 通过修改现有算法，利用目标函数的（半）强凸性，将训练过程分为独立的V学习和策略学习两阶段，避免了复杂度高的极小极大优化，仅需单策略集中性和函数类可实现性假设。
AI.result: 改进算法在样本复杂度上达到$\\widetilde{O}(\	ext{poly}(1/ε))$，并在多个现实环境中优于原有算法，是首个无需极小极大优化且兼具理论效率与实践成功的GCRL方法。
AI.conclusion: 本文通过理论分析与实验验证，提出了首个满足通用函数逼近和单策略集中性假设的 provably efficient 离线GCRL算法，为实际应用提供了理论保障与计算稳定性。

search_text: Provably Efficient Offline Goal-Conditioned Reinforcement Learning with General Function Approximation and Single-Policy Concentrability 具有通用函数逼近和单策略集中性的可证明高效的离线目标条件强化学习 Goal-conditioned reinforcement learning (GCRL) refers to learning general-purpose skills that aim to reach diverse goals. In particular, offline GCRL only requires purely pre-collected datasets to perform training tasks without additional interactions with the environment. In this paper, we provide a rigorous theoretical analysis of an existing empirically successful offline GCRL algorithm. We prove that under slight modification, this algorithm enjoys an $\widetilde{O}(\text{poly}(1/ε))$ sample complexity (where $ε$ is the desired suboptimality of the learned policy) with general function approximation thanks to the property of (semi-)strong convexity of the objective functions. We only require nearly minimal assumptions on the dataset (single-policy concentrability) and the function class (realizability). Moreover, this algorithm consists of two uninterleaved optimization steps, which we refer to as $V$-learning and policy learning, and is computationally stable since it does not involve minimax optimization. We also empirically validate our theory by showing that the modified algorithm outperforms the previous algorithm in various real-world environments. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first algorithm that is both provably efficient with general function approximation and single-policy concentrability, and empirically successful without requiring solving minimax optimization problems. 目标条件强化学习（GCRL）是指学习旨在实现不同目标的通用技能。特别是，离线GCRL仅需要纯粹预先收集的数据集来执行训练任务，而无需与环境进行额外的交互。尽管离线 GCRL 已经变得越来越流行，并且许多先前的工作已经证明了其实证上的成功，但对高效离线 GCRL 算法的理论理解还没有很好地建立，特别是当状态空间巨大且离线数据集仅涵盖我们想要学习的策略时。在本文中，我们对现有的经验上成功的离线 GCRL 算法进行了严格的理论分析。我们证明，在稍加修改的情况下，由于目标函数的（半）强凸性，该算法具有 $\widetilde{O}(\text{poly}(1/ε))$ 样本复杂度（其中 $ε$ 是学习策略的期望次优性）和一般函数逼近。我们只需要对数据集（单策略集中性）和函数类（可实现性）进行几乎最小的假设。此外，该算法由两个非交错的优化步骤组成，我们将其称为$V$学习和策略学习，并且由于不涉及极小极大优化，因此计算稳定。我们还通过证明修改后的算法在各种现实环境中优于以前的算法来实证验证我们的理论。据我们所知，这是第一个既能在通用函数逼近和单策略集中性方面被证明有效的算法，又能在不需要解决极小极大优化问题的情况下获得经验上的成功。 本文提出了一种改进的离线目标条件强化学习算法，通过理论分析证明其在大规模状态空间和有限数据集下的高效性，并验证了其在实际环境中的优越性。 Hanlin Zhu,Amy Zhang cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Arti Bandhana,Ondřej Lukáš,Sebastian Garcia,Tomáš Kroupa
title: Catch Me If You Can: Improving Adversaries in Cyber-Security With Q-Learning Algorithms
title_zh: 如果你能抓住我：使用 Q-Learning 算法改善网络安全中的对手
abstract: The ongoing rise in cyberattacks and the lack of skilled professionals in the cybersecurity domain to combat these attacks show the need for automated tools capable of detecting an attack with good performance. Attackers disguise their actions and launch attacks that consist of multiple actions, which are difficult to detect. Therefore, improving defensive tools requires their calibration against a well-trained attacker. In this work, we propose a model of an attacking agent and environment and evaluate its performance using basic Q-Learning, Naive Q-learning, and DoubleQ-Learning, all of which are variants of Q-Learning. The attacking agent is trained with the goal of exfiltrating data whereby all the hosts in the network have a non-zero detection probability. Results show that the DoubleQ-Learning agent has the best overall performance rate by successfully achieving the goal in $70\%$ of the interactions.
summary: The ongoing rise in cyberattacks and the lack of skilled professionals in the cybersecurity domain to combat these attacks show the need for automated tools capable of detecting an attack with good performance. Attackers disguise their actions and launch attacks that consist of multiple actions, which are difficult to detect. Therefore, improving defensive tools requires their calibration against a well-trained attacker. In this work, we propose a model of an attacking agent and environment and evaluate its performance using basic Q-Learning, Naive Q-learning, and DoubleQ-Learning, all of which are variants of Q-Learning. The attacking agent is trained with the goal of exfiltrating data whereby all the hosts in the network have a non-zero detection probability. Results show that the DoubleQ-Learning agent has the best overall performance rate by successfully achieving the goal in $70\%$ of the interactions.
abstract_zh: 网络攻击的持续增加以及网络安全领域缺乏熟练的专业人员来应对这些攻击表明需要能够以良好的性能检测攻击的自动化工具。攻击者伪装自己的行为并发起由多个动作组成的攻击，这些攻击很难被发现。因此，改进防御工具需要针对训练有素的攻击者进行校准。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个攻击代理和环境的模型，并使用基本 Q-Learning、Naive Q-learning 和 DoubleQ-Learning（所有这些都是 Q-Learning 的变体）来评估其性能。攻击代理的训练目标是窃取数据，从而使网络中的所有主机都具有非零检测概率。结果表明，DoubleQ-Learning 代理具有最佳的整体性能，在 $70\%$ 的交互中成功实现了目标。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Q-Learning算法的攻击者模型，用于提升网络安全防御工具的性能。
AI.motivation: 网络攻击日益增多且安全领域缺乏专业人才，现有防御工具难以检测隐蔽的多步骤攻击，需通过训练高技能攻击模型来优化防御策略。
AI.method: 构建攻击者代理与网络环境模型，采用基础Q-Learning、朴素Q-Learning和Double Q-Learning算法训练攻击代理，目标为在非零检测概率下实现数据外泄。
AI.result: 实验表明，Double Q-Learning代理在70%的交互中成功达成攻击目标，整体性能最优。
AI.conclusion: Double Q-Learning能有效模拟攻击者行为，为网络安全防御系统提供更精准的对抗训练，从而提升检测能力。

authors_text: Vladimir Feinberg,Xinyi Chen,Y. Jennifer Sun,Rohan Anil,Elad Hazan
title: Sketchy: Memory-efficient Adaptive Regularization with Frequent Directions
title_zh: Sketchy：具有频繁方向的内存高效自适应正则化
abstract: Adaptive regularization methods that exploit more than the diagonal entries exhibit state of the art performance for many tasks, but can be prohibitive in terms of memory and running time. We find the spectra of the Kronecker-factored gradient covariance matrix in deep learning (DL) training tasks are concentrated on a small leading eigenspace that changes throughout training, motivating a low-rank sketching approach. We describe a generic method for reducing memory and compute requirements of maintaining a matrix preconditioner using the Frequent Directions (FD) sketch. While previous approaches have explored applying FD for second-order optimization, we present a novel analysis which allows efficient interpolation between resource requirements and the degradation in regret guarantees with rank $k$: in the online convex optimization (OCO) setting over dimension $d$, we match full-matrix $d^2$ memory regret using only $dk$ memory up to additive error in the bottom $d-k$ eigenvalues of the gradient covariance. Further, we show extensions of our work to Shampoo, resulting in a method competitive in quality with Shampoo and Adam, yet requiring only sub-linear memory for tracking second moments.
summary: Adaptive regularization methods that exploit more than the diagonal entries exhibit state of the art performance for many tasks, but can be prohibitive in terms of memory and running time. We find the spectra of the Kronecker-factored gradient covariance matrix in deep learning (DL) training tasks are concentrated on a small leading eigenspace that changes throughout training, motivating a low-rank sketching approach. We describe a generic method for reducing memory and compute requirements of maintaining a matrix preconditioner using the Frequent Directions (FD) sketch. While previous approaches have explored applying FD for second-order optimization, we present a novel analysis which allows efficient interpolation between resource requirements and the degradation in regret guarantees with rank $k$: in the online convex optimization (OCO) setting over dimension $d$, we match full-matrix $d^2$ memory regret using only $dk$ memory up to additive error in the bottom $d-k$ eigenvalues of the gradient covariance. Further, we show extensions of our work to Shampoo, resulting in a method competitive in quality with Shampoo and Adam, yet requiring only sub-linear memory for tracking second moments.
abstract_zh: 利用不仅仅是对角线条目的自适应正则化方法在许多任务中表现出最先进的性能，但在内存和运行时间方面可能令人望而却步。我们发现深度学习 (DL) 训练任务中克罗内克因子梯度协方差矩阵的谱集中在一个小的主特征空间上，该特征空间在整个训练过程中发生变化，从而激发了低阶草图方法。我们描述了一种使用频繁方向（FD）草图来减少维护矩阵预处理器的内存和计算要求的通用方法。虽然之前的方法已经探索了将 FD 用于二阶优化，但我们提出了一种新颖的分析，允许在资源需求和等级 $k$ 的遗憾保证退化之间进行有效插值：在维度 $d$ 上的在线凸优化 (OCO) 设置中，我们仅使用 $dk$ 内存来匹配全矩阵 $d^2$ 内存后悔，直到梯度协方差的底部 $d-k$ 特征值中的附加误差。此外，我们展示了我们对 Shampoo 的工作的扩展，从而产生了一种在质量上与 Shampoo 和 Adam 竞争的方法，但只需要亚线性内存来跟踪第二时刻。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Frequent Directions的低秩sketching方法，用于在深度学习训练中实现内存高效的自适应正则化。
AI.motivation: 现有自适应正则化方法虽性能优异，但内存和计算开销过大，而梯度协方差矩阵的谱集中在小规模特征空间，需低秩近似以降低资源消耗。
AI.method: 利用Frequent Directions（FD）sketch构建矩阵预处理器，通过秩k近似在在线凸优化中实现内存与遗憾保证的平衡，并扩展至Shampoo优化器。
AI.result: 在OCO场景中，仅用dk内存即可达到d²内存的遗憾上界；改进后的Shampoo方法在保持质量的同时，实现次线性内存消耗。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效平衡了资源消耗与优化性能，为大规模深度学习训练提供了高效的二阶优化方案。

authors_text: Haoran Zhu,Boyuan Chen,Carter Yang
title: Understanding Why ViT Trains Badly on Small Datasets: An Intuitive Perspective
title_zh: 理解为什么 ViT 在小数据集上训练不佳：直观的视角
abstract: Vision transformer (ViT) is an attention neural network architecture that is shown to be effective for computer vision tasks. However, compared to ResNet-18 with a similar number of parameters, ViT has a significantly lower evaluation accuracy when trained on small datasets. To facilitate studies in related fields, we provide a visual intuition to help understand why it is the case. We first compare the performance of the two models and confirm that ViT has less accuracy than ResNet-18 when trained on small datasets. We then interpret the results by showing attention map visualization for ViT and feature map visualization for ResNet-18. The difference is further analyzed through a representation similarity perspective. We conclude that the representation of ViT trained on small datasets is hugely different from ViT trained on large datasets, which may be the reason why the performance drops a lot on small datasets.
summary: Vision transformer (ViT) is an attention neural network architecture that is shown to be effective for computer vision tasks. However, compared to ResNet-18 with a similar number of parameters, ViT has a significantly lower evaluation accuracy when trained on small datasets. To facilitate studies in related fields, we provide a visual intuition to help understand why it is the case. We first compare the performance of the two models and confirm that ViT has less accuracy than ResNet-18 when trained on small datasets. We then interpret the results by showing attention map visualization for ViT and feature map visualization for ResNet-18. The difference is further analyzed through a representation similarity perspective. We conclude that the representation of ViT trained on small datasets is hugely different from ViT trained on large datasets, which may be the reason why the performance drops a lot on small datasets.
abstract_zh: 视觉变压器（ViT）是一种注意力神经网络架构，已被证明对计算机视觉任务有效。然而，与参数数量相似的 ResNet-18 相比，ViT 在小数据集上训练时的评估精度明显较低。为了促进相关领域的研究，我们提供了视觉直觉来帮助理解为什么会出现这种情况。我们首先比较两个模型的性能，并确认在小数据集上训练时 ViT 的准确性低于 ResNet-18。然后，我们通过显示 ViT 的注意力图可视化和 ResNet-18 的特征图可视化来解释结果。通过表示相似性的角度进一步分析差异。我们得出的结论是，在小数据集上训练的 ViT 表示与在大数据集上训练的 ViT 表示有很大不同，这可能是小数据集上性能下降很多的原因。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在直观解释ViT在小数据集上训练效果不佳的原因，并分析其与ResNet-18的差异。
AI.motivation: 尽管ViT在大型数据集上表现良好，但其在小数据集上的准确性显著低于ResNet-18，这促使研究者探索其背后的原因。
AI.method: 通过比较ViT和ResNet-18在小数据集上的性能，结合注意力图可视化、特征图可视化及表示相似性分析，探讨模型差异。
AI.result: 实验结果验证了ViT在小数据集上的准确性低于ResNet-18，并发现其表示与大数据集训练的ViT差异显著。
AI.conclusion: ViT在小数据集上的表示与大数据集训练的模型差异显著，这是其性能下降的主要原因。

search_text: Understanding Why ViT Trains Badly on Small Datasets: An Intuitive Perspective 理解为什么 ViT 在小数据集上训练不佳：直观的视角 Vision transformer (ViT) is an attention neural network architecture that is shown to be effective for computer vision tasks. However, compared to ResNet-18 with a similar number of parameters, ViT has a significantly lower evaluation accuracy when trained on small datasets. To facilitate studies in related fields, we provide a visual intuition to help understand why it is the case. We first compare the performance of the two models and confirm that ViT has less accuracy than ResNet-18 when trained on small datasets. We then interpret the results by showing attention map visualization for ViT and feature map visualization for ResNet-18. The difference is further analyzed through a representation similarity perspective. We conclude that the representation of ViT trained on small datasets is hugely different from ViT trained on large datasets, which may be the reason why the performance drops a lot on small datasets. 视觉变压器（ViT）是一种注意力神经网络架构，已被证明对计算机视觉任务有效。然而，与参数数量相似的 ResNet-18 相比，ViT 在小数据集上训练时的评估精度明显较低。为了促进相关领域的研究，我们提供了视觉直觉来帮助理解为什么会出现这种情况。我们首先比较两个模型的性能，并确认在小数据集上训练时 ViT 的准确性低于 ResNet-18。然后，我们通过显示 ViT 的注意力图可视化和 ResNet-18 的特征图可视化来解释结果。通过表示相似性的角度进一步分析差异。我们得出的结论是，在小数据集上训练的 ViT 表示与在大数据集上训练的 ViT 表示有很大不同，这可能是小数据集上性能下降很多的原因。 本文旨在直观解释ViT在小数据集上训练效果不佳的原因，并分析其与ResNet-18的差异。 Haoran Zhu,Boyuan Chen,Carter Yang cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Hao Liang,Josue Ortega Caro,Vikram Maheshri,Ankit B. Patel,Guha Balakrishnan
title: Linking convolutional kernel size to generalization bias in face analysis CNNs
title_zh: 将卷积核大小与人脸分析 CNN 中的泛化偏差联系起来
abstract: Training dataset biases are by far the most scrutinized factors when explaining algorithmic biases of neural networks. In contrast, hyperparameters related to the neural network architecture have largely been ignored even though different network parameterizations are known to induce different implicit biases over learned features. For example, convolutional kernel size is known to affect the frequency content of features learned in CNNs. In this work, we present a causal framework for linking an architectural hyperparameter to out-of-distribution algorithmic bias. Our framework is experimental, in that we train several versions of a network with an intervention to a specific hyperparameter, and measure the resulting causal effect of this choice on performance bias when a particular out-of-distribution image perturbation is applied. In our experiments, we focused on measuring the causal relationship between convolutional kernel size and face analysis classification bias across different subpopulations (race/gender), with respect to high-frequency image details. We show that modifying kernel size, even in one layer of a CNN, changes the frequency content of learned features significantly across data subgroups leading to biased generalization performance even in the presence of a balanced dataset.
summary: Training dataset biases are by far the most scrutinized factors when explaining algorithmic biases of neural networks. In contrast, hyperparameters related to the neural network architecture have largely been ignored even though different network parameterizations are known to induce different implicit biases over learned features. For example, convolutional kernel size is known to affect the frequency content of features learned in CNNs. In this work, we present a causal framework for linking an architectural hyperparameter to out-of-distribution algorithmic bias. Our framework is experimental, in that we train several versions of a network with an intervention to a specific hyperparameter, and measure the resulting causal effect of this choice on performance bias when a particular out-of-distribution image perturbation is applied. In our experiments, we focused on measuring the causal relationship between convolutional kernel size and face analysis classification bias across different subpopulations (race/gender), with respect to high-frequency image details. We show that modifying kernel size, even in one layer of a CNN, changes the frequency content of learned features significantly across data subgroups leading to biased generalization performance even in the presence of a balanced dataset.
abstract_zh: 在解释神经网络的算法偏差时，训练数据集偏差是迄今为止最受关注的因素。相比之下，尽管已知不同的网络参数化会引起对学习特征的不同隐式偏差，但与神经网络架构相关的超参数在很大程度上被忽略了。例如，众所周知，卷积核大小会影响 CNN 中学习到的特征的频率内容。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个因果框架，用于将架构超参数与分布外算法偏差联系起来。我们的框架是实验性的，因为我们通过对特定超参数的干预来训练网络的多个版本，并在应用特定的分布外图像扰动时测量这种选择对性能偏差的因果影响。在我们的实验中，我们专注于测量不同亚群（种族/性别）的卷积核大小和人脸分析分类偏差之间的因果关系，以及高频图像细节。我们表明，即使在 CNN 的一层中，修改内核大小也会显着改变数据子组中学习特征的频率内容，从而导致泛化性能出现偏差，即使在存在平衡数据集的情况下也是如此。

AI.tldr: 本文研究卷积核尺寸与人脸识别CNN泛化偏差之间的因果关系，提出通过实验框架分析架构超参数对分布外算法偏差的影响。
AI.motivation: 尽管数据集偏差是算法偏差的主要来源，但网络架构超参数（如卷积核尺寸）对特征学习的隐含偏差影响长期被忽视，而卷积核尺寸已知会影响CNN学习的频率特征。
AI.method: 构建实验框架，通过干预CNN中特定层的卷积核尺寸，训练多个网络版本，并测量该超参数变化对不同子群体（种族/性别）在高频图像细节上的分类偏差的因果效应。
AI.result: 修改卷积核尺寸（即使仅修改一层）会显著改变不同数据子群的特征频率分布，导致在平衡数据集下仍出现泛化性能偏差。
AI.conclusion: 卷积核尺寸是影响人脸识别算法分布外偏差的关键架构超参数，需在模型设计阶段纳入偏差控制考量。

authors_text: Guangyao Zhou,Nishad Gothoskar,Lirui Wang,Joshua B. Tenenbaum,Dan Gutfreund,Miguel Lázaro-Gredilla,Dileep George,Vikash K. Mansinghka
title: 3D Neural Embedding Likelihood: Probabilistic Inverse Graphics for Robust 6D Pose Estimation
title_zh: 3D 神经嵌入似然：用于鲁棒 6D 姿势估计的概率逆图形
abstract: The ability to perceive and understand 3D scenes is crucial for many applications in computer vision and robotics. Inverse graphics is an appealing approach to 3D scene understanding that aims to infer the 3D scene structure from 2D images. In this paper, we introduce probabilistic modeling to the inverse graphics framework to quantify uncertainty and achieve robustness in 6D pose estimation tasks. Specifically, we propose 3D Neural Embedding Likelihood (3DNEL) as a unified probabilistic model over RGB-D images, and develop efficient inference procedures on 3D scene descriptions. 3DNEL effectively combines learned neural embeddings from RGB with depth information to improve robustness in sim-to-real 6D object pose estimation from RGB-D images. Performance on the YCB-Video dataset is on par with state-of-the-art yet is much more robust in challenging regimes. In contrast to discriminative approaches, 3DNEL's probabilistic generative formulation jointly models multiple objects in a scene, quantifies uncertainty in a principled way, and handles object pose tracking under heavy occlusion. Finally, 3DNEL provides a principled framework for incorporating prior knowledge about the scene and objects, which allows natural extension to additional tasks like camera pose tracking from video.
summary: The ability to perceive and understand 3D scenes is crucial for many applications in computer vision and robotics. Inverse graphics is an appealing approach to 3D scene understanding that aims to infer the 3D scene structure from 2D images. In this paper, we introduce probabilistic modeling to the inverse graphics framework to quantify uncertainty and achieve robustness in 6D pose estimation tasks. Specifically, we propose 3D Neural Embedding Likelihood (3DNEL) as a unified probabilistic model over RGB-D images, and develop efficient inference procedures on 3D scene descriptions. 3DNEL effectively combines learned neural embeddings from RGB with depth information to improve robustness in sim-to-real 6D object pose estimation from RGB-D images. Performance on the YCB-Video dataset is on par with state-of-the-art yet is much more robust in challenging regimes. In contrast to discriminative approaches, 3DNEL's probabilistic generative formulation jointly models multiple objects in a scene, quantifies uncertainty in a principled way, and handles object pose tracking under heavy occlusion. Finally, 3DNEL provides a principled framework for incorporating prior knowledge about the scene and objects, which allows natural extension to additional tasks like camera pose tracking from video.
abstract_zh: 感知和理解 3D 场景的能力对于计算机视觉和机器人领域的许多应用至关重要。逆向图形是一种颇具吸引力的 3D 场景理解方法，旨在从 2D 图像推断 3D 场景结构。在本文中，我们将概率建模引入逆向图形框架，以量化不确定性并实现 6D 位姿估计任务的鲁棒性。具体来说，我们提出 3D 神经嵌入似然（3DNEL）作为 RGB-D 图像上的统一概率模型，并开发针对 3D 场景描述的高效推理程序。 3DNEL 有效地将学习到的 RGB 神经嵌入与深度信息结合起来，以提高从 RGB-D 图像进行模拟到真实 6D 对象姿态估计的鲁棒性。 YCB-Video 数据集的性能与最先进的技术相当，但在具有挑战性的情况下更加稳健。与判别方法相比，3DNEL 的概率生成公式对场景中的多个对象进行联合建模，以有原则的方式量化不确定性，并处理严重遮挡下的对象姿态跟踪。最后，3DNEL 提供了一个原则框架，用于整合有关场景和对象的先验知识，从而可以自然扩展到其他任务，例如从视频中跟踪相机姿势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于概率逆图形框架的3D神经嵌入似然模型（3DNEL），用于从RGB-D图像中进行鲁棒的6D姿态估计。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在复杂场景下（如遮挡）的6D姿态估计鲁棒性不足，且难以量化不确定性，同时缺乏对多物体联合建模的能力。
AI.method: 设计3DNEL模型，融合RGB图像的神经嵌入与深度信息，通过概率生成模型联合建模场景多物体，实现姿态跟踪与不确定性量化。
AI.result: 在YCB-Video数据集上性能与SOTA方法相当，但在遮挡等挑战场景下表现更鲁棒，并支持相机姿态跟踪等扩展任务。
AI.conclusion: 3DNEL为场景先验知识的引入提供了统一框架，通过概率生成方法解决了多物体联合建模与鲁棒姿态估计的难题。

motivation: 现有方法在复杂场景下（如遮挡）的6D姿态估计鲁棒性不足，且难以量化不确定性，同时缺乏对多物体联合建模的能力。
method: 设计3DNEL模型，融合RGB图像的神经嵌入与深度信息，通过概率生成模型联合建模场景多物体，实现姿态跟踪与不确定性量化。
result: 在YCB-Video数据集上性能与SOTA方法相当，但在遮挡等挑战场景下表现更鲁棒，并支持相机姿态跟踪等扩展任务。
conclusion: 3DNEL为场景先验知识的引入提供了统一框架，通过概率生成方法解决了多物体联合建模与鲁棒姿态估计的难题。
search_text: 3D Neural Embedding Likelihood: Probabilistic Inverse Graphics for Robust 6D Pose Estimation 3D 神经嵌入似然：用于鲁棒 6D 姿势估计的概率逆图形 The ability to perceive and understand 3D scenes is crucial for many applications in computer vision and robotics. Inverse graphics is an appealing approach to 3D scene understanding that aims to infer the 3D scene structure from 2D images. In this paper, we introduce probabilistic modeling to the inverse graphics framework to quantify uncertainty and achieve robustness in 6D pose estimation tasks. Specifically, we propose 3D Neural Embedding Likelihood (3DNEL) as a unified probabilistic model over RGB-D images, and develop efficient inference procedures on 3D scene descriptions. 3DNEL effectively combines learned neural embeddings from RGB with depth information to improve robustness in sim-to-real 6D object pose estimation from RGB-D images. Performance on the YCB-Video dataset is on par with state-of-the-art yet is much more robust in challenging regimes. In contrast to discriminative approaches, 3DNEL's probabilistic generative formulation jointly models multiple objects in a scene, quantifies uncertainty in a principled way, and handles object pose tracking under heavy occlusion. Finally, 3DNEL provides a principled framework for incorporating prior knowledge about the scene and objects, which allows natural extension to additional tasks like camera pose tracking from video. 感知和理解 3D 场景的能力对于计算机视觉和机器人领域的许多应用至关重要。逆向图形是一种颇具吸引力的 3D 场景理解方法，旨在从 2D 图像推断 3D 场景结构。在本文中，我们将概率建模引入逆向图形框架，以量化不确定性并实现 6D 位姿估计任务的鲁棒性。具体来说，我们提出 3D 神经嵌入似然（3DNEL）作为 RGB-D 图像上的统一概率模型，并开发针对 3D 场景描述的高效推理程序。 3DNEL 有效地将学习到的 RGB 神经嵌入与深度信息结合起来，以提高从 RGB-D 图像进行模拟到真实 6D 对象姿态估计的鲁棒性。 YCB-Video 数据集的性能与最先进的技术相当，但在具有挑战性的情况下更加稳健。与判别方法相比，3DNEL 的概率生成公式对场景中的多个对象进行联合建模，以有原则的方式量化不确定性，并处理严重遮挡下的对象姿态跟踪。最后，3DNEL 提供了一个原则框架，用于整合有关场景和对象的先验知识，从而可以自然扩展到其他任务，例如从视频中跟踪相机姿势。 本文提出了一种基于概率逆图形框架的3D神经嵌入似然模型（3DNEL），用于从RGB-D图像中进行鲁棒的6D姿态估计。 Guangyao Zhou,Nishad Gothoskar,Lirui Wang,Joshua B. Tenenbaum,Dan Gutfreund,Miguel Lázaro-Gredilla,Dileep George,Vikash K. Mansinghka cs.CV

authors_text: Brandon Birmingham,Adrian Muscat
title: KENGIC: KEyword-driven and N-Gram Graph based Image Captioning
title_zh: KENGIC：关键词驱动和基于 N-Gram 图的图像描述
comment: Published in the Digital Image Computing: Techniques and Applications, 2022 (DICTA 2022)
comments: Published in the Digital Image Computing: Techniques and Applications, 2022 (DICTA 2022)
abstract: This paper presents a Keyword-driven and N-gram Graph based approach for Image Captioning (KENGIC). Most current state-of-the-art image caption generators are trained end-to-end on large scale paired image-caption datasets which are very laborious and expensive to collect. Such models are limited in terms of their explainability and their applicability across different domains. To address these limitations, a simple model based on N-Gram graphs which does not require any end-to-end training on paired image captions is proposed. Starting with a set of image keywords considered as nodes, the generator is designed to form a directed graph by connecting these nodes through overlapping n-grams as found in a given text corpus. The model then infers the caption by maximising the most probable n-gram sequences from the constructed graph. To analyse the use and choice of keywords in context of this approach, this study analysed the generation of image captions based on (a) keywords extracted from gold standard captions and (b) from automatically detected keywords. Both quantitative and qualitative analyses demonstrated the effectiveness of KENGIC. The performance achieved is very close to that of current state-of-the-art image caption generators that are trained in the unpaired setting. The analysis of this approach could also shed light on the generation process behind current top performing caption generators trained in the paired setting, and in addition, provide insights on the limitations of the current most widely used evaluation metrics in automatic image captioning.

Most current state-of-the-art image caption generators are trained end-to-end on large scale paired image-caption datasets which are very laborious and expensive to collect. Such models are limited in terms of their explainability and their applicability across different domains. To address these limitations, a simple model based on N-Gram graphs which does not require any end-to-end training on paired image captions is proposed. Starting with a set of image keywords considered as nodes, the generator is designed to form a directed graph by connecting these nodes through overlapping n-grams as found in a given text corpus. The model then infers the caption by maximising the most probable n-gram sequences from the constructed graph. To analyse the use and choice of keywords in context of this approach, this study analysed the generation of image captions based on (a) keywords extracted from gold standard captions and (b) from automatically detected keywords. Both quantitative and qualitative analyses demonstrated the effectiveness of KENGIC. The performance achieved is very close to that of current state-of-the-art image caption generators that are trained in the unpaired setting. The analysis of this approach could also shed light on the generation process behind current top performing caption generators trained in the paired setting, and in addition, provide insights on the limitations of the current most widely used evaluation metrics in automatic image captioning.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种基于关键字驱动和 N 元图的图像字幕方法 (KENGIC)。目前最先进的图像描述生成器都是在大规模配对图像描述数据集上进行端到端训练的，这些数据集的收集非常费力且昂贵。此类模型的可解释性和跨不同领域的适用性受到限制。为了解决这些限制，提出了一种基于 N-Gram 图的简单模型，该模型不需要对配对图像标题进行任何端到端训练。从一组被视为节点的图像关键字开始，生成器被设计为通过在给定文本语料库中找到的重叠 n 元模型连接这些节点来形成有向图。然后，模型通过最大化构造图中最可能的 n 元序列来推断标题。为了分析这种方法中关键字的使用和选择，本研究基于（a）从黄金标准标题中提取的关键字和（b）从自动检测到的关键字中提取的关键字来分析图像标题的生成。定量和定性分析都证明了 KENGIC 的有效性。所实现的性能非常接近当前最先进的在不配对设置中训练的图像字幕生成器的性能。对这种方法的分析还可以揭示当前在配对设置中训练的最佳性能字幕生成器背后的生成过程，此外，还可以深入了解当前自动图像字幕中最广泛使用的评估指标的局限性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于关键词和N-gram图的图像描述生成方法KENGIC，无需端到端训练即可生成图像描述。
AI.motivation: 现有图像描述生成模型依赖大规模标注数据集，存在可解释性差、跨领域适应性弱等问题，且数据收集成本高。
AI.method: 以图像关键词为节点构建有向图，通过文本语料中的重叠N-gram连接节点，生成描述时选择图中概率最高的N-gram序列。
AI.result: KENGIC在无配对训练下性能接近当前最先进的图像描述生成模型，并揭示了现有评估指标的局限性。
AI.conclusion: KENGIC为图像描述生成提供了更简洁可解释的替代方案，同时指出现有评估指标需改进。

authors_text: Giovanni Pittiglio,Margherita Mencattelli,Pierre E. Dupont
title: Magnetic Ball Chain Robots for Endoluminal Interventions
title_zh: 用于腔内干预的磁性球链机器人
abstract: This paper introduces a novel class of hyperredundant robots comprised of chains of permanently magnetized spheres enclosed in a cylindrical polymer skin. With their shape controlled using an externally-applied magnetic field, the spherical joints of these robots enable them to bend to very small radii of curvature. These robots can be used as steerable tips for endoluminal instruments. A kinematic model is derived based on minimizing magnetic and elastic potential energy. Simulation is used to demonstrate the enhanced steerability of these robots in comparison to magnetic soft continuum robots designed using either distributed or lumped magnetic material. Experiments are included to validate the model and to demonstrate the steering capability of ball chain robots in bifurcating channels.
summary: This paper introduces a novel class of hyperredundant robots comprised of chains of permanently magnetized spheres enclosed in a cylindrical polymer skin. With their shape controlled using an externally-applied magnetic field, the spherical joints of these robots enable them to bend to very small radii of curvature. These robots can be used as steerable tips for endoluminal instruments. A kinematic model is derived based on minimizing magnetic and elastic potential energy. Simulation is used to demonstrate the enhanced steerability of these robots in comparison to magnetic soft continuum robots designed using either distributed or lumped magnetic material. Experiments are included to validate the model and to demonstrate the steering capability of ball chain robots in bifurcating channels.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了一种新型超冗余机器人，由封闭在圆柱形聚合物外壳中的永磁球体链组成。通过使用外部施加的磁场控制其形状，这些机器人的球形关节使它们能够弯曲到非常小的曲率半径。这些机器人可用作腔内器械的可操纵尖端。基于最小化磁势能和弹性势能导出运动学模型。仿真用于证明这些机器人与使用分布式或集总磁性材料设计的磁性软连续体机器人相比具有增强的可操纵性。实验包括验证模型并演示球链机器人在分叉通道中的转向能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种由磁化球体链组成的新型超冗余机器人，用于内窥镜手术中的可操控尖端设计。
AI.motivation: 传统内窥镜手术工具在复杂解剖结构中灵活性不足，需开发更适应弯曲通道的微型机器人以提高操作精度。
AI.method: 基于磁能和弹性势能最小化建立运动学模型，通过仿真对比传统磁性软体机器人，并在分叉通道中进行实验验证。
AI.result: 仿真与实验表明，球链机器人相较传统设计具有更优的转向能力，可适应更小曲率半径的通道。
AI.conclusion: 磁性球链机器人展现出在复杂内窥镜手术场景中的应用潜力，其结构设计与控制方法为微创手术提供了新方案。

authors_text: Anand Bhat,Ragunathan Rajkumar
title: Assigning Optimal Integer Harmonic Periods to Hard Real Time Tasks
title_zh: 为硬实时任务分配最佳整数谐波周期
abstract: Selecting period values for tasks is a very important step in the design process of a real-time system, especially due to the significance of its impact on system schedulability. It is well known that, under RMS, the utilization bound for a harmonic task set is 100%. Also, polynomial-time algorithms have been developed for response-time analysis of harmonic task sets. In practice, the largest acceptable value for the period of a task is determined by the performance and safety requirements of the application. In this paper, we address the problem of assigning harmonic periods to a task set such that every task gets assigned an integer period less than or equal to its application specified upper bound and the task utilization of every task is less than 1. We focus on integer solutions given the discrete nature of time in real-time computer systems. We first express this problem of assigning harmonic periods to a task set as a discrete piecewise optimization problem. We then present the 'Discrete Piecewise Harmonic Search' (DPHS) algorithm that outputs an optimal harmonic task assignment. We then define conditions for a metric to be rational for harmonization. We show that commonly used metrics like, the total percentage error (TPE), total system utilization (TSU), first order error (FOE), and maximum percentage error (MPE), are rational. We next prove that the DPHS algorithm finds the optimal feasible assignment, if one exists, for these rational metrics. We apply the DPHS algorithm to harmonize task sets used in real-world applications to highlight its benefits. We compare the performance of the DPHS algorithm against a brute-force search and find that the DPHS searches up to 94\% fewer task sets than the brute-force search that obtains the optimal solution.
summary: Selecting period values for tasks is a very important step in the design process of a real-time system, especially due to the significance of its impact on system schedulability. It is well known that, under RMS, the utilization bound for a harmonic task set is 100%. Also, polynomial-time algorithms have been developed for response-time analysis of harmonic task sets. In practice, the largest acceptable value for the period of a task is determined by the performance and safety requirements of the application. In this paper, we address the problem of assigning harmonic periods to a task set such that every task gets assigned an integer period less than or equal to its application specified upper bound and the task utilization of every task is less than 1. We focus on integer solutions given the discrete nature of time in real-time computer systems. We first express this problem of assigning harmonic periods to a task set as a discrete piecewise optimization problem. We then present the 'Discrete Piecewise Harmonic Search' (DPHS) algorithm that outputs an optimal harmonic task assignment. We then define conditions for a metric to be rational for harmonization. We show that commonly used metrics like, the total percentage error (TPE), total system utilization (TSU), first order error (FOE), and maximum percentage error (MPE), are rational. We next prove that the DPHS algorithm finds the optimal feasible assignment, if one exists, for these rational metrics. We apply the DPHS algorithm to harmonize task sets used in real-world applications to highlight its benefits. We compare the performance of the DPHS algorithm against a brute-force search and find that the DPHS searches up to 94\% fewer task sets than the brute-force search that obtains the optimal solution.
abstract_zh: 选择任务的周期值是实时系统设计过程中非常重要的一步，特别是因为它对系统可调度性的影响非常重要。众所周知，在 RMS 下，谐波任务集的利用率界限为 100%。此外，还开发了多项式时间算法用于谐波任务集的响应时间分析。在实践中，任务周期的最大可接受值由应用程序的性能和安全要求决定。在本文中，我们解决了将调和周期分配给任务集的问题，使得每个任务被分配一个小于或等于其应用程序指定上限的整数周期，并且每个任务的任务利用率小于1。考虑到实时计算机系统中时间的离散性质，我们专注于整数解决方案。我们首先将向任务集分配谐波周期的问题表示为离散分段优化问题。然后，我们提出“离散分段谐波搜索”（DPHS）算法，该算法输出最佳谐波任务分配。然后，我们定义指标合理协调的条件。我们证明了常用的指标，例如总误差百分比 (TPE)、总系统利用率 (TSU)、一阶误差 (FOE) 和最大误差百分比 (MPE)，都是合理的。接下来我们证明 DPHS 算法可以为这些合理指标找到最佳可行分配（如果存在）。我们应用 DPHS 算法来协调现实应用中使用的任务集，以突出其优势。我们将 DPHS 算法与暴力搜索的性能进行比较，发现 DPHS 搜索的任务集比获得最优解的暴力搜索少了 94%。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何为硬实时任务分配满足应用约束的最优整数谐波周期，以确保系统可调度性。
AI.motivation: 任务周期的选择直接影响实时系统的可调度性，而现有方法难以在应用指定的上界内找到最优谐波周期分配方案。
AI.method: 将问题建模为离散分段优化问题，提出'离散分段谐波搜索'(DPHS)算法，并证明其对理性度量指标的最优性。
AI.result: DPHS算法在实际应用中能减少高达94%的搜索量，相比穷举法更高效，且能保证找到满足条件的最优解。
AI.conclusion: DPHS算法为实时系统谐波周期分配提供了高效可行的解决方案，适用于多种理性度量指标。

We next prove that the DPHS algorithm finds the optimal feasible assignment, if one exists, for these rational metrics. We apply the DPHS algorithm to harmonize task sets used in real-world applications to highlight its benefits. authors_text: Francesco Chiossi,Luke Haliburton,Changkun Ou,Andreas Butz,Albrecht Schmidt
title: Short-Form Videos Degrade Our Capacity to Retain Intentions: Effect of Context Switching On Prospective Memory
title_zh: 短片视频降低了我们保留意图的能力：情境切换对预期记忆的影响
comment: ef:Proceedings of the 2023 CHI Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems
comments: ef:Proceedings of the 2023 CHI Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems
abstract: Social media platforms use short, highly engaging videos to catch users' attention. While the short-form video feeds popularized by TikTok are rapidly spreading to other platforms, we do not yet understand their impact on cognitive functions. We conducted a between-subjects experiment (N=60) investigating the impact of engaging with TikTok, Twitter, and YouTube while performing a Prospective Memory task (i.e., executing a previously planned action). The study required participants to remember intentions over interruptions. We found that the TikTok condition significantly degraded the users' performance in this task. As none of the other conditions (Twitter, YouTube, no activity) had a similar effect, our results indicate that the combination of short videos and rapid context-switching impairs intention recall and execution. We contribute a quantified understanding of the effect of social media feed format on Prospective Memory and outline consequences for media technology designers to not harm the users' memory and wellbeing.
summary: Social media platforms use short, highly engaging videos to catch users' attention. While the short-form video feeds popularized by TikTok are rapidly spreading to other platforms, we do not yet understand their impact on cognitive functions. We conducted a between-subjects experiment (N=60) investigating the impact of engaging with TikTok, Twitter, and YouTube while performing a Prospective Memory task (i.e., executing a previously planned action). The study required participants to remember intentions over interruptions. We found that the TikTok condition significantly degraded the users' performance in this task. As none of the other conditions (Twitter, YouTube, no activity) had a similar effect, our results indicate that the combination of short videos and rapid context-switching impairs intention recall and execution. We contribute a quantified understanding of the effect of social media feed format on Prospective Memory and outline consequences for media technology designers to not harm the users' memory and wellbeing.
abstract_zh: 社交媒体平台使用简短、高度吸引人的视频来吸引用户的注意力。虽然 TikTok 流行的短视频正在迅速传播到其他平台，但我们尚不了解它们对认知功能的影响。我们进行了一项受试者间实验 (N=60)，调查在执行前瞻性记忆任务（即执行先前计划的操作）时使用 TikTok、Twitter 和 YouTube 的影响。该研究要求参与者在被打扰时记住意图。我们发现 TikTok 条件显着降低了用户在此任务中的表现。由于其他条件（Twitter、YouTube、无活动）都没有类似的效果，因此我们的结果表明，短视频和快速上下文切换的结合会损害意图回忆和执行。我们对社交媒体提要格式对预期记忆的影响做出了量化的理解，并概述了媒体技术设计者不损害用户记忆和福祉的后果。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究短视频对人类前瞻性记忆（记住并执行计划行动的能力）的影响，通过实验比较TikTok、Twitter、YouTube等平台使用对任务表现的影响。
AI.motivation: 随着短视频在社交媒体的普及，其对认知功能的潜在负面影响尚未被充分研究，尤其关注其是否损害用户记住并执行计划行动的能力。
AI.method: 采用组间实验（N=60），要求参与者在执行前瞻性记忆任务时使用TikTok、Twitter、YouTube或无活动对照组，通过任务表现评估不同平台对意图记忆与执行的影响。
AI.result: 实验发现，TikTok条件显著降低了用户任务表现，而Twitter、YouTube及无活动条件无类似影响，表明短视频与快速上下文切换的组合损害了意图回忆与执行。
AI.conclusion: 研究量化了社交媒体格式对前瞻性记忆的影响，建议技术设计者需避免损害用户记忆与福祉，尤其需关注短视频平台的负面影响。

authors_text: Jean Marie Tshimula,D'Jeff K. Nkashama,Patrick Owusu,Marc Frappier,Pierre-Martin Tardif,Froduald Kabanza,Armelle Brun,Jean-Marc Patenaude,Shengrui Wang,Belkacem Chikhaoui
title: Characterizing Financial Market Coverage using Artificial Intelligence
title_zh: 使用人工智能表征金融市场覆盖范围
abstract: This paper scrutinizes a database of over 4900 YouTube videos to characterize financial market coverage. Financial market coverage generates a large number of videos. Therefore, watching these videos to derive actionable insights could be challenging and complex. In this paper, we leverage Whisper, a speech-to-text model from OpenAI, to generate a text corpus of market coverage videos from Bloomberg and Yahoo Finance. We employ natural language processing to extract insights regarding language use from the market coverage. Moreover, we examine the prominent presence of trending topics and their evolution over time, and the impacts that some individuals and organizations have on the financial market. Our characterization highlights the dynamics of the financial market coverage and provides valuable insights reflecting broad discussions regarding recent financial events and the world economy.
summary: This paper scrutinizes a database of over 4900 YouTube videos to characterize financial market coverage. Financial market coverage generates a large number of videos. Therefore, watching these videos to derive actionable insights could be challenging and complex. In this paper, we leverage Whisper, a speech-to-text model from OpenAI, to generate a text corpus of market coverage videos from Bloomberg and Yahoo Finance. We employ natural language processing to extract insights regarding language use from the market coverage. Moreover, we examine the prominent presence of trending topics and their evolution over time, and the impacts that some individuals and organizations have on the financial market. Our characterization highlights the dynamics of the financial market coverage and provides valuable insights reflecting broad discussions regarding recent financial events and the world economy.
abstract_zh: 本文仔细研究了包含 4900 多个 YouTube 视频的数据库，以描述金融市场的覆盖范围。金融市场报道产生了大量视频。因此，观看这些视频以获得可行的见解可能具有挑战性且复杂。在本文中，我们利用 OpenAI 的语音转文本模型 Whisper 来生成来自彭博社和雅虎财经的市场报道视频的文本语料库。我们采用自然语言处理从市场覆盖范围中提取有关语言使用的见解。此外，我们还研究了热门话题的突出存在及其随时间的演变，以及某些个人和组织对金融市场的影响。我们的描述突出了金融市场报道的动态，并提供了宝贵的见解，反映了有关近期金融事件和世界经济的广泛讨论。

AI.tldr: 利用人工智能分析YouTube财经视频，以表征金融市场报道的特征。
AI.motivation: 由于金融市场的视频内容庞大，手动分析难以获取有效洞察，需借助AI技术进行自动化分析。
AI.method: 采用OpenAI的Whisper模型将视频转为文本，结合自然语言处理技术分析语言特征、趋势话题及关键人物/机构的影响。
AI.result: 揭示了金融市场报道的动态变化，提供了关于近期财经事件和全球经济讨论的有价值见解。
AI.conclusion: 证明了AI技术在分析金融市场信息及趋势中的有效性，为后续研究提供新视角。
