search_text: Tight algorithms for connectivity problems parameterized by clique-width 针对由团宽度参数化的连接问题的严格算法 The complexity of problems involving global constraints is usually much more difficult to understand than the complexity of problems only involving local constraints. A natural form of global constraints are connectivity constraints. We study connectivity problems from a fine-grained parameterized perspective. In a breakthrough, Cygan et al. (TALG 2022) first obtained algorithms with single-exponential running time c^{tw} n^O(1) for connectivity problems parameterized by treewidth by introducing the cut-and-count-technique. Furthermore, the obtained bases c were shown to be optimal under the Strong Exponential-Time Hypothesis (SETH). However, since only sparse graphs may admit small treewidth, we lack knowledge of the fine-grained complexity of connectivity problems with respect to dense structure. The most popular graph parameter to measure dense structure is arguably clique-width, which intuitively measures how easily a graph can be constructed by repeatedly adding bicliques. Bergougnoux and Kanté (TCS 2019) have shown, using the rank-based approach, that also parameterized by clique-width many connectivity problems admit single-exponential algorithms. Unfortunately, the obtained running times are far from optimal under SETH. We show how to obtain optimal running times parameterized by clique-width for two benchmark connectivity problems, namely Connected Vertex Cover and Connected Dominating Set. These are the first tight results for connectivity problems with respect to clique-width and these results are obtained by developing new algorithms based on the cut-and-count-technique and novel lower bound constructions. Precisely, we show that there exist one-sided error Monte-Carlo algorithms that given a k-clique-expression solve Connected Vertex Cover in time 6^k n^O(1), and Connected Dominating Set in time 5^k n^O(1). Both results are shown to be tight under SETH. 涉及全局约束的问题的复杂性通常比仅涉及局部约束的问题的复杂性更难理解。全局约束的一种自然形式是连通性约束。我们从细粒度参数化的角度研究连接问题。 Cygan 等人取得了突破。 (TALG 2022) 首先通过引入切割计数技术，针对由树宽参数化的连通性问题，获得了具有单指数运行时间 c^{tw} n^O(1) 的算法。此外，所获得的碱基c在强指数时间假设（SETH）下被证明是最优的。然而，由于只有稀疏图可能允许较小的树宽，因此我们缺乏关于密集结构的连接问题的细粒度复杂性的知识。衡量密集结构的最流行的图参数可以说是团宽度，它直观地衡量通过重复添加双团来构造图的难易程度。 Bergougnoux 和 Kanté（TCS 2019）已经证明，使用基于排名的方法，也通过团宽度参数化许多连接问题承认单指数算法。不幸的是，在 SETH 下获得的运行时间远非最佳。我们展示了如何针对两个基准连接问题（即连通顶点覆盖和连通支配集）获得由团宽度参数化的最佳运行时间。这些是关于团宽度的连接问题的第一个严格结果，这些结果是通过开发基于切割计数技术和新颖的下界结构的新算法获得的。准确地说，我们证明存在单边误差蒙特卡罗算法，该算法给定 k-clique 表达式，在 6^k n^O(1) 时间内求解连通顶点覆盖，在 5^k n^O(1) 时间内求解连通支配集。在 SETH 下，这两个结果都显示为紧缩。 本文针对以团宽（clique-width）为参数的连通性问题，开发了最优时间复杂度的算法。 Falko Hegerfeld,Stefan Kratsch cs.DS

authors_text: Seyed Mohammad Sadegh Dashti,Seyedeh Fatemeh Dashti
title: An Expert System to Diagnose Spinal Disorders
title_zh: 诊断脊柱疾病的专家系统
abstract: Objective: Until now, traditional invasive approaches have been the only means being leveraged to diagnose spinal disorders. Traditional manual diagnostics require a high workload, and diagnostic errors are likely to occur due to the prolonged work of physicians. In this research, we develop an expert system based on a hybrid inference algorithm and comprehensive integrated knowledge for assisting the experts in the fast and high-quality diagnosis of spinal disorders. Methods: First, for each spinal anomaly, the accurate and integrated knowledge was acquired from related experts and resources. Second, based on probability distributions and dependencies between symptoms of each anomaly, a unique numerical value known as certainty effect value was assigned to each symptom. Third, a new hybrid inference algorithm was designed to obtain excellent performance, which was an incorporation of the Backward Chaining Inference and Theory of Uncertainty. Results: The proposed expert system was evaluated in two different phases, real-world samples, and medical records evaluation. Evaluations show that in terms of real-world samples analysis, the system achieved excellent accuracy. Application of the system on the sample with anomalies revealed the degree of severity of disorders and the risk of development of abnormalities in unhealthy and healthy patients. In the case of medical records analysis, our expert system proved to have promising performance, which was very close to those of experts. Conclusion: Evaluations suggest that the proposed expert system provides promising performance, helping specialists to validate the accuracy and integrity of their diagnosis. It can also serve as an intelligent educational software for medical students to gain familiarity with spinal disorder diagnosis process, and related symptoms.

Evaluations show that in terms of real-world samples analysis, the system achieved excellent accuracy. Application of the system on the sample with anomalies revealed the degree of severity of disorders and the risk of development of abnormalities in unhealthy and healthy patients. abstract_zh: 目的：到目前为止，传统的侵入性方法一直是诊断脊柱疾病的唯一手段。传统的人工诊断工作量大，且医生长时间工作很容易出现诊断错误。在这项研究中，我们开发了一个基于混合推理算法和全面综合知识的专家系统，以协助专家快速、高质量地诊断脊柱疾病。方法：首先，针对每种脊柱异常，从相关专家和资源获取准确、完整的知识。其次，根据每个异常症状之间的概率分布和依赖性，为每个症状分配一个称为确定性效应值的唯一数值。第三，设计了一种新的混合推理算法，该算法结合了后向链接推理和不确定性理论，以获得优异的性能。结果：所提出的专家系统在两个不同的阶段进行了评估：真实世界样本和医疗记录评估。评估表明，在实际样本分析方面，该系统取得了优异的准确性。该系统在异常样本上的应用揭示了疾病的严重程度以及不健康和健康患者出现异常的风险。在病历分析方面，我们的专家系统被证明具有良好的性能，非常接近专家的性能。结论：评估表明，所提出的专家系统具有良好的性能，可以帮助专家验证其诊断的准确性和完整性。它还可以作为医学生熟悉脊柱疾病诊断过程和相关症状的智能教育软件。

AI.tldr: 开发基于混合推理算法和综合知识的专家系统，用于快速准确诊断脊柱疾病。
AI.motivation: 传统诊断方法存在侵入性强、医生工作负荷高且易出错的问题，需开发自动化辅助系统提升诊断效率和准确性。
AI.method: 整合专家知识与症状概率分布，赋予症状确定性效应值；设计结合逆向推理链与不确定性理论的混合算法。
AI.result: 系统在真实样本和病历分析中均表现优异，准确率高且与专家诊断结果接近，可评估疾病严重程度及风险。
AI.conclusion: 该系统有效辅助专家验证诊断，同时可作为医学教育工具，提升诊断流程规范性与学生实践能力。

authors_text: Kadir Lofca,Jason Jerald,Dalton Costa,Regis Kopper
title: Does Adding Physical Realism to Virtual Reality Training Reduce Time Compression?
title_zh: 将物理现实主义添加到虚拟现实训练中是否可以减少时间压缩？
abstract: Virtual reality (VR) is known to cause a "time compression" effect, where the time spent in VR feels to pass faster than the effective elapsed time. Our goal with this research is to investigate if the physical realism of a VR experience reduces the time compression effect on a gas monitoring training task that requires precise time estimation. We used physical props and passive haptics in a VR task with high physical realism and compared it to an equivalent standard VR task with only virtual objects. We also used an identical real-world task as a baseline time estimation task. Each scenario includes the user picking up a device, opening a door, navigating a corridor with obstacles, performing five short time estimations, and estimating the total time from task start to end. Contrary to previous work, there was a consistent time dilation effect in all conditions, including the real world. However, no significant effects were found comparing the estimated differences between the high and low physical realism conditions. We discuss implications of the results and limitations of the study and propose future work that may better address this important question for virtual reality training.
summary: Virtual reality (VR) is known to cause a "time compression" effect, where the time spent in VR feels to pass faster than the effective elapsed time. Our goal with this research is to investigate if the physical realism of a VR experience reduces the time compression effect on a gas monitoring training task that requires precise time estimation. We used physical props and passive haptics in a VR task with high physical realism and compared it to an equivalent standard VR task with only virtual objects. We also used an identical real-world task as a baseline time estimation task. Each scenario includes the user picking up a device, opening a door, navigating a corridor with obstacles, performing five short time estimations, and estimating the total time from task start to end. Contrary to previous work, there was a consistent time dilation effect in all conditions, including the real world. However, no significant effects were found comparing the estimated differences between the high and low physical realism conditions. We discuss implications of the results and limitations of the study and propose future work that may better address this important question for virtual reality training.
abstract_zh: 众所周知，虚拟现实 (VR) 会产生“时间压缩”效应，即在 VR 中花费的时间感觉比有效流逝的时间过得更快。我们这项研究的目标是调查 VR 体验的物理真实性是否会降低对需要精确时间估计的气体监测训练任务的时间压缩效果。我们在具有高物理真实感的 VR 任务中使用了物理道具和被动触觉，并将其与仅包含虚拟对象的等效标准 VR 任务进行了比较。我们还使用相同的现实世界任务作为基线时间估计任务。每个场景包括用户拿起设备、打开门、穿过有障碍物的走廊、执行五次短时间估计以及估计从任务开始到结束的总时间。与之前的工作相反，在所有条件下（包括现实世界）都存在一致的时间膨胀效应。然而，比较高和低物理真实感条件之间的估计差异，没有发现显着的影响。我们讨论了研究结果的影响和局限性，并提出了未来的工作，可以更好地解决虚拟现实训练的这一重要问题。

AI.tldr: 本研究探讨在虚拟现实训练中增加物理真实感是否能减少时间压缩效应，通过对比高物理真实感VR任务、标准VR任务及现实任务的时间估计差异进行验证。
AI.motivation: 虚拟现实训练中的时间压缩效应可能影响任务表现，而物理真实感可能通过增强沉浸感改善时间感知，但此前研究结论不一致，需进一步验证其有效性。
AI.method: 设计包含物理道具与被动触觉的高物理真实感VR任务，与仅含虚拟物体的标准VR任务及现实任务对比，要求参与者完成设备操作、障碍物导航等任务并估计总耗时。
AI.result: 所有条件下均出现时间膨胀效应（感知时间长于实际时间），高物理真实感与低真实感条件间的时间估计差异无统计学意义。
AI.conclusion: 现实世界及VR环境中均存在时间膨胀现象，物理真实感未显著影响时间压缩程度，未来需优化实验设计或探索其他影响因素。

search_text: Does Adding Physical Realism to Virtual Reality Training Reduce Time Compression? 将物理现实主义添加到虚拟现实训练中是否可以减少时间压缩？ Virtual reality (VR) is known to cause a "time compression" effect, where the time spent in VR feels to pass faster than the effective elapsed time. Our goal with this research is to investigate if the physical realism of a VR experience reduces the time compression effect on a gas monitoring training task that requires precise time estimation. We used physical props and passive haptics in a VR task with high physical realism and compared it to an equivalent standard VR task with only virtual objects. We also used an identical real-world task as a baseline time estimation task. Each scenario includes the user picking up a device, opening a door, navigating a corridor with obstacles, performing five short time estimations, and estimating the total time from task start to end. Contrary to previous work, there was a consistent time dilation effect in all conditions, including the real world. However, no significant effects were found comparing the estimated differences between the high and low physical realism conditions. We discuss implications of the results and limitations of the study and propose future work that may better address this important question for virtual reality training. 众所周知，虚拟现实 (VR) 会产生“时间压缩”效应，即在 VR 中花费的时间感觉比有效流逝的时间过得更快。我们这项研究的目标是调查 VR 体验的物理真实性是否会降低对需要精确时间估计的气体监测训练任务的时间压缩效果。我们在具有高物理真实感的 VR 任务中使用了物理道具和被动触觉，并将其与仅包含虚拟对象的等效标准 VR 任务进行了比较。我们还使用相同的现实世界任务作为基线时间估计任务。每个场景包括用户拿起设备、打开门、穿过有障碍物的走廊、执行五次短时间估计以及估计从任务开始到结束的总时间。与之前的工作相反，在所有条件下（包括现实世界）都存在一致的时间膨胀效应。然而，比较高和低物理真实感条件之间的估计差异，没有发现显着的影响。我们讨论了研究结果的影响和局限性，并提出了未来的工作，可以更好地解决虚拟现实训练的这一重要问题。 本研究探讨在虚拟现实训练中增加物理真实感是否能减少时间压缩效应，通过对比高物理真实感VR任务、标准VR任务及现实任务的时间估计差异进行验证。 Kadir Lofca,Jason Jerald,Dalton Costa,Regis Kopper cs.HC

authors_text: Michal K. Grzeszczyk,Paulina Adamczyk,Sylwia Marek,Ryszard Pręcikowski,Maciej Kuś,M. Patrycja Lelujko,Rosmary Blanco,Tomasz Trzciński,Arkadiusz Sitek,Maciej Malawski,Aneta Lisowska
title: Can gamification reduce the burden of self-reporting in mHealth applications? A feasibility study using machine learning from smartwatch data to estimate cognitive load
title_zh: 游戏化能否减轻移动医疗应用中自我报告的负担？使用智能手表数据中的机器学习来估计认知负荷的可行性研究
abstract: The effectiveness of digital treatments can be measured by requiring patients to self-report their state through applications, however, it can be overwhelming and causes disengagement. We conduct a study to explore the impact of gamification on self-reporting. Our approach involves the creation of a system to assess cognitive load (CL) through the analysis of photoplethysmography (PPG) signals. The data from 11 participants is utilized to train a machine learning model to detect CL. Subsequently, we create two versions of surveys: a gamified and a traditional one. We estimate the CL experienced by other participants (13) while completing surveys. We find that CL detector performance can be enhanced via pre-training on stress detection tasks. For 10 out of 13 participants, a personalized CL detector can achieve an F1 score above 0.7. We find no difference between the gamified and non-gamified surveys in terms of CL but participants prefer the gamified version.
summary: The effectiveness of digital treatments can be measured by requiring patients to self-report their state through applications, however, it can be overwhelming and causes disengagement. We conduct a study to explore the impact of gamification on self-reporting. Our approach involves the creation of a system to assess cognitive load (CL) through the analysis of photoplethysmography (PPG) signals. The data from 11 participants is utilized to train a machine learning model to detect CL. Subsequently, we create two versions of surveys: a gamified and a traditional one. We estimate the CL experienced by other participants (13) while completing surveys. We find that CL detector performance can be enhanced via pre-training on stress detection tasks. For 10 out of 13 participants, a personalized CL detector can achieve an F1 score above 0.7. We find no difference between the gamified and non-gamified surveys in terms of CL but participants prefer the gamified version.
abstract_zh: 数字治疗的有效性可以通过要求患者通过应用程序自我报告其状态来衡量，然而，它可能会让人不知所措并导致脱离。我们进行了一项研究，探讨游戏化对自我报告的影响。我们的方法涉及创建一个系统，通过分析光电体积描记法 (PPG) 信号来评估认知负荷 (CL)。来自 11 位参与者的数据用于训练机器学习模型来检测 CL。随后，我们创建了两种版本的调查：游戏化版本和传统版本。我们估计其他参与者 (13) 在完成调查时经历的 CL。我们发现 CL 检测器的性能可以通过压力检测任务的预训练来增强。对于 13 名参与者中的 10 名，个性化 CL 检测器的 F1 分数可以达到 0.7 以上。我们发现游戏化和非游戏化调查在 CL 方面没有差异，但参与者更喜欢游戏化版本。

AI.tldr: 本研究探讨通过游戏化设计减少移动健康应用中自我报告负担的可行性，并利用智能手表数据和机器学习估计认知负荷。
AI.motivation: 患者通过应用自我报告状态可能因负担过重导致参与度下降，需探索游戏化设计对自我报告的影响及更精准的认知负荷评估方法。
AI.method: 通过分析智能手表的光电容积描记（PPG）信号训练机器学习模型检测认知负荷，设计游戏化与传统版问卷，测试13名参与者并对比其认知负荷差异。
AI.result: 预训练于压力检测任务的模型在10/13参与者中实现F1分数超0.7；游戏化与传统问卷在认知负荷无显著差异，但参与者更偏好游戏化版本。
AI.conclusion: 游戏化设计虽未显著降低认知负荷但提升用户偏好，基于PPG的机器学习认知负荷检测方法可行，未来需扩大样本验证效果。

ai_content.tldr: 本研究探讨通过游戏化设计减少移动健康应用中自我报告负担的可行性，并利用智能手表数据和机器学习估计认知负荷。

authors_text: John A. Christian
title: Pole Estimation and Optical Navigation using Circle of Latitude Projections
title_zh: 使用纬度圆投影进行极点估计和光学导航
abstract: Images of both rotating celestial bodies (e.g., asteroids) and spheroidal planets with banded atmospheres (e.g., Jupiter) can contain features that are well-modeled as a circle of latitude (CoL). The projections of these CoLs appear as ellipses in images collected by cameras or telescopes onboard exploration spacecraft. This work shows how CoL projections may be used to determine the pole orientation and covariance for a spinning asteroid. In the case of a known planet modeled as an oblate spheroid, it is shown how similar CoL projections may be used for spacecraft localization. These methods are developed using the principles of projective geometry. Numerical results are provided for simulated images of asteroid Bennu (for pole orientation) and of Jupiter (for spacecraft localization).
summary: Images of both rotating celestial bodies (e.g., asteroids) and spheroidal planets with banded atmospheres (e.g., Jupiter) can contain features that are well-modeled as a circle of latitude (CoL). The projections of these CoLs appear as ellipses in images collected by cameras or telescopes onboard exploration spacecraft. This work shows how CoL projections may be used to determine the pole orientation and covariance for a spinning asteroid. In the case of a known planet modeled as an oblate spheroid, it is shown how similar CoL projections may be used for spacecraft localization. These methods are developed using the principles of projective geometry. Numerical results are provided for simulated images of asteroid Bennu (for pole orientation) and of Jupiter (for spacecraft localization).
abstract_zh: 旋转天体（例如小行星）和具有带状大气层的球状行星（例如木星）的图像都可以包含经过良好建模的纬度圈 (CoL) 特征。这些 CoL 的投影在探索航天器上的摄像机或望远镜收集的图像中显示为椭圆形。这项工作展示了如何使用 CoL 投影来确定旋转小行星的极点方向和协方差。在将已知行星建模为扁球体的情况下，显示了如何使用类似的 CoL 投影来进行航天器定位。这些方法是利用射影几何原理开发的。提供了小行星贝努（Bennu）（用于极方位）和木星（用于航天器定位）的模拟图像的数值结果。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了如何利用纬圈投影来估计旋转小行星的极点方向和航天器在已知行星上的定位。
AI.motivation: 旋转天体（如小行星）和具有带状大气的球形行星（如木星）的图像中包含可以建模为纬圈的特征，这些特征在图像中表现为椭圆，可用于估计极点方向和航天器定位。
AI.method: 本文使用投影几何原理，通过分析纬圈投影的椭圆形状，推导出极点方向和航天器位置的计算方法。
AI.result: 通过模拟小行星Bennu和木星的图像，验证了该方法在极点方向估计和航天器定位中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 纬圈投影方法能够有效用于估计旋转天体的极点方向和航天器定位，为深空探测任务提供了新的导航手段。

ai_content.tldr: 本文研究了如何利用纬圈投影来估计旋转小行星的极点方向和航天器在已知行星上的定位。

search_text: Pole Estimation and Optical Navigation using Circle of Latitude Projections 使用纬度圆投影进行极点估计和光学导航 Images of both rotating celestial bodies (e.g., asteroids) and spheroidal planets with banded atmospheres (e.g., Jupiter) can contain features that are well-modeled as a circle of latitude (CoL). The projections of these CoLs appear as ellipses in images collected by cameras or telescopes onboard exploration spacecraft. This work shows how CoL projections may be used to determine the pole orientation and covariance for a spinning asteroid. In the case of a known planet modeled as an oblate spheroid, it is shown how similar CoL projections may be used for spacecraft localization. These methods are developed using the principles of projective geometry. Numerical results are provided for simulated images of asteroid Bennu (for pole orientation) and of Jupiter (for spacecraft localization). 旋转天体（例如小行星）和具有带状大气层的球状行星（例如木星）的图像都可以包含经过良好建模的纬度圈 (CoL) 特征。这些 CoL 的投影在探索航天器上的摄像机或望远镜收集的图像中显示为椭圆形。这项工作展示了如何使用 CoL 投影来确定旋转小行星的极点方向和协方差。在将已知行星建模为扁球体的情况下，显示了如何使用类似的 CoL 投影来进行航天器定位。这些方法是利用射影几何原理开发的。提供了小行星贝努（Bennu）（用于极方位）和木星（用于航天器定位）的模拟图像的数值结果。 本文研究了如何利用纬圈投影来估计旋转小行星的极点方向和航天器在已知行星上的定位。 John A. Christian astro-ph.EP,astro-ph.IM,cs.CV

authors_text: Martin J. A. Schuetz,J. Kyle Brubaker,Helmut G. Katzgraber
title: Reply to: Modern graph neural networks do worse than classical greedy algorithms in solving combinatorial optimization problems like maximum independent set
title_zh: 回复：现代图神经网络在解决最大独立集等组合优化问题方面比经典贪心算法表现更差
abstract: We provide a comprehensive reply to the comment written by Chiara Angelini and Federico Ricci-Tersenghi [arXiv:2206.13211] and argue that the comment singles out one particular non-representative example problem, entirely focusing on the maximum independent set (MIS) on sparse graphs, for which greedy algorithms are expected to perform well. Conversely, we highlight the broader algorithmic development underlying our original work, and (within our original framework) provide additional numerical results showing sizable improvements over our original results, thereby refuting the comment's performance statements. We also provide results showing run-time scaling superior to the results provided by Angelini and Ricci-Tersenghi. Furthermore, we show that the proposed set of random d-regular graphs does not provide a universal set of benchmark instances, nor do greedy heuristics provide a universal algorithmic baseline. Finally, we argue that the internal (parallel) anatomy of graph neural networks is very different from the (sequential) nature of greedy algorithms and emphasize that graph neural networks have demonstrated their potential for superior scalability compared to existing heuristics such as parallel tempering. We conclude by discussing the conceptual novelty of our work and outline some potential extensions.
summary: We provide a comprehensive reply to the comment written by Chiara Angelini and Federico Ricci-Tersenghi [arXiv:2206.13211] and argue that the comment singles out one particular non-representative example problem, entirely focusing on the maximum independent set (MIS) on sparse graphs, for which greedy algorithms are expected to perform well. Conversely, we highlight the broader algorithmic development underlying our original work, and (within our original framework) provide additional numerical results showing sizable improvements over our original results, thereby refuting the comment's performance statements. We also provide results showing run-time scaling superior to the results provided by Angelini and Ricci-Tersenghi. Furthermore, we show that the proposed set of random d-regular graphs does not provide a universal set of benchmark instances, nor do greedy heuristics provide a universal algorithmic baseline. Finally, we argue that the internal (parallel) anatomy of graph neural networks is very different from the (sequential) nature of greedy algorithms and emphasize that graph neural networks have demonstrated their potential for superior scalability compared to existing heuristics such as parallel tempering. We conclude by discussing the conceptual novelty of our work and outline some potential extensions.
abstract_zh: 我们对 Chiara Angelini 和 Federico Ricci-Tersenghi [arXiv:2206.13211] 撰写的评论进行了全面回复，并认为该评论挑出了一个特定的非代表性示例问题，完全关注稀疏图上的最大独立集 (MIS)，而贪婪算法预计在该问题上表现良好。相反，我们强调了我们原始工作背后更广泛的算法开发，并且（在我们原始框架内）提供了额外的数值结果，显示了我们原始结果的显着改进，从而反驳了评论的性能陈述。我们还提供了显示运行时扩展优于 Angelini 和 Ricci-Tersenghi 提供的结果的结果。此外，我们表明，所提出的随机 d-正则图集没有提供通用的基准实例集，贪婪启发式也没有提供通用的算法基线。最后，我们认为图神经网络的内部（并行）解剖结构与贪婪算法的（顺序）性质非常不同，并强调图神经网络已经证明了与现有的启发式方法（例如并行调节）相比，它们具有卓越的可扩展性的潜力。最后，我们讨论了我们工作的概念新颖性，并概述了一些潜在的扩展。

AI.tldr: 本文针对Chiara Angelini和Federico Ricci-Tersenghi的评论进行反驳，指出其仅以稀疏图的最大独立集问题为例，未能全面反映图神经网络（GNN）的优势。
AI.motivation: 回应评论中对GNN在组合优化问题上表现的质疑，强调原研究的算法框架和更广泛的适用性。
AI.method: 通过补充实验结果展示GNN在性能和运行时间上的改进，同时批判评论中使用的基准测试集和贪心算法的局限性。
AI.result: 证明GNN在稀疏图以外的场景中表现更优，且运行时间优于贪心算法；指出随机正则图不适合作为通用基准。
AI.conclusion: 强调GNN在可扩展性上的潜力，认为其结构与贪心算法本质不同，未来需进一步探索其应用边界。

authors_text: Zhenxing Cheng,Peng Wang,Yue Liu,Wei Qin,Zidi Tang
title: Industrial computed tomography based intelligent non-destructive testing method for power capacitor
title_zh: 基于工业计算机断层扫描的电力电容器智能无损检测方法
abstract: Power capacitor device is a widely used reactive power compensation equipment in power transmission and distribution system which can easily have internal fault and therefore affects the safe operation of the power system. An intelligent non-destructive testing (I-NDT) method based on ICT is proposed to test the quality of power capacitors automatically in this study. The internal structure of power capacitors would be scanned by the ICT device and then defects could be recognized by the SSD algorithm. Moreover, the data data augmentation algorithm is used to extend the image set to improve the stability and accuracy of the trained SSD model.
summary: Power capacitor device is a widely used reactive power compensation equipment in power transmission and distribution system which can easily have internal fault and therefore affects the safe operation of the power system. An intelligent non-destructive testing (I-NDT) method based on ICT is proposed to test the quality of power capacitors automatically in this study. The internal structure of power capacitors would be scanned by the ICT device and then defects could be recognized by the SSD algorithm. Moreover, the data data augmentation algorithm is used to extend the image set to improve the stability and accuracy of the trained SSD model.
abstract_zh: 电力电容器装置是输配电系统中广泛使用的无功补偿设备，很容易出现内部故障，从而影响电力系统的安全运行。本研究提出了一种基于ICT的智能无损检测（I-NDT）方法来自动检测电力电容器的质量。通过ICT设备扫描电力电容器的内部结构，然后通过SSD算法识别缺陷。而且，利用数据数据增强算法来扩展图像集，以提高训练的SSD模型的稳定性和准确性。

AI.tldr: 提出基于工业CT的智能无损检测方法，用于自动检测电力电容器内部缺陷
AI.motivation: 电力电容器内部故障易影响电力系统安全，需自动检测方法确保设备可靠性
AI.method: 采用工业CT扫描电容器内部结构，结合SSD算法识别缺陷，并利用数据增强算法提升模型稳定性与准确性
AI.result: 有效提升缺陷检测准确率与模型稳定性，实现电力电容器质量的自动化评估
AI.conclusion: 本方法为电力电容器提供高效无损检测方案，有助于保障电力系统安全稳定运行

authors_text: Zihan Zhu,Songyou Peng,Viktor Larsson,Zhaopeng Cui,Martin R. Oswald,Andreas Geiger,Marc Pollefeys
title: NICER-SLAM: Neural Implicit Scene Encoding for RGB SLAM
title_zh: NICER-SLAM：RGB SLAM 的神经隐式场景编码
abstract: Neural implicit representations have recently become popular in simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM), especially in dense visual SLAM. However, previous works in this direction either rely on RGB-D sensors, or require a separate monocular SLAM approach for camera tracking and do not produce high-fidelity dense 3D scene reconstruction. In this paper, we present NICER-SLAM, a dense RGB SLAM system that simultaneously optimizes for camera poses and a hierarchical neural implicit map representation, which also allows for high-quality novel view synthesis. To facilitate the optimization process for mapping, we integrate additional supervision signals including easy-to-obtain monocular geometric cues and optical flow, and also introduce a simple warping loss to further enforce geometry consistency. Moreover, to further boost performance in complicated indoor scenes, we also propose a local adaptive transformation from signed distance functions (SDFs) to density in the volume rendering equation. On both synthetic and real-world datasets we demonstrate strong performance in dense mapping, tracking, and novel view synthesis, even competitive with recent RGB-D SLAM systems.
summary: Neural implicit representations have recently become popular in simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM), especially in dense visual SLAM. However, previous works in this direction either rely on RGB-D sensors, or require a separate monocular SLAM approach for camera tracking and do not produce high-fidelity dense 3D scene reconstruction. In this paper, we present NICER-SLAM, a dense RGB SLAM system that simultaneously optimizes for camera poses and a hierarchical neural implicit map representation, which also allows for high-quality novel view synthesis. To facilitate the optimization process for mapping, we integrate additional supervision signals including easy-to-obtain monocular geometric cues and optical flow, and also introduce a simple warping loss to further enforce geometry consistency. Moreover, to further boost performance in complicated indoor scenes, we also propose a local adaptive transformation from signed distance functions (SDFs) to density in the volume rendering equation. On both synthetic and real-world datasets we demonstrate strong performance in dense mapping, tracking, and novel view synthesis, even competitive with recent RGB-D SLAM systems.
abstract_zh: 神经隐式表示最近在同步定位和建图 (SLAM) 中变得很流行，尤其是在密集视觉 SLAM 中。然而，之前这个方向的工作要么依赖 RGB-D 传感器，要么需要单独的单目 SLAM 方法进行相机跟踪，并且不能产生高保真密集 3D 场景重建。在本文中，我们提出了 NICER-SLAM，这是一种密集的 RGB SLAM 系统，可同时优化相机姿势和分层神经隐式地图表示，这也允许高质量的新颖视图合成。为了促进映射的优化过程，我们集成了额外的监督信号，包括易于获得的单目几何线索和光流，并且还引入了简单的扭曲损失以进一步增强几何一致性。此外，为了进一步提高复杂室内场景的性能，我们还提出了体渲染方程中从符号距离函数（SDF）到密度的局部自适应变换。在合成数据集和现实世界数据集上，我们在密集映射、跟踪和新颖的视图合成方面展示了强大的性能，甚至可以与最新的 RGB-D SLAM 系统相媲美。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为NICER-SLAM的密集RGB SLAM系统，可以同时优化相机姿态和分层神经隐式地图表示，实现高质量的新视角合成。
AI.motivation: 现有的神经隐式表示方法在SLAM领域存在依赖RGB-D传感器或需要单独的单目SLAM方法进行相机跟踪的问题，且无法生成高保真度的密集3D场景重建。
AI.method: NICER-SLAM通过整合额外的监督信号（如单目几何线索和光流）以及引入简单变形损失来增强几何一致性，并提出一种局部自适应变换，从符号距离函数（SDF）到密度的体积渲染方程中进一步提升复杂室内场景的性能。
AI.result: 在合成和真实世界数据集上，NICER-SLAM在密集映射、跟踪和新视角合成方面表现出色，甚至可与最新的RGB-D SLAM系统相媲美。
AI.conclusion: NICER-SLAM通过引入分层神经隐式地图表示和多种优化策略，成功实现了高效的RGB SLAM系统，为未来的研究提供了新思路。

search_text: NICER-SLAM: Neural Implicit Scene Encoding for RGB SLAM NICER-SLAM：RGB SLAM 的神经隐式场景编码 Neural implicit representations have recently become popular in simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM), especially in dense visual SLAM. However, previous works in this direction either rely on RGB-D sensors, or require a separate monocular SLAM approach for camera tracking and do not produce high-fidelity dense 3D scene reconstruction. In this paper, we present NICER-SLAM, a dense RGB SLAM system that simultaneously optimizes for camera poses and a hierarchical neural implicit map representation, which also allows for high-quality novel view synthesis. To facilitate the optimization process for mapping, we integrate additional supervision signals including easy-to-obtain monocular geometric cues and optical flow, and also introduce a simple warping loss to further enforce geometry consistency. Moreover, to further boost performance in complicated indoor scenes, we also propose a local adaptive transformation from signed distance functions (SDFs) to density in the volume rendering equation. On both synthetic and real-world datasets we demonstrate strong performance in dense mapping, tracking, and novel view synthesis, even competitive with recent RGB-D SLAM systems. 神经隐式表示最近在同步定位和建图 (SLAM) 中变得很流行，尤其是在密集视觉 SLAM 中。然而，之前这个方向的工作要么依赖 RGB-D 传感器，要么需要单独的单目 SLAM 方法进行相机跟踪，并且不能产生高保真密集 3D 场景重建。在本文中，我们提出了 NICER-SLAM，这是一种密集的 RGB SLAM 系统，可同时优化相机姿势和分层神经隐式地图表示，这也允许高质量的新颖视图合成。为了促进映射的优化过程，我们集成了额外的监督信号，包括易于获得的单目几何线索和光流，并且还引入了简单的扭曲损失以进一步增强几何一致性。此外，为了进一步提高复杂室内场景的性能，我们还提出了体渲染方程中从符号距离函数（SDF）到密度的局部自适应变换。在合成数据集和现实世界数据集上，我们在密集映射、跟踪和新颖的视图合成方面展示了强大的性能，甚至可以与最新的 RGB-D SLAM 系统相媲美。 本文提出了一种名为NICER-SLAM的密集RGB SLAM系统，可以同时优化相机姿态和分层神经隐式地图表示，实现高质量的新视角合成。 Zihan Zhu,Songyou Peng,Viktor Larsson,Zhaopeng Cui,Martin R. Oswald,Andreas Geiger,Marc Pollefeys cs.CV

authors_text: Sebastian Hjorth,Edoardo Lamon,Dimitrios Chrysostomou,Arash Ajoudani
title: Design of an Energy-Aware Cartesian Impedance Controller for Collaborative Disassembly
title_zh: 用于协作拆卸的能量感知笛卡尔阻抗控制器的设计
comment: 7 pages, 6 figures, presented at the 2023 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA). Video available at https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/SgYFHMlEl0k
comments: 7 pages, 6 figures, presented at the 2023 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA). Video available at https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/SgYFHMlEl0k
abstract: Human-robot collaborative disassembly is an emerging trend in the sustainable recycling process of electronic and mechanical products. It requires the use of advanced technologies to assist workers in repetitive physical tasks and deal with creaky and potentially damaged components. Nevertheless, when disassembling worn-out or damaged components, unexpected robot behaviors may emerge, so harmless and symbiotic physical interaction with humans and the environment becomes paramount. This work addresses this challenge at the control level by ensuring safe and passive behaviors in unplanned interactions and contact losses. The proposed algorithm capitalizes on an energy-aware Cartesian impedance controller, which features energy scaling and damping injection, and an augmented energy tank, which limits the power flow from the controller to the robot. The controller is evaluated in a real-world flawed unscrewing task with a Franka Emika Panda and is compared to a standard impedance controller and a hybrid force-impedance controller. The results demonstrate the high potential of the algorithm in human-robot collaborative disassembly tasks.
summary: Human-robot collaborative disassembly is an emerging trend in the sustainable recycling process of electronic and mechanical products. It requires the use of advanced technologies to assist workers in repetitive physical tasks and deal with creaky and potentially damaged components. Nevertheless, when disassembling worn-out or damaged components, unexpected robot behaviors may emerge, so harmless and symbiotic physical interaction with humans and the environment becomes paramount. This work addresses this challenge at the control level by ensuring safe and passive behaviors in unplanned interactions and contact losses. The proposed algorithm capitalizes on an energy-aware Cartesian impedance controller, which features energy scaling and damping injection, and an augmented energy tank, which limits the power flow from the controller to the robot. The controller is evaluated in a real-world flawed unscrewing task with a Franka Emika Panda and is compared to a standard impedance controller and a hybrid force-impedance controller. The results demonstrate the high potential of the algorithm in human-robot collaborative disassembly tasks.
abstract_zh: 人机协同拆解是电子机械产品可持续回收过程中的新兴趋势。它需要使用先进技术来协助工人完成重复性的体力任务并处理吱吱作响和可能损坏的部件。然而，在拆卸磨损或损坏的组件时，机器人可能会出现意想不到的行为，因此与人类和环境的无害且共生的物理交互变得至关重要。这项工作通过确保计划外交互和接触损失中的安全和被动行为来解决控制层面的这一挑战。所提出的算法利用了能量感知笛卡尔阻抗控制器（具有能量缩放和阻尼注入功能）以及增强能量罐（限制从控制器到机器人的功率流）。该控制器在现实世界中使用 Franka Emika Panda 进行的有缺陷的拧松任务中进行了评估，并与标准阻抗控制器和混合力-阻抗控制器进行了比较。结果证明了该算法在人机协作拆卸任务中的巨大潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了一种能量感知的笛卡尔阻抗控制器，用于协作拆卸任务，以确保人机交互的安全性与被动性。
AI.motivation: 在电子和机械产品的可持续回收过程中，协作拆卸需要处理磨损或损坏的组件，但传统控制器可能因意外交互导致危险，因此需提升人机物理交互的安全性。
AI.method: 提出能量感知的笛卡尔阻抗控制器，结合能量缩放、阻尼注入和增强能量缓冲器，限制控制器向机器人传递的功率流，并在真实故障旋出任务中验证效果。
AI.result: 实验表明，该算法在人机协作拆卸任务中表现出较高的安全性和有效性，优于标准阻抗控制器和混合力-阻抗控制器。
AI.conclusion: 能量感知控制器能有效保障协作拆卸中的安全交互，为复杂环境下的机器人控制提供新思路。

authors_text: Huiliang Zhang,Di Wu,Benoit Boulet
title: Adaptive Aggregation for Safety-Critical Control
title_zh: 用于安全关键控制的自适应聚合
abstract: Safety has been recognized as the central obstacle to preventing the use of reinforcement learning (RL) for real-world applications. Different methods have been developed to deal with safety concerns in RL. However, learning reliable RL-based solutions usually require a large number of interactions with the environment. Likewise, how to improve the learning efficiency, specifically, how to utilize transfer learning for safe reinforcement learning, has not been well studied. In this work, we propose an adaptive aggregation framework for safety-critical control. Our method comprises two key techniques: 1) we learn to transfer the safety knowledge by aggregating the multiple source tasks and a target task through the attention network; 2) we separate the goal of improving task performance and reducing constraint violations by utilizing a safeguard. Experiment results demonstrate that our algorithm can achieve fewer safety violations while showing better data efficiency compared with several baselines.
summary: Safety has been recognized as the central obstacle to preventing the use of reinforcement learning (RL) for real-world applications. Different methods have been developed to deal with safety concerns in RL. However, learning reliable RL-based solutions usually require a large number of interactions with the environment. Likewise, how to improve the learning efficiency, specifically, how to utilize transfer learning for safe reinforcement learning, has not been well studied. In this work, we propose an adaptive aggregation framework for safety-critical control. Our method comprises two key techniques: 1) we learn to transfer the safety knowledge by aggregating the multiple source tasks and a target task through the attention network; 2) we separate the goal of improving task performance and reducing constraint violations by utilizing a safeguard. Experiment results demonstrate that our algorithm can achieve fewer safety violations while showing better data efficiency compared with several baselines.
abstract_zh: 安全性已被认为是阻止强化学习 (RL) 在实际应用中使用的主要障碍。人们已经开发了不同的方法来解决强化学习中的安全问题。然而，学习可靠的基于强化学习的解决方案通常需要与环境进行大量交互。同样，如何提高学习效率，特别是如何利用迁移学习进行安全的强化学习，也没有得到很好的研究。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种用于安全关键控制的自适应聚合框架。我们的方法包括两个关键技术：1）我们通过注意力网络聚合多个源任务和目标任务来学习传递安全知识； 2）我们通过利用保障措施将提高任务绩效和减少约束违规的目标分开。实验结果表明，与几个基线相比，我们的算法可以实现更少的安全违规，同时显示出更好的数据效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自适应聚合框架，用于解决安全关键控制中的强化学习问题，通过迁移学习提升数据效率并减少安全违规。
AI.motivation: 安全问题是阻碍强化学习在现实世界应用的核心挑战，现有方法在减少安全违规与提高学习效率之间存在矛盾，迁移学习在安全强化学习中的应用尚未充分研究。
AI.method: 提出包含两项关键技术：1）通过注意力网络聚合多源任务与目标任务以转移安全知识；2）利用保护机制分离性能优化与约束违规控制目标。
AI.result: 实验表明，该算法在多个基准测试中实现更少的安全违规，同时相比现有方法展现出更高的数据效率。
AI.conclusion: 自适应聚合框架有效平衡了安全约束与学习效率，为安全关键场景下的强化学习提供了新思路。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种自适应聚合框架，用于解决安全关键控制中的强化学习问题，通过迁移学习提升数据效率并减少安全违规。
ai_content.motivation: 安全问题是阻碍强化学习在现实世界应用的核心挑战，现有方法在减少安全违规与提高学习效率之间存在矛盾，迁移学习在安全强化学习中的应用尚未充分研究。
ai_content.method: 提出包含两项关键技术：1）通过注意力网络聚合多源任务与目标任务以转移安全知识；2）利用保护机制分离性能优化与约束违规控制目标。
ai_content.result: 实验表明，该算法在多个基准测试中实现更少的安全违规，同时相比现有方法展现出更高的数据效率。
ai_content.conclusion: 自适应聚合框架有效平衡了安全约束与学习效率，为安全关键场景下的强化学习提供了新思路。

search_text: Adaptive Aggregation for Safety-Critical Control 用于安全关键控制的自适应聚合 Safety has been recognized as the central obstacle to preventing the use of reinforcement learning (RL) for real-world applications. Different methods have been developed to deal with safety concerns in RL. However, learning reliable RL-based solutions usually require a large number of interactions with the environment. Likewise, how to improve the learning efficiency, specifically, how to utilize transfer learning for safe reinforcement learning, has not been well studied. In this work, we propose an adaptive aggregation framework for safety-critical control. Our method comprises two key techniques: 1) we learn to transfer the safety knowledge by aggregating the multiple source tasks and a target task through the attention network; 2) we separate the goal of improving task performance and reducing constraint violations by utilizing a safeguard. Experiment results demonstrate that our algorithm can achieve fewer safety violations while showing better data efficiency compared with several baselines. 安全性已被认为是阻止强化学习 (RL) 在实际应用中使用的主要障碍。人们已经开发了不同的方法来解决强化学习中的安全问题。然而，学习可靠的基于强化学习的解决方案通常需要与环境进行大量交互。同样，如何提高学习效率，特别是如何利用迁移学习进行安全的强化学习，也没有得到很好的研究。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种用于安全关键控制的自适应聚合框架。我们的方法包括两个关键技术：1）我们通过注意力网络聚合多个源任务和目标任务来学习传递安全知识； 2）我们通过利用保障措施将提高任务绩效和减少约束违规的目标分开。实验结果表明，与几个基线相比，我们的算法可以实现更少的安全违规，同时显示出更好的数据效率。 本文提出一种自适应聚合框架，用于解决安全关键控制中的强化学习问题，通过迁移学习提升数据效率并减少安全违规。 Huiliang Zhang,Di Wu,Benoit Boulet cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Jack Furby,Daniel Cunnington,Dave Braines,Alun Preece
title: Towards a Deeper Understanding of Concept Bottleneck Models Through End-to-End Explanation
title_zh: 通过端到端解释更深入地理解概念瓶颈模型
comment: Accepted into the AAAI-23 workshop Representation Learning for Responsible Human-Centric AI (R2HCAI) as a 4 page paper. This version also includes an additional 47 pages for the appendix and contains additional figures and tables
comments: Accepted into the AAAI-23 workshop Representation Learning for Responsible Human-Centric AI (R2HCAI) as a 4 page paper. This version also includes an additional 47 pages for the appendix and contains additional figures and tables
abstract: Concept Bottleneck Models (CBMs) first map raw input(s) to a vector of human-defined concepts, before using this vector to predict a final classification. We might therefore expect CBMs capable of predicting concepts based on distinct regions of an input. In doing so, this would support human interpretation when generating explanations of the model's outputs to visualise input features corresponding to concepts. The contribution of this paper is threefold: Firstly, we expand on existing literature by looking at relevance both from the input to the concept vector, confirming that relevance is distributed among the input features, and from the concept vector to the final classification where, for the most part, the final classification is made using concepts predicted as present. Secondly, we report a quantitative evaluation to measure the distance between the maximum input feature relevance and the ground truth location; we perform this with the techniques, Layer-wise Relevance Propagation (LRP), Integrated Gradients (IG) and a baseline gradient approach, finding LRP has a lower average distance than IG. Thirdly, we propose using the proportion of relevance as a measurement for explaining concept importance.
summary: Concept Bottleneck Models (CBMs) first map raw input(s) to a vector of human-defined concepts, before using this vector to predict a final classification. We might therefore expect CBMs capable of predicting concepts based on distinct regions of an input. In doing so, this would support human interpretation when generating explanations of the model's outputs to visualise input features corresponding to concepts. The contribution of this paper is threefold: Firstly, we expand on existing literature by looking at relevance both from the input to the concept vector, confirming that relevance is distributed among the input features, and from the concept vector to the final classification where, for the most part, the final classification is made using concepts predicted as present. Secondly, we report a quantitative evaluation to measure the distance between the maximum input feature relevance and the ground truth location; we perform this with the techniques, Layer-wise Relevance Propagation (LRP), Integrated Gradients (IG) and a baseline gradient approach, finding LRP has a lower average distance than IG. Thirdly, we propose using the proportion of relevance as a measurement for explaining concept importance.
abstract_zh: 概念瓶颈模型 (CBM) 首先将原始输入映射到人类定义的概念向量，然后使用该向量来预测最终分类。因此，我们可能期望 CBM 能够根据输入的不同区域来预测概念。这样做，在生成模型输出的解释以可视化与概念相对应的输入特征时，这将支持人类解释。本文的贡献有三个：首先，我们通过查看从输入到概念向量的相关性来扩展现有文献，确认相关性分布在输入特征之间，以及从概念向量到最终分类，其中大多数情况下，最终分类是使用当前预测的概念进行的。其次，我们报告了定量评估，以测量最大输入特征相关性与地面真实位置之间的距离；我们使用逐层相关性传播 (LRP)、积分梯度 (IG) 和基线梯度方法来执行此操作，发现 LRP 的平均距离比 IG 更低。第三，我们建议使用相关性比例作为解释概念重要性的衡量标准。

AI.tldr: 本文通过端到端解释方法深入研究概念瓶颈模型（CBMs），分析输入特征与概念向量及最终分类之间的相关性，并提出新的概念重要性衡量方法。
AI.motivation: 概念瓶颈模型需要更清晰的可解释性以支持人类理解模型决策过程，现有研究缺乏对输入特征与概念映射关系的系统分析。
AI.method: 采用层间相关性传播（LRP）、积分梯度（IG）等方法量化输入特征与概念向量的相关性，通过对比实验验证方法有效性，并提出以相关性比例衡量概念重要性。
AI.result: 实验表明LRP方法在输入特征相关性定位精度上优于IG；概念分类主要依赖预测为存在的概念，且相关性比例能有效反映概念重要性。
AI.conclusion: 本文通过系统分析CBM的解释机制，揭示了输入特征相关性分布特性，验证了LRP方法的优势，并为概念重要性评估提供了新思路。

authors_text: Ethan Chun,Yilun Du,Anthony Simeonov,Tomas Lozano-Perez,Leslie Kaelbling
title: Local Neural Descriptor Fields: Locally Conditioned Object Representations for Manipulation
title_zh: 局部神经描述符字段：用于操作的局部条件对象表示
abstract: A robot operating in a household environment will see a wide range of unique and unfamiliar objects. While a system could train on many of these, it is infeasible to predict all the objects a robot will see. In this paper, we present a method to generalize object manipulation skills acquired from a limited number of demonstrations, to novel objects from unseen shape categories. Our approach, Local Neural Descriptor Fields (L-NDF), utilizes neural descriptors defined on the local geometry of the object to effectively transfer manipulation demonstrations to novel objects at test time. In doing so, we leverage the local geometry shared between objects to produce a more general manipulation framework. We illustrate the efficacy of our approach in manipulating novel objects in novel poses -- both in simulation and in the real world.
summary: A robot operating in a household environment will see a wide range of unique and unfamiliar objects. While a system could train on many of these, it is infeasible to predict all the objects a robot will see. In this paper, we present a method to generalize object manipulation skills acquired from a limited number of demonstrations, to novel objects from unseen shape categories. Our approach, Local Neural Descriptor Fields (L-NDF), utilizes neural descriptors defined on the local geometry of the object to effectively transfer manipulation demonstrations to novel objects at test time. In doing so, we leverage the local geometry shared between objects to produce a more general manipulation framework. We illustrate the efficacy of our approach in manipulating novel objects in novel poses -- both in simulation and in the real world.
abstract_zh: 在家庭环境中运行的机器人会看到各种独特且不熟悉的物体。虽然系统可以对其中许多物体进行训练，但预测机器人将看到的所有物体是不可行的。在本文中，我们提出了一种方法，可以将从有限数量的演示中获得的对象操作技能概括为从未见过的形状类别中的新对象。我们的方法局部神经描述符场（L-NDF）利用在对象的局部几何形状上定义的神经描述符，在测试时有效地将操作演示转移到新对象。在此过程中，我们利用对象之间共享的局部几何图形来生成更通用的操作框架。我们展示了我们的方法在以新颖的姿势操纵新颖的物体方面的有效性——无论是在模拟还是在现实世界中。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为L-NDF的方法，通过局部几何特征实现机器人对新物体的操控技能迁移。
AI.motivation: 家庭环境中的机器人会遇到大量未见过的物体，传统方法难以覆盖所有可能对象，需从有限示例中泛化操控技能。
AI.method: 利用局部神经描述符（L-NDF）捕捉物体局部几何特征，通过共享几何信息将已学习的操控技能迁移到新物体。
AI.result: 方法在仿真和真实环境中均能有效操控新物体的新姿态，验证了其泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: L-NDF通过局部几何建模实现了对未知物体的通用操控框架，为机器人操作提供了新思路。

Our approach, Local Neural Descriptor Fields (L-NDF), utilizes neural descriptors defined on the local geometry of the object to effectively transfer manipulation demonstrations to novel objects at test time. We illustrate the efficacy of our approach in manipulating novel objects in novel poses -- both in simulation and in the real world. 在家庭环境中运行的机器人会看到各种独特且不熟悉的物体。虽然系统可以对其中许多物体进行训练，但预测机器人将看到的所有物体是不可行的。在本文中，我们提出了一种方法，可以将从有限数量的演示中获得的对象操作技能概括为从未见过的形状类别中的新对象。我们的方法局部神经描述符场（L-NDF）利用在对象的局部几何形状上定义的神经描述符，在测试时有效地将操作演示转移到新对象。在此过程中，我们利用对象之间共享的局部几何图形来生成更通用的操作框架。我们展示了我们的方法在以新颖的姿势操纵新颖的物体方面的有效性——无论是在模拟还是在现实世界中。 本文提出了一种名为L-NDF的方法，通过局部几何特征实现机器人对新物体的操控技能迁移。 Ethan Chun,Yilun Du,Anthony Simeonov,Tomas Lozano-Perez,Leslie Kaelbling cs.RO,cs.AI,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Yuli Wu,Ivan Karetic,Johannes Stegmaier,Peter Walter,Dorit Merhof
title: A Deep Learning-based in silico Framework for Optimization on Retinal Prosthetic Stimulation
title_zh: 基于深度学习的计算机框架，用于优化视网膜假体刺激
comment: ef:2023 45th Annual International Conference of the IEEE Engineering in Medicine & Biology Society (EMBC)
comments: ef:2023 45th Annual International Conference of the IEEE Engineering in Medicine & Biology Society (EMBC)
abstract: We propose a neural network-based framework to optimize the perceptions simulated by the in silico retinal implant model pulse2percept. The overall pipeline consists of a trainable encoder, a pre-trained retinal implant model and a pre-trained evaluator. The encoder is a U-Net, which takes the original image and outputs the stimulus. The pre-trained retinal implant model is also a U-Net, which is trained to mimic the biomimetic perceptual model implemented in pulse2percept. The evaluator is a shallow VGG classifier, which is trained with original images. Based on 10,000 test images from the MNIST dataset, we show that the convolutional neural network-based encoder performs significantly better than the trivial downsampling approach, yielding a boost in the weighted F1-Score by 36.17% in the pre-trained classifier with 6x10 electrodes. With this fully neural network-based encoder, the quality of the downstream perceptions can be fine-tuned using gradient descent in an end-to-end fashion.
summary: We propose a neural network-based framework to optimize the perceptions simulated by the in silico retinal implant model pulse2percept. The overall pipeline consists of a trainable encoder, a pre-trained retinal implant model and a pre-trained evaluator. The encoder is a U-Net, which takes the original image and outputs the stimulus. The pre-trained retinal implant model is also a U-Net, which is trained to mimic the biomimetic perceptual model implemented in pulse2percept. The evaluator is a shallow VGG classifier, which is trained with original images. Based on 10,000 test images from the MNIST dataset, we show that the convolutional neural network-based encoder performs significantly better than the trivial downsampling approach, yielding a boost in the weighted F1-Score by 36.17% in the pre-trained classifier with 6x10 electrodes. With this fully neural network-based encoder, the quality of the downstream perceptions can be fine-tuned using gradient descent in an end-to-end fashion.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个基于神经网络的框架来优化由计算机视网膜植入模型pulse2percept模拟的感知。整个流程由可训练的编码器、预训练的视网膜植入模型和预训练的评估器组成。编码器是一个 U-Net，它获取原始图像并输出刺激。预训练的视网膜植入模型也是一个 U-Net，它经过训练来模仿pulse2percept 中实现的仿生感知模型。评估器是一个浅层 VGG 分类器，使用原始图像进行训练。基于 MNIST 数据集中的 10,000 张测试图像，我们表明基于卷积神经网络的编码器的性能明显优于普通的下采样方法，在具有 6x10 电极的预训练分类器中，加权 F1 得分提高了 36.17%。借助这种完全基于神经网络的编码器，可以使用梯度下降以端到端的方式微调下游感知的质量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的框架，用于优化视网膜假体刺激的感知模拟。
AI.motivation: 传统视网膜假体刺激方法存在感知质量不足的问题，需通过更精确的神经网络模型优化刺激模式以提升视觉感知效果。
AI.method: 构建包含可训练编码器（U-Net）、预训练视网膜植入模型（U-Net）和预训练评估器（VGG分类器）的端到端框架，通过梯度下降法优化刺激生成。
AI.result: 在MNIST数据集的10,000张测试图像上，CNN编码器使预训练分类器的加权F1-Score提升36.17%（6x10电极配置）。
AI.conclusion: 该全神经网络框架可有效提升视网膜假体感知质量，为个性化刺激优化提供可行方案。

The pre-trained retinal implant model is also a U-Net, which is trained to mimic the biomimetic perceptual model implemented in pulse2percept. With this fully neural network-based encoder, the quality of the downstream perceptions can be fine-tuned using gradient descent in an end-to-end fashion. 我们提出了一个基于神经网络的框架来优化由计算机视网膜植入模型pulse2percept模拟的感知。整个流程由可训练的编码器、预训练的视网膜植入模型和预训练的评估器组成。编码器是一个 U-Net，它获取原始图像并输出刺激。预训练的视网膜植入模型也是一个 U-Net，它经过训练来模仿pulse2percept 中实现的仿生感知模型。评估器是一个浅层 VGG 分类器，使用原始图像进行训练。基于 MNIST 数据集中的 10,000 张测试图像，我们表明基于卷积神经网络的编码器的性能明显优于普通的下采样方法，在具有 6x10 电极的预训练分类器中，加权 F1 得分提高了 36.17%。借助这种完全基于神经网络的编码器，可以使用梯度下降以端到端的方式微调下游感知的质量。 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的框架，用于优化视网膜假体刺激的感知模拟。 Yuli Wu,Ivan Karetic,Johannes Stegmaier,Peter Walter,Dorit Merhof eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.NE

authors_text: Gianluca Scarpellini,Stefano Rosa,Pietro Morerio,Lorenzo Natale,Alessio Del Bue
title: Look Around and Learn: Self-Training Object Detection by Exploration
title_zh: 环顾四周并学习：通过探索自我训练目标检测
abstract: When an object detector is deployed in a novel setting it often experiences a drop in performance. This paper studies how an embodied agent can automatically fine-tune a pre-existing object detector while exploring and acquiring images in a new environment without relying on human intervention, i.e., a fully self-supervised approach. In our setting, an agent initially learns to explore the environment using a pre-trained off-the-shelf detector to locate objects and associate pseudo-labels. By assuming that pseudo-labels for the same object must be consistent across different views, we learn the exploration policy Look Around to mine hard samples, and we devise a novel mechanism called Disagreement Reconciliation for producing refined pseudo-labels from the consensus among observations. We implement a unified benchmark of the current state-of-the-art and compare our approach with pre-existing exploration policies and perception mechanisms. Our method is shown to outperform existing approaches, improving the object detector by 6.2% in a simulated scenario, a 3.59% advancement over other state-of-the-art methods, and by 9.97% in the real robotic test without relying on ground-truth. Code for the proposed approach and baselines are available at https://iit-pavis.github.io/Look_Around_And_Learn/.
summary: When an object detector is deployed in a novel setting it often experiences a drop in performance. This paper studies how an embodied agent can automatically fine-tune a pre-existing object detector while exploring and acquiring images in a new environment without relying on human intervention, i.e., a fully self-supervised approach. In our setting, an agent initially learns to explore the environment using a pre-trained off-the-shelf detector to locate objects and associate pseudo-labels. By assuming that pseudo-labels for the same object must be consistent across different views, we learn the exploration policy Look Around to mine hard samples, and we devise a novel mechanism called Disagreement Reconciliation for producing refined pseudo-labels from the consensus among observations. We implement a unified benchmark of the current state-of-the-art and compare our approach with pre-existing exploration policies and perception mechanisms. Our method is shown to outperform existing approaches, improving the object detector by 6.2% in a simulated scenario, a 3.59% advancement over other state-of-the-art methods, and by 9.97% in the real robotic test without relying on ground-truth. Code for the proposed approach and baselines are available at https://iit-pavis.github.io/Look_Around_And_Learn/.
abstract_zh: 当物体检测器部署在新的环境中时，它的性能通常会下降。本文研究了实体代理如何在不依赖人类干预的情况下在新环境中探索和获取图像的同时自动微调预先存在的物体检测器，即完全自我监督的方法。在我们的设置中，代理最初学习使用预先训练的现成检测器来探索环境，以定位对象并关联伪标签。通过假设同一对象的伪标签在不同视图中必须保持一致，我们学习了探索策略“环顾四周”来挖掘硬样本，并设计了一种称为“分歧协调”的新颖机制，用于根据观察之间的共识生成精炼的伪标签。我们实施当前最先进的统一基准，并将我们的方法与现有的勘探政策和感知机制进行比较。我们的方法被证明优于现有方法，在模拟场景中将目标检测器提高了 6.2%，比其他最先进的方法提高了 3.59%，在不依赖地面实况的真实机器人测试中提高了 9.97%。建议方法和基线的代码可在 https://iit-pavis.github.io/Look_Around_And_Learn/ 上找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需人工干预的自监督方法，通过探索新环境中的图像来自动微调预训练的目标检测器。
AI.motivation: 目标检测器在新环境中部署时常出现性能下降，传统方法依赖人工标注数据，难以适应动态场景。
AI.method: 使用预训练检测器生成伪标签，通过'Look Around'策略挖掘困难样本，并设计'Disagreement Reconciliation'机制从多视角观测中提炼一致的伪标签。
AI.result: 在模拟场景中提升6.2%，超越其他SOTA方法3.59%，在真实机器人测试中提升9.97%且无需真实标注。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过自监督探索与标签共识机制有效提升检测器适应性，在仿真与真实场景均表现优异。

authors_text: Lucas Maystre,Daniel Russo,Yu Zhao
title: Optimizing Audio Recommendations for the Long-Term: A Reinforcement Learning Perspective
title_zh: 长期优化音频推荐：强化学习视角
abstract: We present a novel podcast recommender system deployed at industrial scale. This system successfully optimizes personal listening journeys that unfold over months for hundreds of millions of listeners. In deviating from the pervasive industry practice of optimizing machine learning algorithms for short-term proxy metrics, the system substantially improves long-term performance in A/B tests. The paper offers insights into how our methods cope with attribution, coordination, and measurement challenges that usually hinder such long-term optimization. To contextualize these practical insights within a broader academic framework, we turn to reinforcement learning (RL). Using the language of RL, we formulate a comprehensive model of users' recurring relationships with a recommender system. Then, within this model, we identify our approach as a policy improvement update to a component of the existing recommender system, enhanced by tailored modeling of value functions and user-state representations. Illustrative offline experiments suggest this specialized modeling reduces data requirements by as much as a factor of 120,000 compared to black-box approaches.
summary: We present a novel podcast recommender system deployed at industrial scale. This system successfully optimizes personal listening journeys that unfold over months for hundreds of millions of listeners. In deviating from the pervasive industry practice of optimizing machine learning algorithms for short-term proxy metrics, the system substantially improves long-term performance in A/B tests. The paper offers insights into how our methods cope with attribution, coordination, and measurement challenges that usually hinder such long-term optimization. To contextualize these practical insights within a broader academic framework, we turn to reinforcement learning (RL). Using the language of RL, we formulate a comprehensive model of users' recurring relationships with a recommender system. Then, within this model, we identify our approach as a policy improvement update to a component of the existing recommender system, enhanced by tailored modeling of value functions and user-state representations. Illustrative offline experiments suggest this specialized modeling reduces data requirements by as much as a factor of 120,000 compared to black-box approaches.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种以工业规模部署的新型播客推荐系统。该系统成功优化了数亿听众历时数月的个人聆听之旅。与针对短期代理指标优化机器学习算法的普遍行业实践不同，该系统显着提高了 A/B 测试中的长期性能。该论文深入探讨了我们的方法如何应对通常阻碍这种长期优化的归因、协调和测量挑战。为了将这些实践见解融入到更广泛的学术框架中，我们转向强化学习（RL）。使用强化学习语言，我们制定了用户与推荐系统的重复关系的综合模型。然后，在这个模型中，我们将我们的方法确定为对现有推荐系统组件的策略改进更新，并通过价值函数和用户状态表示的定制建模来增强。说明性离线实验表明，与黑盒方法相比，这种专门的建模可将数据需求减少多达 120,000 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于强化学习的音频推荐系统，旨在优化用户的长期收听体验，而非传统的短期指标。
AI.motivation: 当前行业普遍依赖短期代理指标优化推荐系统，导致长期效果不佳。本文旨在解决长期优化中的归因、协调和度量难题，提升用户长期参与度。
AI.method: 通过强化学习框架建模用户与推荐系统的持续互动，提出策略改进更新方法，结合定制化的价值函数和用户状态表示，并通过离线实验验证方法有效性。
AI.result: 系统在A/B测试中显著提升长期表现，离线实验表明数据需求较黑盒方法减少12万倍。
AI.conclusion: 强化学习方法能有效应对长期优化挑战，为工业级推荐系统提供可扩展的解决方案，兼具学术理论与实践价值。

search_text: Optimizing Audio Recommendations for the Long-Term: A Reinforcement Learning Perspective 长期优化音频推荐：强化学习视角 We present a novel podcast recommender system deployed at industrial scale. This system successfully optimizes personal listening journeys that unfold over months for hundreds of millions of listeners. In deviating from the pervasive industry practice of optimizing machine learning algorithms for short-term proxy metrics, the system substantially improves long-term performance in A/B tests. The paper offers insights into how our methods cope with attribution, coordination, and measurement challenges that usually hinder such long-term optimization. To contextualize these practical insights within a broader academic framework, we turn to reinforcement learning (RL). Using the language of RL, we formulate a comprehensive model of users' recurring relationships with a recommender system. Then, within this model, we identify our approach as a policy improvement update to a component of the existing recommender system, enhanced by tailored modeling of value functions and user-state representations. Illustrative offline experiments suggest this specialized modeling reduces data requirements by as much as a factor of 120,000 compared to black-box approaches. 我们提出了一种以工业规模部署的新型播客推荐系统。该系统成功优化了数亿听众历时数月的个人聆听之旅。与针对短期代理指标优化机器学习算法的普遍行业实践不同，该系统显着提高了 A/B 测试中的长期性能。该论文深入探讨了我们的方法如何应对通常阻碍这种长期优化的归因、协调和测量挑战。为了将这些实践见解融入到更广泛的学术框架中，我们转向强化学习（RL）。使用强化学习语言，我们制定了用户与推荐系统的重复关系的综合模型。然后，在这个模型中，我们将我们的方法确定为对现有推荐系统组件的策略改进更新，并通过价值函数和用户状态表示的定制建模来增强。说明性离线实验表明，与黑盒方法相比，这种专门的建模可将数据需求减少多达 120,000 倍。 本文提出了一种基于强化学习的音频推荐系统，旨在优化用户的长期收听体验，而非传统的短期指标。 Lucas Maystre,Daniel Russo,Yu Zhao cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.IR,eess.SY,stat.ML

authors_text: Carole Adam
title: Simulating the impact of cognitive biases on the mobility transition
title_zh: 模拟认知偏差对移动转型的影响
abstract: Climate change is becoming more visible, and human adaptation is required urgently to prevent greater damage. One particular domain of adaptation concerns daily mobility (work commute), with a significant portion of these trips being done in individual cars. Yet, their impact on pollution, noise, or accidents is well-known. This paper explores various cognitive biases that can explain such lack of adaptation. Our approach is to design simple interactive simulators that users can play with in order to understand biases. The idea is that awareness of such cognitive biases is often a first step towards more rational decision making, even though things are not that simple. This paper reports on three simulators, each focused on a particular factor of resistance. Various scenarios are simulated to demonstrate their explanatory power. These simulators are already available to play online, with the goal to provide users with food for thought about how mobility could evolve in the future. Work is still ongoing to design a user survey to evaluate their impact.
summary: Climate change is becoming more visible, and human adaptation is required urgently to prevent greater damage. One particular domain of adaptation concerns daily mobility (work commute), with a significant portion of these trips being done in individual cars. Yet, their impact on pollution, noise, or accidents is well-known. This paper explores various cognitive biases that can explain such lack of adaptation. Our approach is to design simple interactive simulators that users can play with in order to understand biases. The idea is that awareness of such cognitive biases is often a first step towards more rational decision making, even though things are not that simple. This paper reports on three simulators, each focused on a particular factor of resistance. Various scenarios are simulated to demonstrate their explanatory power. These simulators are already available to play online, with the goal to provide users with food for thought about how mobility could evolve in the future. Work is still ongoing to design a user survey to evaluate their impact.
abstract_zh: 气候变化变得越来越明显，人类迫切需要适应气候变化，以防止造成更大的损害。适应的一个特定领域涉及日常出行（工作通勤），其中很大一部分旅行是乘坐私家车完成的。然而，它们对污染、噪音或事故的影响是众所周知的。本文探讨了可以解释这种适应性缺乏的各种认知偏差。我们的方法是设计简单的交互式模拟器，用户可以使用它来了解偏见。这个想法是，意识到这种认知偏差通常是做出更理性决策的第一步，尽管事情并不那么简单。本文报告了三个模拟器，每个模拟器都专注于一个特定的阻力因素。模拟各种场景以展示其解释力。这些模拟器已经可以在线玩，目的是为用户提供关于未来移动性如何发展的思考。设计用户调查以评估其影响的工作仍在进行中。

AI.tldr: 设计互动模拟器，研究认知偏差对出行方式转变的影响
AI.motivation: 应对气候变化，促进可持续出行，需理解阻碍适应的认知偏差
AI.method: 开发三个互动模拟器，模拟不同阻力因素场景，展示认知偏差的解释力
AI.result: 模拟器上线，提供未来出行思考，但需进一步调查其影响
AI.conclusion: 认知偏差阻碍适应，提高意识有助于理性决策，但需进一步研究

authors_text: Ricardo Martins,Meysam Basiri
title: Tension Estimation and Localization for a Tethered Micro Aerial Robot
title_zh: 系留微型空中机器人的张力估计和定位
abstract: This work focuses on the study of tethered fights of a micro quadcopter, with the aim of supplying continuous power to a small-sized aerial robot. Multiple features for facilitating the interaction between a tethered micro quadcopter and a ground base are described in this paper. Firstly, a tether model based on the catenary curve is presented that describes a quadcopter tethered to a point in space. Furthermore, a method capable of estimating the tension applied to the quadcopter, based only on the inertial information from the IMU sensors and the motor thrusts, is presented. Finally, a novel method for localizing the quadcopter by exploiting the tension imposed by the tether and the shape of the tether is described. The proposed methods are evaluated both in simulation and in real world prototype.
summary: This work focuses on the study of tethered fights of a micro quadcopter, with the aim of supplying continuous power to a small-sized aerial robot. Multiple features for facilitating the interaction between a tethered micro quadcopter and a ground base are described in this paper. Firstly, a tether model based on the catenary curve is presented that describes a quadcopter tethered to a point in space. Furthermore, a method capable of estimating the tension applied to the quadcopter, based only on the inertial information from the IMU sensors and the motor thrusts, is presented. Finally, a novel method for localizing the quadcopter by exploiting the tension imposed by the tether and the shape of the tether is described. The proposed methods are evaluated both in simulation and in real world prototype.
abstract_zh: 本工作重点研究微型四轴飞行器的系留战斗，旨在为小型空中机器人提供持续动力。本文描述了促进系留微型四轴飞行器和地面基地之间交互的多个功能。首先，提出了基于悬链线的系链模型，该模型描述了系链到空间中的一点的四轴飞行器。此外，还提出了一种能够仅基于 IMU 传感器和电机推力的惯性信息来估计施加到四轴飞行器的张力的方法。最后，描述了一种通过利用系绳施加的张力和系绳的形状来定位四轴飞行器的新方法。所提出的方法在模拟和现实世界原型中进行了评估。

AI.tldr: 本论文研究了 tethered 微型四旋翼飞行器的张力估计与定位方法，旨在为小型空中机器人提供持续电源并增强其与地面基站的交互能力。
AI.motivation: 传统小型空中机器人依赖电池供电存在续航限制，而tethered系统可提供持续电源，但需解决绳索张力估计与定位难题以实现稳定交互。
AI.method: 提出基于悬链线模型的绳索建模方法，结合IMU惯性数据与电机推力实现张力估计，并利用绳索形变与张力特征进行四旋翼定位。
AI.result: 实验验证了所提方法在仿真环境与实体原型中的有效性，证明其可准确估计绳索张力并实现四旋翼定位。
AI.conclusion: 本研究为tethered微型空中机器人系统提供了张力估计与定位的可行方案，为后续持续供电与稳定交互应用奠定了技术基础。

The proposed methods are evaluated both in simulation and in real world prototype. 本工作重点研究微型四轴飞行器的系留战斗，旨在为小型空中机器人提供持续动力。本文描述了促进系留微型四轴飞行器和地面基地之间交互的多个功能。首先，提出了基于悬链线的系链模型，该模型描述了系链到空间中的一点的四轴飞行器。此外，还提出了一种能够仅基于 IMU 传感器和电机推力的惯性信息来估计施加到四轴飞行器的张力的方法。最后，描述了一种通过利用系绳施加的张力和系绳的形状来定位四轴飞行器的新方法。所提出的方法在模拟和现实世界原型中进行了评估。 本论文研究了 tethered 微型四旋翼飞行器的张力估计与定位方法，旨在为小型空中机器人提供持续电源并增强其与地面基站的交互能力。 Ricardo Martins,Meysam Basiri cs.RO

authors_text: Zitong Yu,Yuming Shen,Jingang Shi,Hengshuang Zhao,Yawen Cui,Jiehua Zhang,Philip Torr,Guoying Zhao
title: PhysFormer++: Facial Video-based Physiological Measurement with SlowFast Temporal Difference Transformer
title_zh: PhysFormer++：使用 SlowFast 时间差分变压器进行基于面部视频的生理测量
comment: Accepted by International Journal of Computer Vision (IJCV). arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2111.12082
comments: Accepted by International Journal of Computer Vision (IJCV). arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2111.12082
abstract: Remote photoplethysmography (rPPG), which aims at measuring heart activities and physiological signals from facial video without any contact, has great potential in many applications (e.g., remote healthcare and affective computing). Recent deep learning approaches focus on mining subtle rPPG clues using convolutional neural networks with limited spatio-temporal receptive fields, which neglect the long-range spatio-temporal perception and interaction for rPPG modeling. In this paper, we propose two end-to-end video transformer based architectures, namely PhysFormer and PhysFormer++, to adaptively aggregate both local and global spatio-temporal features for rPPG representation enhancement. As key modules in PhysFormer, the temporal difference transformers first enhance the quasi-periodic rPPG features with temporal difference guided global attention, and then refine the local spatio-temporal representation against interference. To better exploit the temporal contextual and periodic rPPG clues, we also extend the PhysFormer to the two-pathway SlowFast based PhysFormer++ with temporal difference periodic and cross-attention transformers. Furthermore, we propose the label distribution learning and a curriculum learning inspired dynamic constraint in frequency domain, which provide elaborate supervisions for PhysFormer and PhysFormer++ and alleviate overfitting. Comprehensive experiments are performed on four benchmark datasets to show our superior performance on both intra- and cross-dataset testings. Unlike most transformer networks needed pretraining from large-scale datasets, the proposed PhysFormer family can be easily trained from scratch on rPPG datasets, which makes it promising as a novel transformer baseline for the rPPG community.

Recent deep learning approaches focus on mining subtle rPPG clues using convolutional neural networks with limited spatio-temporal receptive fields, which neglect the long-range spatio-temporal perception and interaction for rPPG modeling. In this paper, we propose two end-to-end video transformer based architectures, namely PhysFormer and PhysFormer++, to adaptively aggregate both local and global spatio-temporal features for rPPG representation enhancement. As key modules in PhysFormer, the temporal difference transformers first enhance the quasi-periodic rPPG features with temporal difference guided global attention, and then refine the local spatio-temporal representation against interference. To better exploit the temporal contextual and periodic rPPG clues, we also extend the PhysFormer to the two-pathway SlowFast based PhysFormer++ with temporal difference periodic and cross-attention transformers. Furthermore, we propose the label distribution learning and a curriculum learning inspired dynamic constraint in frequency domain, which provide elaborate supervisions for PhysFormer and PhysFormer++ and alleviate overfitting. Comprehensive experiments are performed on four benchmark datasets to show our superior performance on both intra- and cross-dataset testings. Unlike most transformer networks needed pretraining from large-scale datasets, the proposed PhysFormer family can be easily trained from scratch on rPPG datasets, which makes it promising as a novel transformer baseline for the rPPG community.
abstract_zh: 远程光电体积描记法（rPPG）旨在无需任何接触地通过面部视频测量心脏活动和生理信号，在许多应用（例如远程医疗和情感计算）中具有巨大潜力。最近的深度学习方法侧重于使用具有有限时空感受野的卷积神经网络挖掘微妙的 rPPG 线索，而忽略了 rPPG 建模的远程时空感知和交互。在本文中，我们提出了两种基于端到端视频转换器的架构，即 PhysFormer 和 PhysFormer++，以自适应聚合局部和全局时空特征以增强 rPPG 表示。作为 PhysFormer 中的关键模块，时间差变换器首先通过时间差引导全局注意力增强准周期 rPPG 特征，然后细化局部时空表示以对抗干扰。为了更好地利用时间上下文和周期性 rPPG 线索，我们还将 PhysFormer 扩展到基于双路径 SlowFast 的 PhysFormer++，具有时间差异周期性和交叉注意变压器。此外，我们提出了标签分布学习和课程学习启发的频域动态约束，为 PhysFormer 和 PhysFormer++ 提供了精细的监督并减轻了过度拟合。在四个基准数据集上进行了全面的实验，以展示我们在数据集内和跨数据集测试方面的卓越性能。与大多数 Transformer 网络需要从大规模数据集进行预训练不同，所提出的 PhysFormer 系列可以轻松地在 rPPG 数据集上从头开始训练，这使其有望成为 rPPG 社区的新型 Transformer 基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于视频变换器的PhysFormer和PhysFormer++架构，用于从面部视频中无接触测量生理信号（如心率），通过增强时空特征表示提升远程光电容积描记法（rPPG）性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于卷积神经网络的rPPG方法因时空感受野有限，难以捕捉长程时空交互特征，导致生理信号建模效果不足。
AI.method: 设计时序差分变换器模块，通过全局注意力增强准周期rPPG特征并抑制干扰；扩展为双路径SlowFast结构的PhysFormer++，引入周期性与时序交叉注意力机制；提出频域动态约束和标签分布学习策略优化训练。
AI.result: 在四个基准数据集上实现优于现有方法的跨数据集和同数据集测试性能，且无需依赖大规模预训练，可直接从rPPG数据集训练。
AI.conclusion: PhysFormer系列为rPPG领域提供了无需预训练的新型变换器基线，通过时空特征自适应聚合显著提升了非接触生理信号测量的准确性与泛化性。

authors_text: Eugene Kharitonov,Damien Vincent,Zalán Borsos,Raphaël Marinier,Sertan Girgin,Olivier Pietquin,Matt Sharifi,Marco Tagliasacchi,Neil Zeghidour
title: Speak, Read and Prompt: High-Fidelity Text-to-Speech with Minimal Supervision
title_zh: 说、读和提示：在最少的监督下实现高保真文本到语音转换
abstract: We introduce SPEAR-TTS, a multi-speaker text-to-speech (TTS) system that can be trained with minimal supervision. By combining two types of discrete speech representations, we cast TTS as a composition of two sequence-to-sequence tasks: from text to high-level semantic tokens (akin to "reading") and from semantic tokens to low-level acoustic tokens ("speaking"). Decoupling these two tasks enables training of the "speaking" module using abundant audio-only data, and unlocks the highly efficient combination of pretraining and backtranslation to reduce the need for parallel data when training the "reading" component. To control the speaker identity, we adopt example prompting, which allows SPEAR-TTS to generalize to unseen speakers using only a short sample of 3 seconds, without any explicit speaker representation or speaker-id labels. Our experiments demonstrate that SPEAR-TTS achieves a character error rate that is competitive with state-of-the-art methods using only 15 minutes of parallel data, while matching ground-truth speech in terms of naturalness and acoustic quality, as measured in subjective tests.
summary: We introduce SPEAR-TTS, a multi-speaker text-to-speech (TTS) system that can be trained with minimal supervision. By combining two types of discrete speech representations, we cast TTS as a composition of two sequence-to-sequence tasks: from text to high-level semantic tokens (akin to "reading") and from semantic tokens to low-level acoustic tokens ("speaking"). Decoupling these two tasks enables training of the "speaking" module using abundant audio-only data, and unlocks the highly efficient combination of pretraining and backtranslation to reduce the need for parallel data when training the "reading" component. To control the speaker identity, we adopt example prompting, which allows SPEAR-TTS to generalize to unseen speakers using only a short sample of 3 seconds, without any explicit speaker representation or speaker-id labels. Our experiments demonstrate that SPEAR-TTS achieves a character error rate that is competitive with state-of-the-art methods using only 15 minutes of parallel data, while matching ground-truth speech in terms of naturalness and acoustic quality, as measured in subjective tests.
abstract_zh: 我们推出了 SPEAR-TTS，这是一种多说话者文本转语音 (TTS) 系统，可以在最少的监督下进行训练。通过组合两种类型的离散语音表示，我们将 TTS 视为两个序列到序列任务的组合：从文本到高级语义标记（类似于“阅读”）以及从语义标记到低级声学标记（“说话”）。将这两个任务解耦，可以使用丰富的纯音频数据来训练“说话”模块，并解锁预训练和反向翻译的高效组合，以减少训练“阅读”组件时对并行数据的需求。为了控制说话者身份，我们采用示例提示，这使得 SPEAR-TTS 仅使用 3 秒的短样本即可泛化到看不见的说话者，而无需任何明确的说话者表示或说话者 ID 标签。我们的实验表明，SPEAR-TTS 仅使用 15 分钟的并行数据即可实现与最先进的方法相媲美的字符错误率，同时在主观测试中测得的自然度和音质方面与真实语音相匹配。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SPEAR-TTS的多说话人文本到语音（TTS）系统，能够在极少量监督下实现高质量语音合成。
AI.motivation: 传统TTS系统需要大量平行数据和说话人特定参数，而本文旨在通过减少监督和数据需求，同时保持语音自然度和音质。
AI.method: 将TTS分解为两个序列到序列任务：文本到语义标记（类似阅读）和语义标记到声学标记（说话）。利用预训练和反向翻译减少平行数据需求，并通过示例提示实现说话人身份控制，无需显式说话人表示或标签。
AI.result: 在仅使用15分钟平行数据的情况下，SPEAR-TTS的字符错误率与最先进方法相当，且在主观测试中语音自然度和音质达到真实语音水平。
AI.conclusion: SPEAR-TTS通过解耦任务和高效训练策略，在极少量数据下实现了高质量、多说话人的语音合成，为低监督TTS提供了新思路。

Decoupling these two tasks enables training of the "speaking" module using abundant audio-only data, and unlocks the highly efficient combination of pretraining and backtranslation to reduce the need for parallel data when training the "reading" component. To control the speaker identity, we adopt example prompting, which allows SPEAR-TTS to generalize to unseen speakers using only a short sample of 3 seconds, without any explicit speaker representation or speaker-id labels. Our experiments demonstrate that SPEAR-TTS achieves a character error rate that is competitive with state-of-the-art methods using only 15 minutes of parallel data, while matching ground-truth speech in terms of naturalness and acoustic quality, as measured in subjective tests. 我们推出了 SPEAR-TTS，这是一种多说话者文本转语音 (TTS) 系统，可以在最少的监督下进行训练。通过组合两种类型的离散语音表示，我们将 TTS 视为两个序列到序列任务的组合：从文本到高级语义标记（类似于“阅读”）以及从语义标记到低级声学标记（“说话”）。将这两个任务解耦，可以使用丰富的纯音频数据来训练“说话”模块，并解锁预训练和反向翻译的高效组合，以减少训练“阅读”组件时对并行数据的需求。为了控制说话者身份，我们采用示例提示，这使得 SPEAR-TTS 仅使用 3 秒的短样本即可泛化到看不见的说话者，而无需任何明确的说话者表示或说话者 ID 标签。我们的实验表明，SPEAR-TTS 仅使用 15 分钟的并行数据即可实现与最先进的方法相媲美的字符错误率，同时在主观测试中测得的自然度和音质方面与真实语音相匹配。 本文提出了一种名为SPEAR-TTS的多说话人文本到语音（TTS）系统，能够在极少量监督下实现高质量语音合成。 Eugene Kharitonov,Damien Vincent,Zalán Borsos,Raphaël Marinier,Sertan Girgin,Olivier Pietquin,Matt Sharifi,Marco Tagliasacchi,Neil Zeghidour cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Wangbin Ding,Lei Li,Junyi Qiu,Sihan Wang,Liqin Huang,Yinyin Chen,Shan Yang,Xiahai Zhuang
title: Aligning Multi-Sequence CMR Towards Fully Automated Myocardial Pathology Segmentation
title_zh: 将多序列 CMR 与全自动心肌病理分割结合起来
abstract: Myocardial pathology segmentation (MyoPS) is critical for the risk stratification and treatment planning of myocardial infarction (MI). Multi-sequence cardiac magnetic resonance (MS-CMR) images can provide valuable information. For instance, balanced steady-state free precession cine sequences present clear anatomical boundaries, while late gadolinium enhancement and T2-weighted CMR sequences visualize myocardial scar and edema of MI, respectively. Existing methods usually fuse anatomical and pathological information from different CMR sequences for MyoPS, but assume that these images have been spatially aligned. However, MS-CMR images are usually unaligned due to the respiratory motions in clinical practices, which poses additional challenges for MyoPS. This work presents an automatic MyoPS framework for unaligned MS-CMR images. Specifically, we design a combined computing model for simultaneous image registration and information fusion, which aggregates multi-sequence features into a common space to extract anatomical structures (i.e., myocardium). Consequently, we can highlight the informative regions in the common space via the extracted myocardium to improve MyoPS performance, considering the spatial relationship between myocardial pathologies and myocardium. Experiments on a private MS-CMR dataset and a public dataset from the MYOPS2020 challenge show that our framework could achieve promising performance for fully automatic MyoPS.
summary: Myocardial pathology segmentation (MyoPS) is critical for the risk stratification and treatment planning of myocardial infarction (MI). Multi-sequence cardiac magnetic resonance (MS-CMR) images can provide valuable information. For instance, balanced steady-state free precession cine sequences present clear anatomical boundaries, while late gadolinium enhancement and T2-weighted CMR sequences visualize myocardial scar and edema of MI, respectively. Existing methods usually fuse anatomical and pathological information from different CMR sequences for MyoPS, but assume that these images have been spatially aligned. However, MS-CMR images are usually unaligned due to the respiratory motions in clinical practices, which poses additional challenges for MyoPS. This work presents an automatic MyoPS framework for unaligned MS-CMR images. Specifically, we design a combined computing model for simultaneous image registration and information fusion, which aggregates multi-sequence features into a common space to extract anatomical structures (i.e., myocardium). Consequently, we can highlight the informative regions in the common space via the extracted myocardium to improve MyoPS performance, considering the spatial relationship between myocardial pathologies and myocardium. Experiments on a private MS-CMR dataset and a public dataset from the MYOPS2020 challenge show that our framework could achieve promising performance for fully automatic MyoPS.
abstract_zh: 心肌病理学分割（MyoPS）对于心肌梗死（MI）的风险分层和治疗计划至关重要。多序列心脏磁共振 (MS-CMR) 图像可以提供有价值的信息。例如，平衡稳态自由进动电影序列呈现清晰的解剖学边界，而晚期钆增强和 T2 加权 CMR 序列分别可视化心肌疤痕和 MI 水肿。现有方法通常融合来自不同 CMR 序列的解剖学和病理学信息来进行 MyoPS，但假设这些图像已在空间上对齐。然而，由于临床实践中的呼吸运动，MS-CMR 图像通常不对齐，这给 MyoPS 带来了额外的挑战。这项工作提出了一个用于未对齐 MS-CMR 图像的自动 MyoPS 框架。具体来说，我们设计了一种用于同时图像配准和信息融合的组合计算模型，它将多序列特征聚合到一个公共空间中以提取解剖结构（即心肌）。因此，考虑到心肌病理和心肌之间的空间关系，我们可以通过提取的心肌突出显示公共空间中的信息区域，以提高 MyoPS 性能。在私有 MS-CMR 数据集和 MYOPS2020 挑战赛的公共数据集上进行的实验表明，我们的框架可以在全自动 MyoPS 方面实现有希望的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对未对齐多序列心脏磁共振（MS-CMR）图像的全自动心肌病理性分割框架。
AI.motivation: 现有方法假设不同CMR序列图像已空间对齐，但临床实践中因呼吸运动导致图像未对齐，增加了心肌病理性分割（MyoPS）的难度。
AI.method: 设计了一个联合计算模型，同时进行图像配准与信息融合，将多序列特征聚合到公共空间以提取心肌结构，并通过空间关系优化病灶区域分割。
AI.result: 在私有MS-CMR数据集和MYOPS2020公开数据集上均取得有竞争力的分割性能。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过统一处理未对齐图像并融合多模态信息，有效提升了全自动MyoPS的准确性与鲁棒性。

authors_text: Jonas Nüßlein,Sebastian Zielinski,Thomas Gabor,Claudia Linnhoff-Popien,Sebastian Feld
title: Solving (Max) 3-SAT via Quadratic Unconstrained Binary Optimization
title_zh: 通过二次无约束二元优化求解（最大）3-SAT
abstract: We introduce a novel approach to translate arbitrary 3-SAT instances to Quadratic Unconstrained Binary Optimization (QUBO) as they are used by quantum annealing (QA) or the quantum approximate optimization algorithm (QAOA). Our approach requires fewer couplings and fewer physical qubits than the current state-of-the-art, which results in higher solution quality. We verified the practical applicability of the approach by testing it on a D-Wave quantum annealer.
summary: We introduce a novel approach to translate arbitrary 3-SAT instances to Quadratic Unconstrained Binary Optimization (QUBO) as they are used by quantum annealing (QA) or the quantum approximate optimization algorithm (QAOA). Our approach requires fewer couplings and fewer physical qubits than the current state-of-the-art, which results in higher solution quality. We verified the practical applicability of the approach by testing it on a D-Wave quantum annealer.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了一种新颖的方法，将任意 3-SAT 实例转换为二次无约束二元优化 (QUBO)，因为它们被量子退火 (QA) 或量子近似优化算法 (QAOA) 使用。与当前最先进的技术相比，我们的方法需要更少的耦合和更少的物理量子位，从而带来更高的解决方案质量。我们通过在 D-Wave 量子退火机上进行测试来验证该方法的实际适用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种将任意3-SAT实例转换为QUBO问题的新方法，以提高量子退火和QAOA的求解效率。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在转换3-SAT到QUBO时需要较多的耦合和物理量子比特，限制了求解效率和质量，因此需要更高效的方法。
AI.method: 通过设计更高效的映射方法，将3-SAT问题转换为QUBO问题，减少所需的耦合数量和物理量子比特数量。
AI.result: 在D-Wave量子退火器上的测试验证了该方法的实用性，实现了更高的解质量。
AI.conclusion: 该方法相比现有技术在减少资源需求和提升解质量方面具有优势，适用于量子退火和QAOA，展示了实际应用潜力。
