authors_text: Ruoxuan Feng,Wenke Xia,Di Hu
title: Revisiting Pre-training in Audio-Visual Learning
title_zh: 重新审视视听学习中的预训练
abstract: Pre-training technique has gained tremendous success in enhancing model performance on various tasks, but found to perform worse than training from scratch in some uni-modal situations. This inspires us to think: are the pre-trained models always effective in the more complex multi-modal scenario, especially for the heterogeneous modalities such as audio and visual ones? We find that the answer is No. Specifically, we explore the effects of pre-trained models on two audio-visual learning scenarios: cross-modal initialization and multi-modal joint learning. When cross-modal initialization is applied, the phenomena of "dead channel" caused by abnormal Batchnorm parameters hinders the utilization of model capacity. Thus, we propose Adaptive Batchnorm Re-initialization (ABRi) to better exploit the capacity of pre-trained models for target tasks. In multi-modal joint learning, we find a strong pre-trained uni-modal encoder would bring negative effects on the encoder of another modality. To alleviate such problem, we introduce a two-stage Fusion Tuning strategy, taking better advantage of the pre-trained knowledge while making the uni-modal encoders cooperate with an adaptive masking method. The experiment results show that our methods could further exploit pre-trained models' potential and boost performance in audio-visual learning.
summary: Pre-training technique has gained tremendous success in enhancing model performance on various tasks, but found to perform worse than training from scratch in some uni-modal situations. This inspires us to think: are the pre-trained models always effective in the more complex multi-modal scenario, especially for the heterogeneous modalities such as audio and visual ones? We find that the answer is No. Specifically, we explore the effects of pre-trained models on two audio-visual learning scenarios: cross-modal initialization and multi-modal joint learning. When cross-modal initialization is applied, the phenomena of "dead channel" caused by abnormal Batchnorm parameters hinders the utilization of model capacity. Thus, we propose Adaptive Batchnorm Re-initialization (ABRi) to better exploit the capacity of pre-trained models for target tasks. In multi-modal joint learning, we find a strong pre-trained uni-modal encoder would bring negative effects on the encoder of another modality. To alleviate such problem, we introduce a two-stage Fusion Tuning strategy, taking better advantage of the pre-trained knowledge while making the uni-modal encoders cooperate with an adaptive masking method. The experiment results show that our methods could further exploit pre-trained models' potential and boost performance in audio-visual learning.
abstract_zh: 预训练技术在提高各种任务的模型性能方面取得了巨大成功，但发现在某些单模态情况下其性能比从头开始训练更差。这启发我们思考：预训练的模型在更复杂的多模态场景中是否总是有效，特别是对于音频和视觉等异构模态？我们发现答案是否定的。具体来说，我们探讨了预训练模型对两种视听学习场景的影响：跨模态初始化和多模态联合学习。应用跨模态初始化时，Batchnorm参数异常导致的“死通道”现象阻碍了模型容量的利用。因此，我们提出自适应批量标准化重新初始化（ABRi），以更好地利用预训练模型针对目标任务的能力。在多模态联合学习中，我们发现强大的预训练单模态编码器会给另一种模态的编码器带来负面影响。为了缓解这个问题，我们引入了两阶段融合调整策略，更好地利用预训练的知识，同时使单模态编码器与自适应掩蔽方法配合。实验结果表明，我们的方法可以进一步挖掘预训练模型的潜力并提高视听学习的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了预训练模型在视听学习中的有效性，并针对跨模态初始化和多模态联合学习场景提出改进方法。
AI.motivation: 预训练模型在单模态任务中可能不如从头训练，在复杂多模态场景（如音频-视觉）中效果存疑，需重新评估其适用性。
AI.method: 提出自适应批量归一化重初始化（ABRi）解决跨模态初始化的'死通道'问题，并设计两阶段融合调优策略缓解多模态联合学习中单模态编码器的负影响。
AI.result: 实验表明改进方法能更充分挖掘预训练模型潜力，显著提升视听学习任务性能。
AI.conclusion: 预训练模型在多模态任务中需针对性调整，本文方法通过参数重初始化和协同优化策略有效提升了模型表现。

ai_content.tldr: 本文探讨了预训练模型在视听学习中的有效性，并针对跨模态初始化和多模态联合学习场景提出改进方法。

search_text: Revisiting Pre-training in Audio-Visual Learning 重新审视视听学习中的预训练 Pre-training technique has gained tremendous success in enhancing model performance on various tasks, but found to perform worse than training from scratch in some uni-modal situations. This inspires us to think: are the pre-trained models always effective in the more complex multi-modal scenario, especially for the heterogeneous modalities such as audio and visual ones? We find that the answer is No. Specifically, we explore the effects of pre-trained models on two audio-visual learning scenarios: cross-modal initialization and multi-modal joint learning. When cross-modal initialization is applied, the phenomena of "dead channel" caused by abnormal Batchnorm parameters hinders the utilization of model capacity. Thus, we propose Adaptive Batchnorm Re-initialization (ABRi) to better exploit the capacity of pre-trained models for target tasks. In multi-modal joint learning, we find a strong pre-trained uni-modal encoder would bring negative effects on the encoder of another modality. To alleviate such problem, we introduce a two-stage Fusion Tuning strategy, taking better advantage of the pre-trained knowledge while making the uni-modal encoders cooperate with an adaptive masking method. The experiment results show that our methods could further exploit pre-trained models' potential and boost performance in audio-visual learning. 预训练技术在提高各种任务的模型性能方面取得了巨大成功，但发现在某些单模态情况下其性能比从头开始训练更差。这启发我们思考：预训练的模型在更复杂的多模态场景中是否总是有效，特别是对于音频和视觉等异构模态？我们发现答案是否定的。具体来说，我们探讨了预训练模型对两种视听学习场景的影响：跨模态初始化和多模态联合学习。应用跨模态初始化时，Batchnorm参数异常导致的“死通道”现象阻碍了模型容量的利用。因此，我们提出自适应批量标准化重新初始化（ABRi），以更好地利用预训练模型针对目标任务的能力。在多模态联合学习中，我们发现强大的预训练单模态编码器会给另一种模态的编码器带来负面影响。为了缓解这个问题，我们引入了两阶段融合调整策略，更好地利用预训练的知识，同时使单模态编码器与自适应掩蔽方法配合。实验结果表明，我们的方法可以进一步挖掘预训练模型的潜力并提高视听学习的性能。 本文探讨了预训练模型在视听学习中的有效性，并针对跨模态初始化和多模态联合学习场景提出改进方法。 Ruoxuan Feng,Wenke Xia,Di Hu cs.CV,cs.MM,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Christopher K. I. Williams
title: Structured Generative Models for Scene Understanding
title_zh: 用于场景理解的结构化生成模型
abstract: This position paper argues for the use of \emph{structured generative models} (SGMs) for the understanding of static scenes. This requires the reconstruction of a 3D scene from an input image (or a set of multi-view images), whereby the contents of the image(s) are causally explained in terms of models of instantiated objects, each with their own type, shape, appearance and pose, along with global variables like scene lighting and camera parameters. This approach also requires scene models which account for the co-occurrences and inter-relationships of objects in a scene. The SGM approach has the merits that it is compositional and generative, which lead to interpretability and editability. \\\\ To pursue the SGM agenda, we need models for objects and scenes, and approaches to carry out inference. We first review models for objects, which include ``things'' (object categories that have a well defined shape), and ``stuff'' (categories which have amorphous spatial extent). We then move on to review \emph{scene models} which describe the inter-relationships of objects. Perhaps the most challenging problem for SGMs is \emph{inference} of the objects, lighting and camera parameters, and scene inter-relationships from input consisting of a single or multiple images. We conclude with a discussion of issues that need addressing to advance the SGM agenda.
summary: This position paper argues for the use of \emph{structured generative models} (SGMs) for the understanding of static scenes. This requires the reconstruction of a 3D scene from an input image (or a set of multi-view images), whereby the contents of the image(s) are causally explained in terms of models of instantiated objects, each with their own type, shape, appearance and pose, along with global variables like scene lighting and camera parameters. This approach also requires scene models which account for the co-occurrences and inter-relationships of objects in a scene. The SGM approach has the merits that it is compositional and generative, which lead to interpretability and editability. \\\\ To pursue the SGM agenda, we need models for objects and scenes, and approaches to carry out inference. We first review models for objects, which include ``things'' (object categories that have a well defined shape), and ``stuff'' (categories which have amorphous spatial extent). We then move on to review \emph{scene models} which describe the inter-relationships of objects. Perhaps the most challenging problem for SGMs is \emph{inference} of the objects, lighting and camera parameters, and scene inter-relationships from input consisting of a single or multiple images. We conclude with a discussion of issues that need addressing to advance the SGM agenda.
abstract_zh: 这篇立场文件主张使用\emph{结构化生成模型}（SGM）来理解静态场景。这需要从输入图像（或一组多视图图像）重建 3D 场景，其中图像的内容根据实例化对象的模型进行因果解释，每个对象都有自己的类型、形状、外观和姿势，以及场景照明和相机参数等全局变量。这种方法还需要场景模型来解释场景中对象的共现和相互关系。 SGM 方法的优点是它具有组合性和生成性，从而具有可解释性和可编辑性。 \\\\为了实现SGM议程，我们需要对象和场景的模型以及进行推理的方法。我们首先回顾对象模型，其中包括“事物”（具有明确形状的对象类别）和“东西”（具有无定形空间范围的类别）。然后我们继续回顾描述对象相互关系的\emph{场景模型}。对于 SGM 来说，最具挑战性的问题可能是从由单个或多个图像组成的输入中推断物体、照明和相机参数以及场景相互关系。最后，我们讨论了推进特别股东大会议程需要解决的问题。

AI.tldr: 本文主张使用结构化生成模型（SGMs）进行静态场景理解，通过从输入图像重建3D场景，解释图像内容并建模场景中物体的相互关系。
AI.motivation: SGMs具有组合性和生成性优势，能够实现场景的可解释性和可编辑性，但需要解决物体、光照、相机参数及场景关系的推理问题。
AI.method: 回顾物体模型（如具象物体和非具象物质）及场景模型，分析物体间关系建模方法，并探讨单/多图像输入下的推理挑战。
AI.result: 系统梳理了SGMs的理论框架与关键技术，明确了当前研究的核心难点（如复杂场景推理）及未来方向。
AI.conclusion: 需突破推理算法、跨模态对齐等关键技术，以推动SGMs在场景理解中的实际应用。

authors_text: Jan Dreier,Nikolas Mählmann,Sebastian Siebertz
title: First-Order Model Checking on Structurally Sparse Graph Classes
title_zh: 结构稀疏图类的一阶模型检查
abstract: A class of graphs is structurally nowhere dense if it can be constructed from a nowhere dense class by a first-order transduction. Structurally nowhere dense classes vastly generalize nowhere dense classes and constitute important examples of monadically stable classes. We show that the first-order model checking problem is fixed-parameter tractable on every structurally nowhere dense class of graphs. Our result builds on a recently developed game-theoretic characterization of monadically stable graph classes. As a second key ingredient of independent interest, we provide a polynomial-time algorithm for approximating weak neighborhood covers (on general graphs). We combine the two tools into a recursive locality-based model checking algorithm. This algorithm is efficient on every monadically stable graph class admitting flip-closed sparse weak neighborhood covers, where flip-closure is a mild additional assumption. Thereby, establishing efficient first-order model checking on monadically stable classes is reduced to proving the existence of flip-closed sparse weak neighborhood covers on these classes - a purely combinatorial problem. We complete the picture by proving the existence of the desired covers for structurally nowhere dense classes: we show that every structurally nowhere dense class can be sparsified by contracting local sets of vertices, enabling us to lift the existence of covers from sparse classes.
summary: A class of graphs is structurally nowhere dense if it can be constructed from a nowhere dense class by a first-order transduction. Structurally nowhere dense classes vastly generalize nowhere dense classes and constitute important examples of monadically stable classes. We show that the first-order model checking problem is fixed-parameter tractable on every structurally nowhere dense class of graphs. Our result builds on a recently developed game-theoretic characterization of monadically stable graph classes. As a second key ingredient of independent interest, we provide a polynomial-time algorithm for approximating weak neighborhood covers (on general graphs). We combine the two tools into a recursive locality-based model checking algorithm. This algorithm is efficient on every monadically stable graph class admitting flip-closed sparse weak neighborhood covers, where flip-closure is a mild additional assumption. Thereby, establishing efficient first-order model checking on monadically stable classes is reduced to proving the existence of flip-closed sparse weak neighborhood covers on these classes - a purely combinatorial problem. We complete the picture by proving the existence of the desired covers for structurally nowhere dense classes: we show that every structurally nowhere dense class can be sparsified by contracting local sets of vertices, enabling us to lift the existence of covers from sparse classes.
abstract_zh: 如果一类图可以通过一阶转导从无处稠密类构造出来，那么它在结构上就是无处稠密的。在结构上，无处密集类极大地概括了无处密集类，并构成了单子稳定类的重要例子。我们证明，一阶模型检查问题在每个结构上无处密集的图类上都是固定参数可处理的。我们的结果建立在最近开发的单子稳定图类的博弈论表征的基础上。作为独立兴趣的第二个关键要素，我们提供了一种多项式时间算法来近似弱邻域覆盖（在一般图上）。我们将这两个工具组合成一个基于递归局部性的模型检查算法。该算法对于允许翻转封闭稀疏弱邻域覆盖的每个一元稳定图类都是有效的，其中翻转封闭是一个温和的附加假设。因此，对一元稳定类建立有效的一阶模型检查被简化为证明这些类上翻转封闭稀疏弱邻域覆盖的存在——一个纯粹的组合问题。我们通过证明结构无处稠密类所需覆盖的存在性来完成整个图景：我们表明，每个结构无处稠密类都可以通过收缩局部顶点集来稀疏化，使我们能够从稀疏类中提升覆盖的存在性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在结构稀疏图类上进行一阶模型检测的固定参数可解性问题。
AI.motivation: 扩展对稀疏图类的理论理解，并为单调稳定图类提供高效的模型检测方法。
AI.method: 结合博弈论表征与弱邻域覆盖近似算法，设计基于局部性的递归模型检测方法。
AI.result: 证明结构无处稠密类的一阶模型检测具有固定参数可解性，并建立覆盖存在性与稀疏化的关联。
AI.conclusion: 将单调稳定类的模型检测问题归约为组合覆盖存在性证明，为后续研究提供理论框架。

This algorithm is efficient on every monadically stable graph class admitting flip-closed sparse weak neighborhood covers, where flip-closure is a mild additional assumption. Thereby, establishing efficient first-order model checking on monadically stable classes is reduced to proving the existence of flip-closed sparse weak neighborhood covers on these classes - a purely combinatorial problem. We complete the picture by proving the existence of the desired covers for structurally nowhere dense classes: we show that every structurally nowhere dense class can be sparsified by contracting local sets of vertices, enabling us to lift the existence of covers from sparse classes. 如果一类图可以通过一阶转导从无处稠密类构造出来，那么它在结构上就是无处稠密的。在结构上，无处密集类极大地概括了无处密集类，并构成了单子稳定类的重要例子。我们证明，一阶模型检查问题在每个结构上无处密集的图类上都是固定参数可处理的。我们的结果建立在最近开发的单子稳定图类的博弈论表征的基础上。作为独立兴趣的第二个关键要素，我们提供了一种多项式时间算法来近似弱邻域覆盖（在一般图上）。我们将这两个工具组合成一个基于递归局部性的模型检查算法。该算法对于允许翻转封闭稀疏弱邻域覆盖的每个一元稳定图类都是有效的，其中翻转封闭是一个温和的附加假设。因此，对一元稳定类建立有效的一阶模型检查被简化为证明这些类上翻转封闭稀疏弱邻域覆盖的存在——一个纯粹的组合问题。我们通过证明结构无处稠密类所需覆盖的存在性来完成整个图景：我们表明，每个结构无处稠密类都可以通过收缩局部顶点集来稀疏化，使我们能够从稀疏类中提升覆盖的存在性。 本文研究了在结构稀疏图类上进行一阶模型检测的固定参数可解性问题。 Jan Dreier,Nikolas Mählmann,Sebastian Siebertz cs.LO,cs.DM,cs.DS,math.CO,math.LO

authors_text: Souvik Kundu,Sairam Sundaresan,Sharath Nittur Sridhar,Shunlin Lu,Han Tang,Peter A. Beerel
title: Sparse Mixture Once-for-all Adversarial Training for Efficient In-Situ Trade-Off Between Accuracy and Robustness of DNNs
title_zh: 稀疏混合一次性对抗训练，用于在 DNN 的准确性和鲁棒性之间进行有效的原位权衡
abstract: Existing deep neural networks (DNNs) that achieve state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance on both clean and adversarially-perturbed images rely on either activation or weight conditioned convolution operations. However, such conditional learning costs additional multiply-accumulate (MAC) or addition operations, increasing inference memory and compute costs. To that end, we present a sparse mixture once for all adversarial training (SMART), that allows a model to train once and then in-situ trade-off between accuracy and robustness, that too at a reduced compute and parameter overhead. In particular, SMART develops two expert paths, for clean and adversarial images, respectively, that are then conditionally trained via respective dedicated sets of binary sparsity masks. Extensive evaluations on multiple image classification datasets across different models show SMART to have up to 2.72x fewer non-zero parameters costing proportional reduction in compute overhead, while yielding SOTA accuracy-robustness trade-off. Additionally, we present insightful observations in designing sparse masks to successfully condition on both clean and perturbed images.
summary: Existing deep neural networks (DNNs) that achieve state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance on both clean and adversarially-perturbed images rely on either activation or weight conditioned convolution operations. However, such conditional learning costs additional multiply-accumulate (MAC) or addition operations, increasing inference memory and compute costs. To that end, we present a sparse mixture once for all adversarial training (SMART), that allows a model to train once and then in-situ trade-off between accuracy and robustness, that too at a reduced compute and parameter overhead. In particular, SMART develops two expert paths, for clean and adversarial images, respectively, that are then conditionally trained via respective dedicated sets of binary sparsity masks. Extensive evaluations on multiple image classification datasets across different models show SMART to have up to 2.72x fewer non-zero parameters costing proportional reduction in compute overhead, while yielding SOTA accuracy-robustness trade-off. Additionally, we present insightful observations in designing sparse masks to successfully condition on both clean and perturbed images.
abstract_zh: 现有的深度神经网络 (DNN) 在干净图像和对抗性扰动图像上实现最先进 (SOTA) 性能，依赖于激活或权重条件卷积运算。然而，这种条件学习需要额外的乘法累加 (MAC) 或加法运算，从而增加推理内存和计算成本。为此，我们提出了一种稀疏混合一次用于所有对抗训练（SMART），允许模型训练一次，然后在准确性和鲁棒性之间进行原位权衡，这也减少了计算和参数开销。特别是，SMART 分别针对干净图像和对抗性图像开发了两条专家路径，然后通过各自专用的二进制稀疏掩模集进行有条件的训练。对不同模型的多个图像分类数据集的广泛评估表明，SMART 的非零参数减少了 2.72 倍，计算开销成比例减少，同时实现了 SOTA 准确性与鲁棒性的权衡。此外，我们还提出了设计稀疏掩模以成功调节干净图像和扰动图像的富有洞察力的观察结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SMART的方法，通过一次性对抗训练实现深度神经网络（DNN）在精度和鲁棒性之间的高效权衡。
AI.motivation: 现有DNN在处理干净和对抗样本时依赖条件卷积操作，但这些操作会增加计算和内存开销，导致效率低下。
AI.method: SMART通过设计两个专家路径（分别处理干净图像和对抗样本），结合二值稀疏掩码进行条件训练，实现一次性训练后动态调整精度与鲁棒性的平衡。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上，SMART减少了高达2.72倍的非零参数，计算开销相应降低，同时保持了最先进的精度-鲁棒性权衡。
AI.conclusion: SMART通过稀疏掩码设计有效降低了计算成本，为DNN在部署时提供灵活的精度与鲁棒性调整方案。

Beerel cs.CV

authors_text: Nikita Dhawan,Sicong Huang,Juhan Bae,Roger Grosse
title: Efficient Parametric Approximations of Neural Network Function Space Distance
title_zh: 神经网络函数空间距离的高效参数逼近
abstract: It is often useful to compactly summarize important properties of model parameters and training data so that they can be used later without storing and/or iterating over the entire dataset. As a specific case, we consider estimating the Function Space Distance (FSD) over a training set, i.e. the average discrepancy between the outputs of two neural networks. We propose a Linearized Activation Function TRick (LAFTR) and derive an efficient approximation to FSD for ReLU neural networks. The key idea is to approximate the architecture as a linear network with stochastic gating. Despite requiring only one parameter per unit of the network, our approach outcompetes other parametric approximations with larger memory requirements. Applied to continual learning, our parametric approximation is competitive with state-of-the-art nonparametric approximations, which require storing many training examples. Furthermore, we show its efficacy in estimating influence functions accurately and detecting mislabeled examples without expensive iterations over the entire dataset.
summary: It is often useful to compactly summarize important properties of model parameters and training data so that they can be used later without storing and/or iterating over the entire dataset. As a specific case, we consider estimating the Function Space Distance (FSD) over a training set, i.e. the average discrepancy between the outputs of two neural networks. We propose a Linearized Activation Function TRick (LAFTR) and derive an efficient approximation to FSD for ReLU neural networks. The key idea is to approximate the architecture as a linear network with stochastic gating. Despite requiring only one parameter per unit of the network, our approach outcompetes other parametric approximations with larger memory requirements. Applied to continual learning, our parametric approximation is competitive with state-of-the-art nonparametric approximations, which require storing many training examples. Furthermore, we show its efficacy in estimating influence functions accurately and detecting mislabeled examples without expensive iterations over the entire dataset.
abstract_zh: 紧凑地总结模型参数和训练数据的重要属性通常很有用，以便稍后可以使用它们，而无需存储和/或迭代整个数据集。作为一个具体案例，我们考虑估计训练集上的函数空间距离（FSD），即两个神经网络输出之间的平均差异。我们提出了线性化激活函数 TRick (LAFTR)，并为 ReLU 神经网络推导了 FSD 的有效近似。关键思想是将架构近似为具有随机门控的线性网络。尽管网络的每个单元只需要一个参数，但我们的方法胜过其他具有更大内存需求的参数近似。应用于持续学习，我们的参数近似与最先进的非参数近似具有竞争力，后者需要存储许多训练样本。此外，我们还展示了它在准确估计影响函数和检测错误标记示例方面的功效，而无需对整个数据集进行昂贵的迭代。

AI.tldr: 提出一种高效参数化方法近似神经网络函数空间距离（FSD），用于模型参数和训练数据的紧凑总结
AI.motivation: 需要在不存储或遍历整个数据集的情况下，有效总结模型参数和训练数据的关键属性，以提高计算效率
AI.method: 提出线性化激活函数技巧（LAFTR），将ReLU网络近似为随机门控的线性网络，每个单元仅需一个参数进行高效FSD近似
AI.result: 在内存效率上优于其他参数化方法，在持续学习中与非参数方法竞争，并能有效估计影响函数和检测错误标记
AI.conclusion: LAFTR方法在保持高效性的同时，有效近似FSD，适用于持续学习和错误检测等任务

authors_text: Zekang Lan,Yan Xu,Yingkun Huang,Dian Huang,Shengzhong Feng
title: Optimization of Topology-Aware Job Allocation on a High-Performance Computing Cluster by Neural Simulated Annealing
title_zh: 通过神经模拟退火优化高性能计算集群上的拓扑感知作业分配
abstract: Jobs on high-performance computing (HPC) clusters can suffer significant performance degradation due to inter-job network interference. Topology-aware job allocation problem (TJAP) is such a problem that decides how to dedicate nodes to specific applications to mitigate inter-job network interference. In this paper, we study the window-based TJAP on a fat-tree network aiming at minimizing the cost of communication hop, a defined inter-job interference metric. The window-based approach for scheduling repeats periodically taking the jobs in the queue and solving an assignment problem that maps jobs to the available nodes. Two special allocation strategies are considered, i.e., static continuity assignment strategy (SCAS) and dynamic continuity assignment strategy (DCAS). For the SCAS, a 0-1 integer programming is developed. For the DCAS, an approach called neural simulated algorithm (NSA), which is an extension to simulated algorithm (SA) that learns a repair operator and employs them in a guided heuristic search, is proposed. The efficacy of NSA is demonstrated with a computational study against SA and SCIP. The results of numerical experiments indicate that both the model and algorithm proposed in this paper are effective.
summary: Jobs on high-performance computing (HPC) clusters can suffer significant performance degradation due to inter-job network interference. Topology-aware job allocation problem (TJAP) is such a problem that decides how to dedicate nodes to specific applications to mitigate inter-job network interference. In this paper, we study the window-based TJAP on a fat-tree network aiming at minimizing the cost of communication hop, a defined inter-job interference metric. The window-based approach for scheduling repeats periodically taking the jobs in the queue and solving an assignment problem that maps jobs to the available nodes. Two special allocation strategies are considered, i.e., static continuity assignment strategy (SCAS) and dynamic continuity assignment strategy (DCAS). For the SCAS, a 0-1 integer programming is developed. For the DCAS, an approach called neural simulated algorithm (NSA), which is an extension to simulated algorithm (SA) that learns a repair operator and employs them in a guided heuristic search, is proposed. The efficacy of NSA is demonstrated with a computational study against SA and SCIP. The results of numerical experiments indicate that both the model and algorithm proposed in this paper are effective.
abstract_zh: 由于作业间的网络干扰，高性能计算 (HPC) 集群上的作业可能会遭受显着的性能下降。拓扑感知作业分配问题（TJAP）是一个决定如何将节点专用于特定应用程序以减轻作业间网络干扰的问题。在本文中，我们研究了胖树网络上基于窗口的 TJAP，旨在最小化通信跳数的成本，这是一种定义的作业间干扰度量。基于窗口的调度方法定期重复获取队列中的作业并解决将作业映射到可用节点的分配问题。考虑两种特殊的分配策略，即静态连续性分配策略（SCAS）和动态连续性分配策略（DCAS）。对于 SCAS，开发了 0-1 整数规划。对于 DCAS，提出了一种称为神经模拟算法 (NSA) 的方法，它是模拟算法 (SA) 的扩展，可学习修复算子并将其用于引导启发式​​搜索。 NSA 的功效通过针对 SA 和 SCIP 的计算研究得到证明。数值实验结果表明本文提出的模型和算法是有效的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于神经模拟退火算法（NSA）的拓扑感知作业分配优化方法，旨在减少高性能计算集群中作业间的网络干扰。
AI.motivation: HPC集群中作业因网络干扰导致性能下降，传统分配策略难以有效缓解该问题，需更优的动态分配算法。
AI.method: 针对静态和动态连续分配策略（SCAS/DCAS），分别采用0-1整数规划与神经模拟退火算法（NSA），并通过实验对比SA和SCIP验证效果。
AI.result: 实验表明NSA在通信跳数成本优化上优于传统方法，验证了所提模型和算法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: NSA能有效解决窗口式拓扑感知作业分配问题，为HPC集群调度提供新思路。

search_text: Optimization of Topology-Aware Job Allocation on a High-Performance Computing Cluster by Neural Simulated Annealing 通过神经模拟退火优化高性能计算集群上的拓扑感知作业分配 Jobs on high-performance computing (HPC) clusters can suffer significant performance degradation due to inter-job network interference. Topology-aware job allocation problem (TJAP) is such a problem that decides how to dedicate nodes to specific applications to mitigate inter-job network interference. In this paper, we study the window-based TJAP on a fat-tree network aiming at minimizing the cost of communication hop, a defined inter-job interference metric. The window-based approach for scheduling repeats periodically taking the jobs in the queue and solving an assignment problem that maps jobs to the available nodes. Two special allocation strategies are considered, i.e., static continuity assignment strategy (SCAS) and dynamic continuity assignment strategy (DCAS). For the SCAS, a 0-1 integer programming is developed. For the DCAS, an approach called neural simulated algorithm (NSA), which is an extension to simulated algorithm (SA) that learns a repair operator and employs them in a guided heuristic search, is proposed. The efficacy of NSA is demonstrated with a computational study against SA and SCIP. The results of numerical experiments indicate that both the model and algorithm proposed in this paper are effective. 由于作业间的网络干扰，高性能计算 (HPC) 集群上的作业可能会遭受显着的性能下降。拓扑感知作业分配问题（TJAP）是一个决定如何将节点专用于特定应用程序以减轻作业间网络干扰的问题。在本文中，我们研究了胖树网络上基于窗口的 TJAP，旨在最小化通信跳数的成本，这是一种定义的作业间干扰度量。基于窗口的调度方法定期重复获取队列中的作业并解决将作业映射到可用节点的分配问题。考虑两种特殊的分配策略，即静态连续性分配策略（SCAS）和动态连续性分配策略（DCAS）。对于 SCAS，开发了 0-1 整数规划。对于 DCAS，提出了一种称为神经模拟算法 (NSA) 的方法，它是模拟算法 (SA) 的扩展，可学习修复算子并将其用于引导启发式​​搜索。 NSA 的功效通过针对 SA 和 SCIP 的计算研究得到证明。数值实验结果表明本文提出的模型和算法是有效的。 本文提出基于神经模拟退火算法（NSA）的拓扑感知作业分配优化方法，旨在减少高性能计算集群中作业间的网络干扰。 Zekang Lan,Yan Xu,Yingkun Huang,Dian Huang,Shengzhong Feng cs.DC,cs.AI

authors_text: Kailai Yang,Tianlin Zhang,Hassan Alhuzali,Sophia Ananiadou
title: Cluster-Level Contrastive Learning for Emotion Recognition in Conversations
title_zh: 用于对话中情绪识别的集群级对比学习
comment: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Affective Computing
comments: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Affective Computing
abstract: A key challenge for Emotion Recognition in Conversations (ERC) is to distinguish semantically similar emotions. Some works utilise Supervised Contrastive Learning (SCL) which uses categorical emotion labels as supervision signals and contrasts in high-dimensional semantic space. However, categorical labels fail to provide quantitative information between emotions. ERC is also not equally dependent on all embedded features in the semantic space, which makes the high-dimensional SCL inefficient. To address these issues, we propose a novel low-dimensional Supervised Cluster-level Contrastive Learning (SCCL) method, which first reduces the high-dimensional SCL space to a three-dimensional affect representation space Valence-Arousal-Dominance (VAD), then performs cluster-level contrastive learning to incorporate measurable emotion prototypes. To help modelling the dialogue and enriching the context, we leverage the pre-trained knowledge adapters to infuse linguistic and factual knowledge. Experiments show that our method achieves new state-of-the-art results with 69.81% on IEMOCAP, 65.7% on MELD, and 62.51% on DailyDialog datasets. The analysis also proves that the VAD space is not only suitable for ERC but also interpretable, with VAD prototypes enhancing its performance and stabilising the training of SCCL. In addition, the pre-trained knowledge adapters benefit the performance of the utterance encoder and SCCL. Our code is available at: https://github.com/SteveKGYang/SCCL
summary: A key challenge for Emotion Recognition in Conversations (ERC) is to distinguish semantically similar emotions. Some works utilise Supervised Contrastive Learning (SCL) which uses categorical emotion labels as supervision signals and contrasts in high-dimensional semantic space. However, categorical labels fail to provide quantitative information between emotions. ERC is also not equally dependent on all embedded features in the semantic space, which makes the high-dimensional SCL inefficient. To address these issues, we propose a novel low-dimensional Supervised Cluster-level Contrastive Learning (SCCL) method, which first reduces the high-dimensional SCL space to a three-dimensional affect representation space Valence-Arousal-Dominance (VAD), then performs cluster-level contrastive learning to incorporate measurable emotion prototypes. To help modelling the dialogue and enriching the context, we leverage the pre-trained knowledge adapters to infuse linguistic and factual knowledge. Experiments show that our method achieves new state-of-the-art results with 69.81% on IEMOCAP, 65.7% on MELD, and 62.51% on DailyDialog datasets. The analysis also proves that the VAD space is not only suitable for ERC but also interpretable, with VAD prototypes enhancing its performance and stabilising the training of SCCL. In addition, the pre-trained knowledge adapters benefit the performance of the utterance encoder and SCCL. Our code is available at: https://github.com/SteveKGYang/SCCL
abstract_zh: 对话中的情绪识别 (ERC) 的一个关键挑战是区分语义上相似的情绪。一些作品利用监督对比学习（SCL），它使用分类情感标签作为监督信号并在高维语义空间中进行对比。然而，分类标签无法提供情绪之间的定量信息。 ERC 也并不同等地依赖于语义空间中的所有嵌入特征，这使得高维 SCL 效率低下。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种新颖的低维监督集群级对比学习（SCCL）方法，该方法首先将高维SCL空间简化为三维情感表示空间Valence-Arousal-Dominance（VAD），然后执行集群级对比学习以纳入可测量的情感原型。为了帮助建模对话并丰富上下文，我们利用预先训练的知识适配器来注入语言和事实知识。实验表明，我们的方法取得了新的最先进结果，在 IEMOCAP 上达到了 69.81%，在 MELD 上达到了 65.7%，在 DailyDialog 数据集上达到了 62.51%。分析还证明VAD空间不仅适合ERC而且可解释，VAD原型增强了其性能并稳定了SCCL的训练。此外，预先训练的知识适配器有利于话语编码器和 SCCL 的性能。我们的代码位于：https://github.com/SteveKGYang/SCCL

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于聚类级对比学习的情绪识别方法，通过降低高维语义空间维度并引入可解释的VAD情感原型，提升对话中情绪识别的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于类别标签的监督对比学习（SCL）无法提供情绪间的量化信息，且高维特征效率低下，难以有效区分语义相似的情绪。
AI.method: 提出低维监督聚类级对比学习（SCCL）方法，将高维语义空间映射到三维VAD（愉悦-唤醒-支配）情感空间，并结合预训练知识适配器注入语言与事实知识，实现聚类级对比学习。
AI.result: 在IEMOCAP、MELD和DailyDialog数据集上分别达到69.81%、65.7%和62.51%的准确率，刷新了现有方法的性能记录。
AI.conclusion: VAD空间不仅适用于情绪识别且具有可解释性，结合预训练知识适配器可进一步提升模型表现与训练稳定性。

authors_text: Chengcheng Han,Yuhe Wang,Yingnan Fu,Xiang Li,Minghui Qiu,Ming Gao,Aoying Zhou
title: Meta-Learning Siamese Network for Few-Shot Text Classification
title_zh: 用于少样本文本分类的元学习连体网络
abstract: Few-shot learning has been used to tackle the problem of label scarcity in text classification, of which meta-learning based methods have shown to be effective, such as the prototypical networks (PROTO). Despite the success of PROTO, there still exist three main problems: (1) ignore the randomness of the sampled support sets when computing prototype vectors; (2) disregard the importance of labeled samples; (3) construct meta-tasks in a purely random manner. In this paper, we propose a Meta-Learning Siamese Network, namely, Meta-SN, to address these issues. Specifically, instead of computing prototype vectors from the sampled support sets, Meta-SN utilizes external knowledge (e.g. class names and descriptive texts) for class labels, which is encoded as the low-dimensional embeddings of prototype vectors. In addition, Meta-SN presents a novel sampling strategy for constructing meta-tasks, which gives higher sampling probabilities to hard-to-classify samples. Extensive experiments are conducted on six benchmark datasets to show the clear superiority of Meta-SN over other state-of-the-art models. For reproducibility, all the datasets and codes are provided at https://github.com/hccngu/Meta-SN.
summary: Few-shot learning has been used to tackle the problem of label scarcity in text classification, of which meta-learning based methods have shown to be effective, such as the prototypical networks (PROTO). Despite the success of PROTO, there still exist three main problems: (1) ignore the randomness of the sampled support sets when computing prototype vectors; (2) disregard the importance of labeled samples; (3) construct meta-tasks in a purely random manner. In this paper, we propose a Meta-Learning Siamese Network, namely, Meta-SN, to address these issues. Specifically, instead of computing prototype vectors from the sampled support sets, Meta-SN utilizes external knowledge (e.g. class names and descriptive texts) for class labels, which is encoded as the low-dimensional embeddings of prototype vectors. In addition, Meta-SN presents a novel sampling strategy for constructing meta-tasks, which gives higher sampling probabilities to hard-to-classify samples. Extensive experiments are conducted on six benchmark datasets to show the clear superiority of Meta-SN over other state-of-the-art models. For reproducibility, all the datasets and codes are provided at https://github.com/hccngu/Meta-SN.
abstract_zh: Few-shot Learning已被用来解决文本分类中标签稀缺的问题，其中基于元学习的方法已被证明是有效的，例如原型网络（PROTO）。尽管PROTO取得了成功，但仍然存在三个主要问题：（1）计算原型向量时忽略了采样支持集的随机性； （2）忽视标记样品的重要性； (3)以纯随机的方式构建元任务。在本文中，我们提出了一种元学习连体网络（Meta-SN）来解决这些问题。具体来说，Meta-SN 不是根据采样的支持集计算原型向量，而是利用外部知识（例如类名称和描述性文本）作为类标签，并将其编码为原型向量的低维嵌入。此外，Meta-SN提出了一种新颖的构建元任务的采样策略，为难以分类的样本提供了更高的采样概率。在六个基准数据集上进行了大量实验，以显示 Meta-SN 相对于其他最先进模型的明显优势。为了重现性，所有数据集和代码均在 https://github.com/hccngu/Meta-SN 上提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种元学习暹罗网络（Meta-SN），用于解决少样本文本分类中原型向量计算忽略支持集随机性、未重视标记样本及元任务随机构造的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于元学习的少样本分类方法（如PROTOTYPICAL网络）存在三方面缺陷：原型向量计算未考虑支持集随机性、未充分利用标记样本信息、元任务构造方式过于随机，限制了模型性能。
AI.method: Meta-SN通过引入外部知识（如类别名称和描述文本）生成低维原型嵌入，替代传统支持集原型向量计算；并设计新型采样策略，提高难分类样本在元任务中的采样概率。
AI.result: 在六个基准数据集上的实验表明，Meta-SN显著优于现有最先进模型，且代码与数据集已公开提供以保证可复现性。
AI.conclusion: Meta-SN通过结合外部知识与改进的采样策略，有效解决了少样本文本分类中的关键问题，为该领域提供了新的技术思路与实现方案。

search_text: Meta-Learning Siamese Network for Few-Shot Text Classification 用于少样本文本分类的元学习连体网络 Few-shot learning has been used to tackle the problem of label scarcity in text classification, of which meta-learning based methods have shown to be effective, such as the prototypical networks (PROTO). Despite the success of PROTO, there still exist three main problems: (1) ignore the randomness of the sampled support sets when computing prototype vectors; (2) disregard the importance of labeled samples; (3) construct meta-tasks in a purely random manner. In this paper, we propose a Meta-Learning Siamese Network, namely, Meta-SN, to address these issues. Specifically, instead of computing prototype vectors from the sampled support sets, Meta-SN utilizes external knowledge (e.g. class names and descriptive texts) for class labels, which is encoded as the low-dimensional embeddings of prototype vectors. In addition, Meta-SN presents a novel sampling strategy for constructing meta-tasks, which gives higher sampling probabilities to hard-to-classify samples. Extensive experiments are conducted on six benchmark datasets to show the clear superiority of Meta-SN over other state-of-the-art models. For reproducibility, all the datasets and codes are provided at https://github.com/hccngu/Meta-SN. Few-shot Learning已被用来解决文本分类中标签稀缺的问题，其中基于元学习的方法已被证明是有效的，例如原型网络（PROTO）。尽管PROTO取得了成功，但仍然存在三个主要问题：（1）计算原型向量时忽略了采样支持集的随机性； （2）忽视标记样品的重要性； (3)以纯随机的方式构建元任务。在本文中，我们提出了一种元学习连体网络（Meta-SN）来解决这些问题。具体来说，Meta-SN 不是根据采样的支持集计算原型向量，而是利用外部知识（例如类名称和描述性文本）作为类标签，并将其编码为原型向量的低维嵌入。此外，Meta-SN提出了一种新颖的构建元任务的采样策略，为难以分类的样本提供了更高的采样概率。在六个基准数据集上进行了大量实验，以显示 Meta-SN 相对于其他最先进模型的明显优势。为了重现性，所有数据集和代码均在 https://github.com/hccngu/Meta-SN 上提供。 本文提出一种元学习暹罗网络（Meta-SN），用于解决少样本文本分类中原型向量计算忽略支持集随机性、未重视标记样本及元任务随机构造的问题。 Chengcheng Han,Yuhe Wang,Yingnan Fu,Xiang Li,Minghui Qiu,Ming Gao,Aoying Zhou cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Pavithra Koralalage,Ireoluwa Fakeye,Pedro Machado,Jason Smith,Isibor Kennedy Ihianle,Salisu Wada Yahaya,Andreas Oikonomou,Ahmad Lotfi
title: Dynamic Training of Liquid State Machines
title_zh: 液态状态机的动态训练
abstract: Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) emerged as a promising solution in the field of Artificial Neural Networks (ANNs), attracting the attention of researchers due to their ability to mimic the human brain and process complex information with remarkable speed and accuracy. This research aimed to optimise the training process of Liquid State Machines (LSMs), a recurrent architecture of SNNs, by identifying the most effective weight range to be assigned in SNN to achieve the least difference between desired and actual output. The experimental results showed that by using spike metrics and a range of weights, the desired output and the actual output of spiking neurons could be effectively optimised, leading to improved performance of SNNs. The results were tested and confirmed using three different weight initialisation approaches, with the best results obtained using the Barabasi-Albert random graph method.
summary: Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) emerged as a promising solution in the field of Artificial Neural Networks (ANNs), attracting the attention of researchers due to their ability to mimic the human brain and process complex information with remarkable speed and accuracy. This research aimed to optimise the training process of Liquid State Machines (LSMs), a recurrent architecture of SNNs, by identifying the most effective weight range to be assigned in SNN to achieve the least difference between desired and actual output. The experimental results showed that by using spike metrics and a range of weights, the desired output and the actual output of spiking neurons could be effectively optimised, leading to improved performance of SNNs. The results were tested and confirmed using three different weight initialisation approaches, with the best results obtained using the Barabasi-Albert random graph method.
abstract_zh: 尖峰神经网络（SNN）作为人工神经网络（ANN）领域的一种有前景的解决方案而出现，由于其能够模仿人脑并以惊人的速度和准确性处理复杂信息，因此吸引了研究人员的注意。本研究旨在通过确定 SNN 中分配的最有效权重范围来优化液体状态机 (LSM)（一种 SNN 循环架构）的训练过程，以实现期望输出与实际输出之间的差异最小。实验结果表明，通过使用尖峰度量和一系列权重，可以有效优化尖峰神经元的期望输出和实际输出，从而提高 SNN 的性能。使用三种不同的权重初始化方法对结果进行了测试和确认，其中使用 Barabasi-Albert 随机图方法获得了最佳结果。

AI.tldr: 优化液体状态机的训练过程，确定最佳权重范围以减少期望输出与实际输出之间的差异。
AI.motivation: SNNs因其模仿人脑和高效处理复杂信息的能力而受到关注，但LSMs的训练过程需要进一步优化以提高性能。
AI.method: 通过使用脉冲度量和多种权重初始化方法（包括Barabasi-Albert随机图方法）来优化权重范围，从而改进SNN的输出。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，使用脉冲度量和权重优化方法能有效提升SNN性能，其中Barabasi-Albert方法效果最佳。
AI.conclusion: 该研究验证了通过优化权重范围和初始化方法可有效提升SNN性能，其中Barabasi-Albert方法表现最优。

authors_text: Stefanie Wucherer,Robert McMurray,Kok Yew Ng,Florian Kerber
title: Learning to Predict Grip Quality from Simulation: Establishing a Digital Twin to Generate Simulated Data for a Grip Stability Metric
title_zh: 学习通过仿真预测抓握质量：建立数字孪生来生成抓握稳定性指标的模拟数据
abstract: A robust grip is key to successful manipulation and joining of work pieces involved in any industrial assembly process. Stability of a grip depends on geometric and physical properties of the object as well as the gripper itself. Current state-of-the-art algorithms can usually predict if a grip would fail. However, they are not able to predict the force at which the gripped object starts to slip, which is critical as the object might be subjected to external forces, e.g. when joining it with another object. This research project aims to develop a AI-based approach for a grip metric based on tactile sensor data capturing the physical interactions between gripper and object. Thus, the maximum force that can be applied to the object before it begins to slip should be predicted before manipulating the object. The RGB image of the contact surface between the object and gripper jaws obtained from GelSight tactile sensors during the initial phase of the grip should serve as a training input for the grip metric. To generate such a data set, a pull experiment is designed using a UR 5 robot. Performing these experiments in real life to populate the data set is time consuming since different object classes, geometries, material properties and surface textures need to be considered to enhance the robustness of the prediction algorithm. Hence, a simulation model of the experimental setup has been developed to both speed up and automate the data generation process. In this paper, the design of this digital twin and the accuracy of the synthetic data are presented. State-of-the-art image comparison algorithms show that the simulated RGB images of the contact surface match the experimental data. In addition, the maximum pull forces can be reproduced for different object classes and grip scenarios. As a result, the synthetically generated data can be further used to train the neural grip metric network.

Thus, the maximum force that can be applied to the object before it begins to slip should be predicted before manipulating the object. The RGB image of the contact surface between the object and gripper jaws obtained from GelSight tactile sensors during the initial phase of the grip should serve as a training input for the grip metric. To generate such a data set, a pull experiment is designed using a UR 5 robot. Performing these experiments in real life to populate the data set is time consuming since different object classes, geometries, material properties and surface textures need to be considered to enhance the robustness of the prediction algorithm. Hence, a simulation model of the experimental setup has been developed to both speed up and automate the data generation process. In this paper, the design of this digital twin and the accuracy of the synthetic data are presented. In addition, the maximum pull forces can be reproduced for different object classes and grip scenarios. As a result, the synthetically generated data can be further used to train the neural grip metric network.
abstract_zh: 坚固的抓握力是成功操纵和连接任何工业装配过程中涉及的工件的关键。抓握的稳定性取决于物体以及抓手本身的几何和物理特性。目前最先进的算法通常可以预测抓握是否会失败。然而，他们无法预测所夹持的物体开始滑动的力，这一点至关重要，因为物体可能会受到外力，例如力。将其与另一个对象连接时。该研究项目旨在开发一种基于人工智能的抓握度量方法，该方法基于捕捉抓手和物体之间物理交互的触觉传感器数据。因此，在操纵物体之前应该预测物体开始滑动之前可以施加到物体上的最大力。在抓取的初始阶段，从 GelSight 触觉传感器获得的物体和夹爪之间的接触面的 RGB 图像应作为抓取指标的训练输入。为了生成这样的数据集，使用 UR 5 机器人设计了拉力实验。在现实生活中执行这些实验来填充数据集非常耗时，因为需要考虑不同的对象类别、几何形状、材料属性和表面纹理以增强预测算法的稳健性。因此，开发了实验装置的模拟模型，以加速和自动化数据生成过程。本文介绍了该数字孪生的设计和合成数据的准确性。最先进的图像比较算法表明，接触表面的模拟 RGB 图像与实验数据相符。此外，可以针对不同的物体类别和抓握场景再现最大拉力。因此，综合生成的数据可以进一步用于训练神经握力度量网络。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过建立数字孪生模型，利用模拟数据训练AI算法预测抓取质量，以解决工业装配中抓取稳定性评估的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有算法无法准确预测物体开始滑动时的临界力，而这一参数对工业装配中受外力的物体至关重要，需通过触觉传感器数据和模拟加速数据生成。
AI.method: 设计基于UR5机器人的数字孪生模型，通过模拟拉力实验生成合成数据，并利用图像对比算法验证模拟RGB图像与实验数据的一致性。
AI.result: 模拟生成的接触面RGB图像与实验数据匹配，且能准确再现不同物体类别的最大拉力，证明合成数据可用于训练神经网络。
AI.conclusion: 数字孪生模型有效生成高质量模拟数据，为训练抓取稳定性AI指标提供了可行方案，提升了预测算法的鲁棒性。

method: 设计基于UR5机器人的数字孪生模型，通过模拟拉力实验生成合成数据，并利用图像对比算法验证模拟RGB图像与实验数据的一致性。
result: 模拟生成的接触面RGB图像与实验数据匹配，且能准确再现不同物体类别的最大拉力，证明合成数据可用于训练神经网络。
conclusion: 数字孪生模型有效生成高质量模拟数据，为训练抓取稳定性AI指标提供了可行方案，提升了预测算法的鲁棒性。
search_text: Learning to Predict Grip Quality from Simulation: Establishing a Digital Twin to Generate Simulated Data for a Grip Stability Metric 学习通过仿真预测抓握质量：建立数字孪生来生成抓握稳定性指标的模拟数据 A robust grip is key to successful manipulation and joining of work pieces involved in any industrial assembly process. Stability of a grip depends on geometric and physical properties of the object as well as the gripper itself. Current state-of-the-art algorithms can usually predict if a grip would fail. However, they are not able to predict the force at which the gripped object starts to slip, which is critical as the object might be subjected to external forces, e.g. when joining it with another object. This research project aims to develop a AI-based approach for a grip metric based on tactile sensor data capturing the physical interactions between gripper and object. Thus, the maximum force that can be applied to the object before it begins to slip should be predicted before manipulating the object. The RGB image of the contact surface between the object and gripper jaws obtained from GelSight tactile sensors during the initial phase of the grip should serve as a training input for the grip metric. To generate such a data set, a pull experiment is designed using a UR 5 robot. Performing these experiments in real life to populate the data set is time consuming since different object classes, geometries, material properties and surface textures need to be considered to enhance the robustness of the prediction algorithm. Hence, a simulation model of the experimental setup has been developed to both speed up and automate the data generation process. In this paper, the design of this digital twin and the accuracy of the synthetic data are presented. State-of-the-art image comparison algorithms show that the simulated RGB images of the contact surface match the experimental data. In addition, the maximum pull forces can be reproduced for different object classes and grip scenarios. As a result, the synthetically generated data can be further used to train the neural grip metric network. 坚固的抓握力是成功操纵和连接任何工业装配过程中涉及的工件的关键。抓握的稳定性取决于物体以及抓手本身的几何和物理特性。目前最先进的算法通常可以预测抓握是否会失败。然而，他们无法预测所夹持的物体开始滑动的力，这一点至关重要，因为物体可能会受到外力，例如力。将其与另一个对象连接时。该研究项目旨在开发一种基于人工智能的抓握度量方法，该方法基于捕捉抓手和物体之间物理交互的触觉传感器数据。因此，在操纵物体之前应该预测物体开始滑动之前可以施加到物体上的最大力。在抓取的初始阶段，从 GelSight 触觉传感器获得的物体和夹爪之间的接触面的 RGB 图像应作为抓取指标的训练输入。为了生成这样的数据集，使用 UR 5 机器人设计了拉力实验。在现实生活中执行这些实验来填充数据集非常耗时，因为需要考虑不同的对象类别、几何形状、材料属性和表面纹理以增强预测算法的稳健性。因此，开发了实验装置的模拟模型，以加速和自动化数据生成过程。本文介绍了该数字孪生的设计和合成数据的准确性。最先进的图像比较算法表明，接触表面的模拟 RGB 图像与实验数据相符。此外，可以针对不同的物体类别和抓握场景再现最大拉力。因此，综合生成的数据可以进一步用于训练神经握力度量网络。 本文旨在通过建立数字孪生模型，利用模拟数据训练AI算法预测抓取质量，以解决工业装配中抓取稳定性评估的问题。 Stefanie Wucherer,Robert McMurray,Kok Yew Ng,Florian Kerber cs.RO,eess.IV,eess.SP

authors_text: Pinzhen Chen,Gerasimos Lampouras
title: Exploring Data Augmentation for Code Generation Tasks
title_zh: 探索代码生成任务的数据增强
abstract: Advances in natural language processing, such as transfer learning from pre-trained language models, have impacted how models are trained for programming language tasks too. Previous research primarily explored code pre-training and expanded it through multi-modality and multi-tasking, yet the data for downstream tasks remain modest in size. Focusing on data utilization for downstream tasks, we propose and adapt augmentation methods that yield consistent improvements in code translation and summarization by up to 6.9% and 7.5% respectively. Further analysis suggests that our methods work orthogonally and show benefits in output code style and numeric consistency. We also discuss test data imperfections.
summary: Advances in natural language processing, such as transfer learning from pre-trained language models, have impacted how models are trained for programming language tasks too. Previous research primarily explored code pre-training and expanded it through multi-modality and multi-tasking, yet the data for downstream tasks remain modest in size. Focusing on data utilization for downstream tasks, we propose and adapt augmentation methods that yield consistent improvements in code translation and summarization by up to 6.9% and 7.5% respectively. Further analysis suggests that our methods work orthogonally and show benefits in output code style and numeric consistency. We also discuss test data imperfections.
abstract_zh: 自然语言处理的进步，例如从预先训练的语言模型中进行迁移学习，也影响了模型针对编程语言任务的训练方式。之前的研究主要探索代码预训练，并通过多模态和多任务进行扩展，但下游任务的数据规模仍然不大。着眼于下游任务的数据利用，我们提出并调整增强方法，使代码翻译和摘要的持续改进分别高达 6.9% 和 7.5%。进一步的分析表明，我们的方法正交工作，并在输出代码风格和数字一致性方面显示出优势。我们还讨论了测试数据的缺陷。

AI.tldr: 本文研究数据增强方法以提升代码生成任务（如代码翻译和摘要）的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有研究在代码预训练和多模态扩展上进展显著，但下游任务数据量有限，限制了模型性能，需探索更有效的数据增强方法。
AI.method: 提出并适配多种数据增强方法，通过合成或变换现有数据来扩大训练集，提升模型泛化能力。
AI.result: 代码翻译和摘要任务的准确率分别提升6.9%和7.5%，且方法在代码风格一致性和数值准确性方面表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 数据增强方法能有效提升代码生成任务性能，且方法间正交，但需注意测试数据质量对结果的影响。

authors_text: Zeping Min,Qian Ge,Zhong Li,Weinan E
title: MAC: A unified framework boosting low resource automatic speech recognition
title_zh: MAC：促进低资源自动语音识别的统一框架
abstract: We propose a unified framework for low resource automatic speech recognition tasks named meta audio concatenation (MAC). It is easy to implement and can be carried out in extremely low resource environments. Mathematically, we give a clear description of MAC framework from the perspective of bayesian sampling. In this framework, we leverage a novel concatenative synthesis text-to-speech system to boost the low resource ASR task. By the concatenative synthesis text-to-speech system, we can integrate language pronunciation rules and adjust the TTS process. Furthermore, we propose a broad notion of meta audio set to meet the modeling needs of different languages and different scenes when using the system. Extensive experiments have demonstrated the great effectiveness of MAC on low resource ASR tasks. For CTC greedy search, CTC prefix, attention, and attention rescoring decode mode in Cantonese ASR task, Taiwanese ASR task, and Japanese ASR task the MAC method can reduce the CER by more than 15\%. Furthermore, in the ASR task, MAC beats wav2vec2 (with fine-tuning) on common voice datasets of Cantonese and gets really competitive results on common voice datasets of Taiwanese and Japanese. Among them, it is worth mentioning that we achieve a \textbf{10.9\%} character error rate (CER) on the common voice Cantonese ASR task, bringing about \textbf{30\%} relative improvement compared to the wav2vec2 (with fine-tuning).
summary: We propose a unified framework for low resource automatic speech recognition tasks named meta audio concatenation (MAC). It is easy to implement and can be carried out in extremely low resource environments. Mathematically, we give a clear description of MAC framework from the perspective of bayesian sampling. In this framework, we leverage a novel concatenative synthesis text-to-speech system to boost the low resource ASR task. By the concatenative synthesis text-to-speech system, we can integrate language pronunciation rules and adjust the TTS process. Furthermore, we propose a broad notion of meta audio set to meet the modeling needs of different languages and different scenes when using the system. Extensive experiments have demonstrated the great effectiveness of MAC on low resource ASR tasks. For CTC greedy search, CTC prefix, attention, and attention rescoring decode mode in Cantonese ASR task, Taiwanese ASR task, and Japanese ASR task the MAC method can reduce the CER by more than 15\%. Furthermore, in the ASR task, MAC beats wav2vec2 (with fine-tuning) on common voice datasets of Cantonese and gets really competitive results on common voice datasets of Taiwanese and Japanese. Among them, it is worth mentioning that we achieve a \textbf{10.9\%} character error rate (CER) on the common voice Cantonese ASR task, bringing about \textbf{30\%} relative improvement compared to the wav2vec2 (with fine-tuning).
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个用于低资源自动语音识别任务的统一框架，称为元音频连接（MAC）。它易于实现，可以在资源极少的环境下进行。数学上，我们从贝叶斯采样的角度对MAC框架进行了清晰的描述。在此框架中，我们利用新颖的串联合成文本转语音系统来提升低资源 ASR 任务。通过拼接合成文本转语音系统，我们可以整合语言发音规则并调整TTS过程。此外，我们提出了元音频集的广泛概念，以满足使用系统时不同语言和不同场景的建模需求。大量的实验证明了 MAC 在低资源 ASR 任务上的巨大有效性。对于粤语ASR任务、台语ASR任务和日语ASR任务中的CTC贪婪搜索、CTC前缀、注意力和注意力重评分解码模式，MAC方法可以将CER降低15％以上。此外，在 ASR 任务中，MAC 在粤语常见语音数据集上击败了 wav2vec2（经过微调），并且在台湾语和日语常见语音数据集上获得了真正有竞争力的结果。其中，值得一提的是，我们在普通语音粤语 ASR 任务上实现了 \textbf{10.9\%} 字符错误率（CER），与 wav2vec2（经过微调）相比，带来了 \textbf{30\%} 的相对改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为MAC的统一框架，旨在提升低资源环境下的自动语音识别（ASR）性能。
AI.motivation: 低资源语言的自动语音识别面临数据不足的挑战，现有方法在资源有限时效果不佳，需探索更高效且通用的解决方案。
AI.method: 通过贝叶斯采样理论构建MAC框架，结合拼接合成文本到语音（TTS）系统生成高质量语音数据，并引入元音频集以适应多语言和多场景需求。
AI.result: 在粤语、台语和日语的低资源ASR任务中，MAC方法使字符错误率（CER）降低超15%，且在粤语任务中达到10.9%的CER，相较fine-tune后的wav2vec2模型提升30%。
AI.conclusion: MAC框架通过生成合成数据与元音频集设计，有效提升了低资源ASR性能，展现出跨语言和场景的广泛适用性。

authors_text: Shuai Wang,Harrisen Scells,Bevan Koopman,Guido Zuccon
title: Can ChatGPT Write a Good Boolean Query for Systematic Review Literature Search?
title_zh: ChatGPT 可以编写一个好的布尔查询来进行系统综述文献检索吗？
abstract: Systematic reviews are comprehensive reviews of the literature for a highly focused research question. These reviews are often treated as the highest form of evidence in evidence-based medicine, and are the key strategy to answer research questions in the medical field. To create a high-quality systematic review, complex Boolean queries are often constructed to retrieve studies for the review topic. However, it often takes a long time for systematic review researchers to construct a high quality systematic review Boolean query, and often the resulting queries are far from effective. Poor queries may lead to biased or invalid reviews, because they missed to retrieve key evidence, or to extensive increase in review costs, because they retrieved too many irrelevant studies. Recent advances in Transformer-based generative models have shown great potential to effectively follow instructions from users and generate answers based on the instructions being made. In this paper, we investigate the effectiveness of the latest of such models, ChatGPT, in generating effective Boolean queries for systematic review literature search. Through a number of extensive experiments on standard test collections for the task, we find that ChatGPT is capable of generating queries that lead to high search precision, although trading-off this for recall. Overall, our study demonstrates the potential of ChatGPT in generating effective Boolean queries for systematic review literature search. The ability of ChatGPT to follow complex instructions and generate queries with high precision makes it a valuable tool for researchers conducting systematic reviews, particularly for rapid reviews where time is a constraint and often trading-off higher precision for lower recall is acceptable.
summary: Systematic reviews are comprehensive reviews of the literature for a highly focused research question. These reviews are often treated as the highest form of evidence in evidence-based medicine, and are the key strategy to answer research questions in the medical field. To create a high-quality systematic review, complex Boolean queries are often constructed to retrieve studies for the review topic. However, it often takes a long time for systematic review researchers to construct a high quality systematic review Boolean query, and often the resulting queries are far from effective. Poor queries may lead to biased or invalid reviews, because they missed to retrieve key evidence, or to extensive increase in review costs, because they retrieved too many irrelevant studies. Recent advances in Transformer-based generative models have shown great potential to effectively follow instructions from users and generate answers based on the instructions being made. In this paper, we investigate the effectiveness of the latest of such models, ChatGPT, in generating effective Boolean queries for systematic review literature search. Through a number of extensive experiments on standard test collections for the task, we find that ChatGPT is capable of generating queries that lead to high search precision, although trading-off this for recall. Overall, our study demonstrates the potential of ChatGPT in generating effective Boolean queries for systematic review literature search. The ability of ChatGPT to follow complex instructions and generate queries with high precision makes it a valuable tool for researchers conducting systematic reviews, particularly for rapid reviews where time is a constraint and often trading-off higher precision for lower recall is acceptable.
abstract_zh: 系统综述是针对高度集中的研究问题对文献进行的全面综述。这些评论通常被视为循证医学中最高形式的证据，是回答医学领域研究问题的关键策略。为了创建高质量的系统综述，通常会构建复杂的布尔查询来检索综述主题的研究。然而，系统评价研究人员通常需要花费很长时间才能构建高质量的系统评价布尔查询，而且生成的查询往往远非有效。糟糕的查询可能会导致有偏见或无效的评论，因为他们错过了检索关键证据，或者导致评论成本大幅增加，因为他们检索了太多不相关的研究。基于 Transformer 的生成模型的最新进展显示出有效遵循用户指令并根据所做指令生成答案的巨大潜力。在本文中，我们研究了最新的此类模型 ChatGPT 在生成有效的布尔查询以进行系统综述文献搜索方面的有效性。通过对该任务的标准测试集合进行大量广泛的实验，我们发现 ChatGPT 能够生成导致高搜索精度的查询，尽管这会牺牲召回率。总的来说，我们的研究证明了 ChatGPT 在为系统综述文献检索生成有效布尔查询方面的潜力。 ChatGPT 遵循复杂指令并生成高精度查询的能力使其成为研究人员进行系统审查的宝贵工具，特别是对于时间有限且通常可以接受更高精确度和更低召回率的快速审查。

AI.tldr: 评估ChatGPT生成布尔查询用于系统综述文献搜索的效果
AI.motivation: 系统综述需复杂布尔查询但人工构建耗时且效果不佳，生成模型可能提供高效解决方案
AI.method: 在标准测试集上进行多轮实验，评估ChatGPT生成布尔查询的精确率与召回率
AI.result: ChatGPT生成的查询具有高精确率但牺牲部分召回率，整体表现有效
AI.conclusion: ChatGPT可作为生成高效布尔查询的工具，适用于时间敏感的快速系统综述研究

search_text: Can ChatGPT Write a Good Boolean Query for Systematic Review Literature Search? ChatGPT 可以编写一个好的布尔查询来进行系统综述文献检索吗？ Systematic reviews are comprehensive reviews of the literature for a highly focused research question. These reviews are often treated as the highest form of evidence in evidence-based medicine, and are the key strategy to answer research questions in the medical field. To create a high-quality systematic review, complex Boolean queries are often constructed to retrieve studies for the review topic. However, it often takes a long time for systematic review researchers to construct a high quality systematic review Boolean query, and often the resulting queries are far from effective. Poor queries may lead to biased or invalid reviews, because they missed to retrieve key evidence, or to extensive increase in review costs, because they retrieved too many irrelevant studies. Recent advances in Transformer-based generative models have shown great potential to effectively follow instructions from users and generate answers based on the instructions being made. Overall, our study demonstrates the potential of ChatGPT in generating effective Boolean queries for systematic review literature search. authors_text: Ali Borji
title: A Categorical Archive of ChatGPT Failures
title_zh: ChatGPT 故障的分类存档
abstract: Large language models have been demonstrated to be valuable in different fields. ChatGPT, developed by OpenAI, has been trained using massive amounts of data and simulates human conversation by comprehending context and generating appropriate responses. It has garnered significant attention due to its ability to effectively answer a broad range of human inquiries, with fluent and comprehensive answers surpassing prior public chatbots in both security and usefulness. However, a comprehensive analysis of ChatGPT's failures is lacking, which is the focus of this study. Eleven categories of failures, including reasoning, factual errors, math, coding, and bias, are presented and discussed. The risks, limitations, and societal implications of ChatGPT are also highlighted. The goal of this study is to assist researchers and developers in enhancing future language models and chatbots.
summary: Large language models have been demonstrated to be valuable in different fields. ChatGPT, developed by OpenAI, has been trained using massive amounts of data and simulates human conversation by comprehending context and generating appropriate responses. It has garnered significant attention due to its ability to effectively answer a broad range of human inquiries, with fluent and comprehensive answers surpassing prior public chatbots in both security and usefulness. However, a comprehensive analysis of ChatGPT's failures is lacking, which is the focus of this study. Eleven categories of failures, including reasoning, factual errors, math, coding, and bias, are presented and discussed. The risks, limitations, and societal implications of ChatGPT are also highlighted. The goal of this study is to assist researchers and developers in enhancing future language models and chatbots.
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型已被证明在不同领域具有价值。 ChatGPT 由 OpenAI 开发，已使用大量数据进行训练，并通过理解上下文并生成适当的响应来模拟人类对话。它因其能够有效回答广泛的人类询问而受到广泛关注，其流畅而全面的答案在安全性和实用性方面都超越了之前的公共聊天机器人。然而，缺乏对ChatGPT故障的全面分析，而这正是本研究的重点。提出并讨论了 11 类失败，包括推理、事实错误、数学、编码和偏见。还强调了 ChatGPT 的风险、局限性和社会影响。这项研究的目的是帮助研究人员和开发人员增强未来的语言模型和聊天机器人。

AI.tldr: 本文对ChatGPT的失败案例进行分类整理，分析其在推理、事实错误、数学、编程等11个领域的局限性。
AI.motivation: 尽管ChatGPT表现出色，但缺乏对其失败模式的系统性研究，需通过分类分析揭示其风险与改进方向。
AI.method: 通过收集并归类ChatGPT在实际应用中的典型失败案例，按11个维度进行分析讨论。
AI.result: 识别出11类主要失败类型，揭示模型在复杂推理、事实准确性及社会影响方面的核心问题。
AI.conclusion: 系统性分析ChatGPT的失败案例可为未来语言模型的安全性与可靠性提升提供关键参考。

authors_text: Zhijing Jin,Rada Mihalcea
title: Natural Language Processing for Policymaking
title_zh: 用于政策制定的自然语言处理
comment: Handbook of Computational Social Science for Policy (2023), Chapter 7 (pages 141-162). Open Access on Springer: https://doi.org/10.1007/978-3-031-16624-2
comments: Handbook of Computational Social Science for Policy (2023), Chapter 7 (pages 141-162). Open Access on Springer: https://doi.org/10.1007/978-3-031-16624-2
abstract: Language is the medium for many political activities, from campaigns to news reports. Natural language processing (NLP) uses computational tools to parse text into key information that is needed for policymaking. In this chapter, we introduce common methods of NLP, including text classification, topic modeling, event extraction, and text scaling. We then overview how these methods can be used for policymaking through four major applications including data collection for evidence-based policymaking, interpretation of political decisions, policy communication, and investigation of policy effects. Finally, we highlight some potential limitations and ethical concerns when using NLP for policymaking. This text is from Chapter 7 (pages 141-162) of the Handbook of Computational Social Science for Policy (2023). Open Access on Springer: https://doi.org/10.1007/978-3-031-16624-2

We then overview how these methods can be used for policymaking through four major applications including data collection for evidence-based policymaking, interpretation of political decisions, policy communication, and investigation of policy effects. Finally, we highlight some potential limitations and ethical concerns when using NLP for policymaking. This text is from Chapter 7 (pages 141-162) of the Handbook of Computational Social Science for Policy (2023). Open Access on Springer: https://doi.org/10.1007/978-3-031-16624-2
abstract_zh: 语言是许多政治活动的媒介，从竞选活动到新闻报道。自然语言处理 (NLP) 使用计算工具将文本解析为政策制定所需的关键信息。在本章中，我们介绍 NLP 的常用方法，包括文本分类、主题建模、事件提取和文本缩放。然后，我们概述了如何通过四个主要应用将这些方法用于政策制定，包括基于证据的政策制定的数据收集、政治决策的解释、政策沟通和政策效果调查。最后，我们强调了使用 NLP 进行政策制定时的一些潜在限制和道德问题。本文摘自《政策计算社会科学手册》（2023 年）第 7 章（第 141-162 页）。 Springer 上的开放获取：https://doi.org/10.1007/978-3-031-16624-2

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了自然语言处理（NLP）技术在政策制定中的应用，包括文本分类、主题建模等方法，并探讨其在政策数据收集、决策解读、沟通及效果评估中的作用。
AI.motivation: 语言是政治活动的核心媒介，NLP技术能将文本转化为政策制定所需的关键信息，从而提升决策的科学性与效率。
AI.method: 综述了文本分类、主题建模、事件抽取和文本量化等NLP方法，并结合政策制定的四个应用场景进行分析。
AI.result: 系统梳理了NLP技术如何支持基于证据的政策制定、政治决策解读、政策传播及效果评估，同时指出其局限性与伦理挑战。
AI.conclusion: NLP为政策制定提供了新工具，但需关注数据偏差、隐私保护及算法透明性等潜在风险。

result: 系统梳理了NLP技术如何支持基于证据的政策制定、政治决策解读、政策传播及效果评估，同时指出其局限性与伦理挑战。
conclusion: NLP为政策制定提供了新工具，但需关注数据偏差、隐私保护及算法透明性等潜在风险。
search_text: Natural Language Processing for Policymaking 用于政策制定的自然语言处理 Language is the medium for many political activities, from campaigns to news reports. Natural language processing (NLP) uses computational tools to parse text into key information that is needed for policymaking. In this chapter, we introduce common methods of NLP, including text classification, topic modeling, event extraction, and text scaling. We then overview how these methods can be used for policymaking through four major applications including data collection for evidence-based policymaking, interpretation of political decisions, policy communication, and investigation of policy effects. Finally, we highlight some potential limitations and ethical concerns when using NLP for policymaking. This text is from Chapter 7 (pages 141-162) of the Handbook of Computational Social Science for Policy (2023). Open Access on Springer: https://doi.org/10.1007/978-3-031-16624-2 语言是许多政治活动的媒介，从竞选活动到新闻报道。自然语言处理 (NLP) 使用计算工具将文本解析为政策制定所需的关键信息。在本章中，我们介绍 NLP 的常用方法，包括文本分类、主题建模、事件提取和文本缩放。然后，我们概述了如何通过四个主要应用将这些方法用于政策制定，包括基于证据的政策制定的数据收集、政治决策的解释、政策沟通和政策效果调查。最后，我们强调了使用 NLP 进行政策制定时的一些潜在限制和道德问题。本文摘自《政策计算社会科学手册》（2023 年）第 7 章（第 141-162 页）。 Springer 上的开放获取：https://doi.org/10.1007/978-3-031-16624-2 本文介绍了自然语言处理（NLP）技术在政策制定中的应用，包括文本分类、主题建模等方法，并探讨其在政策数据收集、决策解读、沟通及效果评估中的作用。 Zhijing Jin,Rada Mihalcea cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.CY,cs.LG

authors_text: Sunyi Chi,Bo Dong,Yiming Xu,Zhenyu Shi,Zheng Du
title: APAM: Adaptive Pre-training and Adaptive Meta Learning in Language Model for Noisy Labels and Long-tailed Learning
title_zh: APAM：噪声标签和长尾学习的语言模型中的自适应预训练和自适应元学习
abstract: Practical natural language processing (NLP) tasks are commonly long-tailed with noisy labels. Those problems challenge the generalization and robustness of complex models such as Deep Neural Networks (DNNs). Some commonly used resampling techniques, such as oversampling or undersampling, could easily lead to overfitting. It is growing popular to learn the data weights leveraging a small amount of metadata. Besides, recent studies have shown the advantages of self-supervised pre-training, particularly to the under-represented data. In this work, we propose a general framework to handle the problem of both long-tail and noisy labels. The model is adapted to the domain of problems in a contrastive learning manner. The re-weighting module is a feed-forward network that learns explicit weighting functions and adapts weights according to metadata. The framework further adapts weights of terms in the loss function through a combination of the polynomial expansion of cross-entropy loss and focal loss. Our extensive experiments show that the proposed framework consistently outperforms baseline methods. Lastly, our sensitive analysis emphasizes the capability of the proposed framework to handle the long-tailed problem and mitigate the negative impact of noisy labels.
summary: Practical natural language processing (NLP) tasks are commonly long-tailed with noisy labels. Those problems challenge the generalization and robustness of complex models such as Deep Neural Networks (DNNs). Some commonly used resampling techniques, such as oversampling or undersampling, could easily lead to overfitting. It is growing popular to learn the data weights leveraging a small amount of metadata. Besides, recent studies have shown the advantages of self-supervised pre-training, particularly to the under-represented data. In this work, we propose a general framework to handle the problem of both long-tail and noisy labels. The model is adapted to the domain of problems in a contrastive learning manner. The re-weighting module is a feed-forward network that learns explicit weighting functions and adapts weights according to metadata. The framework further adapts weights of terms in the loss function through a combination of the polynomial expansion of cross-entropy loss and focal loss. Our extensive experiments show that the proposed framework consistently outperforms baseline methods. Lastly, our sensitive analysis emphasizes the capability of the proposed framework to handle the long-tailed problem and mitigate the negative impact of noisy labels.
abstract_zh: 实际的自然语言处理（NLP）任务通常是带有噪声标签的长尾任务。这些问题挑战了深度神经网络 (DNN) 等复杂模型的泛化性和鲁棒性。一些常用的重采样技术，例如过采样或欠采样，很容易导致过拟合。利用少量元数据来学习数据权重越来越流行。此外，最近的研究表明了自监督预训练的优势，特别是对于代表性不足的数据。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个通用框架来处理长尾标签和噪声标签的问题。该模型以对比学习的方式适应问题领域。重新加权模块是一个前馈网络，它学习显式加权函数并根据元数据调整权重。该框架通过交叉熵损失和焦点损失的多项式展开的组合进一步调整损失函数中项的权重。我们广泛的实验表明，所提出的框架始终优于基线方法。最后，我们的敏感分析强调了所提出的框架处理长尾问题并减轻噪声标签负面影响的能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为APAM的通用框架，用于解决自然语言处理中长尾分布与噪声标签的双重挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有重采样技术易导致过拟合，而利用元数据学习数据权重的方法在处理长尾和噪声标签问题上仍存在不足。
AI.method: 结合对比学习进行领域适配，通过前馈网络构建动态权重模块，并融合交叉熵损失的多项式扩展与焦损失优化损失函数权重。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上实验表明，该框架在长尾分布和噪声标签场景下均优于现有基线方法。
AI.conclusion: APAM框架通过自适应预训练与元学习机制，有效提升了模型在长尾数据和噪声标签环境下的鲁棒性与泛化能力。

search_text: APAM: Adaptive Pre-training and Adaptive Meta Learning in Language Model for Noisy Labels and Long-tailed Learning APAM：噪声标签和长尾学习的语言模型中的自适应预训练和自适应元学习 Practical natural language processing (NLP) tasks are commonly long-tailed with noisy labels. Those problems challenge the generalization and robustness of complex models such as Deep Neural Networks (DNNs). Some commonly used resampling techniques, such as oversampling or undersampling, could easily lead to overfitting. It is growing popular to learn the data weights leveraging a small amount of metadata. Besides, recent studies have shown the advantages of self-supervised pre-training, particularly to the under-represented data. In this work, we propose a general framework to handle the problem of both long-tail and noisy labels. The model is adapted to the domain of problems in a contrastive learning manner. The re-weighting module is a feed-forward network that learns explicit weighting functions and adapts weights according to metadata. The framework further adapts weights of terms in the loss function through a combination of the polynomial expansion of cross-entropy loss and focal loss. Our extensive experiments show that the proposed framework consistently outperforms baseline methods. Lastly, our sensitive analysis emphasizes the capability of the proposed framework to handle the long-tailed problem and mitigate the negative impact of noisy labels. 实际的自然语言处理（NLP）任务通常是带有噪声标签的长尾任务。这些问题挑战了深度神经网络 (DNN) 等复杂模型的泛化性和鲁棒性。一些常用的重采样技术，例如过采样或欠采样，很容易导致过拟合。利用少量元数据来学习数据权重越来越流行。此外，最近的研究表明了自监督预训练的优势，特别是对于代表性不足的数据。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个通用框架来处理长尾标签和噪声标签的问题。该模型以对比学习的方式适应问题领域。重新加权模块是一个前馈网络，它学习显式加权函数并根据元数据调整权重。该框架通过交叉熵损失和焦点损失的多项式展开的组合进一步调整损失函数中项的权重。我们广泛的实验表明，所提出的框架始终优于基线方法。最后，我们的敏感分析强调了所提出的框架处理长尾问题并减轻噪声标签负面影响的能力。 本文提出一种名为APAM的通用框架，用于解决自然语言处理中长尾分布与噪声标签的双重挑战。 Sunyi Chi,Bo Dong,Yiming Xu,Zhenyu Shi,Zheng Du cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Xiaowen Shi,Fan Yang,Ze Wang,Xiaoxu Wu,Muzhi Guan,Guogang Liao,Yongkang Wang,Xingxing Wang,Dong Wang
title: PIER: Permutation-Level Interest-Based End-to-End Re-ranking Framework in E-commerce
title_zh: PIER：电子商务中基于兴趣的排列级端到端重排序框架
abstract: Re-ranking draws increased attention on both academics and industries, which rearranges the ranking list by modeling the mutual influence among items to better meet users' demands. Many existing re-ranking methods directly take the initial ranking list as input, and generate the optimal permutation through a well-designed context-wise model, which brings the evaluation-before-reranking problem. Meanwhile, evaluating all candidate permutations brings unacceptable computational costs in practice. Thus, to better balance efficiency and effectiveness, online systems usually use a two-stage architecture which uses some heuristic methods such as beam-search to generate a suitable amount of candidate permutations firstly, which are then fed into the evaluation model to get the optimal permutation. However, existing methods in both stages can be improved through the following aspects. As for generation stage, heuristic methods only use point-wise prediction scores and lack an effective judgment. As for evaluation stage, most existing context-wise evaluation models only consider the item context and lack more fine-grained feature context modeling. This paper presents a novel end-to-end re-ranking framework named PIER to tackle the above challenges which still follows the two-stage architecture and contains two mainly modules named FPSM and OCPM. We apply SimHash in FPSM to select top-K candidates from the full permutation based on user's permutation-level interest in an efficient way. Then we design a novel omnidirectional attention mechanism in OCPM to capture the context information in the permutation. Finally, we jointly train these two modules end-to-end by introducing a comparative learning loss. Offline experiment results demonstrate that PIER outperforms baseline models on both public and industrial datasets, and we have successfully deployed PIER on Meituan food delivery platform.

Many existing re-ranking methods directly take the initial ranking list as input, and generate the optimal permutation through a well-designed context-wise model, which brings the evaluation-before-reranking problem. Meanwhile, evaluating all candidate permutations brings unacceptable computational costs in practice. Thus, to better balance efficiency and effectiveness, online systems usually use a two-stage architecture which uses some heuristic methods such as beam-search to generate a suitable amount of candidate permutations firstly, which are then fed into the evaluation model to get the optimal permutation. However, existing methods in both stages can be improved through the following aspects. As for generation stage, heuristic methods only use point-wise prediction scores and lack an effective judgment. As for evaluation stage, most existing context-wise evaluation models only consider the item context and lack more fine-grained feature context modeling. This paper presents a novel end-to-end re-ranking framework named PIER to tackle the above challenges which still follows the two-stage architecture and contains two mainly modules named FPSM and OCPM. We apply SimHash in FPSM to select top-K candidates from the full permutation based on user's permutation-level interest in an efficient way. Then we design a novel omnidirectional attention mechanism in OCPM to capture the context information in the permutation. Finally, we jointly train these two modules end-to-end by introducing a comparative learning loss. Offline experiment results demonstrate that PIER outperforms baseline models on both public and industrial datasets, and we have successfully deployed PIER on Meituan food delivery platform.
abstract_zh: 重新排名越来越受到学术界和工业界的关注，它通过建模项目之间的相互影响来重新排列排名列表，以更好地满足用户的需求。许多现有的重排序方法直接以初始排序列表作为输入，并通过精心设计的上下文模型生成最优排列，这带来了重排序之前的评估问题。同时，评估所有候选排列在实践中会带来不可接受的计算成本。因此，为了更好地平衡效率和效果，在线系统通常采用两阶段架构，首先使用波束搜索等启发式方法生成适量的候选排列，然后将其输入到评估模型中以获得最佳排列。然而，这两个阶段的现有方法都可以通过以下方面进行改进。对于生成阶段，启发式方法仅使用逐点预测分数，缺乏有效的判断。在评估阶段，大多数现有的上下文评估模型仅考虑项目上下文，缺乏更细粒度的特征上下文建模。本文提出了一种新颖的端到端重排序框架PIER来应对上述挑战，该框架仍然遵循两阶段架构，包含两个主要模块FPSM和OCPM。我们在 FPSM 中应用 SimHash，根据用户对排列级别的兴趣，以有效的方式从完整排列中选择前 K 个候选者。然后我们在 OCPM 中设计了一种新颖的全向注意力机制来捕获排列中的上下文信息。最后，我们通过引入比较学习损失来端到端地联合训练这两个模块。线下实验结果表明，PIER 在公共数据集和行业数据集上均优于基线模型，并且我们已成功将 PIER 部署在美团外卖平台上。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于用户排列级兴趣的端到端重排序框架PIER，旨在提升电商场景下重排序的效率与效果。
AI.motivation: 现有重排序方法存在评估前重排序问题及计算成本高，两阶段架构中生成阶段依赖启发式方法且缺乏有效判断，评估阶段未充分建模细粒度上下文信息。
AI.method: 设计包含FPSM模块（基于SimHash高效筛选候选排列）和OCPM模块（全向注意力机制捕捉排列上下文信息）的PIER框架，并通过对比学习损失联合训练两个模块。
AI.result: 在公开数据集和工业数据集上均优于基线模型，已成功部署于美团外卖平台。
AI.conclusion: PIER通过端到端优化生成与评估阶段，在效率与效果间取得平衡，为电商重排序提供有效解决方案。

Then we design a novel omnidirectional attention mechanism in OCPM to capture the context information in the permutation. Finally, we jointly train these two modules end-to-end by introducing a comparative learning loss. Offline experiment results demonstrate that PIER outperforms baseline models on both public and industrial datasets, and we have successfully deployed PIER on Meituan food delivery platform. 重新排名越来越受到学术界和工业界的关注，它通过建模项目之间的相互影响来重新排列排名列表，以更好地满足用户的需求。许多现有的重排序方法直接以初始排序列表作为输入，并通过精心设计的上下文模型生成最优排列，这带来了重排序之前的评估问题。同时，评估所有候选排列在实践中会带来不可接受的计算成本。因此，为了更好地平衡效率和效果，在线系统通常采用两阶段架构，首先使用波束搜索等启发式方法生成适量的候选排列，然后将其输入到评估模型中以获得最佳排列。然而，这两个阶段的现有方法都可以通过以下方面进行改进。对于生成阶段，启发式方法仅使用逐点预测分数，缺乏有效的判断。在评估阶段，大多数现有的上下文评估模型仅考虑项目上下文，缺乏更细粒度的特征上下文建模。本文提出了一种新颖的端到端重排序框架PIER来应对上述挑战，该框架仍然遵循两阶段架构，包含两个主要模块FPSM和OCPM。我们在 FPSM 中应用 SimHash，根据用户对排列级别的兴趣，以有效的方式从完整排列中选择前 K 个候选者。然后我们在 OCPM 中设计了一种新颖的全向注意力机制来捕获排列中的上下文信息。最后，我们通过引入比较学习损失来端到端地联合训练这两个模块。线下实验结果表明，PIER 在公共数据集和行业数据集上均优于基线模型，并且我们已成功将 PIER 部署在美团外卖平台上。 本文提出一种基于用户排列级兴趣的端到端重排序框架PIER，旨在提升电商场景下重排序的效率与效果。 Xiaowen Shi,Fan Yang,Ze Wang,Xiaoxu Wu,Muzhi Guan,Guogang Liao,Yongkang Wang,Xingxing Wang,Dong Wang cs.IR,cs.AI

authors_text: Yan Zhang,Ziang Li,Haole Guo,Luyao Wang,Qihe Chen,Wenjie Jiang,Mingming Fan,Guyue Zhou,Jiangtao Gong
title: "I am the follower, also the boss": Exploring Different Levels of Autonomy and Machine Forms of Guiding Robots for the Visually Impaired
title_zh: “我是跟随者，也是老板”：视障导引机器人不同自主程度与机器形态的探索
abstract: Guiding robots, in the form of canes or cars, have recently been explored to assist blind and low vision (BLV) people. Such robots can provide full or partial autonomy when guiding. However, the pros and cons of different forms and autonomy for guiding robots remain unknown. We sought to fill this gap. We designed autonomy-switchable guiding robotic cane and car. We conducted a controlled lab-study (N=12) and a field study (N=9) on BLV. Results showed that full autonomy received better walking performance and subjective ratings in the controlled study, whereas participants used more partial autonomy in the natural environment as demanding more control. Besides, the car robot has demonstrated abilities to provide a higher sense of safety and navigation efficiency compared with the cane robot. Our findings offered empirical evidence about how the BLV community perceived different machine forms and autonomy, which can inform the design of assistive robots.
summary: Guiding robots, in the form of canes or cars, have recently been explored to assist blind and low vision (BLV) people. Such robots can provide full or partial autonomy when guiding. However, the pros and cons of different forms and autonomy for guiding robots remain unknown. We sought to fill this gap. We designed autonomy-switchable guiding robotic cane and car. We conducted a controlled lab-study (N=12) and a field study (N=9) on BLV. Results showed that full autonomy received better walking performance and subjective ratings in the controlled study, whereas participants used more partial autonomy in the natural environment as demanding more control. Besides, the car robot has demonstrated abilities to provide a higher sense of safety and navigation efficiency compared with the cane robot. Our findings offered empirical evidence about how the BLV community perceived different machine forms and autonomy, which can inform the design of assistive robots.
abstract_zh: 最近，人们开始探索以手杖或汽车形式出现的引导机器人来帮助盲人和低视力（BLV）人士。此类机器人在引导时可以提供完全或部分自主权。然而，不同形式和自主性的引导机器人的优缺点仍然未知。我们试图填补这一空白。我们设计了可自主切换的引导机器人手杖和汽车。我们对 BLV 进行了对照实验室研究 (N=12) 和现场研究 (N=9)。结果表明，在对照研究中，完全自主的人获得了更好的步行表现和主观评分，而参与者在自然环境中使用更多的部分自主，因为要求更多的控制。此外，与手杖机器人相比，汽车机器人具有提供更高安全感和导航效率的能力。我们的研究结果提供了关于 BLV 社区如何感知不同机器形式和自主性的经验证据，这可以为辅助机器人的设计提供信息。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了不同自主程度和机器形态的导盲机器人对视障人士的辅助效果。
AI.motivation: 现有导盲机器人（如拐杖或汽车形态）的自主程度和形式优劣尚不明确，需通过实证研究填补这一空白。
AI.method: 设计可切换自主程度的导盲机器人拐杖和汽车，通过实验室对照研究（N=12）和实地研究（N=9）评估其性能与用户反馈。
AI.result: 实验室中全自主模式表现更优，但实地研究中用户更倾向部分自主以获得更多控制感；汽车形态在安全性和导航效率上优于拐杖形态。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果为视障群体对不同机器形态与自主程度的偏好提供了实证依据，可指导辅助机器人设计。

authors_text: Pawit Kochakarn,Daniele De Martini,Daniel Omeiza,Lars Kunze
title: Explainable Action Prediction through Self-Supervision on Scene Graphs
title_zh: 通过场景图的自我监督进行可解释的动作预测
comment: Accepted to the 2023 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA)
comments: Accepted to the 2023 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA)
abstract: This work explores scene graphs as a distilled representation of high-level information for autonomous driving, applied to future driver-action prediction. Given the scarcity and strong imbalance of data samples, we propose a self-supervision pipeline to infer representative and well-separated embeddings. Key aspects are interpretability and explainability; as such, we embed in our architecture attention mechanisms that can create spatial and temporal heatmaps on the scene graphs. We evaluate our system on the ROAD dataset against a fully-supervised approach, showing the superiority of our training regime.
summary: This work explores scene graphs as a distilled representation of high-level information for autonomous driving, applied to future driver-action prediction. Given the scarcity and strong imbalance of data samples, we propose a self-supervision pipeline to infer representative and well-separated embeddings. Key aspects are interpretability and explainability; as such, we embed in our architecture attention mechanisms that can create spatial and temporal heatmaps on the scene graphs. We evaluate our system on the ROAD dataset against a fully-supervised approach, showing the superiority of our training regime.
abstract_zh: 这项工作探索了场景图作为自动驾驶高级信息的精炼表示，应用于未来的驾驶员行为预测。鉴于数据样本的稀缺性和严重不平衡性，我们提出了一种自我监督管道来推断具有代表性且分离良好的嵌入。关键方面是可解释性和可解释性；因此，我们在架构中嵌入了注意力机制，可以在场景图上创建空间和时间热图。我们根据完全监督的方法在 ROAD 数据集上评估我们的系统，显示了我们训练制度的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于场景图的自监督方法，用于自动驾驶中可解释的未来驾驶动作预测。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶场景中高质量标注数据稀缺且分布不均衡，传统监督方法受限；需提升预测模型的可解释性以增强安全性与可信度。
AI.method: 构建自监督学习框架生成场景图嵌入，结合注意力机制生成时空热力图实现可解释性，通过对比学习优化嵌入表示。
AI.result: 在ROAD数据集上优于全监督方法，证明自监督训练机制有效性，且能可视化解释预测决策依据。
AI.conclusion: 自监督学习可缓解数据不足问题，注意力机制赋予模型可解释性，为自动驾驶安全决策提供新思路。
