authors_text: Yao Chen,Yuanhan Mo,Aimee Readie,Gregory Ligozio,Indrajeet Mandal,Faiz Jabbar,Thibaud Coroller,Bartlomiej W. Papiez
title: VertXNet: An Ensemble Method for Vertebrae Segmentation and Identification of Spinal X-Ray
title_zh: VertXNet：脊柱 X 射线椎骨分割和识别的集成方法
abstract: Reliable vertebrae annotations are key to perform analysis of spinal X-ray images. However, obtaining annotation of vertebrae from those images is usually carried out manually due to its complexity (i.e. small structures with varying shape), making it a costly and tedious process. To accelerate this process, we proposed an ensemble pipeline, VertXNet, that combines two state-of-the-art (SOTA) segmentation models (respectively U-Net and Mask R-CNN) to automatically segment and label vertebrae in X-ray spinal images. Moreover, VertXNet introduces a rule-based approach that allows to robustly infer vertebrae labels (by locating the 'reference' vertebrae which are easier to segment than others) for a given spinal X-ray image. We evaluated the proposed pipeline on three spinal X-ray datasets (two internal and one publicly available), and compared against vertebrae annotated by radiologists. Our experimental results have shown that the proposed pipeline outperformed two SOTA segmentation models on our test dataset (MEASURE 1) with a mean Dice of 0.90, vs. a mean Dice of 0.73 for Mask R-CNN and 0.72 for U-Net. To further evaluate the generalization ability of VertXNet, the pre-trained pipeline was directly tested on two additional datasets (PREVENT and NHANES II) and consistent performance was observed with a mean Dice of 0.89 and 0.88, respectively. Overall, VertXNet demonstrated significantly improved performance for vertebra segmentation and labeling for spinal X-ray imaging, and evaluation on both in-house clinical trial data and publicly available data further proved its generalization.
summary: Reliable vertebrae annotations are key to perform analysis of spinal X-ray images. However, obtaining annotation of vertebrae from those images is usually carried out manually due to its complexity (i.e. small structures with varying shape), making it a costly and tedious process. To accelerate this process, we proposed an ensemble pipeline, VertXNet, that combines two state-of-the-art (SOTA) segmentation models (respectively U-Net and Mask R-CNN) to automatically segment and label vertebrae in X-ray spinal images. Moreover, VertXNet introduces a rule-based approach that allows to robustly infer vertebrae labels (by locating the 'reference' vertebrae which are easier to segment than others) for a given spinal X-ray image. We evaluated the proposed pipeline on three spinal X-ray datasets (two internal and one publicly available), and compared against vertebrae annotated by radiologists. Our experimental results have shown that the proposed pipeline outperformed two SOTA segmentation models on our test dataset (MEASURE 1) with a mean Dice of 0.90, vs. a mean Dice of 0.73 for Mask R-CNN and 0.72 for U-Net. To further evaluate the generalization ability of VertXNet, the pre-trained pipeline was directly tested on two additional datasets (PREVENT and NHANES II) and consistent performance was observed with a mean Dice of 0.89 and 0.88, respectively. Overall, VertXNet demonstrated significantly improved performance for vertebra segmentation and labeling for spinal X-ray imaging, and evaluation on both in-house clinical trial data and publicly available data further proved its generalization.
abstract_zh: 可靠的椎骨注释是执行脊柱 X 射线图像分析的关键。然而，由于其复杂性（即形状各异的小结构），从这些图像中获取椎骨注释通常是手动进行的，这使得它成为一个昂贵且乏味的过程。为了加速这一过程，我们提出了一个集成管道 VertXNet，它结合了两种最先进的 (SOTA) 分割模型（分别为 U-Net 和 Mask R-CNN），以自动分割和标记 X 射线脊柱图像中的椎骨。此外，VertXNet 引入了一种基于规则的方法，可以为给定的脊柱 X 射线图像稳健地推断椎骨标签（通过定位比其他椎骨更容易分割的“参考”椎骨）。我们在三个脊柱 X 射线数据集（两个内部数据集和一个公开数据集）上评估了拟议的流程，并与放射科医生注释的椎骨进行了比较。我们的实验结果表明，所提出的管道在我们的测试数据集（MEASURE 1）上优于两个 SOTA 分割模型，平均 Dice 为 0.90，而 Mask R-CNN 的平均 Dice 为 0.73，U-Net 的平均 Dice 为 0.72。为了进一步评估 VertXNet 的泛化能力，直接在两个附加数据集（PREVENT 和 NHANES II）上测试预训练管道，并观察到平均 Dice 分别为 0.89 和 0.88 的一致性能。总体而言，VertXNet 在脊柱 X 射线成像的椎骨分割和标记方面表现出显着改善的性能，并且对内部临床试验数据和公开数据的评估进一步证明了其普遍性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出VertXNet，一种结合U-Net和Mask R-CNN的集成方法，用于脊柱X光片的椎体分割与自动标注。
AI.motivation: 手动标注脊柱X光片中的椎体结构耗时且成本高，需开发自动化方法提升效率和准确性。
AI.method: 集成U-Net和Mask R-CNN进行分割，并引入基于规则的标注策略，通过定位易分割的参考椎体推断其他椎体标签。
AI.result: 在MEASURE 1数据集上Dice系数达0.90，优于Mask R-CNN（0.73）和U-Net（0.72）；在PREVENT和NHANES II数据集上分别达到0.89和0.88。
AI.conclusion: VertXNet在椎体分割与标注任务中表现优异，且在多种数据集上具有良好的泛化能力。

search_text: VertXNet: An Ensemble Method for Vertebrae Segmentation and Identification of Spinal X-Ray VertXNet：脊柱 X 射线椎骨分割和识别的集成方法 Reliable vertebrae annotations are key to perform analysis of spinal X-ray images. However, obtaining annotation of vertebrae from those images is usually carried out manually due to its complexity (i.e. small structures with varying shape), making it a costly and tedious process. To accelerate this process, we proposed an ensemble pipeline, VertXNet, that combines two state-of-the-art (SOTA) segmentation models (respectively U-Net and Mask R-CNN) to automatically segment and label vertebrae in X-ray spinal images. Moreover, VertXNet introduces a rule-based approach that allows to robustly infer vertebrae labels (by locating the 'reference' vertebrae which are easier to segment than others) for a given spinal X-ray image. We evaluated the proposed pipeline on three spinal X-ray datasets (two internal and one publicly available), and compared against vertebrae annotated by radiologists. Our experimental results have shown that the proposed pipeline outperformed two SOTA segmentation models on our test dataset (MEASURE 1) with a mean Dice of 0.90, vs. a mean Dice of 0.73 for Mask R-CNN and 0.72 for U-Net. To further evaluate the generalization ability of VertXNet, the pre-trained pipeline was directly tested on two additional datasets (PREVENT and NHANES II) and consistent performance was observed with a mean Dice of 0.89 and 0.88, respectively. Overall, VertXNet demonstrated significantly improved performance for vertebra segmentation and labeling for spinal X-ray imaging, and evaluation on both in-house clinical trial data and publicly available data further proved its generalization. 可靠的椎骨注释是执行脊柱 X 射线图像分析的关键。然而，由于其复杂性（即形状各异的小结构），从这些图像中获取椎骨注释通常是手动进行的，这使得它成为一个昂贵且乏味的过程。为了加速这一过程，我们提出了一个集成管道 VertXNet，它结合了两种最先进的 (SOTA) 分割模型（分别为 U-Net 和 Mask R-CNN），以自动分割和标记 X 射线脊柱图像中的椎骨。此外，VertXNet 引入了一种基于规则的方法，可以为给定的脊柱 X 射线图像稳健地推断椎骨标签（通过定位比其他椎骨更容易分割的“参考”椎骨）。我们在三个脊柱 X 射线数据集（两个内部数据集和一个公开数据集）上评估了拟议的流程，并与放射科医生注释的椎骨进行了比较。我们的实验结果表明，所提出的管道在我们的测试数据集（MEASURE 1）上优于两个 SOTA 分割模型，平均 Dice 为 0.90，而 Mask R-CNN 的平均 Dice 为 0.73，U-Net 的平均 Dice 为 0.72。为了进一步评估 VertXNet 的泛化能力，直接在两个附加数据集（PREVENT 和 NHANES II）上测试预训练管道，并观察到平均 Dice 分别为 0.89 和 0.88 的一致性能。总体而言，VertXNet 在脊柱 X 射线成像的椎骨分割和标记方面表现出显着改善的性能，并且对内部临床试验数据和公开数据的评估进一步证明了其普遍性。 本文提出VertXNet，一种结合U-Net和Mask R-CNN的集成方法，用于脊柱X光片的椎体分割与自动标注。 Yao Chen,Yuanhan Mo,Aimee Readie,Gregory Ligozio,Indrajeet Mandal,Faiz Jabbar,Thibaud Coroller,Bartlomiej W. authors_text: Mathias Bos,Bastiaan Vandewal,Wilm Decré,Jan Swevers
title: MPC-based Motion Planning for Autonomous Truck-Trailer Maneuvering
title_zh: 基于 MPC 的自动卡车拖车操纵运动规划
comment: This work has been submitted to IFAC for possible publication. (IFAC World Congress 2023)
comments: This work has been submitted to IFAC for possible publication. (IFAC World Congress 2023)
abstract: Time-optimal motion planning of autonomous vehicles in complex environments is a highly researched topic. This paper describes a novel approach to optimize and execute locally feasible trajectories for the maneuvering of a truck-trailer Autonomous Mobile Robot (AMR), by dividing the environment in a sequence or route of freely accessible overlapping corridors. Multi-stage optimal control generates local trajectories through advancing subsets of this route. To cope with the advancing subsets and changing environments, the optimal control problem is solved online with a receding horizon in a Model Predictive Control (MPC) fashion with an improved update strategy. This strategy seamlessly integrates the computationally expensive MPC updates with a low-cost feedback controller for trajectory tracking, for disturbance rejection, and for stabilization of the unstable kinematics of the reversing truck-trailer AMR. This methodology is implemented in a flexible software framework for an effortless transition from offline simulations to deployment of experiments. An experimental setup showcasing the truck-trailer AMR performing two reverse parking maneuvers validates the presented method.
summary: Time-optimal motion planning of autonomous vehicles in complex environments is a highly researched topic. This paper describes a novel approach to optimize and execute locally feasible trajectories for the maneuvering of a truck-trailer Autonomous Mobile Robot (AMR), by dividing the environment in a sequence or route of freely accessible overlapping corridors. Multi-stage optimal control generates local trajectories through advancing subsets of this route. To cope with the advancing subsets and changing environments, the optimal control problem is solved online with a receding horizon in a Model Predictive Control (MPC) fashion with an improved update strategy. This strategy seamlessly integrates the computationally expensive MPC updates with a low-cost feedback controller for trajectory tracking, for disturbance rejection, and for stabilization of the unstable kinematics of the reversing truck-trailer AMR. This methodology is implemented in a flexible software framework for an effortless transition from offline simulations to deployment of experiments. An experimental setup showcasing the truck-trailer AMR performing two reverse parking maneuvers validates the presented method.
abstract_zh: 复杂环境中自动驾驶车辆的时间最优运动规划是一个备受研究的课题。本文描述了一种新颖的方法，通过将环境划分为可自由访问的重叠走廊的序列或路线，来优化和执行卡车拖车自主移动机器人（AMR）操纵的本地可行轨迹。多阶段最优控制通过推进该路线的子集来生成局部轨迹。为了应对不断变化的子集和不断变化的环境，最优控制问题通过改进的更新策略以模型预测控制（MPC）方式在线解决。该策略将计算量大的 MPC 更新与低成本反馈控制器无缝集成，用于轨迹跟踪、干扰抑制以及倒车卡车拖车 AMR 不稳定运动学的稳定。该方法在灵活的软件框架中实现，可以轻松地从离线模拟过渡到实验部署。展示卡车拖车 AMR 执行两次倒车停车操作的实验装置验证了所提出的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于模型预测控制（MPC）的运动规划方法，用于自动驾驶卡车挂车在复杂环境中的轨迹优化与执行。
AI.motivation: 复杂环境中自动驾驶车辆的时间最优运动规划是研究热点，但现有方法在动态环境适应性和计算效率方面存在不足，尤其针对卡车挂车的不稳定倒车运动。
AI.method: 将环境划分为重叠走廊序列，通过多阶段最优控制生成局部轨迹；采用在线MPC与低成本反馈控制器结合策略，实现动态环境下的轨迹跟踪与系统稳定。
AI.result: 实验验证了方法在卡车挂车倒车停车场景中的有效性，展示了从仿真到实际部署的灵活性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过MPC与反馈控制的协同，有效解决了动态环境下的轨迹规划问题，为自动驾驶卡车挂车的实际应用提供了可行方案。

authors_text: John Kalkhof,Camila González,Anirban Mukhopadhyay
title: Med-NCA: Robust and Lightweight Segmentation with Neural Cellular Automata
title_zh: Med-NCA：使用神经细胞自动机进行鲁棒且轻量级的分割
abstract: Access to the proper infrastructure is critical when performing medical image segmentation with Deep Learning. This requirement makes it difficult to run state-of-the-art segmentation models in resource-constrained scenarios like primary care facilities in rural areas and during crises. The recently emerging field of Neural Cellular Automata (NCA) has shown that locally interacting one-cell models can achieve competitive results in tasks such as image generation or segmentations in low-resolution inputs. However, they are constrained by high VRAM requirements and the difficulty of reaching convergence for high-resolution images. To counteract these limitations we propose Med-NCA, an end-to-end NCA training pipeline for high-resolution image segmentation. Our method follows a two-step process. Global knowledge is first communicated between cells across the downscaled image. Following that, patch-based segmentation is performed. Our proposed Med-NCA outperforms the classic UNet by 2% and 3% Dice for hippocampus and prostate segmentation, respectively, while also being 500 times smaller. We also show that Med-NCA is by design invariant with respect to image scale, shape and translation, experiencing only slight performance degradation even with strong shifts; and is robust against MRI acquisition artefacts. Med-NCA enables high-resolution medical image segmentation even on a Raspberry Pi B+, arguably the smallest device able to run PyTorch and that can be powered by a standard power bank.
summary: Access to the proper infrastructure is critical when performing medical image segmentation with Deep Learning. This requirement makes it difficult to run state-of-the-art segmentation models in resource-constrained scenarios like primary care facilities in rural areas and during crises. The recently emerging field of Neural Cellular Automata (NCA) has shown that locally interacting one-cell models can achieve competitive results in tasks such as image generation or segmentations in low-resolution inputs. However, they are constrained by high VRAM requirements and the difficulty of reaching convergence for high-resolution images. To counteract these limitations we propose Med-NCA, an end-to-end NCA training pipeline for high-resolution image segmentation. Our method follows a two-step process. Global knowledge is first communicated between cells across the downscaled image. Following that, patch-based segmentation is performed. Our proposed Med-NCA outperforms the classic UNet by 2% and 3% Dice for hippocampus and prostate segmentation, respectively, while also being 500 times smaller. We also show that Med-NCA is by design invariant with respect to image scale, shape and translation, experiencing only slight performance degradation even with strong shifts; and is robust against MRI acquisition artefacts. Med-NCA enables high-resolution medical image segmentation even on a Raspberry Pi B+, arguably the smallest device able to run PyTorch and that can be powered by a standard power bank.
abstract_zh: 使用深度学习执行医学图像分割时，访问适当的基础设施至关重要。这一要求使得在资源有限的场景（例如农村地区的初级保健设施和危机期间）运行最先进的分割模型变得困难。最近新兴的神经细胞自动机（NCA）领域表明，局部交互的单细胞模型可以在图像生成或低分辨率输入分割等任务中取得有竞争力的结果。然而，它们受到高 VRAM 要求和难以实现高分辨率图像收敛的限制。为了克服这些限制，我们提出了 Med-NCA，这是一种用于高分辨率图像分割的端到端 NCA 训练管道。我们的方法遵循两步过程。全局知识首先通过缩小的图像在细胞之间进行交流。接下来，执行基于补丁的分割。我们提出的 Med-NCA 在海马体和前列腺分割方面比经典 UNet 的性能分别高出 2% 和 3%，同时尺寸也小了 500 倍。我们还表明，Med-NCA 在设计上在图像比例、形状和平移方面是不变的，即使在强烈的变化下，也只会经历轻微的性能下降；并且对 MRI 采集伪影具有鲁棒性。 Med-NCA 甚至可以在 Raspberry Pi B+ 上实现高分辨率医学图像分割，Raspberry Pi B+ 可以说是能够运行 PyTorch 的最小设备，并且可以由标准移动电源供电。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Med-NCA，一种基于神经细胞自动机（NCA）的轻量级高分辨率医学图像分割方法。
AI.motivation: 传统深度学习分割模型需要强大算力，难以在资源受限场景（如农村基层医疗）应用；现有NCA方法存在显存需求高、高分辨率收敛困难等问题。
AI.method: 采用两阶段流程：先通过降采样图像进行全局知识传播，再执行基于块的分割；设计尺度/形状/平移不变性架构，增强对MRI伪影的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在海马体和前列腺分割任务中Dice系数分别优于UNet 2%和3%，模型体积缩小500倍，可在树莓派B+上运行。
AI.conclusion: Med-NCA实现了在低功耗设备上的高分辨率医学图像分割，为资源受限场景提供可行解决方案。

search_text: Med-NCA: Robust and Lightweight Segmentation with Neural Cellular Automata Med-NCA：使用神经细胞自动机进行鲁棒且轻量级的分割 Access to the proper infrastructure is critical when performing medical image segmentation with Deep Learning. This requirement makes it difficult to run state-of-the-art segmentation models in resource-constrained scenarios like primary care facilities in rural areas and during crises. The recently emerging field of Neural Cellular Automata (NCA) has shown that locally interacting one-cell models can achieve competitive results in tasks such as image generation or segmentations in low-resolution inputs. However, they are constrained by high VRAM requirements and the difficulty of reaching convergence for high-resolution images. To counteract these limitations we propose Med-NCA, an end-to-end NCA training pipeline for high-resolution image segmentation. Our method follows a two-step process. Global knowledge is first communicated between cells across the downscaled image. Following that, patch-based segmentation is performed. Our proposed Med-NCA outperforms the classic UNet by 2% and 3% Dice for hippocampus and prostate segmentation, respectively, while also being 500 times smaller. We also show that Med-NCA is by design invariant with respect to image scale, shape and translation, experiencing only slight performance degradation even with strong shifts; and is robust against MRI acquisition artefacts. Med-NCA enables high-resolution medical image segmentation even on a Raspberry Pi B+, arguably the smallest device able to run PyTorch and that can be powered by a standard power bank. 使用深度学习执行医学图像分割时，访问适当的基础设施至关重要。这一要求使得在资源有限的场景（例如农村地区的初级保健设施和危机期间）运行最先进的分割模型变得困难。最近新兴的神经细胞自动机（NCA）领域表明，局部交互的单细胞模型可以在图像生成或低分辨率输入分割等任务中取得有竞争力的结果。然而，它们受到高 VRAM 要求和难以实现高分辨率图像收敛的限制。为了克服这些限制，我们提出了 Med-NCA，这是一种用于高分辨率图像分割的端到端 NCA 训练管道。我们的方法遵循两步过程。全局知识首先通过缩小的图像在细胞之间进行交流。接下来，执行基于补丁的分割。我们提出的 Med-NCA 在海马体和前列腺分割方面比经典 UNet 的性能分别高出 2% 和 3%，同时尺寸也小了 500 倍。我们还表明，Med-NCA 在设计上在图像比例、形状和平移方面是不变的，即使在强烈的变化下，也只会经历轻微的性能下降；并且对 MRI 采集伪影具有鲁棒性。 Med-NCA 甚至可以在 Raspberry Pi B+ 上实现高分辨率医学图像分割，Raspberry Pi B+ 可以说是能够运行 PyTorch 的最小设备，并且可以由标准移动电源供电。 本文提出Med-NCA，一种基于神经细胞自动机（NCA）的轻量级高分辨率医学图像分割方法。 John Kalkhof,Camila González,Anirban Mukhopadhyay eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Wentao Shi,Jiawei Chen,Fuli Feng,Jizhi Zhang,Junkang Wu,Chongming Gao,Xiangnan He
title: On the Theories Behind Hard Negative Sampling for Recommendation
title_zh: 关于推荐的硬负采样背后的理论
comment: Accepted by WWW'2023; Code is available at https://github.com/swt-user/WWW_2023_code
comments: Accepted by WWW'2023; Code is available at https://github.com/swt-user/WWW_2023_code
abstract: Negative sampling has been heavily used to train recommender models on large-scale data, wherein sampling hard examples usually not only accelerates the convergence but also improves the model accuracy. Nevertheless, the reasons for the effectiveness of Hard Negative Sampling (HNS) have not been revealed yet. In this work, we fill the research gap by conducting thorough theoretical analyses on HNS. Firstly, we prove that employing HNS on the Bayesian Personalized Ranking (BPR) learner is equivalent to optimizing One-way Partial AUC (OPAUC). Concretely, the BPR equipped with Dynamic Negative Sampling (DNS) is an exact estimator, while with softmax-based sampling is a soft estimator. Secondly, we prove that OPAUC has a stronger connection with Top-K evaluation metrics than AUC and verify it with simulation experiments. These analyses establish the theoretical foundation of HNS in optimizing Top-K recommendation performance for the first time. On these bases, we offer two insightful guidelines for effective usage of HNS: 1) the sampling hardness should be controllable, e.g., via pre-defined hyper-parameters, to adapt to different Top-K metrics and datasets; 2) the smaller the $K$ we emphasize in Top-K evaluation metrics, the harder the negative samples we should draw. Extensive experiments on three real-world benchmarks verify the two guidelines.
summary: Negative sampling has been heavily used to train recommender models on large-scale data, wherein sampling hard examples usually not only accelerates the convergence but also improves the model accuracy. Nevertheless, the reasons for the effectiveness of Hard Negative Sampling (HNS) have not been revealed yet. In this work, we fill the research gap by conducting thorough theoretical analyses on HNS. Firstly, we prove that employing HNS on the Bayesian Personalized Ranking (BPR) learner is equivalent to optimizing One-way Partial AUC (OPAUC). Concretely, the BPR equipped with Dynamic Negative Sampling (DNS) is an exact estimator, while with softmax-based sampling is a soft estimator. Secondly, we prove that OPAUC has a stronger connection with Top-K evaluation metrics than AUC and verify it with simulation experiments. These analyses establish the theoretical foundation of HNS in optimizing Top-K recommendation performance for the first time. On these bases, we offer two insightful guidelines for effective usage of HNS: 1) the sampling hardness should be controllable, e.g., via pre-defined hyper-parameters, to adapt to different Top-K metrics and datasets; 2) the smaller the $K$ we emphasize in Top-K evaluation metrics, the harder the negative samples we should draw. Extensive experiments on three real-world benchmarks verify the two guidelines.
abstract_zh: 负采样已被大量用于在大规模数据上训练推荐模型，其中对困难示例进行采样通常不仅可以加速收敛，还可以提高模型的准确性。然而，硬负采样（HNS）有效的原因尚未揭晓。在这项工作中，我们通过对 HNS 进行深入的理论分析来填补研究空白​​。首先，我们证明在贝叶斯个性化排名（BPR）学习器上使用 HNS 相当于优化单向部分 AUC（OPAUC）。具体来说，配备动态负采样（DNS）的 BPR 是一个精确估计器，而配备基于 softmax 的采样的 BPR 是一个软估计器。其次，我们证明OPAUC与Top-K评估指标的联系比AUC更强，并通过仿真实验进行验证。这些分析首次为HNS优化Top-K推荐性能奠定了理论基础。在此基础上，我们为有效使用 HNS 提供了两个富有洞察力的指南：1）采样硬度应该是可控的，例如通过预定义的超参数，以适应不同的 Top-K 指标和数据集； 2）我们在Top-K评估指标中强调的$K$越小，我们应该越难抽取负样本。对三个现实世界基准的大量实验验证了这两个准则。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过理论分析揭示硬负采样（HNS）在推荐系统中的有效性，并建立其优化Top-K推荐性能的理论基础。
AI.motivation: 尽管HNS被广泛用于加速模型收敛和提高准确性，但其背后的原因尚未明确，需理论支持以指导实际应用。
AI.method: 通过理论证明HNS在BPR中的等价性，分析OPAUC与Top-K指标的联系，并进行模拟实验验证。
AI.result: 提出可控采样难度和根据Top-K指标调整负样本难度的指导原则，并在三个真实数据集上验证了有效性。
AI.conclusion: 首次建立了HNS优化Top-K推荐的理论基础，并提供了有效使用HNS的实践指南。

search_text: On the Theories Behind Hard Negative Sampling for Recommendation 关于推荐的硬负采样背后的理论 Negative sampling has been heavily used to train recommender models on large-scale data, wherein sampling hard examples usually not only accelerates the convergence but also improves the model accuracy. Nevertheless, the reasons for the effectiveness of Hard Negative Sampling (HNS) have not been revealed yet. In this work, we fill the research gap by conducting thorough theoretical analyses on HNS. Firstly, we prove that employing HNS on the Bayesian Personalized Ranking (BPR) learner is equivalent to optimizing One-way Partial AUC (OPAUC). Concretely, the BPR equipped with Dynamic Negative Sampling (DNS) is an exact estimator, while with softmax-based sampling is a soft estimator. Secondly, we prove that OPAUC has a stronger connection with Top-K evaluation metrics than AUC and verify it with simulation experiments. These analyses establish the theoretical foundation of HNS in optimizing Top-K recommendation performance for the first time. On these bases, we offer two insightful guidelines for effective usage of HNS: 1) the sampling hardness should be controllable, e.g., via pre-defined hyper-parameters, to adapt to different Top-K metrics and datasets; 2) the smaller the $K$ we emphasize in Top-K evaluation metrics, the harder the negative samples we should draw. Extensive experiments on three real-world benchmarks verify the two guidelines. 负采样已被大量用于在大规模数据上训练推荐模型，其中对困难示例进行采样通常不仅可以加速收敛，还可以提高模型的准确性。然而，硬负采样（HNS）有效的原因尚未揭晓。在这项工作中，我们通过对 HNS 进行深入的理论分析来填补研究空白​​。首先，我们证明在贝叶斯个性化排名（BPR）学习器上使用 HNS 相当于优化单向部分 AUC（OPAUC）。具体来说，配备动态负采样（DNS）的 BPR 是一个精确估计器，而配备基于 softmax 的采样的 BPR 是一个软估计器。其次，我们证明OPAUC与Top-K评估指标的联系比AUC更强，并通过仿真实验进行验证。这些分析首次为HNS优化Top-K推荐性能奠定了理论基础。在此基础上，我们为有效使用 HNS 提供了两个富有洞察力的指南：1）采样硬度应该是可控的，例如通过预定义的超参数，以适应不同的 Top-K 指标和数据集； 2）我们在Top-K评估指标中强调的$K$越小，我们应该越难抽取负样本。对三个现实世界基准的大量实验验证了这两个准则。 本文旨在通过理论分析揭示硬负采样（HNS）在推荐系统中的有效性，并建立其优化Top-K推荐性能的理论基础。 Wentao Shi,Jiawei Chen,Fuli Feng,Jizhi Zhang,Junkang Wu,Chongming Gao,Xiangnan He cs.IR,cs.AI

authors_text: Bernard Keenan,Kacper Sokol
title: Mind the Gap! Bridging Explainable Artificial Intelligence and Human Understanding with Luhmann's Functional Theory of Communication
title_zh: 注意间隙！用卢曼的沟通功能理论架起可解释的人工智能和人类理解的桥梁
abstract: Over the past decade explainable artificial intelligence has evolved from a predominantly technical discipline into a field that is deeply intertwined with social sciences. Insights such as human preference for contrastive -- more precisely, counterfactual -- explanations have played a major role in this transition, inspiring and guiding the research in computer science. Other observations, while equally important, have nevertheless received much less consideration. The desire of human explainees to communicate with artificial intelligence explainers through a dialogue-like interaction has been mostly neglected by the community. This poses many challenges for the effectiveness and widespread adoption of such technologies as delivering a single explanation optimised according to some predefined objectives may fail to engender understanding in its recipients and satisfy their unique needs given the diversity of human knowledge and intention. Using insights elaborated by Niklas Luhmann and, more recently, Elena Esposito we apply social systems theory to highlight challenges in explainable artificial intelligence and offer a path forward, striving to reinvigorate the technical research in the direction of interactive and iterative explainers. Specifically, this paper demonstrates the potential of systems theoretical approaches to communication in elucidating and addressing the problems and limitations of human-centred explainable artificial intelligence.
summary: Over the past decade explainable artificial intelligence has evolved from a predominantly technical discipline into a field that is deeply intertwined with social sciences. Insights such as human preference for contrastive -- more precisely, counterfactual -- explanations have played a major role in this transition, inspiring and guiding the research in computer science. Other observations, while equally important, have nevertheless received much less consideration. The desire of human explainees to communicate with artificial intelligence explainers through a dialogue-like interaction has been mostly neglected by the community. This poses many challenges for the effectiveness and widespread adoption of such technologies as delivering a single explanation optimised according to some predefined objectives may fail to engender understanding in its recipients and satisfy their unique needs given the diversity of human knowledge and intention. Using insights elaborated by Niklas Luhmann and, more recently, Elena Esposito we apply social systems theory to highlight challenges in explainable artificial intelligence and offer a path forward, striving to reinvigorate the technical research in the direction of interactive and iterative explainers. Specifically, this paper demonstrates the potential of systems theoretical approaches to communication in elucidating and addressing the problems and limitations of human-centred explainable artificial intelligence.
abstract_zh: 在过去的十年中，可解释的人工智能已经从一个主要的技术学科发展成为一个与社会科学紧密交织的领域。人类对对比（更准确地说，反事实）解释的偏好等见解在这一转变中发挥了重要作用，启发和指导了计算机科学研究。其他观察结果虽然同样重要，但受到的考虑要少得多。人类解释者通过类似对话的互动方式与人工智能解释者进行交流的愿望大多被社区忽视了。这对此类技术的有效性和广泛采用提出了许多挑战，因为鉴于人类知识和意图的多样性，根据某些预定义目标提供优化的单一解释可能无法引起接收者的理解并满足他们的独特需求。利用 Niklas Luhmann 和最近 Elena Esposito 阐述的见解，我们应用社会系统理论来强调可解释人工智能的挑战，并提供前进的道路，努力重振交互式和迭代解释器方向的技术研究。具体来说，本文展示了系统理论通信方法在阐明和解决以人为中心的可解释人工智能的问题和局限性方面的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文结合卢曼的沟通功能理论，探讨如何通过对话式交互弥合可解释人工智能（XAI）与人类理解之间的鸿沟。
AI.motivation: 现有XAI方法过度依赖单向解释，忽视了用户与AI之间动态对话的需求，导致解释效果受限于人类知识多样性和意图差异。
AI.method: 应用社会系统理论，分析XAI在沟通层面的挑战，并提出基于互动与迭代的解释框架。
AI.result: 系统理论为XAI提供了新的分析视角，揭示了对话式交互在提升解释有效性中的关键作用。
AI.conclusion: 未来XAI研究需转向支持动态对话的交互式解释器，以更好地满足人类用户的多样化需求。

tldr: 本文结合卢曼的沟通功能理论，探讨如何通过对话式交互弥合可解释人工智能（XAI）与人类理解之间的鸿沟。
motivation: 现有XAI方法过度依赖单向解释，忽视了用户与AI之间动态对话的需求，导致解释效果受限于人类知识多样性和意图差异。
method: 应用社会系统理论，分析XAI在沟通层面的挑战，并提出基于互动与迭代的解释框架。
result: 系统理论为XAI提供了新的分析视角，揭示了对话式交互在提升解释有效性中的关键作用。
conclusion: 未来XAI研究需转向支持动态对话的交互式解释器，以更好地满足人类用户的多样化需求。
search_text: Mind the Gap! Bridging Explainable Artificial Intelligence and Human Understanding with Luhmann's Functional Theory of Communication 注意间隙！用卢曼的沟通功能理论架起可解释的人工智能和人类理解的桥梁 Over the past decade explainable artificial intelligence has evolved from a predominantly technical discipline into a field that is deeply intertwined with social sciences. Insights such as human preference for contrastive -- more precisely, counterfactual -- explanations have played a major role in this transition, inspiring and guiding the research in computer science. Other observations, while equally important, have nevertheless received much less consideration. The desire of human explainees to communicate with artificial intelligence explainers through a dialogue-like interaction has been mostly neglected by the community. This poses many challenges for the effectiveness and widespread adoption of such technologies as delivering a single explanation optimised according to some predefined objectives may fail to engender understanding in its recipients and satisfy their unique needs given the diversity of human knowledge and intention. Using insights elaborated by Niklas Luhmann and, more recently, Elena Esposito we apply social systems theory to highlight challenges in explainable artificial intelligence and offer a path forward, striving to reinvigorate the technical research in the direction of interactive and iterative explainers. Specifically, this paper demonstrates the potential of systems theoretical approaches to communication in elucidating and addressing the problems and limitations of human-centred explainable artificial intelligence. 在过去的十年中，可解释的人工智能已经从一个主要的技术学科发展成为一个与社会科学紧密交织的领域。人类对对比（更准确地说，反事实）解释的偏好等见解在这一转变中发挥了重要作用，启发和指导了计算机科学研究。其他观察结果虽然同样重要，但受到的考虑要少得多。人类解释者通过类似对话的互动方式与人工智能解释者进行交流的愿望大多被社区忽视了。这对此类技术的有效性和广泛采用提出了许多挑战，因为鉴于人类知识和意图的多样性，根据某些预定义目标提供优化的单一解释可能无法引起接收者的理解并满足他们的独特需求。利用 Niklas Luhmann 和最近 Elena Esposito 阐述的见解，我们应用社会系统理论来强调可解释人工智能的挑战，并提供前进的道路，努力重振交互式和迭代解释器方向的技术研究。具体来说，本文展示了系统理论通信方法在阐明和解决以人为中心的可解释人工智能的问题和局限性方面的潜力。 本文结合卢曼的沟通功能理论，探讨如何通过对话式交互弥合可解释人工智能（XAI）与人类理解之间的鸿沟。 Bernard Keenan,Kacper Sokol cs.CY,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Lorenzo Ciardo,Marcin Kozik,Andrei Krokhin,Tamio-Vesa Nakajima,Stanislav Živný
title: 1-in-3 vs. Not-All-Equal: Dichotomy of a broken promise
title_zh: 三合一 vs. 不完全平等：违背承诺的二分法
comment: Full version of a LICS 2024 paper
comments: Full version of a LICS 2024 paper
abstract: The 1-in-3 and Not-All-Equal satisfiability problems for Boolean CNF formulas are two well-known NP-hard problems. In contrast, the promise 1-in-3 vs. Not-All-Equal problem can be solved in polynomial time. In the present work, we investigate this constraint satisfaction problem in a regime where the promise is weakened from either side by a rainbow-free structure, and establish a complexity dichotomy for the resulting class of computational problems.
summary: The 1-in-3 and Not-All-Equal satisfiability problems for Boolean CNF formulas are two well-known NP-hard problems. In contrast, the promise 1-in-3 vs. Not-All-Equal problem can be solved in polynomial time. In the present work, we investigate this constraint satisfaction problem in a regime where the promise is weakened from either side by a rainbow-free structure, and establish a complexity dichotomy for the resulting class of computational problems.
abstract_zh: 布尔 CNF 公式的 1-in-3 和 Not-All-Equal 可满足性问题是两个著名的 NP 难问题。相比之下，承诺的 1-3 与 Not-All-Equal 问题可以在多项式时间内解决。在目前的工作中，我们研究了这种约束满足问题，其中承诺被无彩虹结构从任一侧削弱，并为由此产生的一类计算问题建立了复杂性二分法。

AI.tldr: 研究在弱化承诺条件下，基于彩虹自由结构的约束满足问题的复杂性分类。
AI.motivation: 1-in-3与Not-All-Equal问题均为NP难，但带承诺版本可多项式求解。探究当承诺被彩虹自由结构削弱时，问题复杂性是否仍存在二分法。
AI.method: 通过分析彩虹自由结构对承诺的削弱效应，建立约束满足问题的复杂性分类框架。
AI.result: 证明该类问题存在复杂性二分法：所有实例要么属于P类，要么是NP难的。
AI.conclusion: 引入彩虹自由结构后，1-in-3与Not-All-Equal问题的复杂性边界得到明确划分，完善了约束满足问题的理论体系。

authors_text: Fanghua Yu,Xintao Wang,Mingdeng Cao,Gen Li,Ying Shan,Chao Dong
title: OSRT: Omnidirectional Image Super-Resolution with Distortion-aware Transformer
title_zh: OSRT：具有失真感知变压器的全向图像超分辨率
abstract: Omnidirectional images (ODIs) have obtained lots of research interest for immersive experiences. Although ODIs require extremely high resolution to capture details of the entire scene, the resolutions of most ODIs are insufficient. Previous methods attempt to solve this issue by image super-resolution (SR) on equirectangular projection (ERP) images. However, they omit geometric properties of ERP in the degradation process, and their models can hardly generalize to real ERP images. In this paper, we propose Fisheye downsampling, which mimics the real-world imaging process and synthesizes more realistic low-resolution samples. Then we design a distortion-aware Transformer (OSRT) to modulate ERP distortions continuously and self-adaptively. Without a cumbersome process, OSRT outperforms previous methods by about 0.2dB on PSNR. Moreover, we propose a convenient data augmentation strategy, which synthesizes pseudo ERP images from plain images. This simple strategy can alleviate the over-fitting problem of large networks and significantly boost the performance of ODISR. Extensive experiments have demonstrated the state-of-the-art performance of our OSRT. Codes and models will be available at https://github.com/Fanghua-Yu/OSRT.
summary: Omnidirectional images (ODIs) have obtained lots of research interest for immersive experiences. Although ODIs require extremely high resolution to capture details of the entire scene, the resolutions of most ODIs are insufficient. Previous methods attempt to solve this issue by image super-resolution (SR) on equirectangular projection (ERP) images. However, they omit geometric properties of ERP in the degradation process, and their models can hardly generalize to real ERP images. In this paper, we propose Fisheye downsampling, which mimics the real-world imaging process and synthesizes more realistic low-resolution samples. Then we design a distortion-aware Transformer (OSRT) to modulate ERP distortions continuously and self-adaptively. Without a cumbersome process, OSRT outperforms previous methods by about 0.2dB on PSNR. Moreover, we propose a convenient data augmentation strategy, which synthesizes pseudo ERP images from plain images. This simple strategy can alleviate the over-fitting problem of large networks and significantly boost the performance of ODISR. Extensive experiments have demonstrated the state-of-the-art performance of our OSRT. Codes and models will be available at https://github.com/Fanghua-Yu/OSRT.
abstract_zh: 全向图像（ODI）引起了人们对沉浸式体验的广泛研究兴趣。尽管 ODI 需要极高的分辨率来捕捉整个场景的细节，但大多数 ODI 的分辨率都不够。先前的方法试图通过等距柱状投影（ERP）图像上的图像超分辨率（SR）来解决这个问题。然而，他们在退化过程中忽略了 ERP 的几何特性，并且他们的模型很难推广到真实的 ERP 图像。在本文中，我们提出了鱼眼下采样，它模仿现实世界的成像过程并合成更真实的低分辨率样本。然后我们设计了一个失真感知变压器（OSRT）来连续自适应地调节 ERP 失真。由于没有繁琐的过程，OSRT 在 PSNR 上比之前的方法高出约 0.2dB。此外，我们提出了一种方便的数据增强策略，从普通图像合成伪 ERP 图像。这种简单的策略可以缓解大型网络的过拟合问题，并显着提高 ODISR 的性能。大量的实验证明了我们的 OSRT 的最先进的性能。代码和模型可在 https://github.com/Fanghua-Yu/OSRT 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出OSRT方法，通过结合鱼眼下采样和失真感知Transformer，解决全景图像超分辨率中的几何失真问题。
AI.motivation: 现有全景图像超分辨率方法忽略等距投影（ERP）的几何特性，导致模型难以泛化到真实场景，且低分辨率样本不够真实。
AI.method: 设计鱼眼下采样模拟真实成像过程生成低分辨率样本，构建失真感知Transformer（OSRT）自适应调节ERP失真，并提出伪ERP图像数据增强策略。
AI.result: OSRT在PSNR指标上优于现有方法约0.2dB，且在多个实验中达到SOTA性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过建模ERP几何特性与自适应失真补偿，OSRT有效提升了全景图像超分辨率质量。

authors_text: Eran Rosenbluth
title: The Solidarity Cover Problem
title_zh: 团结保险问题
abstract: Various real-world problems consist of partitioning a set of locations into disjoint subsets, each subset spread in a way that it covers the whole set with a certain radius. Given a finite set S, a metric d, and a radius r, define a subset (of S) S' to be an r-cover if and only if forall s in S there exists s' in S' such that d(s,s') is less or equal to r. We examine the problem of determining whether there exist m disjoint r-covers, naming it the Solidarity Cover Problem (SCP). We consider as well the related optimization problems of maximizing the number of r-covers, referred to as the partition size, and minimizing the radius. We analyze the relation between the SCP and a graph problem known as the Domatic Number Problem (DNP), both hard problems in the general case. We show that the SCP is hard already in the Euclidean 2D setting, implying hardness of the DNP already in the unit-disc-graph setting. As far as we know, the latter is a result yet to be shown. We use the tight approximation bound of (1-o(1))/ln(n) for the DNP's general case, shown by U.Feige, M.Halld'orsson, G.Kortsarz, and A.Srinivasan (SIAM Journal on computing, 2002), to deduce the same bound for partition-size approximation of the SCP in the Euclidean space setting. We show an upper bound of 3 and lower bounds of 2 and sqrt(2) for approximating the minimal radius in different settings of the SCP. Lastly, in the Euclidean 2D setting we provide a general bicriteria-approximation scheme which allows a range of possibilities for trading the optimality of the radius in return for better approximation of the partition size and vice versa. We demonstrate a usage of the scheme which achieves an approximation of (1/16,2) for the partition size and radius respectively.

Lastly, in the Euclidean 2D setting we provide a general bicriteria-approximation scheme which allows a range of possibilities for trading the optimality of the radius in return for better approximation of the partition size and vice versa. We demonstrate a usage of the scheme which achieves an approximation of (1/16,2) for the partition size and radius respectively.
abstract_zh: 各种现实世界的问题包括将一组位置划分为不相交的子集，每个子​​集以一定的半径覆盖整个集合的方式展开。给定有限集 S、度量 d 和半径 r，定义（S 的）子集 S' 为 r-cover，当且仅当对于 S 中的所有 s，S' 中存在 s'，使得 d(s,s') 小于或等于 r。我们研究确定是否存在 m 个不相交的 r 覆盖的问题，将其命名为团结覆盖问题（SCP）。我们还考虑了最大化 r-covers 数量（称为分区大小）和最小化半径的相关优化问题。我们分析了 SCP 和称为域数问题 (DNP) 的图问题之间的关系，这两个问题都是一般情况下的难题。我们证明 SCP 在欧几里得二维设置中已经很困难，这意味着 DNP 在单位圆盘图设置中已经很困难。据我们所知，后者是一个尚未显示的结果。我们使用 U.Feige、M.Halld'orsson、G.Kortsarz 和 A.Srinivasan（SIAM 计算杂志，2002）所示的 DNP 一般情况的紧逼近界 (1-o(1))/ln(n) 来推导欧几里得空间设置中 SCP 分区大小近似的相同界。我们展示了 3 的上限和 2 的下限以及 sqrt(2)，用于近似 SCP 不同设置中的最小半径。最后，在欧几里得二维设置中，我们提供了一个通用的双标准近似方案，该方案允许一系列可能性来交换半径的最优性，以换取更好的分区大小近似值，反之亦然。我们演示了该方案的用法，该方案的分区大小和半径分别达到 (1/16,2) 的近似值。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何将一组位置划分为多个不相交的r-覆盖子集，使得每个子集都能覆盖整个集合，并探讨相关优化问题。
AI.motivation: 现实世界中存在需要将地点划分为覆盖区域的问题，例如设施选址或网络设计。作者旨在分析该问题的计算复杂性，并与图论中的支配数问题建立联系，以揭示其理论边界。
AI.method: 通过将SCP与支配数问题（DNP）关联，证明其在欧几里得空间中的计算难度；利用已有近似算法结果，设计针对SCP的近似方案，并提出多目标优化的双标准近似框架。
AI.result: 证明SCP在二维欧几里得空间中是NP难的，推导出分区规模近似比界（(1-o(1))/ln(n)），给出半径近似的上下界（2至3），并提出可调节的双标准近似方案（如分区规模1/16、半径2的近似）。
AI.conclusion: SCP在理论和应用层面均具有挑战性，其与DNP的关联揭示了新研究方向，提出的近似方法为实际场景提供了可行的解决方案。

search_text: The Solidarity Cover Problem 团结保险问题 Various real-world problems consist of partitioning a set of locations into disjoint subsets, each subset spread in a way that it covers the whole set with a certain radius. Given a finite set S, a metric d, and a radius r, define a subset (of S) S' to be an r-cover if and only if forall s in S there exists s' in S' such that d(s,s') is less or equal to r. We examine the problem of determining whether there exist m disjoint r-covers, naming it the Solidarity Cover Problem (SCP). We consider as well the related optimization problems of maximizing the number of r-covers, referred to as the partition size, and minimizing the radius. We analyze the relation between the SCP and a graph problem known as the Domatic Number Problem (DNP), both hard problems in the general case. We show that the SCP is hard already in the Euclidean 2D setting, implying hardness of the DNP already in the unit-disc-graph setting. As far as we know, the latter is a result yet to be shown. We use the tight approximation bound of (1-o(1))/ln(n) for the DNP's general case, shown by U.Feige, M.Halld'orsson, G.Kortsarz, and A.Srinivasan (SIAM Journal on computing, 2002), to deduce the same bound for partition-size approximation of the SCP in the Euclidean space setting. We show an upper bound of 3 and lower bounds of 2 and sqrt(2) for approximating the minimal radius in different settings of the SCP. Lastly, in the Euclidean 2D setting we provide a general bicriteria-approximation scheme which allows a range of possibilities for trading the optimality of the radius in return for better approximation of the partition size and vice versa. We demonstrate a usage of the scheme which achieves an approximation of (1/16,2) for the partition size and radius respectively. 各种现实世界的问题包括将一组位置划分为不相交的子集，每个子​​集以一定的半径覆盖整个集合的方式展开。给定有限集 S、度量 d 和半径 r，定义（S 的）子集 S' 为 r-cover，当且仅当对于 S 中的所有 s，S' 中存在 s'，使得 d(s,s') 小于或等于 r。我们研究确定是否存在 m 个不相交的 r 覆盖的问题，将其命名为团结覆盖问题（SCP）。我们还考虑了最大化 r-covers 数量（称为分区大小）和最小化半径的相关优化问题。我们分析了 SCP 和称为域数问题 (DNP) 的图问题之间的关系，这两个问题都是一般情况下的难题。我们证明 SCP 在欧几里得二维设置中已经很困难，这意味着 DNP 在单位圆盘图设置中已经很困难。据我们所知，后者是一个尚未显示的结果。我们使用 U.Feige、M.Halld'orsson、G.Kortsarz 和 A.Srinivasan（SIAM 计算杂志，2002）所示的 DNP 一般情况的紧逼近界 (1-o(1))/ln(n) 来推导欧几里得空间设置中 SCP 分区大小近似的相同界。我们展示了 3 的上限和 2 的下限以及 sqrt(2)，用于近似 SCP 不同设置中的最小半径。最后，在欧几里得二维设置中，我们提供了一个通用的双标准近似方案，该方案允许一系列可能性来交换半径的最优性，以换取更好的分区大小近似值，反之亦然。我们演示了该方案的用法，该方案的分区大小和半径分别达到 (1/16,2) 的近似值。 本文研究如何将一组位置划分为多个不相交的r-覆盖子集，使得每个子集都能覆盖整个集合，并探讨相关优化问题。 Eran Rosenbluth cs.DS,cs.CC,cs.CG,math.CO,math.OC

authors_text: Helin Dutagaci
title: Using t-distributed stochastic neighbor embedding for visualization and segmentation of 3D point clouds of plants
title_zh: 使用 t 分布随机邻域嵌入对植物 3D 点云进行可视化和分割
abstract: In this work, the use of t-SNE is proposed to embed 3D point clouds of plants into 2D space for plant characterization. It is demonstrated that t-SNE operates as a practical tool to flatten and visualize a complete 3D plant model in 2D space. The perplexity parameter of t-SNE allows 2D rendering of plant structures at various organizational levels. Aside from the promise of serving as a visualization tool for plant scientists, t-SNE also provides a gateway for processing 3D point clouds of plants using their embedded counterparts in 2D. In this paper, simple methods were proposed to perform semantic segmentation and instance segmentation via grouping the embedded 2D points. The evaluation of these methods on a public 3D plant data set conveys the potential of t-SNE for enabling of 2D implementation of various steps involved in automatic 3D phenotyping pipelines.
summary: In this work, the use of t-SNE is proposed to embed 3D point clouds of plants into 2D space for plant characterization. It is demonstrated that t-SNE operates as a practical tool to flatten and visualize a complete 3D plant model in 2D space. The perplexity parameter of t-SNE allows 2D rendering of plant structures at various organizational levels. Aside from the promise of serving as a visualization tool for plant scientists, t-SNE also provides a gateway for processing 3D point clouds of plants using their embedded counterparts in 2D. In this paper, simple methods were proposed to perform semantic segmentation and instance segmentation via grouping the embedded 2D points. The evaluation of these methods on a public 3D plant data set conveys the potential of t-SNE for enabling of 2D implementation of various steps involved in automatic 3D phenotyping pipelines.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，建议使用 t-SNE 将植物的 3D 点云嵌入到 2D 空间中以进行植物表征。事实证明，t-SNE 作为一种实用工具可以在 2D 空间中展平和可视化完整的 3D 植物模型。 t-SNE 的困惑度参数允许在不同组织级别对工厂结构进行 2D 渲染。除了作为植物科学家的可视化工具的承诺之外，t-SNE 还提供了一个使用嵌入式 2D 对应点来处理植物 3D 点云的网关。本文提出了通过对嵌入的 2D 点进行分组来执行语义分割和实例分割的简单方法。在公共 3D 植物数据集上对这些方法的评估表明了 t-SNE 在实现自动 3D 表型分析流程中涉及的各个步骤的 2D 实施方面的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用t-SNE将植物三维点云嵌入二维空间，用于可视化和分割，以支持植物表型分析。
AI.motivation: 传统三维点云处理复杂，需有效工具实现可视化和分割，以促进植物表型分析自动化。
AI.method: 采用t-SNE算法将三维点云嵌入二维空间，利用其困惑度参数调整结构层次，并提出基于二维嵌入的简单分割方法。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该方法在公开数据集上有效，展示了t-SNE在自动三维表型分析流程中的应用潜力。
AI.conclusion: t-SNE能有效实现植物三维点云的二维可视化和分割，为自动三维表型分析提供新方法。

authors_text: Robert Loftin,Mustafa Mert Çelikok,Herke van Hoof,Samuel Kaski,Frans A. Oliehoek
title: Uncoupled Learning of Differential Stackelberg Equilibria with Commitments
title_zh: 具有承诺的微分 Stackelberg 均衡的解耦学习
comment: International Conference on Autonomous Agents and Multi-Agent Systems (AAMAS) 2024
comments: International Conference on Autonomous Agents and Multi-Agent Systems (AAMAS) 2024
abstract: In multi-agent problems requiring a high degree of cooperation, success often depends on the ability of the agents to adapt to each other's behavior. A natural solution concept in such settings is the Stackelberg equilibrium, in which the ``leader'' agent selects the strategy that maximizes its own payoff given that the ``follower'' agent will choose their best response to this strategy. Recent work has extended this solution concept to two-player differentiable games, such as those arising from multi-agent deep reinforcement learning, in the form of the \textit{differential} Stackelberg equilibrium. While this previous work has presented learning dynamics which converge to such equilibria, these dynamics are ``coupled'' in the sense that the learning updates for the leader's strategy require some information about the follower's payoff function. As such, these methods cannot be applied to truly decentralised multi-agent settings, particularly ad hoc cooperation, where each agent only has access to its own payoff function. In this work we present ``uncoupled'' learning dynamics based on zeroth-order gradient estimators, in which each agent's strategy update depends only on their observations of the other's behavior. We analyze the convergence of these dynamics in general-sum games, and prove that they converge to differential Stackelberg equilibria under the same conditions as previous coupled methods. Furthermore, we present an online mechanism by which symmetric learners can negotiate leader-follower roles. We conclude with a discussion of the implications of our work for multi-agent reinforcement learning and ad hoc collaboration more generally.
summary: In multi-agent problems requiring a high degree of cooperation, success often depends on the ability of the agents to adapt to each other's behavior. A natural solution concept in such settings is the Stackelberg equilibrium, in which the ``leader'' agent selects the strategy that maximizes its own payoff given that the ``follower'' agent will choose their best response to this strategy. Recent work has extended this solution concept to two-player differentiable games, such as those arising from multi-agent deep reinforcement learning, in the form of the \textit{differential} Stackelberg equilibrium. While this previous work has presented learning dynamics which converge to such equilibria, these dynamics are ``coupled'' in the sense that the learning updates for the leader's strategy require some information about the follower's payoff function. As such, these methods cannot be applied to truly decentralised multi-agent settings, particularly ad hoc cooperation, where each agent only has access to its own payoff function. In this work we present ``uncoupled'' learning dynamics based on zeroth-order gradient estimators, in which each agent's strategy update depends only on their observations of the other's behavior. We analyze the convergence of these dynamics in general-sum games, and prove that they converge to differential Stackelberg equilibria under the same conditions as previous coupled methods. Furthermore, we present an online mechanism by which symmetric learners can negotiate leader-follower roles. We conclude with a discussion of the implications of our work for multi-agent reinforcement learning and ad hoc collaboration more generally.
abstract_zh: 在需要高度合作的多智能体问题中，成功往往取决于智能体适应彼此行为的能力。在这种情况下，一个自然的解决方案概念是斯塔克尔伯格均衡，其中“领导者”代理选择最大化其自身收益的策略，因为“追随者”代理将选择对此策略的最佳响应。最近的工作已将此解决方案概念扩展到两人可微游戏，例如由多智能体深度强化学习产生的游戏，其形式为 \textit{difference} Stackelberg 均衡。虽然之前的工作提出了收敛到这种均衡的学习动态，但这些动态是“耦合的”，因为领导者策略的学习更新需要一些有关追随者收益函数的信息。因此，这些方法不能应用于真正去中心化的多智能体设置，特别是临时合作，其中每个智能体只能访问自己的支付函数。在这项工作中，我们提出了基于零阶梯度估计器的“解耦”学习动态，其中每个代理的策略更新仅取决于他们对对方行为的观察。我们分析了一般和博弈中这些动态的收敛性，并证明它们在与之前的耦合方法相同的条件下收敛到微分斯塔克尔伯格均衡。此外，我们提出了一种在线机制，对称学习者可以通过该机制协商领导者-追随者角色。最后，我们讨论了我们的工作对多智能体强化学习和更广泛的临时协作的影响。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需共享收益函数信息的非耦合学习方法，用于求解多智能体系统中的微分Stackelberg均衡，并分析了其收敛性及角色协商机制。
AI.motivation: 现有Stackelberg均衡学习方法依赖于智能体间的耦合信息（如对方收益函数），难以应用于去中心化或ad hoc协作场景，需开发仅基于行为观察的非耦合学习方法。
AI.method: 基于零阶梯度估计器设计非耦合学习动态，智能体仅通过观察对方行为更新策略；提出对称学习者协商领导-跟随角色的在线机制。
AI.result: 证明非耦合动态在一般和博弈中与耦合方法相同条件下收敛至微分Stackelberg均衡，并验证了角色协商机制的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为去中心化多智能体协作提供了理论支持，推动了无需预设角色分工的自适应合作策略发展。

search_text: Uncoupled Learning of Differential Stackelberg Equilibria with Commitments 具有承诺的微分 Stackelberg 均衡的解耦学习 In multi-agent problems requiring a high degree of cooperation, success often depends on the ability of the agents to adapt to each other's behavior. A natural solution concept in such settings is the Stackelberg equilibrium, in which the ``leader'' agent selects the strategy that maximizes its own payoff given that the ``follower'' agent will choose their best response to this strategy. Recent work has extended this solution concept to two-player differentiable games, such as those arising from multi-agent deep reinforcement learning, in the form of the \textit{differential} Stackelberg equilibrium. While this previous work has presented learning dynamics which converge to such equilibria, these dynamics are ``coupled'' in the sense that the learning updates for the leader's strategy require some information about the follower's payoff function. As such, these methods cannot be applied to truly decentralised multi-agent settings, particularly ad hoc cooperation, where each agent only has access to its own payoff function. In this work we present ``uncoupled'' learning dynamics based on zeroth-order gradient estimators, in which each agent's strategy update depends only on their observations of the other's behavior. We analyze the convergence of these dynamics in general-sum games, and prove that they converge to differential Stackelberg equilibria under the same conditions as previous coupled methods. Furthermore, we present an online mechanism by which symmetric learners can negotiate leader-follower roles. We conclude with a discussion of the implications of our work for multi-agent reinforcement learning and ad hoc collaboration more generally. 在需要高度合作的多智能体问题中，成功往往取决于智能体适应彼此行为的能力。在这种情况下，一个自然的解决方案概念是斯塔克尔伯格均衡，其中“领导者”代理选择最大化其自身收益的策略，因为“追随者”代理将选择对此策略的最佳响应。最近的工作已将此解决方案概念扩展到两人可微游戏，例如由多智能体深度强化学习产生的游戏，其形式为 \textit{difference} Stackelberg 均衡。虽然之前的工作提出了收敛到这种均衡的学习动态，但这些动态是“耦合的”，因为领导者策略的学习更新需要一些有关追随者收益函数的信息。因此，这些方法不能应用于真正去中心化的多智能体设置，特别是临时合作，其中每个智能体只能访问自己的支付函数。在这项工作中，我们提出了基于零阶梯度估计器的“解耦”学习动态，其中每个代理的策略更新仅取决于他们对对方行为的观察。我们分析了一般和博弈中这些动态的收敛性，并证明它们在与之前的耦合方法相同的条件下收敛到微分斯塔克尔伯格均衡。此外，我们提出了一种在线机制，对称学习者可以通过该机制协商领导者-追随者角色。最后，我们讨论了我们的工作对多智能体强化学习和更广泛的临时协作的影响。 本文提出了一种无需共享收益函数信息的非耦合学习方法，用于求解多智能体系统中的微分Stackelberg均衡，并分析了其收敛性及角色协商机制。 Robert Loftin,Mustafa Mert Çelikok,Herke van Hoof,Samuel Kaski,Frans A. authors_text: Yash Patel,Yusheng Xie,Yi Zhu,Srikar Appalaraju,R. Manmatha
title: SimCon Loss with Multiple Views for Text Supervised Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 用于文本监督语义分割的多个视图的 SimCon 损失
abstract: Learning to segment images purely by relying on the image-text alignment from web data can lead to sub-optimal performance due to noise in the data. The noise comes from the samples where the associated text does not correlate with the image's visual content. Instead of purely relying on the alignment from the noisy data, this paper proposes a novel loss function termed SimCon, which accounts for intra-modal similarities to determine the appropriate set of positive samples to align. Further, using multiple views of the image (created synthetically) for training and combining the SimCon loss with it makes the training more robust. This version of the loss is termed MV-SimCon. The empirical results demonstrate that using the proposed loss function leads to consistent improvements on zero-shot, text supervised semantic segmentation and outperforms state-of-the-art by $+3.0\%$, $+3.3\%$ and $+6.9\%$ on PASCAL VOC, PASCAL Context and MSCOCO, respectively. With test time augmentations, we set a new record by improving these results further to $58.7\%$, $26.6\%$, and $33.3\%$ on PASCAL VOC, PASCAL Context, and MSCOCO, respectively. In addition, using the proposed loss function leads to robust training and faster convergence.
summary: Learning to segment images purely by relying on the image-text alignment from web data can lead to sub-optimal performance due to noise in the data. The noise comes from the samples where the associated text does not correlate with the image's visual content. Instead of purely relying on the alignment from the noisy data, this paper proposes a novel loss function termed SimCon, which accounts for intra-modal similarities to determine the appropriate set of positive samples to align. Further, using multiple views of the image (created synthetically) for training and combining the SimCon loss with it makes the training more robust. This version of the loss is termed MV-SimCon. The empirical results demonstrate that using the proposed loss function leads to consistent improvements on zero-shot, text supervised semantic segmentation and outperforms state-of-the-art by $+3.0\%$, $+3.3\%$ and $+6.9\%$ on PASCAL VOC, PASCAL Context and MSCOCO, respectively. With test time augmentations, we set a new record by improving these results further to $58.7\%$, $26.6\%$, and $33.3\%$ on PASCAL VOC, PASCAL Context, and MSCOCO, respectively. In addition, using the proposed loss function leads to robust training and faster convergence.
abstract_zh: 由于数据中的噪声，学习纯粹依靠网络数据中的图像文本对齐来分割图像可能会导致性能次优。噪声来自相关文本与图像的视觉内容不相关的样本。本文提出了一种称为 SimCon 的新型损失函数，而不是纯粹依赖于噪声数据的对齐，它考虑了模态内的相似性来确定要对齐的适当的正样本集。此外，使用图像的多个视图（综合创建）进行训练并将 SimCon 损失与之结合使训练更加稳健。这个版本的损失被称为 MV-SimCon。实证结果表明，使用所提出的损失函数可以在零样本、文本监督语义分割方面取得一致的改进，并且在 PASCAL VOC、PASCAL Context 和 MSCOCO 上分别优于最先进的 $+3.0\%$、$+3.3\%$ 和 $+6.9\%$。通过测试时间的增加，我们在 PASCAL VOC、PASCAL Context 和 MSCOCO 上将这些结果分别进一步提高到 $58.7\%$、$26.6\%$ 和 $33.3\%$，创下了新记录。此外，使用所提出的损失函数可以实现稳健的训练和更快的收敛。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为SimCon的新损失函数，结合多视角图像增强，用于提升文本监督下的语义分割性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖网络数据中的图文对齐信息，但噪声样本（文本与图像内容无关）会导致性能下降，需通过更鲁棒的损失函数解决这一问题。
AI.method: 设计SimCon损失函数，利用模态内相似性筛选正样本；结合合成多视角图像训练，形成MV-SimCon方法以增强模型鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在PASCAL VOC、PASCAL Context和MSCOCO数据集上分别提升3.0%、3.3%、6.9%，结合测试时增强后达到58.7%、26.6%、33.3%的新纪录，并加速收敛。
AI.conclusion: MV-SimCon通过优化正样本选择和多视角训练，显著提升文本监督语义分割性能，优于现有最先进方法且训练更稳定。

authors_text: Rundong Wang,Longtao Zheng,Wei Qiu,Bowei He,Bo An,Zinovi Rabinovich,Yujing Hu,Yingfeng Chen,Tangjie Lv,Changjie Fan
title: Towards Skilled Population Curriculum for Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 面向多智能体强化学习的技能人口课程
abstract: Recent advances in multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) allow agents to coordinate their behaviors in complex environments. However, common MARL algorithms still suffer from scalability and sparse reward issues. One promising approach to resolving them is automatic curriculum learning (ACL). ACL involves a student (curriculum learner) training on tasks of increasing difficulty controlled by a teacher (curriculum generator). Despite its success, ACL's applicability is limited by (1) the lack of a general student framework for dealing with the varying number of agents across tasks and the sparse reward problem, and (2) the non-stationarity of the teacher's task due to ever-changing student strategies. As a remedy for ACL, we introduce a novel automatic curriculum learning framework, Skilled Population Curriculum (SPC), which adapts curriculum learning to multi-agent coordination. Specifically, we endow the student with population-invariant communication and a hierarchical skill set, allowing it to learn cooperation and behavior skills from distinct tasks with varying numbers of agents. In addition, we model the teacher as a contextual bandit conditioned by student policies, enabling a team of agents to change its size while still retaining previously acquired skills. We also analyze the inherent non-stationarity of this multi-agent automatic curriculum teaching problem and provide a corresponding regret bound. Empirical results show that our method improves the performance, scalability and sample efficiency in several MARL environments.
summary: Recent advances in multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) allow agents to coordinate their behaviors in complex environments. However, common MARL algorithms still suffer from scalability and sparse reward issues. One promising approach to resolving them is automatic curriculum learning (ACL). ACL involves a student (curriculum learner) training on tasks of increasing difficulty controlled by a teacher (curriculum generator). Despite its success, ACL's applicability is limited by (1) the lack of a general student framework for dealing with the varying number of agents across tasks and the sparse reward problem, and (2) the non-stationarity of the teacher's task due to ever-changing student strategies. As a remedy for ACL, we introduce a novel automatic curriculum learning framework, Skilled Population Curriculum (SPC), which adapts curriculum learning to multi-agent coordination. Specifically, we endow the student with population-invariant communication and a hierarchical skill set, allowing it to learn cooperation and behavior skills from distinct tasks with varying numbers of agents. In addition, we model the teacher as a contextual bandit conditioned by student policies, enabling a team of agents to change its size while still retaining previously acquired skills. We also analyze the inherent non-stationarity of this multi-agent automatic curriculum teaching problem and provide a corresponding regret bound. Empirical results show that our method improves the performance, scalability and sample efficiency in several MARL environments.
abstract_zh: 多智能体强化学习（MARL）的最新进展允许智能体在复杂环境中协调其行为。然而，常见的 MARL 算法仍然面临可扩展性和奖励稀疏的问题。解决这些问题的一种有前途的方法是自动课程学习（ACL）。 ACL 涉及对学生（课程学习者）进行由教师（课程生成者）控制的难度不断增加的任务的培训。尽管取得了成功，但 ACL 的适用性受到以下因素的限制：(1) 缺乏通用的学生框架来处理跨任务的不同数量的代理和稀疏奖励问题，以及 (2) 由于不断变化的学生策略而导致教师任务的非平稳性。作为 ACL 的补救措施，我们引入了一种新颖的自动课程学习框架——技能群体课程（SPC），它使课程学习适应多智能体协调。具体来说，我们赋予学生群体不变的沟通能力和分层技能，使其能够从不同数量的智能体的不同任务中学习合作和行为技能。此外，我们将教师建模为受学生政策制约的上下文强盗，使代理团队能够改变其规模，同时仍然保留以前获得的技能。我们还分析了这种多智能体自动课程教学问题固有的非平稳性，并提供了相应的遗憾界。实证结果表明，我们的方法提高了多个 MARL 环境中的性能、可扩展性和样本效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Skilled Population Curriculum (SPC)的自动课程学习框架，以解决多智能体强化学习中的可扩展性和稀疏奖励问题。
AI.motivation: 现有自动课程学习方法在处理智能体数量变化、稀疏奖励及教师任务非平稳性方面存在局限，限制了其在多智能体环境中的应用效果。
AI.method: 通过赋予学生群体不变通信能力和分层技能集，使智能体能适应不同规模任务；教师端采用基于学生策略的上下文老虎机模型，动态调整任务难度并保留已有技能。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在多个MARL环境中显著提升了性能、可扩展性和样本效率，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: SPC框架通过结构化设计解决了多智能体课程学习的核心挑战，为复杂协作场景提供了新的解决方案。

search_text: Towards Skilled Population Curriculum for Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning 面向多智能体强化学习的技能人口课程 Recent advances in multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) allow agents to coordinate their behaviors in complex environments. However, common MARL algorithms still suffer from scalability and sparse reward issues. One promising approach to resolving them is automatic curriculum learning (ACL). ACL involves a student (curriculum learner) training on tasks of increasing difficulty controlled by a teacher (curriculum generator). Despite its success, ACL's applicability is limited by (1) the lack of a general student framework for dealing with the varying number of agents across tasks and the sparse reward problem, and (2) the non-stationarity of the teacher's task due to ever-changing student strategies. As a remedy for ACL, we introduce a novel automatic curriculum learning framework, Skilled Population Curriculum (SPC), which adapts curriculum learning to multi-agent coordination. Specifically, we endow the student with population-invariant communication and a hierarchical skill set, allowing it to learn cooperation and behavior skills from distinct tasks with varying numbers of agents. In addition, we model the teacher as a contextual bandit conditioned by student policies, enabling a team of agents to change its size while still retaining previously acquired skills. We also analyze the inherent non-stationarity of this multi-agent automatic curriculum teaching problem and provide a corresponding regret bound. Empirical results show that our method improves the performance, scalability and sample efficiency in several MARL environments. 多智能体强化学习（MARL）的最新进展允许智能体在复杂环境中协调其行为。然而，常见的 MARL 算法仍然面临可扩展性和奖励稀疏的问题。解决这些问题的一种有前途的方法是自动课程学习（ACL）。 ACL 涉及对学生（课程学习者）进行由教师（课程生成者）控制的难度不断增加的任务的培训。尽管取得了成功，但 ACL 的适用性受到以下因素的限制：(1) 缺乏通用的学生框架来处理跨任务的不同数量的代理和稀疏奖励问题，以及 (2) 由于不断变化的学生策略而导致教师任务的非平稳性。作为 ACL 的补救措施，我们引入了一种新颖的自动课程学习框架——技能群体课程（SPC），它使课程学习适应多智能体协调。具体来说，我们赋予学生群体不变的沟通能力和分层技能，使其能够从不同数量的智能体的不同任务中学习合作和行为技能。此外，我们将教师建模为受学生政策制约的上下文强盗，使代理团队能够改变其规模，同时仍然保留以前获得的技能。我们还分析了这种多智能体自动课程教学问题固有的非平稳性，并提供了相应的遗憾界。实证结果表明，我们的方法提高了多个 MARL 环境中的性能、可扩展性和样本效率。 本文提出一种名为Skilled Population Curriculum (SPC)的自动课程学习框架，以解决多智能体强化学习中的可扩展性和稀疏奖励问题。 Rundong Wang,Longtao Zheng,Wei Qiu,Bowei He,Bo An,Zinovi Rabinovich,Yujing Hu,Yingfeng Chen,Tangjie Lv,Changjie Fan cs.AI,cs.LG,cs.MA

authors_text: Yanbo Wang,Chuming Lin,Donghao Luo,Ying Tai,Zhizhong Zhang,Yuan Xie
title: High-Resolution GAN Inversion for Degraded Images in Large Diverse Datasets
title_zh: 针对大型多样化数据集中的退化图像进行高分辨率 GAN 反演
abstract: The last decades are marked by massive and diverse image data, which shows increasingly high resolution and quality. However, some images we obtained may be corrupted, affecting the perception and the application of downstream tasks. A generic method for generating a high-quality image from the degraded one is in demand. In this paper, we present a novel GAN inversion framework that utilizes the powerful generative ability of StyleGAN-XL for this problem. To ease the inversion challenge with StyleGAN-XL, Clustering \& Regularize Inversion (CRI) is proposed. Specifically, the latent space is firstly divided into finer-grained sub-spaces by clustering. Instead of initializing the inversion with the average latent vector, we approximate a centroid latent vector from the clusters, which generates an image close to the input image. Then, an offset with a regularization term is introduced to keep the inverted latent vector within a certain range. We validate our CRI scheme on multiple restoration tasks (i.e., inpainting, colorization, and super-resolution) of complex natural images, and show preferable quantitative and qualitative results. We further demonstrate our technique is robust in terms of data and different GAN models. To our best knowledge, we are the first to adopt StyleGAN-XL for generating high-quality natural images from diverse degraded inputs. Code is available at https://github.com/Booooooooooo/CRI.
summary: The last decades are marked by massive and diverse image data, which shows increasingly high resolution and quality. However, some images we obtained may be corrupted, affecting the perception and the application of downstream tasks. A generic method for generating a high-quality image from the degraded one is in demand. In this paper, we present a novel GAN inversion framework that utilizes the powerful generative ability of StyleGAN-XL for this problem. To ease the inversion challenge with StyleGAN-XL, Clustering \& Regularize Inversion (CRI) is proposed. Specifically, the latent space is firstly divided into finer-grained sub-spaces by clustering. Instead of initializing the inversion with the average latent vector, we approximate a centroid latent vector from the clusters, which generates an image close to the input image. Then, an offset with a regularization term is introduced to keep the inverted latent vector within a certain range. We validate our CRI scheme on multiple restoration tasks (i.e., inpainting, colorization, and super-resolution) of complex natural images, and show preferable quantitative and qualitative results. We further demonstrate our technique is robust in terms of data and different GAN models. To our best knowledge, we are the first to adopt StyleGAN-XL for generating high-quality natural images from diverse degraded inputs. Code is available at https://github.com/Booooooooooo/CRI.
abstract_zh: 过去几十年的特点是海量且多样化的图像数据，其分辨率和质量越来越高。然而，我们获得的一些图像可能会被损坏，影响下游任务的感知和应用。需要一种从退化图像生成高质量图像的通用方法。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的 GAN 反转框架，利用 StyleGAN-XL 强大的生成能力来解决这个问题。为了缓解 StyleGAN-XL 的反演挑战，提出了聚类\&正则化反演（CRI）。具体来说，首先通过聚类将潜在空间划分为更细粒度的子空间。我们不是用平均潜在向量来初始化反演，而是从聚类中近似一个质心潜在向量，这会生成接近输入图像的图像。然后，引入带有正则化项的偏移量，以将反转的潜在向量保持在一定范围内。我们在复杂自然图像的多个修复任务（即修复、着色和超分辨率）上验证了我们的 CRI 方案，并显示出更好的定量和定性结果。我们进一步证明我们的技术在数据和不同的 GAN 模型方面是稳健的。据我们所知，我们是第一个采用 StyleGAN-XL 从各种退化输入生成高质量自然图像的公司。代码可在 https://github.com/Booooooooooo/CRI 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于StyleGAN-XL的高分辨率生成对抗网络（GAN）反转框架，用于从退化图像中生成高质量图像。
AI.motivation: 随着高分辨率图像数据的增多，许多图像可能因退化而影响下游任务的应用，亟需一种通用方法从退化图像生成高质量图像。
AI.method: 提出聚类与正则化反转（CRI）方法，通过聚类划分潜在空间子空间，利用聚类中心近似初始潜在向量，并引入正则化项约束反转后的潜在向量范围。
AI.result: 在图像修复、着色和超分辨率等任务中取得优于现有方法的定量和定性结果，且方法对数据和不同GAN模型具有鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 首次将StyleGAN-XL应用于多样化的退化输入生成高质量自然图像，代码已开源。

authors_text: Jinlong Fan,Jing Zhang,Zhi Hou,Dacheng Tao
title: AniPixel: Towards Animatable Pixel-Aligned Human Avatar
title_zh: AniPixel：迈向可动画化的像素对齐人体头像
comment: Accepted by MM'23, code will be released at https://github.com/loong8888/AniPixel
comments: Accepted by MM'23, code will be released at https://github.com/loong8888/AniPixel
abstract: Although human reconstruction typically results in human-specific avatars, recent 3D scene reconstruction techniques utilizing pixel-aligned features show promise in generalizing to new scenes. Applying these techniques to human avatar reconstruction can result in a volumetric avatar with generalizability but limited animatability due to rendering only being possible for static representations. In this paper, we propose AniPixel, a novel animatable and generalizable human avatar reconstruction method that leverages pixel-aligned features for body geometry prediction and RGB color blending. Technically, to align the canonical space with the target space and the observation space, we propose a bidirectional neural skinning field based on skeleton-driven deformation to establish the target-to-canonical and canonical-to-observation correspondences. Then, we disentangle the canonical body geometry into a normalized neutral-sized body and a subject-specific residual for better generalizability. As the geometry and appearance are closely related, we introduce pixel-aligned features to facilitate the body geometry prediction and detailed surface normals to reinforce the RGB color blending. We also devise a pose-dependent and view direction-related shading module to represent the local illumination variance. Experiments show that AniPixel renders comparable novel views while delivering better novel pose animation results than state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Although human reconstruction typically results in human-specific avatars, recent 3D scene reconstruction techniques utilizing pixel-aligned features show promise in generalizing to new scenes. Applying these techniques to human avatar reconstruction can result in a volumetric avatar with generalizability but limited animatability due to rendering only being possible for static representations. In this paper, we propose AniPixel, a novel animatable and generalizable human avatar reconstruction method that leverages pixel-aligned features for body geometry prediction and RGB color blending. Technically, to align the canonical space with the target space and the observation space, we propose a bidirectional neural skinning field based on skeleton-driven deformation to establish the target-to-canonical and canonical-to-observation correspondences. Then, we disentangle the canonical body geometry into a normalized neutral-sized body and a subject-specific residual for better generalizability. As the geometry and appearance are closely related, we introduce pixel-aligned features to facilitate the body geometry prediction and detailed surface normals to reinforce the RGB color blending. We also devise a pose-dependent and view direction-related shading module to represent the local illumination variance. Experiments show that AniPixel renders comparable novel views while delivering better novel pose animation results than state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 尽管人体重建通常会产生人类特定的化身，但最近利用像素对齐特征的 3D 场景重建技术显示出推广到新场景的前景。将这些技术应用于人体化身重建可以产生具有通用性的体积化身，但由于渲染只能用于静态表示，因此可动画性有限。在本文中，我们提出了 AniPixel，这是一种新颖的可动画且可概括的人体头像重建方法，该方法利用像素对齐特征进行身体几何预测和 RGB 颜色混合。从技术上讲，为了将规范空间与目标空间和观察空间对齐，我们提出了一种基于骨架驱动变形的双向神经蒙皮场，以建立目标到规范和规范到观察的对应关系。然后，我们将规范的身体几何形状分解为标准化的中性大小的身体和特定于主题的残差，以获得更好的通用性。由于几何形状和外观密切相关，我们引入了像素对齐特征来促进身体几何预测，并引入了详细的表面法线来加强 RGB 颜色混合。我们还设计了一个与姿势相关且与视图方向相关的着色模块来表示局部照明方差。实验表明，与最先进的方法相比，AniPixel 可以渲染类似的新颖视图，同时提供更好的新颖姿势动画结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种可动画化且具有泛化能力的人体虚拟形象重建方法AniPixel。
AI.motivation: 尽管人体重建通常生成特定于人体的虚拟形象，但最近利用像素对齐特征的3D场景重建技术显示出对新场景的泛化能力。然而，这些技术在人体虚拟形象重建中由于只能生成静态表示而限制了动画能力。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种基于骨骼驱动变形的双向神经皮肤场，以对齐标准空间与目标空间及观察空间。此外，将标准人体几何体分解为标准化中性体型和特定主体的残差，以增强泛化能力。引入像素对齐特征以促进人体几何预测和详细表面法线以增强RGB颜色混合。还设计了一个与姿态和视图方向相关的阴影模块，以表示局部光照变化。
AI.result: 实验表明，AniPixel在生成新视角方面与现有方法相当，但在生成新姿态动画方面优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: AniPixel是一种可动画化且具有泛化能力的人体虚拟形象重建方法，能够在生成新视角和动画方面取得良好效果。

search_text: AniPixel: Towards Animatable Pixel-Aligned Human Avatar AniPixel：迈向可动画化的像素对齐人体头像 Although human reconstruction typically results in human-specific avatars, recent 3D scene reconstruction techniques utilizing pixel-aligned features show promise in generalizing to new scenes. Applying these techniques to human avatar reconstruction can result in a volumetric avatar with generalizability but limited animatability due to rendering only being possible for static representations. In this paper, we propose AniPixel, a novel animatable and generalizable human avatar reconstruction method that leverages pixel-aligned features for body geometry prediction and RGB color blending. Technically, to align the canonical space with the target space and the observation space, we propose a bidirectional neural skinning field based on skeleton-driven deformation to establish the target-to-canonical and canonical-to-observation correspondences. Then, we disentangle the canonical body geometry into a normalized neutral-sized body and a subject-specific residual for better generalizability. As the geometry and appearance are closely related, we introduce pixel-aligned features to facilitate the body geometry prediction and detailed surface normals to reinforce the RGB color blending. We also devise a pose-dependent and view direction-related shading module to represent the local illumination variance. Experiments show that AniPixel renders comparable novel views while delivering better novel pose animation results than state-of-the-art methods. 尽管人体重建通常会产生人类特定的化身，但最近利用像素对齐特征的 3D 场景重建技术显示出推广到新场景的前景。将这些技术应用于人体化身重建可以产生具有通用性的体积化身，但由于渲染只能用于静态表示，因此可动画性有限。在本文中，我们提出了 AniPixel，这是一种新颖的可动画且可概括的人体头像重建方法，该方法利用像素对齐特征进行身体几何预测和 RGB 颜色混合。从技术上讲，为了将规范空间与目标空间和观察空间对齐，我们提出了一种基于骨架驱动变形的双向神经蒙皮场，以建立目标到规范和规范到观察的对应关系。然后，我们将规范的身体几何形状分解为标准化的中性大小的身体和特定于主题的残差，以获得更好的通用性。由于几何形状和外观密切相关，我们引入了像素对齐特征来促进身体几何预测，并引入了详细的表面法线来加强 RGB 颜色混合。我们还设计了一个与姿势相关且与视图方向相关的着色模块来表示局部照明方差。实验表明，与最先进的方法相比，AniPixel 可以渲染类似的新颖视图，同时提供更好的新颖姿势动画结果。 本文提出了一种可动画化且具有泛化能力的人体虚拟形象重建方法AniPixel。 Jinlong Fan,Jing Zhang,Zhi Hou,Dacheng Tao cs.CV

authors_text: Louis Ohl,Pierre-Alexandre Mattei,Charles Bouveyron,Mickaël Leclercq,Arnaud Droit,Frédéric Precioso
title: Sparse and geometry-aware generalisation of the mutual information for joint discriminative clustering and feature selection
title_zh: 用于联合判别聚类和特征选择的互信息的稀疏和几何感知概括
comment: Published in Statistics and Computing, Volume 34, article number 155, (2024), https://doi.org/10.1007/s11222-024-10467-9
comments: Published in Statistics and Computing, Volume 34, article number 155, (2024), https://doi.org/10.1007/s11222-024-10467-9
abstract: Feature selection in clustering is a hard task which involves simultaneously the discovery of relevant clusters as well as relevant variables with respect to these clusters. While feature selection algorithms are often model-based through optimised model selection or strong assumptions on the data distribution, we introduce a discriminative clustering model trying to maximise a geometry-aware generalisation of the mutual information called GEMINI with a simple l1 penalty: the Sparse GEMINI. This algorithm avoids the burden of combinatorial feature subset exploration and is easily scalable to high-dimensional data and large amounts of samples while only designing a discriminative clustering model. We demonstrate the performances of Sparse GEMINI on synthetic datasets and large-scale datasets. Our results show that Sparse GEMINI is a competitive algorithm and has the ability to select relevant subsets of variables with respect to the clustering without using relevance criteria or prior hypotheses.
summary: Feature selection in clustering is a hard task which involves simultaneously the discovery of relevant clusters as well as relevant variables with respect to these clusters. While feature selection algorithms are often model-based through optimised model selection or strong assumptions on the data distribution, we introduce a discriminative clustering model trying to maximise a geometry-aware generalisation of the mutual information called GEMINI with a simple l1 penalty: the Sparse GEMINI. This algorithm avoids the burden of combinatorial feature subset exploration and is easily scalable to high-dimensional data and large amounts of samples while only designing a discriminative clustering model. We demonstrate the performances of Sparse GEMINI on synthetic datasets and large-scale datasets. Our results show that Sparse GEMINI is a competitive algorithm and has the ability to select relevant subsets of variables with respect to the clustering without using relevance criteria or prior hypotheses.
abstract_zh: 聚类中的特征选择是一项艰巨的任务，它涉及同时发现相关聚类以及与这些聚类相关的相关变量。虽然特征选择算法通常是通过优化模型选择或对数据分布的强假设来基于模型的，但我们引入了一种判别式聚类模型，试图通过简单的 l1 惩罚来最大化称为 GEMINI 的互信息的几何感知泛化：稀疏 GEMINI。该算法避免了组合特征子集探索的负担，并且可以轻松扩展到高维数据和大量样本，同时仅设计判别性聚类模型。我们展示了 Sparse GEMINI 在合成数据集和大规模数据集上的性能。我们的结果表明，Sparse GEMINI 是一种竞争算法，能够在不使用相关性标准或先验假设的情况下选择与聚类相关的变量子集。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合稀疏性和几何感知的互信息泛化方法（Sparse GEMINI），用于联合判别聚类与特征选择。
AI.motivation: 传统聚类特征选择方法依赖模型假设或先验知识，难以高效处理高维数据。本文旨在开发无需先验假设、可同时优化聚类与特征选择的算法。
AI.method: 通过最大化几何感知的互信息（GEMINI）并引入L1正则化，构建Sparse GEMINI算法，避免组合特征搜索，实现高维数据的可扩展性。
AI.result: 在合成数据集和大规模数据集上验证了Sparse GEMINI的有效性，其能自主选择与聚类相关的特征子集，无需依赖先验标准。
AI.conclusion: Sparse GEMINI是一种高效的联合聚类与特征选择方法，适用于高维数据场景，且无需复杂模型假设或先验知识。

authors_text: Jun Chen,Hanwen Chen,Mengmeng Wang,Guang Dai,Ivor W. Tsang,Yong Liu
title: Learning Discretized Neural Networks under Ricci Flow
title_zh: Ricci Flow 下学习离散神经网络
abstract: In this paper, we study Discretized Neural Networks (DNNs) composed of low-precision weights and activations, which suffer from either infinite or zero gradients due to the non-differentiable discrete function during training. Most training-based DNNs in such scenarios employ the standard Straight-Through Estimator (STE) to approximate the gradient w.r.t. discrete values. However, the use of STE introduces the problem of gradient mismatch, arising from perturbations in the approximated gradient. To address this problem, this paper reveals that this mismatch can be interpreted as a metric perturbation in a Riemannian manifold, viewed through the lens of duality theory. Building on information geometry, we construct the Linearly Nearly Euclidean (LNE) manifold for DNNs, providing a background for addressing perturbations. By introducing a partial differential equation on metrics, i.e., the Ricci flow, we establish the dynamical stability and convergence of the LNE metric with the $L^2$-norm perturbation. In contrast to previous perturbation theories with convergence rates in fractional powers, the metric perturbation under the Ricci flow exhibits exponential decay in the LNE manifold. Experimental results across various datasets demonstrate that our method achieves superior and more stable performance for DNNs compared to other representative training-based methods.
summary: In this paper, we study Discretized Neural Networks (DNNs) composed of low-precision weights and activations, which suffer from either infinite or zero gradients due to the non-differentiable discrete function during training. Most training-based DNNs in such scenarios employ the standard Straight-Through Estimator (STE) to approximate the gradient w.r.t. discrete values. However, the use of STE introduces the problem of gradient mismatch, arising from perturbations in the approximated gradient. To address this problem, this paper reveals that this mismatch can be interpreted as a metric perturbation in a Riemannian manifold, viewed through the lens of duality theory. Building on information geometry, we construct the Linearly Nearly Euclidean (LNE) manifold for DNNs, providing a background for addressing perturbations. By introducing a partial differential equation on metrics, i.e., the Ricci flow, we establish the dynamical stability and convergence of the LNE metric with the $L^2$-norm perturbation. In contrast to previous perturbation theories with convergence rates in fractional powers, the metric perturbation under the Ricci flow exhibits exponential decay in the LNE manifold. Experimental results across various datasets demonstrate that our method achieves superior and more stable performance for DNNs compared to other representative training-based methods.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们研究由低精度权重和激活组成的离散神经网络（DNN），由于训练过程中的不可微离散函数，它们会遭受无限或零梯度。在这种情况下，大多数基于训练的 DNN 都会采用标准的直通估计器 (STE) 来近似梯度。离散值。然而，STE 的使用引入了由于近似梯度的扰动而引起的梯度失配问题。为了解决这个问题，本文揭示了从对偶理论的角度来看，这种不匹配可以解释为黎曼流形中的度量扰动。基于信息几何，我们构建了 DNN 的线性近欧几里得 (LNE) 流形，为解决扰动提供了背景。通过引入度量上的偏微分方程，即 Ricci 流，我们建立了 LNE 度量与 $L^2$-范数扰动的动态稳定性和收敛性。与之前分数幂收敛率的微扰理论相比，Ricci 流下的度量微扰在 LNE 流形中表现出指数衰减。各种数据集的实验结果表明，与其他基于训练的代表性方法相比，我们的方法在 DNN 方面实现了更优越、更稳定的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文研究离散化神经网络（DNN）在训练过程中因非微分离散函数导致的梯度问题，并提出基于黎曼几何中里奇流的方法来解决梯度不匹配问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于直通估计器（STE）的方法在离散化DNN训练中存在梯度不匹配问题，导致训练不稳定，需寻找更有效的梯度处理机制。
AI.method: 通过信息几何构建线性近欧几里得（LNE）流形，将梯度扰动解释为黎曼流形中的度量扰动，并引入里奇流偏微分方程实现度量动态稳定性和收敛性。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在多个数据集上实现更优且稳定的DNN训练效果，相比传统方法具有指数级的扰动衰减优势。
AI.conclusion: 基于里奇流的几何方法有效解决了离散化DNN的梯度问题，为低精度神经网络训练提供了新的理论框架和稳定方案。
