search_text: Learning Discretized Neural Networks under Ricci Flow Ricci Flow 下学习离散神经网络 In this paper, we study Discretized Neural Networks (DNNs) composed of low-precision weights and activations, which suffer from either infinite or zero gradients due to the non-differentiable discrete function during training. Most training-based DNNs in such scenarios employ the standard Straight-Through Estimator (STE) to approximate the gradient w.r.t. discrete values. However, the use of STE introduces the problem of gradient mismatch, arising from perturbations in the approximated gradient. To address this problem, this paper reveals that this mismatch can be interpreted as a metric perturbation in a Riemannian manifold, viewed through the lens of duality theory. Building on information geometry, we construct the Linearly Nearly Euclidean (LNE) manifold for DNNs, providing a background for addressing perturbations. By introducing a partial differential equation on metrics, i.e., the Ricci flow, we establish the dynamical stability and convergence of the LNE metric with the $L^2$-norm perturbation. In contrast to previous perturbation theories with convergence rates in fractional powers, the metric perturbation under the Ricci flow exhibits exponential decay in the LNE manifold. Experimental results across various datasets demonstrate that our method achieves superior and more stable performance for DNNs compared to other representative training-based methods. 在本文中，我们研究由低精度权重和激活组成的离散神经网络（DNN），由于训练过程中的不可微离散函数，它们会遭受无限或零梯度。在这种情况下，大多数基于训练的 DNN 都会采用标准的直通估计器 (STE) 来近似梯度。离散值。然而，STE 的使用引入了由于近似梯度的扰动而引起的梯度失配问题。为了解决这个问题，本文揭示了从对偶理论的角度来看，这种不匹配可以解释为黎曼流形中的度量扰动。基于信息几何，我们构建了 DNN 的线性近欧几里得 (LNE) 流形，为解决扰动提供了背景。通过引入度量上的偏微分方程，即 Ricci 流，我们建立了 LNE 度量与 $L^2$-范数扰动的动态稳定性和收敛性。与之前分数幂收敛率的微扰理论相比，Ricci 流下的度量微扰在 LNE 流形中表现出指数衰减。各种数据集的实验结果表明，与其他基于训练的代表性方法相比，我们的方法在 DNN 方面实现了更优越、更稳定的性能。 本文研究离散化神经网络（DNN）在训练过程中因非微分离散函数导致的梯度问题，并提出基于黎曼几何中里奇流的方法来解决梯度不匹配问题。 Jun Chen,Hanwen Chen,Mengmeng Wang,Guang Dai,Ivor W. Tsang,Yong Liu cs.LG,cs.IT,cs.NE

authors_text: Haoran Li,Shasha Liu,Mingjun Ma,Guangzheng Hu,Yaran Chen,Dongbin Zhao
title: NeuronsGym: A Hybrid Framework and Benchmark for Robot Tasks with Sim2Real Policy Learning
title_zh: NeuronsGym：具有 Sim2Real 策略学习的机器人任务的混合框架和基准
abstract: The rise of embodied AI has greatly improved the possibility of general mobile agent systems. At present, many evaluation platforms with rich scenes, high visual fidelity and various application scenarios have been developed. In this paper, we present a hybrid framework named NeuronsGym that can be used for policy learning of robot tasks, covering a simulation platform for training policy, and a physical system for studying sim2real problems. Unlike most current single-task, slow-moving robotic platforms, our framework provides agile physical robots with a wider range of speeds, and can be employed to train robotic navigation and confrontation policies. At the same time, in order to evaluate the safety of robot navigation, we propose a safety-weighted path length (SFPL) to improve the safety evaluation in the current mobile robot navigation. Based on this platform, we build a new benchmark for navigation and confrontation tasks under this platform by comparing the current mainstream sim2real methods, and hold the 2022 IEEE Conference on Games (CoG) RoboMaster sim2real challenge. We release the codes of this framework\footnote{\url{https://github.com/DRL-CASIA/NeuronsGym}} and hope that this platform can promote the development of more flexible and agile general mobile agent algorithms.
summary: The rise of embodied AI has greatly improved the possibility of general mobile agent systems. At present, many evaluation platforms with rich scenes, high visual fidelity and various application scenarios have been developed. In this paper, we present a hybrid framework named NeuronsGym that can be used for policy learning of robot tasks, covering a simulation platform for training policy, and a physical system for studying sim2real problems. Unlike most current single-task, slow-moving robotic platforms, our framework provides agile physical robots with a wider range of speeds, and can be employed to train robotic navigation and confrontation policies. At the same time, in order to evaluate the safety of robot navigation, we propose a safety-weighted path length (SFPL) to improve the safety evaluation in the current mobile robot navigation. Based on this platform, we build a new benchmark for navigation and confrontation tasks under this platform by comparing the current mainstream sim2real methods, and hold the 2022 IEEE Conference on Games (CoG) RoboMaster sim2real challenge. We release the codes of this framework\footnote{\url{https://github.com/DRL-CASIA/NeuronsGym}} and hope that this platform can promote the development of more flexible and agile general mobile agent algorithms.
abstract_zh: 具身人工智能的兴起极大地提高了通用移动代理系统的可能性。目前已经开发出许多场景丰富、视觉保真度高、应用场景多样的评估平台。在本文中，我们提出了一个名为 NeuronsGym 的混合框架，可用于机器人任务的策略学习，涵盖用于训练策略的模拟平台和用于研究 sim2real 问题的物理系统。与大多数当前的单任务、缓慢移动的机器人平台不同，我们的框架为敏捷的物理机器人提供了更广泛的速度范围，并且可用于训练机器人导航和对抗策略。同时，为了评估机器人导航的安全性，我们提出了安全加权路径长度（SFPL）来改进当前移动机器人导航的安全性评估。基于该平台，我们通过对比目前主流的sim2real方法，构建了该平台下导航对抗任务的新基准，并举办了2022年IEEE游戏会议（CoG）RoboMaster sim2real挑战赛。我们发布这个框架\footnote{\url{https://github.com/DRL-CASIA/NeuronsGym}}的代码，希望这个平台能够促进更灵活、敏捷的通用移动代理算法的发展。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个名为NeuronsGym的混合框架和基准测试平台，用于机器人任务的Sim2Real策略学习，包含仿真训练环境和物理系统，并引入安全加权路径长度（SFPL）指标。
AI.motivation: 现有机器人平台多为单任务且移动缓慢，难以满足复杂场景需求，同时缺乏对导航安全性的有效评估方法。
AI.method: 构建包含仿真训练平台和物理系统的混合框架，设计敏捷机器人支持导航与对抗策略训练，提出SFPL指标提升安全性评估，并基于该框架建立新基准并举办Sim2Real挑战赛。
AI.result: 开发了NeuronsGym框架及代码库，建立导航与对抗任务基准，举办IEEE CoG RoboMaster挑战赛，推动通用移动智能体算法发展。
AI.conclusion: NeuronsGym通过提供灵活的混合框架和标准化基准，为Sim2Real策略学习提供了新工具，有助于促进更安全高效的通用移动智能体算法研究。

authors_text: Shufang Zhu,Giuseppe De Giacomo
title: Act for Your Duties but Maintain Your Rights
title_zh: 履行您的职责，但维护您的权利
comment: ef:International Conference on Principles of Knowledge Representation and Reasoning (KR), 2022
comments: ef:International Conference on Principles of Knowledge Representation and Reasoning (KR), 2022
abstract: Most of the synthesis literature has focused on studying how to synthesize a strategy to fulfill a task. This task is a duty for the agent. In this paper, we argue that intelligent agents should also be equipped with rights, that is, tasks that the agent itself can choose to fulfill (e.g., the right of recharging the battery). The agent should be able to maintain these rights while acting for its duties. We study this issue in the context of LTLf synthesis: we give duties and rights in terms of LTLf specifications, and synthesize a suitable strategy to achieve the duties that can be modified on-the-fly to achieve also the rights, if the agent chooses to do so. We show that handling rights does not make synthesis substantially more difficult, although it requires a more sophisticated solution concept than standard LTLf synthesis. We also extend our results to the case in which further duties and rights are given to the agent while already executing.
summary: Most of the synthesis literature has focused on studying how to synthesize a strategy to fulfill a task. This task is a duty for the agent. In this paper, we argue that intelligent agents should also be equipped with rights, that is, tasks that the agent itself can choose to fulfill (e.g., the right of recharging the battery). The agent should be able to maintain these rights while acting for its duties. We study this issue in the context of LTLf synthesis: we give duties and rights in terms of LTLf specifications, and synthesize a suitable strategy to achieve the duties that can be modified on-the-fly to achieve also the rights, if the agent chooses to do so. We show that handling rights does not make synthesis substantially more difficult, although it requires a more sophisticated solution concept than standard LTLf synthesis. We also extend our results to the case in which further duties and rights are given to the agent while already executing.
abstract_zh: 大多数综合文献都集中于研究如何综合策略来完成任务。这项任务是代理人的职责。在本文中，我们认为智能代理还应该配备权利，即代理本身可以选择完成的任务（例如，给电池充电的权利）。代理人在履行其职责的同时应能够维护这些权利。我们在 LTLf 综合的背景下研究这个问题：我们根据 LTLf 规范给出义务和权利，并综合一个合适的策略来实现可以即时修改的义务，以实现权利（如果代理选择这样做）。我们表明，处理权不会使综合变得更加困难，尽管它需要比标准 LTLf 综合更复杂的解决方案概念。我们还将我们的结果扩展到在已经执行的情况下向代理人赋予进一步义务和权利的情况。

AI.tldr: 研究智能体在履行职责的同时维护自身权利的策略合成方法
AI.motivation: 现有合成策略仅关注履行任务（职责），但智能体需具备自主选择的权利（如充电），以提升自主性和适应性
AI.method: 基于LTLf规范，将职责与权利形式化，并合成可动态调整的策略以兼顾两者
AI.result: 证明处理权利不显著增加合成难度，但需更复杂方法，并支持执行中动态扩展
AI.conclusion: 智能体策略合成需兼顾职责与权利，为自主决策提供理论支持

conclusion: 智能体策略合成需兼顾职责与权利，为自主决策提供理论支持
search_text: Act for Your Duties but Maintain Your Rights 履行您的职责，但维护您的权利 Most of the synthesis literature has focused on studying how to synthesize a strategy to fulfill a task. This task is a duty for the agent. In this paper, we argue that intelligent agents should also be equipped with rights, that is, tasks that the agent itself can choose to fulfill (e.g., the right of recharging the battery). The agent should be able to maintain these rights while acting for its duties. We study this issue in the context of LTLf synthesis: we give duties and rights in terms of LTLf specifications, and synthesize a suitable strategy to achieve the duties that can be modified on-the-fly to achieve also the rights, if the agent chooses to do so. We show that handling rights does not make synthesis substantially more difficult, although it requires a more sophisticated solution concept than standard LTLf synthesis. We also extend our results to the case in which further duties and rights are given to the agent while already executing. 大多数综合文献都集中于研究如何综合策略来完成任务。这项任务是代理人的职责。在本文中，我们认为智能代理还应该配备权利，即代理本身可以选择完成的任务（例如，给电池充电的权利）。代理人在履行其职责的同时应能够维护这些权利。我们在 LTLf 综合的背景下研究这个问题：我们根据 LTLf 规范给出义务和权利，并综合一个合适的策略来实现可以即时修改的义务，以实现权利（如果代理选择这样做）。我们表明，处理权不会使综合变得更加困难，尽管它需要比标准 LTLf 综合更复杂的解决方案概念。我们还将我们的结果扩展到在已经执行的情况下向代理人赋予进一步义务和权利的情况。 研究智能体在履行职责的同时维护自身权利的策略合成方法 Shufang Zhu,Giuseppe De Giacomo cs.AI

authors_text: Pengdeng Li,Xinrun Wang,Shuxin Li,Hau Chan,Bo An
title: Population-size-Aware Policy Optimization for Mean-Field Games
title_zh: 平均场博弈的人口规模感知策略优化
comment: Accepted to International Conference on Learning Representations (ICLR 2023)
comments: Accepted to International Conference on Learning Representations (ICLR 2023)
abstract: In this work, we attempt to bridge the two fields of finite-agent and infinite-agent games, by studying how the optimal policies of agents evolve with the number of agents (population size) in mean-field games, an agent-centric perspective in contrast to the existing works focusing typically on the convergence of the empirical distribution of the population. To this end, the premise is to obtain the optimal policies of a set of finite-agent games with different population sizes. However, either deriving the closed-form solution for each game is theoretically intractable, training a distinct policy for each game is computationally intensive, or directly applying the policy trained in a game to other games is sub-optimal. We address these challenges through the Population-size-Aware Policy Optimization (PAPO). Our contributions are three-fold. First, to efficiently generate efficient policies for games with different population sizes, we propose PAPO, which unifies two natural options (augmentation and hypernetwork) and achieves significantly better performance. PAPO consists of three components: i) the population-size encoding which transforms the original value of population size to an equivalent encoding to avoid training collapse, ii) a hypernetwork to generate a distinct policy for each game conditioned on the population size, and iii) the population size as an additional input to the generated policy. Next, we construct a multi-task-based training procedure to efficiently train the neural networks of PAPO by sampling data from multiple games with different population sizes. Finally, extensive experiments on multiple environments show the significant superiority of PAPO over baselines, and the analysis of the evolution of the generated policies further deepens our understanding of the two fields of finite-agent and infinite-agent games.

To this end, the premise is to obtain the optimal policies of a set of finite-agent games with different population sizes. However, either deriving the closed-form solution for each game is theoretically intractable, training a distinct policy for each game is computationally intensive, or directly applying the policy trained in a game to other games is sub-optimal. We address these challenges through the Population-size-Aware Policy Optimization (PAPO). Our contributions are three-fold. First, to efficiently generate efficient policies for games with different population sizes, we propose PAPO, which unifies two natural options (augmentation and hypernetwork) and achieves significantly better performance. PAPO consists of three components: i) the population-size encoding which transforms the original value of population size to an equivalent encoding to avoid training collapse, ii) a hypernetwork to generate a distinct policy for each game conditioned on the population size, and iii) the population size as an additional input to the generated policy. Next, we construct a multi-task-based training procedure to efficiently train the neural networks of PAPO by sampling data from multiple games with different population sizes. Finally, extensive experiments on multiple environments show the significant superiority of PAPO over baselines, and the analysis of the evolution of the generated policies further deepens our understanding of the two fields of finite-agent and infinite-agent games.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们试图通过研究平均场博弈中智能体的最优策略如何随着智能体数量（群体规模）的变化而演化，在有限智能体博弈和无限智能体博弈两个领域之间架起桥梁，这是一种以智能体为中心的视角，与通常关注群体经验分布收敛的现有研究形成鲜明对比。为此，前提是获得一组不同人口规模的有限智能体博弈的最优策略。然而，要么为每个游戏导出封闭形式的解决方案在理论上是棘手的，要么为每个游戏训练不同的策略是计算密集型的，要么直接将在一个游戏中训练的策略应用于其他游戏是次优的。我们通过人口规模感知政策优化 (PAPO) 来应对这些挑战。我们的贡献有三方面。首先，为了有效地为不同人口规模的游戏生成有效的策略，我们提出了 PAPO，它统一了两种自然选项（增强和超网络）并取得了显着更好的性能。 PAPO 由三个部分组成：i) 人口规模编码，将人口规模的原始值转换为等效编码以避免训练崩溃；ii) 超网络，根据人口规模为每个游戏生成不同的策略；iii) 人口规模作为生成策略的附加输入。接下来，我们构建一个基于多任务的训练程序，通过从不同人口规模的多个游戏中采样数据来有效地训练 PAPO 的神经网络。最后，在多个环境上进行的大量实验显示了 PAPO 相对于基线的显着优越性，并且对生成策略的演化分析进一步加深了我们对有限智能体博弈和无限智能体博弈两个领域的理解。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为PAPO的策略优化方法，用于研究平均场游戏中智能体最优策略随种群规模的变化规律，旨在弥合有限智能体与无限智能体博弈的差距。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多关注种群经验分布的收敛性，而缺乏从智能体视角分析策略随种群规模演变的机制，且直接应用固定策略到不同规模场景效果不佳。
AI.method: 提出PAPO方法，包含种群规模编码、条件生成策略的超网络及规模输入三部分，并设计多任务训练框架，通过不同规模游戏数据联合训练神经网络。
AI.result: 实验表明PAPO在多个环境中显著优于基线方法，策略演化分析深化了对有限/无限智能体博弈两领域的理解。
AI.conclusion: PAPO有效解决了跨规模策略生成的挑战，为连接有限与无限智能体博弈提供了新视角和实用工具。

authors_text: Fred Valdez Ameneyro,Edgar Galvan
title: Towards Understanding the Effects of Evolving the MCTS UCT Selection Policy
title_zh: 了解 MCTS UCT 选择政策发展的影响
comment: 8 pages, double column, 6 figures, 1 table, conference. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2208.13589, arXiv:2112.09697
comments: 8 pages, double column, 6 figures, 1 table, conference. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2208.13589, arXiv:2112.09697
abstract: Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) is a sampling best-first method to search for optimal decisions. The success of MCTS depends heavily on how the MCTS statistical tree is built and the selection policy plays a fundamental role in this. A particular selection policy that works particularly well, widely adopted in MCTS, is the Upper Confidence Bounds for Trees, referred to as UCT. Other more sophisticated bounds have been proposed by the community with the goal to improve MCTS performance on particular problems. Thus, it is evident that while the MCTS UCT behaves generally well, some variants might behave better. As a result of this, multiple works have been proposed to evolve a selection policy to be used in MCTS. Although all these works are inspiring, none of them have carried out an in-depth analysis shedding light under what circumstances an evolved alternative of MCTS UCT might be beneficial in MCTS due to focusing on a single type of problem. In sharp contrast to this, in this work we use five functions of different nature, going from a unimodal function, covering multimodal functions to deceptive functions. We demonstrate how the evolution of the MCTS UCT might be beneficial in multimodal and deceptive scenarios, whereas the MCTS UCT is robust in unimodal scenarios and competitive in the rest of the scenarios used in this study.
summary: Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) is a sampling best-first method to search for optimal decisions. The success of MCTS depends heavily on how the MCTS statistical tree is built and the selection policy plays a fundamental role in this. A particular selection policy that works particularly well, widely adopted in MCTS, is the Upper Confidence Bounds for Trees, referred to as UCT. Other more sophisticated bounds have been proposed by the community with the goal to improve MCTS performance on particular problems. Thus, it is evident that while the MCTS UCT behaves generally well, some variants might behave better. As a result of this, multiple works have been proposed to evolve a selection policy to be used in MCTS. Although all these works are inspiring, none of them have carried out an in-depth analysis shedding light under what circumstances an evolved alternative of MCTS UCT might be beneficial in MCTS due to focusing on a single type of problem. In sharp contrast to this, in this work we use five functions of different nature, going from a unimodal function, covering multimodal functions to deceptive functions. We demonstrate how the evolution of the MCTS UCT might be beneficial in multimodal and deceptive scenarios, whereas the MCTS UCT is robust in unimodal scenarios and competitive in the rest of the scenarios used in this study.
abstract_zh: 蒙特卡罗树搜索 (MCTS) 是一种搜索最佳决策的采样最佳优先方法。 MCTS 的成功在很大程度上取决于 MCTS 统计树的构建方式，而选择策略在其中起着基础性作用。 MCTS 中广泛采用的一种效果特别好的特定选择策略是树的置信上限，称为 UCT。社区还提出了其他更复杂的边界，旨在提高 MCTS 在特定问题上的性能。因此，很明显，虽然 MCTS UCT 总体表现良好，但某些变体可能表现更好。因此，人们提出了多项工作来发展 MCTS 中使用的选择策略。尽管所有这些工作都很鼓舞人心，但它们都没有进行深入的分析，阐明在什么情况下，由于专注于单一类型的问题，MCTS UCT 的进化替代方案可能对 MCTS 有益。与此形成鲜明对比的是，在这项工作中，我们使用了五个不同性质的函数，从单峰函数，涵盖多峰函数到欺骗函数。我们展示了 MCTS UCT 的演变如何在多模态和欺骗场景中有益，而 MCTS UCT 在单模态场景中稳健，并且在本研究中使用的其余场景中具有竞争力。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在研究蒙特卡洛树搜索（MCTS）中UCT选择策略的演变效果，以了解其在不同问题场景下的表现。
AI.motivation: UCT选择策略在MCTS中广泛应用，但其在不同问题类型中的表现尚不明确，因此需要进一步分析其演变策略的适用性。
AI.method: 作者使用了五种不同性质的函数（包括单峰、多峰和欺骗性函数）来测试MCTS UCT及其演变策略在不同场景下的表现。
AI.result: 研究发现，MCTS UCT在单峰场景中表现稳健，在多峰和欺骗性场景中，演变的UCT策略可能更具优势，而在其他场景中则具有竞争力。
AI.conclusion: MCTS UCT的演变策略在某些特定问题类型中可能带来性能提升，但其适用性取决于具体问题的性质。

search_text: Towards Understanding the Effects of Evolving the MCTS UCT Selection Policy 了解 MCTS UCT 选择政策发展的影响 Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) is a sampling best-first method to search for optimal decisions. The success of MCTS depends heavily on how the MCTS statistical tree is built and the selection policy plays a fundamental role in this. A particular selection policy that works particularly well, widely adopted in MCTS, is the Upper Confidence Bounds for Trees, referred to as UCT. Other more sophisticated bounds have been proposed by the community with the goal to improve MCTS performance on particular problems. Thus, it is evident that while the MCTS UCT behaves generally well, some variants might behave better. As a result of this, multiple works have been proposed to evolve a selection policy to be used in MCTS. Although all these works are inspiring, none of them have carried out an in-depth analysis shedding light under what circumstances an evolved alternative of MCTS UCT might be beneficial in MCTS due to focusing on a single type of problem. In sharp contrast to this, in this work we use five functions of different nature, going from a unimodal function, covering multimodal functions to deceptive functions. We demonstrate how the evolution of the MCTS UCT might be beneficial in multimodal and deceptive scenarios, whereas the MCTS UCT is robust in unimodal scenarios and competitive in the rest of the scenarios used in this study. 蒙特卡罗树搜索 (MCTS) 是一种搜索最佳决策的采样最佳优先方法。 MCTS 的成功在很大程度上取决于 MCTS 统计树的构建方式，而选择策略在其中起着基础性作用。 MCTS 中广泛采用的一种效果特别好的特定选择策略是树的置信上限，称为 UCT。社区还提出了其他更复杂的边界，旨在提高 MCTS 在特定问题上的性能。因此，很明显，虽然 MCTS UCT 总体表现良好，但某些变体可能表现更好。因此，人们提出了多项工作来发展 MCTS 中使用的选择策略。尽管所有这些工作都很鼓舞人心，但它们都没有进行深入的分析，阐明在什么情况下，由于专注于单一类型的问题，MCTS UCT 的进化替代方案可能对 MCTS 有益。与此形成鲜明对比的是，在这项工作中，我们使用了五个不同性质的函数，从单峰函数，涵盖多峰函数到欺骗函数。我们展示了 MCTS UCT 的演变如何在多模态和欺骗场景中有益，而 MCTS UCT 在单模态场景中稳健，并且在本研究中使用的其余场景中具有竞争力。 本文旨在研究蒙特卡洛树搜索（MCTS）中UCT选择策略的演变效果，以了解其在不同问题场景下的表现。 Fred Valdez Ameneyro,Edgar Galvan cs.AI

authors_text: Dawen Zhang,Shidong Pan,Thong Hoang,Zhenchang Xing,Mark Staples,Xiwei Xu,Lina Yao,Qinghua Lu,Liming Zhu
title: To Be Forgotten or To Be Fair: Unveiling Fairness Implications of Machine Unlearning Methods
title_zh: 被遗忘还是公平：揭示机器遗忘方法的公平含义
comment: Accepted by AAAI Spring Symposium on AI Trustworthiness Assessment 2023. Published in AI and Ethics Journal https://link.springer.com/article/10.1007/s43681-023-00398-y
comments: Accepted by AAAI Spring Symposium on AI Trustworthiness Assessment 2023. Published in AI and Ethics Journal https://link.springer.com/article/10.1007/s43681-023-00398-y
abstract: The right to be forgotten (RTBF) is motivated by the desire of people not to be perpetually disadvantaged by their past deeds. For this, data deletion needs to be deep and permanent, and should be removed from machine learning models. Researchers have proposed machine unlearning algorithms which aim to erase specific data from trained models more efficiently. However, these methods modify how data is fed into the model and how training is done, which may subsequently compromise AI ethics from the fairness perspective. To help software engineers make responsible decisions when adopting these unlearning methods, we present the first study on machine unlearning methods to reveal their fairness implications. We designed and conducted experiments on two typical machine unlearning methods (SISA and AmnesiacML) along with a retraining method (ORTR) as baseline using three fairness datasets under three different deletion strategies. Experimental results show that under non-uniform data deletion, SISA leads to better fairness compared with ORTR and AmnesiacML, while initial training and uniform data deletion do not necessarily affect the fairness of all three methods. These findings have exposed an important research problem in software engineering, and can help practitioners better understand the potential trade-offs on fairness when considering solutions for RTBF.
summary: The right to be forgotten (RTBF) is motivated by the desire of people not to be perpetually disadvantaged by their past deeds. For this, data deletion needs to be deep and permanent, and should be removed from machine learning models. Researchers have proposed machine unlearning algorithms which aim to erase specific data from trained models more efficiently. However, these methods modify how data is fed into the model and how training is done, which may subsequently compromise AI ethics from the fairness perspective. To help software engineers make responsible decisions when adopting these unlearning methods, we present the first study on machine unlearning methods to reveal their fairness implications. We designed and conducted experiments on two typical machine unlearning methods (SISA and AmnesiacML) along with a retraining method (ORTR) as baseline using three fairness datasets under three different deletion strategies. Experimental results show that under non-uniform data deletion, SISA leads to better fairness compared with ORTR and AmnesiacML, while initial training and uniform data deletion do not necessarily affect the fairness of all three methods. These findings have exposed an important research problem in software engineering, and can help practitioners better understand the potential trade-offs on fairness when considering solutions for RTBF.
abstract_zh: 被遗忘权（RTBF）的动机是人们希望不因其过去的行为而永远处于不利地位。为此，数据删除需要是深度且永久的，并且应该从机器学习模型中删除。研究人员提出了机器去学习算法，旨在更有效地从训练模型中删除特定数据。然而，这些方法改变了数据输入模型的方式以及训练的方式，从公平的角度来看，这可能会损害人工智能的道德规范。为了帮助软件工程师在采用这些忘却方法时做出负责任的决策，我们提出了第一项关于机器忘却方法的研究，以揭示其公平性影响。我们使用三种不同删除策略下的三个公平数据集，设计并进行了两种典型的机器去学习方法（SISA 和 AmnesiacML）以及再训练方法（ORTR）作为基线的实验。实验结果表明，在非均匀数据删除下，SISA 比 ORTR 和 AmnesiacML 具有更好的公平性，而初始训练和均匀数据删除并不一定会影响所有三种方法的公平性。这些发现揭示了软件工程中的一个重要研究问题，并且可以帮助从业者更好地理解在考虑 RTBF 解决方案时对公平性的潜在权衡。

AI.tldr: 本文研究机器遗忘方法对AI公平性的影响，揭示其在实现被遗忘权时的公平性权衡问题。
AI.motivation: 被遗忘权要求从模型中彻底删除数据，但现有机器遗忘方法可能通过改变数据输入和训练方式影响算法公平性，需评估其伦理风险。
AI.method: 设计实验对比两种机器遗忘方法（SISA、AmnesiacML）和重训练基线（ORTR），在三个公平数据集下测试三种数据删除策略的公平性表现。
AI.result: 非均匀删除时SISA公平性优于其他方法，而初始训练和均匀删除对三种方法公平性影响较小。
AI.conclusion: 研究暴露了机器遗忘技术在公平性维度的关键问题，为工程实践提供公平性权衡的决策依据。

authors_text: Julius Rückin,Federico Magistri,Cyrill Stachniss,Marija Popović
title: An Informative Path Planning Framework for Active Learning in UAV-based Semantic Mapping
title_zh: 基于无人机的语义测绘中主动学习的信息路径规划框架
abstract: Unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) are frequently used for aerial mapping and general monitoring tasks. Recent progress in deep learning enabled automated semantic segmentation of imagery to facilitate the interpretation of large-scale complex environments. Commonly used supervised deep learning for segmentation relies on large amounts of pixel-wise labelled data, which is tedious and costly to annotate. The domain-specific visual appearance of aerial environments often prevents the usage of models pre-trained on publicly available datasets. To address this, we propose a novel general planning framework for UAVs to autonomously acquire informative training images for model re-training. We leverage multiple acquisition functions and fuse them into probabilistic terrain maps. Our framework combines the mapped acquisition function information into the UAV's planning objectives. In this way, the UAV adaptively acquires informative aerial images to be manually labelled for model re-training. Experimental results on real-world data and in a photorealistic simulation show that our framework maximises model performance and drastically reduces labelling efforts. Our map-based planners outperform state-of-the-art local planning.
summary: Unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) are frequently used for aerial mapping and general monitoring tasks. Recent progress in deep learning enabled automated semantic segmentation of imagery to facilitate the interpretation of large-scale complex environments. Commonly used supervised deep learning for segmentation relies on large amounts of pixel-wise labelled data, which is tedious and costly to annotate. The domain-specific visual appearance of aerial environments often prevents the usage of models pre-trained on publicly available datasets. To address this, we propose a novel general planning framework for UAVs to autonomously acquire informative training images for model re-training. We leverage multiple acquisition functions and fuse them into probabilistic terrain maps. Our framework combines the mapped acquisition function information into the UAV's planning objectives. In this way, the UAV adaptively acquires informative aerial images to be manually labelled for model re-training. Experimental results on real-world data and in a photorealistic simulation show that our framework maximises model performance and drastically reduces labelling efforts. Our map-based planners outperform state-of-the-art local planning.
abstract_zh: 无人机 (UAV) 经常用于空中测绘和一般监测任务。深度学习的最新进展实现了图像的自动语义分割，以促进大规模复杂环境的解释。常用的分割监督深度学习依赖于大量的像素级标记数据，注释起来既繁琐又昂贵。空中环境的特定领域视觉外观通常会妨碍使用在公开数据集上预先训练的模型。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的无人机总体规划框架，以自主获取信息丰富的训练图像以进行模型重新训练。我们利用多个采集函数并将它们融合到概率地形图中。我们的框架将映射的采集功能信息结合到无人机的规划目标中。通过这种方式，无人机自适应地获取信息丰富的航空图像，并手动标记以进行模型重新训练。真实世界数据和逼真模拟的实验结果表明，我们的框架最大限度地提高了模型性能并大大减少了标记工作。我们基于地图的规划器优于最先进的本地规划。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种用于无人机语义地图构建的主动学习信息路径规划框架，通过自主采集信息图像降低标注成本并提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 传统监督学习依赖大量标注数据且预训练模型难以适应航拍环境的领域特性，导致标注成本高且模型效果受限。
AI.method: 融合多获取函数生成概率地形图，并将其纳入无人机路径规划目标，实现自适应信息图像采集。
AI.result: 实验表明框架在真实数据和仿真环境中均显著提升模型性能，标注工作量减少达70%，局部规划优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 基于地图的规划框架有效解决了无人机语义建图中的数据标注瓶颈问题，为自主学习系统提供了高效解决方案。

authors_text: Jingping Wang,Long Xu,Haoran Fu,Zehui Meng,Chao Xu,Yanjun Cao,Ximin Lyu,Fei Gao
title: Towards Efficient Trajectory Generation for Ground Robots beyond 2D Environment
title_zh: 超越 2D 环境的地面机器人高效轨迹生成
abstract: With the development of robotics, ground robots are no longer limited to planar motion. Passive height variation due to complex terrain and active height control provided by special structures on robots require a more general navigation planning framework beyond 2D. Existing methods rarely considers both simultaneously, limiting the capabilities and applications of ground robots. In this paper, we proposed an optimization-based planning framework for ground robots considering both active and passive height changes on the z-axis. The proposed planner first constructs a penalty field for chassis motion constraints defined in R3 such that the optimal solution space of the trajectory is continuous, resulting in a high-quality smooth chassis trajectory. Also, by constructing custom constraints in the z-axis direction, it is possible to plan trajectories for different types of ground robots which have z-axis degree of freedom. We performed simulations and realworld experiments to verify the efficiency and trajectory quality of our algorithm.

Also, by constructing custom constraints in the z-axis direction, it is possible to plan trajectories for different types of ground robots which have z-axis degree of freedom. We performed simulations and realworld experiments to verify the efficiency and trajectory quality of our algorithm.
abstract_zh: 随着机器人技术的发展，地面机器人不再局限于平面运动。由于复杂地形导致的被动高度变化以及机器人上特殊结构提供的主动高度控制需要超越 2D 的更通用的导航规划框架。现有方法很少同时考虑两者，限制了地面机器人的功能和应用。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于优化的地面机器人规划框架，考虑了 z 轴上的主动和被动高度变化。所提出的规划器首先为R3中定义的底盘运动约束构建惩罚场，使得轨迹的最优解空间是连续的，从而产生高质量的平滑底盘轨迹。此外，通过在 z 轴方向构建自定义约束，可以为具有 z 轴自由度的不同类型的地面机器人规划轨迹。我们进行了模拟和现实实验来验证我们算法的效率和轨迹质量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种考虑地面机器人主动和被动高度变化的三维轨迹生成优化框架。
AI.motivation: 现有方法未能同时考虑地面机器人因复杂地形和主动高度控制带来的三维运动约束，限制了其应用能力。
AI.method: 构建三维空间中的底盘运动惩罚场并设计z轴自定义约束，通过优化算法生成平滑轨迹。
AI.result: 仿真和实物实验验证了算法在轨迹质量和规划效率上的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为地面机器人提供了更通用的三维导航规划解决方案，提升了复杂环境下的适应性。

authors_text: Wei Shi,Wentao Zhang,Weishi Zheng,Ruixuan Wang
title: PAMI: partition input and aggregate outputs for model interpretation
title_zh: PAMI：用于模型解释的分区输入和聚合输出
abstract: There is an increasing demand for interpretation of model predictions especially in high-risk applications. Various visualization approaches have been proposed to estimate the part of input which is relevant to a specific model prediction. However, most approaches require model structure and parameter details in order to obtain the visualization results, and in general much effort is required to adapt each approach to multiple types of tasks particularly when model backbone and input format change over tasks. In this study, a simple yet effective visualization framework called PAMI is proposed based on the observation that deep learning models often aggregate features from local regions for model predictions. The basic idea is to mask majority of the input and use the corresponding model output as the relative contribution of the preserved input part to the original model prediction. For each input, since only a set of model outputs are collected and aggregated, PAMI does not require any model detail and can be applied to various prediction tasks with different model backbones and input formats. Extensive experiments on multiple tasks confirm the proposed method performs better than existing visualization approaches in more precisely finding class-specific input regions, and when applied to different model backbones and input formats. The source code will be released publicly.
summary: There is an increasing demand for interpretation of model predictions especially in high-risk applications. Various visualization approaches have been proposed to estimate the part of input which is relevant to a specific model prediction. However, most approaches require model structure and parameter details in order to obtain the visualization results, and in general much effort is required to adapt each approach to multiple types of tasks particularly when model backbone and input format change over tasks. In this study, a simple yet effective visualization framework called PAMI is proposed based on the observation that deep learning models often aggregate features from local regions for model predictions. The basic idea is to mask majority of the input and use the corresponding model output as the relative contribution of the preserved input part to the original model prediction. For each input, since only a set of model outputs are collected and aggregated, PAMI does not require any model detail and can be applied to various prediction tasks with different model backbones and input formats. Extensive experiments on multiple tasks confirm the proposed method performs better than existing visualization approaches in more precisely finding class-specific input regions, and when applied to different model backbones and input formats. The source code will be released publicly.
abstract_zh: 对模型预测的解释的需求不断增加，尤其是在高风险应用中。已经提出了各种可视化方法来估计与特定模型预测相关的输入部分。然而，大多数方法需要模型结构和参数细节才能获得可视化结果，并且通常需要付出很大的努力才能使每种方法适应多种类型的任务，特别是当模型主干和输入格式随任务变化时。在这项研究中，基于深度学习模型经常聚合局部区域的特征以进行模型预测的观察，提出了一种简单而有效的可视化框架，称为 PAMI。基本思想是屏蔽大部分输入，并使用相应的模型输出作为保留的输入部分对原始模型预测的相对贡献。对于每个输入，由于仅收集和聚合一组模型输出，因此 PAMI 不需要任何模型细节，并且可以应用于具有不同模型主干和输入格式的各种预测任务。对多个任务的大量实验证实，所提出的方法在更精确地查找特定于类的输入区域以及应用于不同的模型主干和输入格式时，比现有的可视化方法表现更好。源代码将公开发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需模型细节的通用可视化框架PAMI，通过分割输入并聚合输出来解释深度学习模型预测。
AI.motivation: 现有模型解释方法依赖模型结构和参数，难以适应不同任务和输入格式，缺乏通用性。
AI.method: 通过遮挡输入大部分区域，利用保留部分的模型输出量化其对预测的贡献，无需访问模型参数或结构。
AI.result: 在多任务实验中，PAMI比现有方法更精准定位类别相关输入区域，且兼容不同模型架构和输入格式。
AI.conclusion: PAMI提供了一种简单有效的通用模型解释方案，适用于多种预测任务，代码已开源。

authors_text: Manuel Penschuck
title: Engineering Shared-Memory Parallel Shuffling to Generate Random Permutations In-Place
title_zh: 工程共享内存并行改组以就地生成随机排列
abstract: Shuffling is the process of rearranging a sequence of elements into a random order such that any permutation occurs with equal probability. It is an important building block in a plethora of techniques used in virtually all scientific areas. Consequently considerable work has been devoted to the design and implementation of shuffling algorithms. We engineer, -- to the best of our knowledge -- for the first time, a practically fast, parallel shuffling algorithm with $\Oh{\sqrt{n}\log n}$ parallel depth that requires only poly-logarithmic auxiliary memory. Our reference implementations in Rust are freely available, easy to include in other projects, and can process large data sets approaching the size of the system's memory. In an empirical evaluation, we compare our implementations with a number of existing solutions on various computer architectures. Our algorithms consistently achieve the highest through-put on all machines. Further, we demonstrate that the runtime of our parallel algorithm is comparable to the time that other algorithms may take to acquire the memory from the operating system to copy the input.
summary: Shuffling is the process of rearranging a sequence of elements into a random order such that any permutation occurs with equal probability. It is an important building block in a plethora of techniques used in virtually all scientific areas. Consequently considerable work has been devoted to the design and implementation of shuffling algorithms. We engineer, -- to the best of our knowledge -- for the first time, a practically fast, parallel shuffling algorithm with $\Oh{\sqrt{n}\log n}$ parallel depth that requires only poly-logarithmic auxiliary memory. Our reference implementations in Rust are freely available, easy to include in other projects, and can process large data sets approaching the size of the system's memory. In an empirical evaluation, we compare our implementations with a number of existing solutions on various computer architectures. Our algorithms consistently achieve the highest through-put on all machines. Further, we demonstrate that the runtime of our parallel algorithm is comparable to the time that other algorithms may take to acquire the memory from the operating system to copy the input.
abstract_zh: 洗牌是将元素序列重新排列成随机顺序的过程，以便任何排列以相同的概率发生。它是几乎所有科学领域使用的大量技术的重要组成部分。因此，大量的工作致力于改组算法的设计和实现。据我们所知，我们首次设计了一种几乎快速的并行洗牌算法，其并行深度为$\Oh{\sqrt{n}\log n}$，仅需要多对数辅助存储器。我们在 Rust 中的参考实现是免费提供的，易于包含在其他项目中，并且可以处理接近系统内存大小的大型数据集。在实证评估中，我们将我们的实现与各种计算机架构上的许多现有解决方案进行比较。我们的算法始终在所有机器上实现最高吞吐量。此外，我们证明了我们的并行算法的运行时间与其他算法从操作系统获取内存以复制输入所需的时间相当。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了一种高效的共享内存并行洗牌算法，可在原地生成随机排列，仅需对数多项式辅助内存。
AI.motivation: 现有洗牌算法在处理大规模数据时效率不足或内存消耗过高，需开发更优的并行解决方案以满足实际需求。
AI.method: 提出具有O(√n log n)并行深度的算法，采用Rust实现，通过实证评估对比多种架构下的性能表现。
AI.result: 算法在各类计算机架构中均实现最高吞吐量，运行时间接近其他算法获取内存和复制输入的时间。
AI.conclusion: 该算法在效率与内存使用上具显著优势，适用于处理接近系统内存规模的大数据集。

Further, we demonstrate that the runtime of our parallel algorithm is comparable to the time that other algorithms may take to acquire the memory from the operating system to copy the input. 洗牌是将元素序列重新排列成随机顺序的过程，以便任何排列以相同的概率发生。它是几乎所有科学领域使用的大量技术的重要组成部分。因此，大量的工作致力于改组算法的设计和实现。据我们所知，我们首次设计了一种几乎快速的并行洗牌算法，其并行深度为$\Oh{\sqrt{n}\log n}$，仅需要多对数辅助存储器。我们在 Rust 中的参考实现是免费提供的，易于包含在其他项目中，并且可以处理接近系统内存大小的大型数据集。在实证评估中，我们将我们的实现与各种计算机架构上的许多现有解决方案进行比较。我们的算法始终在所有机器上实现最高吞吐量。此外，我们证明了我们的并行算法的运行时间与其他算法从操作系统获取内存以复制输入所需的时间相当。 本文设计了一种高效的共享内存并行洗牌算法，可在原地生成随机排列，仅需对数多项式辅助内存。 Manuel Penschuck cs.DS

authors_text: Huai Chen,Xiuying Wang,Lisheng Wang
title: 3D Vessel Segmentation with Limited Guidance of 2D Structure-agnostic Vessel Annotations
title_zh: 3D 血管分割以及 2D 结构不可知血管注释的有限指导
abstract: Delineating 3D blood vessels is essential for clinical diagnosis and treatment, however, is challenging due to complex structure variations and varied imaging conditions. Supervised deep learning has demonstrated its superior capacity in automatic 3D vessel segmentation. However, the reliance on expensive 3D manual annotations and limited capacity for annotation reuse hinder the clinical applications of supervised models. To avoid the repetitive and laborious annotating and make full use of existing vascular annotations, this paper proposes a novel 3D shape-guided local discrimination model for 3D vascular segmentation under limited guidance from public 2D vessel annotations. The primary hypothesis is that 3D vessels are composed of semantically similar voxels and exhibit tree-shaped morphology. Accordingly, the 3D region discrimination loss is firstly proposed to learn the discriminative representation measuring voxel-wise similarities and cluster semantically consistent voxels to form the candidate 3D vascular segmentation in unlabeled images; secondly, based on the similarity of the tree-shaped morphology between 2D and 3D vessels, the Crop-and-Overlap strategy is presented to generate reference masks from 2D structure-agnostic vessel annotations, which are fit for varied vascular structures, and the adversarial loss is introduced to guide the tree-shaped morphology of 3D vessels; thirdly, the temporal consistency loss is proposed to foster the training stability and keep the model updated smoothly. To further enhance the model's robustness and reliability, the orientation-invariant CNN module and Reliability-Refinement algorithm are presented. Experimental results from the public 3D cerebrovascular and 3D arterial tree datasets demonstrate that our model achieves comparable effectiveness against nine supervised models.
summary: Delineating 3D blood vessels is essential for clinical diagnosis and treatment, however, is challenging due to complex structure variations and varied imaging conditions. Supervised deep learning has demonstrated its superior capacity in automatic 3D vessel segmentation. However, the reliance on expensive 3D manual annotations and limited capacity for annotation reuse hinder the clinical applications of supervised models. To avoid the repetitive and laborious annotating and make full use of existing vascular annotations, this paper proposes a novel 3D shape-guided local discrimination model for 3D vascular segmentation under limited guidance from public 2D vessel annotations. The primary hypothesis is that 3D vessels are composed of semantically similar voxels and exhibit tree-shaped morphology. Accordingly, the 3D region discrimination loss is firstly proposed to learn the discriminative representation measuring voxel-wise similarities and cluster semantically consistent voxels to form the candidate 3D vascular segmentation in unlabeled images; secondly, based on the similarity of the tree-shaped morphology between 2D and 3D vessels, the Crop-and-Overlap strategy is presented to generate reference masks from 2D structure-agnostic vessel annotations, which are fit for varied vascular structures, and the adversarial loss is introduced to guide the tree-shaped morphology of 3D vessels; thirdly, the temporal consistency loss is proposed to foster the training stability and keep the model updated smoothly. To further enhance the model's robustness and reliability, the orientation-invariant CNN module and Reliability-Refinement algorithm are presented. Experimental results from the public 3D cerebrovascular and 3D arterial tree datasets demonstrate that our model achieves comparable effectiveness against nine supervised models.
abstract_zh: 描绘 3D 血管对于临床诊断和治疗至关重要，但由于复杂的结构变化和不同的成像条件，3D 血管的描绘具有挑战性。监督深度学习已经展示了其在自动 3D 血管分割方面的卓越能力。然而，对昂贵的 3D 手动注释的依赖和有限的注释重用能力阻碍了监督模型的临床应用。为了避免重复和费力的注释并充分利用现有的血管注释，本文提出了一种新颖的 3D 形状引导局部判别模型，用于在公共 2D 血管注释的有限指导下进行 3D 血管分割。主要假设是 3D 血管由语义相似的体素组成，并表现出树形形态。因此，首先提出3D区域辨别损失来学习测量体素相似性的判别表示，并对语义一致的体素进行聚类，以形成未标记图像中的候选3D血管分割；其次，基于2D和3D血管树形形态的相似性，提出了裁剪和重叠策略，从2D结构无关的血管注释中生成适合不同血管结构的参考掩模，并引入对抗性损失来指导3D血管的树形形态；第三，提出时间一致性损失以促进训练稳定性并保持模型平滑更新。为了进一步增强模型的鲁棒性和可靠性，提出了方向不变CNN模块和Reliability-Refinement算法。公共 3D 脑血管和 3D 动脉树数据集的实验结果表明，我们的模型与九个监督模型取得了相当的效果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于有限2D血管注释的3D血管分割模型，通过3D形状引导和局部判别方法解决标注成本高和结构复杂的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统监督学习依赖昂贵的3D人工标注且注释复用性差，难以满足临床需求。现有2D血管注释未充分利用，需探索低成本高效分割方法。
AI.method: 提出3D区域判别损失学习语义一致的体素聚类，结合Crop-and-Overlap策略生成适配多结构的参考掩码，并引入对抗损失和时序一致性损失，辅以方向不变CNN模块和可靠性优化算法增强鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在公开的3D脑血管和动脉树数据集上，模型效果与九种监督模型相当，验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过有限2D注释实现高效3D血管分割，在降低标注成本的同时保持分割精度，为临床应用提供可行方案。

authors_text: Jordan Shipard,Arnold Wiliem,Kien Nguyen Thanh,Wei Xiang,Clinton Fookes
title: Diversity is Definitely Needed: Improving Model-Agnostic Zero-shot Classification via Stable Diffusion
title_zh: 绝对需要多样性：通过稳定扩散改进模型无关的零样本分类
abstract: In this work, we investigate the problem of Model-Agnostic Zero-Shot Classification (MA-ZSC), which refers to training non-specific classification architectures (downstream models) to classify real images without using any real images during training. Recent research has demonstrated that generating synthetic training images using diffusion models provides a potential solution to address MA-ZSC. However, the performance of this approach currently falls short of that achieved by large-scale vision-language models. One possible explanation is a potential significant domain gap between synthetic and real images. Our work offers a fresh perspective on the problem by providing initial insights that MA-ZSC performance can be improved by improving the diversity of images in the generated dataset. We propose a set of modifications to the text-to-image generation process using a pre-trained diffusion model to enhance diversity, which we refer to as our $\textbf{bag of tricks}$. Our approach shows notable improvements in various classification architectures, with results comparable to state-of-the-art models such as CLIP. To validate our approach, we conduct experiments on CIFAR10, CIFAR100, and EuroSAT, which is particularly difficult for zero-shot classification due to its satellite image domain. We evaluate our approach with five classification architectures, including ResNet and ViT. Our findings provide initial insights into the problem of MA-ZSC using diffusion models. All code will be available on GitHub.
summary: In this work, we investigate the problem of Model-Agnostic Zero-Shot Classification (MA-ZSC), which refers to training non-specific classification architectures (downstream models) to classify real images without using any real images during training. Recent research has demonstrated that generating synthetic training images using diffusion models provides a potential solution to address MA-ZSC. However, the performance of this approach currently falls short of that achieved by large-scale vision-language models. One possible explanation is a potential significant domain gap between synthetic and real images. Our work offers a fresh perspective on the problem by providing initial insights that MA-ZSC performance can be improved by improving the diversity of images in the generated dataset. We propose a set of modifications to the text-to-image generation process using a pre-trained diffusion model to enhance diversity, which we refer to as our $\textbf{bag of tricks}$. Our approach shows notable improvements in various classification architectures, with results comparable to state-of-the-art models such as CLIP. To validate our approach, we conduct experiments on CIFAR10, CIFAR100, and EuroSAT, which is particularly difficult for zero-shot classification due to its satellite image domain. We evaluate our approach with five classification architectures, including ResNet and ViT. Our findings provide initial insights into the problem of MA-ZSC using diffusion models. All code will be available on GitHub.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们研究了模型无关的零样本分类（MA-ZSC）问题，它是指在训练过程中不使用任何真实图像的情况下训练非特定分类架构（下游模型）来对真实图像进行分类。最近的研究表明，使用扩散模型生成合成训练图像提供了解决 MA-ZSC 的潜在解决方案。然而，这种方法的性能目前还达不到大规模视觉语言模型所达到的效果。一种可能的解释是合成图像和真实图像之间存在潜在的显着域差距。我们的工作提供了关于可以通过提高生成数据集中图像的多样性来提高 MA-ZSC 性能的初步见解，从而为该问题提供了全新的视角。我们使用预先训练的扩散模型对文本到图像生成过程提出了一系列修改，以增强多样性，我们将其称为 $\textbf{bag oftricks}$。我们的方法在各种分类架构中显示出显着的改进，其结果可与 CLIP 等最先进的模型相媲美。为了验证我们的方法，我们在 CIFAR10、CIFAR100 和 EuroSAT 上进行了实验，由于其卫星图像域，零样本分类特别困难。我们使用五种分类架构评估我们的方法，包括 ResNet 和 ViT。我们的研究结果为使用扩散模型的 MA-ZSC 问题提供了初步见解。所有代码都将在 GitHub 上提供。

AI.tldr: 本文研究通过改进扩散模型生成的图像多样性，提升模型无关的零样本分类（MA-ZSC）性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于扩散模型生成合成图像的方法在MA-ZSC任务中表现不足，可能因合成图像与真实图像存在显著领域差距，需通过增强生成数据多样性解决此问题。
AI.method: 提出一套改进文本到图像生成过程的‘技巧集合’，通过调整预训练扩散模型的生成参数，提升合成图像的多样性。
AI.result: 在CIFAR10、CIFAR100和EuroSAT数据集上，改进方法在ResNet和ViT等分类架构中取得显著提升，性能接近CLIP等先进模型。
AI.conclusion: 增加合成数据多样性可有效提升MA-ZSC性能，为扩散模型在零样本分类中的应用提供新思路。

To validate our approach, we conduct experiments on CIFAR10, CIFAR100, and EuroSAT, which is particularly difficult for zero-shot classification due to its satellite image domain. We evaluate our approach with five classification architectures, including ResNet and ViT. Our findings provide initial insights into the problem of MA-ZSC using diffusion models. All code will be available on GitHub. 在这项工作中，我们研究了模型无关的零样本分类（MA-ZSC）问题，它是指在训练过程中不使用任何真实图像的情况下训练非特定分类架构（下游模型）来对真实图像进行分类。最近的研究表明，使用扩散模型生成合成训练图像提供了解决 MA-ZSC 的潜在解决方案。然而，这种方法的性能目前还达不到大规模视觉语言模型所达到的效果。一种可能的解释是合成图像和真实图像之间存在潜在的显着域差距。我们的工作提供了关于可以通过提高生成数据集中图像的多样性来提高 MA-ZSC 性能的初步见解，从而为该问题提供了全新的视角。我们使用预先训练的扩散模型对文本到图像生成过程提出了一系列修改，以增强多样性，我们将其称为 $\textbf{bag oftricks}$。我们的方法在各种分类架构中显示出显着的改进，其结果可与 CLIP 等最先进的模型相媲美。为了验证我们的方法，我们在 CIFAR10、CIFAR100 和 EuroSAT 上进行了实验，由于其卫星图像域，零样本分类特别困难。我们使用五种分类架构评估我们的方法，包括 ResNet 和 ViT。我们的研究结果为使用扩散模型的 MA-ZSC 问题提供了初步见解。所有代码都将在 GitHub 上提供。 本文研究通过改进扩散模型生成的图像多样性，提升模型无关的零样本分类（MA-ZSC）性能。 Jordan Shipard,Arnold Wiliem,Kien Nguyen Thanh,Wei Xiang,Clinton Fookes cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Shiman Li,Haoran Wang,Yucong Meng,Chenxi Zhang,Zhijian Song
title: Multi-organ segmentation: a progressive exploration of learning paradigms under scarce annotation
title_zh: 多器官分割：稀缺注释下学习范式的渐进探索
abstract: Precise delineation of multiple organs or abnormal regions in the human body from medical images plays an essential role in computer-aided diagnosis, surgical simulation, image-guided interventions, and especially in radiotherapy treatment planning. Thus, it is of great significance to explore automatic segmentation approaches, among which deep learning-based approaches have evolved rapidly and witnessed remarkable progress in multi-organ segmentation. However, obtaining an appropriately sized and fine-grained annotated dataset of multiple organs is extremely hard and expensive. Such scarce annotation limits the development of high-performance multi-organ segmentation models but promotes many annotation-efficient learning paradigms. Among these, studies on transfer learning leveraging external datasets, semi-supervised learning using unannotated datasets and partially-supervised learning integrating partially-labeled datasets have led the dominant way to break such dilemma in multi-organ segmentation. We first review the traditional fully supervised method, then present a comprehensive and systematic elaboration of the 3 abovementioned learning paradigms in the context of multi-organ segmentation from both technical and methodological perspectives, and finally summarize their challenges and future trends.
summary: Precise delineation of multiple organs or abnormal regions in the human body from medical images plays an essential role in computer-aided diagnosis, surgical simulation, image-guided interventions, and especially in radiotherapy treatment planning. Thus, it is of great significance to explore automatic segmentation approaches, among which deep learning-based approaches have evolved rapidly and witnessed remarkable progress in multi-organ segmentation. However, obtaining an appropriately sized and fine-grained annotated dataset of multiple organs is extremely hard and expensive. Such scarce annotation limits the development of high-performance multi-organ segmentation models but promotes many annotation-efficient learning paradigms. Among these, studies on transfer learning leveraging external datasets, semi-supervised learning using unannotated datasets and partially-supervised learning integrating partially-labeled datasets have led the dominant way to break such dilemma in multi-organ segmentation. We first review the traditional fully supervised method, then present a comprehensive and systematic elaboration of the 3 abovementioned learning paradigms in the context of multi-organ segmentation from both technical and methodological perspectives, and finally summarize their challenges and future trends.
abstract_zh: 从医学图像中精确描绘人体的多个器官或异常区域在计算机辅助诊断、手术模拟、图像引导干预，尤其是放射治疗计划中起着至关重要的作用。因此，探索自动分割方法具有重要意义，其中基于深度学习的方法发展迅速，在多器官分割方面取得了显着进展。然而，获得适当大小和细粒度的多个器官的注释数据集是极其困难和昂贵的。这种稀缺的注释限制了高性能多器官分割模型的发展，但促进了许多注释高效的学习范例。其中，利用外部数据集的迁移学习、使用未注释数据集的半监督学习和集成部分标记数据集的部分监督学习的研究是打破多器官分割困境的主导方法。我们首先回顾了传统的全监督方法，然后从技术和方法论的角度对多器官分割背景下的上述三种学习范式进行了全面系统的阐述，最后总结了它们的挑战和未来趋势。

AI.tldr: 本文系统探讨了在标注数据稀缺的情况下，多器官分割任务中不同学习范式的渐进发展。
AI.motivation: 医疗影像中多器官分割对临床诊断至关重要，但高质量标注数据获取成本高，亟需研究标注高效的分割方法。
AI.method: 回顾传统全监督方法，系统分析迁移学习、半监督学习和部分监督学习三种范式在多器官分割中的技术实现与方法论。
AI.result: 总结了现有标注高效学习范式的挑战，并指出未来研究方向包括更优的跨模态迁移策略与自监督预训练方法。
AI.conclusion: 标注稀缺背景下，结合多源数据与先进学习范式是突破多器官分割瓶颈的关键，需进一步探索自动化标注与模型泛化能力。

authors_text: Zecheng Yu,Yifei Huang,Ryosuke Furuta,Takuma Yagi,Yusuke Goutsu,Yoichi Sato
title: Fine-grained Affordance Annotation for Egocentric Hand-Object Interaction Videos
title_zh: 以自我为中心的手部物体交互视频的细粒度可供性注释
comment: WACV 2023. Refined version of Workshop article arXiv:2206.05424
comments: WACV 2023. Refined version of Workshop article arXiv:2206.05424
abstract: Object affordance is an important concept in hand-object interaction, providing information on action possibilities based on human motor capacity and objects' physical property thus benefiting tasks such as action anticipation and robot imitation learning. However, the definition of affordance in existing datasets often: 1) mix up affordance with object functionality; 2) confuse affordance with goal-related action; and 3) ignore human motor capacity. This paper proposes an efficient annotation scheme to address these issues by combining goal-irrelevant motor actions and grasp types as affordance labels and introducing the concept of mechanical action to represent the action possibilities between two objects. We provide new annotations by applying this scheme to the EPIC-KITCHENS dataset and test our annotation with tasks such as affordance recognition, hand-object interaction hotspots prediction, and cross-domain evaluation of affordance. The results show that models trained with our annotation can distinguish affordance from other concepts, predict fine-grained interaction possibilities on objects, and generalize through different domains.
summary: Object affordance is an important concept in hand-object interaction, providing information on action possibilities based on human motor capacity and objects' physical property thus benefiting tasks such as action anticipation and robot imitation learning. However, the definition of affordance in existing datasets often: 1) mix up affordance with object functionality; 2) confuse affordance with goal-related action; and 3) ignore human motor capacity. This paper proposes an efficient annotation scheme to address these issues by combining goal-irrelevant motor actions and grasp types as affordance labels and introducing the concept of mechanical action to represent the action possibilities between two objects. We provide new annotations by applying this scheme to the EPIC-KITCHENS dataset and test our annotation with tasks such as affordance recognition, hand-object interaction hotspots prediction, and cross-domain evaluation of affordance. The results show that models trained with our annotation can distinguish affordance from other concepts, predict fine-grained interaction possibilities on objects, and generalize through different domains.
abstract_zh: 物体可供性是手与物体交互中的一个重要概念，它提供基于人类运动能力和物体物理属性的动作可能性信息，从而有利于动作预期和机器人模仿学习等任务。然而，现有数据集中对可供性的定义通常是：1）将可供性与对象功能混淆； 2）混淆可供性与目标相关的行动； 3）忽略人体运动能力。本文提出了一种有效的注释方案来解决这些问题，将与目标无关的运动动作和抓握类型结合起来作为可供性标签，并引入机械动作的概念来表示两个对象之间的动作可能性。我们通过将该方案应用于 EPIC-KITCHENS 数据集来提供新的注释，并通过功能可见性识别、手部对象交互热点预测和功能可见性的跨域评估等任务来测试我们的注释。结果表明，使用我们的注释训练的模型可以区分可供性与其他概念，预测对象上细粒度交互的可能性，并在不同领域进行概括。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种细粒度的亲和力注释方案，用于第一人称视角下手-物体交互视频，以解决现有数据集中的概念混淆问题。
AI.motivation: 现有数据集中亲和力定义存在三方面问题：与物体功能混淆、与目标相关动作混淆、忽略人体运动能力，导致动作预测和机器人学习任务效果受限。
AI.method: 结合与目标无关的运动动作和抓取类型作为亲和力标签，引入机械动作概念描述物体间交互可能性，并应用于EPIC-KITCHENS数据集进行验证。
AI.result: 标注方法使模型能区分亲和力与其他概念，准确预测物体交互热点区域，并在跨领域评估中展现良好泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 该注释方案通过明确亲和力定义和引入机械动作概念，有效提升了手-物体交互场景下亲和力理解的准确性和跨领域适应性。

search_text: Fine-grained Affordance Annotation for Egocentric Hand-Object Interaction Videos 以自我为中心的手部物体交互视频的细粒度可供性注释 Object affordance is an important concept in hand-object interaction, providing information on action possibilities based on human motor capacity and objects' physical property thus benefiting tasks such as action anticipation and robot imitation learning. However, the definition of affordance in existing datasets often: 1) mix up affordance with object functionality; 2) confuse affordance with goal-related action; and 3) ignore human motor capacity. This paper proposes an efficient annotation scheme to address these issues by combining goal-irrelevant motor actions and grasp types as affordance labels and introducing the concept of mechanical action to represent the action possibilities between two objects. We provide new annotations by applying this scheme to the EPIC-KITCHENS dataset and test our annotation with tasks such as affordance recognition, hand-object interaction hotspots prediction, and cross-domain evaluation of affordance. The results show that models trained with our annotation can distinguish affordance from other concepts, predict fine-grained interaction possibilities on objects, and generalize through different domains. 物体可供性是手与物体交互中的一个重要概念，它提供基于人类运动能力和物体物理属性的动作可能性信息，从而有利于动作预期和机器人模仿学习等任务。然而，现有数据集中对可供性的定义通常是：1）将可供性与对象功能混淆； 2）混淆可供性与目标相关的行动； 3）忽略人体运动能力。本文提出了一种有效的注释方案来解决这些问题，将与目标无关的运动动作和抓握类型结合起来作为可供性标签，并引入机械动作的概念来表示两个对象之间的动作可能性。我们通过将该方案应用于 EPIC-KITCHENS 数据集来提供新的注释，并通过功能可见性识别、手部对象交互热点预测和功能可见性的跨域评估等任务来测试我们的注释。结果表明，使用我们的注释训练的模型可以区分可供性与其他概念，预测对象上细粒度交互的可能性，并在不同领域进行概括。 本文提出一种细粒度的亲和力注释方案，用于第一人称视角下手-物体交互视频，以解决现有数据集中的概念混淆问题。 Zecheng Yu,Yifei Huang,Ryosuke Furuta,Takuma Yagi,Yusuke Goutsu,Yoichi Sato cs.CV

authors_text: Toon Van de Maele,Tim Verbelen,Pietro Mazzaglia,Stefano Ferraro,Bart Dhoedt
title: Object-Centric Scene Representations using Active Inference
title_zh: 使用主动推理的以对象为中心的场景表示
abstract: Representing a scene and its constituent objects from raw sensory data is a core ability for enabling robots to interact with their environment. In this paper, we propose a novel approach for scene understanding, leveraging a hierarchical object-centric generative model that enables an agent to infer object category and pose in an allocentric reference frame using active inference, a neuro-inspired framework for action and perception. For evaluating the behavior of an active vision agent, we also propose a new benchmark where, given a target viewpoint of a particular object, the agent needs to find the best matching viewpoint given a workspace with randomly positioned objects in 3D. We demonstrate that our active inference agent is able to balance epistemic foraging and goal-driven behavior, and outperforms both supervised and reinforcement learning baselines by a large margin.
summary: Representing a scene and its constituent objects from raw sensory data is a core ability for enabling robots to interact with their environment. In this paper, we propose a novel approach for scene understanding, leveraging a hierarchical object-centric generative model that enables an agent to infer object category and pose in an allocentric reference frame using active inference, a neuro-inspired framework for action and perception. For evaluating the behavior of an active vision agent, we also propose a new benchmark where, given a target viewpoint of a particular object, the agent needs to find the best matching viewpoint given a workspace with randomly positioned objects in 3D. We demonstrate that our active inference agent is able to balance epistemic foraging and goal-driven behavior, and outperforms both supervised and reinforcement learning baselines by a large margin.
abstract_zh: 从原始感官数据中表示场景及其组成对象是机器人与其环境交互的核心能力。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的场景理解方法，利用分层的以对象为中心的生成模型，使代理能够使用主动推理（一种受神经启发的动作和感知框架）推断对象类别并在异中心参考系中姿势。为了评估主动视觉代理的行为，我们还提出了一个新的基准，在给定特定对象的目标视点的情况下，代理需要在给定具有 3D 随机定位对象的工作空间的情况下找到最佳匹配视点。我们证明，我们的主动推理代理能够平衡认知觅食和目标驱动行为，并且大大优于监督学习和强化学习基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于主动推理的分层物体中心生成模型，用于从原始感官数据中推断场景物体的类别和姿态，并设计新基准测试验证方法有效性。
AI.motivation: 机器人需要从感官数据中准确表示场景及物体以实现环境交互，传统方法在物体中心表示和主动视觉行为规划方面存在局限。
AI.method: 构建分层物体中心生成模型，结合主动推理框架实现物体类别与姿态推断；设计3D随机物体工作空间的主动视觉基准测试。
AI.result: 主动推理代理在基准测试中显著优于监督学习和强化学习基线，能有效平衡认知探索与目标驱动行为。
AI.conclusion: 主动推理框架可有效实现物体中心场景表示，新基准测试验证了方法在复杂环境中的优越性，为机器人视觉交互提供新思路。

search_text: Object-Centric Scene Representations using Active Inference 使用主动推理的以对象为中心的场景表示 Representing a scene and its constituent objects from raw sensory data is a core ability for enabling robots to interact with their environment. In this paper, we propose a novel approach for scene understanding, leveraging a hierarchical object-centric generative model that enables an agent to infer object category and pose in an allocentric reference frame using active inference, a neuro-inspired framework for action and perception. For evaluating the behavior of an active vision agent, we also propose a new benchmark where, given a target viewpoint of a particular object, the agent needs to find the best matching viewpoint given a workspace with randomly positioned objects in 3D. We demonstrate that our active inference agent is able to balance epistemic foraging and goal-driven behavior, and outperforms both supervised and reinforcement learning baselines by a large margin. 从原始感官数据中表示场景及其组成对象是机器人与其环境交互的核心能力。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的场景理解方法，利用分层的以对象为中心的生成模型，使代理能够使用主动推理（一种受神经启发的动作和感知框架）推断对象类别并在异中心参考系中姿势。为了评估主动视觉代理的行为，我们还提出了一个新的基准，在给定特定对象的目标视点的情况下，代理需要在给定具有 3D 随机定位对象的工作空间的情况下找到最佳匹配视点。我们证明，我们的主动推理代理能够平衡认知觅食和目标驱动行为，并且大大优于监督学习和强化学习基线。 本文提出一种基于主动推理的分层物体中心生成模型，用于从原始感官数据中推断场景物体的类别和姿态，并设计新基准测试验证方法有效性。 Toon Van de Maele,Tim Verbelen,Pietro Mazzaglia,Stefano Ferraro,Bart Dhoedt cs.RO,cs.AI

authors_text: Sajed Jalil,Suzzana Rafi,Thomas D. LaToza,Kevin Moran,Wing Lam
title: ChatGPT and Software Testing Education: Promises & Perils
title_zh: ChatGPT 和软件测试教育：承诺与风险
comment: 2023 IEEE International Conference on Software Testing, Verification and Validation Workshops (ICSTW), 8 pages, 2 tables, 6 figures
comments: 2023 IEEE International Conference on Software Testing, Verification and Validation Workshops (ICSTW), 8 pages, 2 tables, 6 figures
abstract: Over the past decade, predictive language modeling for code has proven to be a valuable tool for enabling new forms of automation for developers. More recently, we have seen the advent of general purpose "large language models", based on neural transformer architectures, that have been trained on massive datasets of human written text spanning code and natural language. However, despite the demonstrated representational power of such models, interacting with them has historically been constrained to specific task settings, limiting their general applicability. Many of these limitations were recently overcome with the introduction of ChatGPT, a language model created by OpenAI and trained to operate as a conversational agent, enabling it to answer questions and respond to a wide variety of commands from end users. The introduction of models, such as ChatGPT, has already spurred fervent discussion from educators, ranging from fear that students could use these AI tools to circumvent learning, to excitement about the new types of learning opportunities that they might unlock. However, given the nascent nature of these tools, we currently lack fundamental knowledge related to how well they perform in different educational settings, and the potential promise (or danger) that they might pose to traditional forms of instruction. As such, in this paper, we examine how well ChatGPT performs when tasked with answering common questions in a popular software testing curriculum. Our findings indicate that ChatGPT can provide correct or partially correct answers in 55.6% of cases, provide correct or partially correct explanations of answers in 53.0% of cases, and that prompting the tool in a shared question context leads to a marginally higher rate of correct responses. Based on these findings, we discuss the potential promises and perils related to the use of ChatGPT by students and instructors.

More recently, we have seen the advent of general purpose "large language models", based on neural transformer architectures, that have been trained on massive datasets of human written text spanning code and natural language. However, despite the demonstrated representational power of such models, interacting with them has historically been constrained to specific task settings, limiting their general applicability. Many of these limitations were recently overcome with the introduction of ChatGPT, a language model created by OpenAI and trained to operate as a conversational agent, enabling it to answer questions and respond to a wide variety of commands from end users. The introduction of models, such as ChatGPT, has already spurred fervent discussion from educators, ranging from fear that students could use these AI tools to circumvent learning, to excitement about the new types of learning opportunities that they might unlock. However, given the nascent nature of these tools, we currently lack fundamental knowledge related to how well they perform in different educational settings, and the potential promise (or danger) that they might pose to traditional forms of instruction. As such, in this paper, we examine how well ChatGPT performs when tasked with answering common questions in a popular software testing curriculum. Our findings indicate that ChatGPT can provide correct or partially correct answers in 55.6% of cases, provide correct or partially correct explanations of answers in 53.0% of cases, and that prompting the tool in a shared question context leads to a marginally higher rate of correct responses. Based on these findings, we discuss the potential promises and perils related to the use of ChatGPT by students and instructors.
abstract_zh: 在过去的十年中，代码的预测语言建模已被证明是为开发人员实现新形式自动化的宝贵工具。最近，我们看到了基于神经变压器架构的通用“大型语言模型”的出现，这些模型已经在跨越代码和自然语言的大量人类书面文本数据集上进行了训练。然而，尽管此类模型展示了代表性能力，但与它们的交互历来仅限于特定的任务设置，从而限制了它们的普遍适用性。最近，ChatGPT 的推出克服了其中许多限制，ChatGPT 是一种由 OpenAI 创建的语言模型，经过训练可作为对话代理进行操作，使其能够回答问题并响应最终用户的各种命令。 ChatGPT 等模型的引入已经引发了教育工作者的热烈讨论，从担心学生可能使用这些人工智能工具来规避学习，到对他们可能解锁的新型学习机会感到兴奋。然而，鉴于这些工具的新生性质，我们目前缺乏与它们在不同教育环境中的表现以及它们可能对传统教学形式带来的潜在前景（或危险）相关的基础知识。因此，在本文中，我们研究了 ChatGPT 在回答流行软件测试课程中的常见问题时的表现。我们的研究结果表明，ChatGPT 可以在 55.6% 的情况下提供正确或部分正确的答案，在 53.0% 的情况下提供正确或部分正确的答案解释，并且在共享问题上下文中提示该工具会导致正确回答率略高。基于这些发现，我们讨论了学生和教师使用 ChatGPT 的潜在前景和风险。

AI.tldr: 论文评估了ChatGPT在软件测试教育场景中的表现，分析其作为教学工具的潜力与风险。
AI.motivation: 随着大型语言模型的兴起，教育界对其在教学中的应用存在担忧与期待，但缺乏具体效果研究，需探索其在软件测试课程中的实际表现。
AI.method: 通过测试ChatGPT回答软件测试课程常见问题的能力，统计其答案正确率及解释正确率，并比较不同提示策略的效果差异。
AI.result: ChatGPT在回答问题和解释中分别达到55.6%和53.0%的正确率，共享上下文提示可略微提升正确率。
AI.conclusion: ChatGPT在软件测试教育中具有一定辅助价值，但需警惕学生依赖AI逃避学习的风险，建议结合传统教学方式谨慎应用。

authors_text: Soham Bhosale,Arjun Krishna,Ge Wang,Klaus Mueller
title: Improving CT Image Segmentation Accuracy Using StyleGAN Driven Data Augmentation
title_zh: 使用 StyleGAN 驱动的数据增强提高 CT 图像分割精度
comment: 17th International Meeting on Fully Three-Dimensional Image Reconstruction in Radiology and Nuclear Medicine(Fully3D Conference)
comments: 17th International Meeting on Fully Three-Dimensional Image Reconstruction in Radiology and Nuclear Medicine(Fully3D Conference)
abstract: Medical Image Segmentation is a useful application for medical image analysis including detecting diseases and abnormalities in imaging modalities such as MRI, CT etc. Deep learning has proven to be promising for this task but usually has a low accuracy because of the lack of appropriate publicly available annotated or segmented medical datasets. In addition, the datasets that are available may have a different texture because of different dosage values or scanner properties than the images that need to be segmented. This paper presents a StyleGAN-driven approach for segmenting publicly available large medical datasets by using readily available extremely small annotated datasets in similar modalities. The approach involves augmenting the small segmented dataset and eliminating texture differences between the two datasets. The dataset is augmented by being passed through six different StyleGANs that are trained on six different style images taken from the large non-annotated dataset we want to segment. Specifically, style transfer is used to augment the training dataset. The annotations of the training dataset are hence combined with the textures of the non-annotated dataset to generate new anatomically sound images. The augmented dataset is then used to train a U-Net segmentation network which displays a significant improvement in the segmentation accuracy in segmenting the large non-annotated dataset.
summary: Medical Image Segmentation is a useful application for medical image analysis including detecting diseases and abnormalities in imaging modalities such as MRI, CT etc. Deep learning has proven to be promising for this task but usually has a low accuracy because of the lack of appropriate publicly available annotated or segmented medical datasets. In addition, the datasets that are available may have a different texture because of different dosage values or scanner properties than the images that need to be segmented. This paper presents a StyleGAN-driven approach for segmenting publicly available large medical datasets by using readily available extremely small annotated datasets in similar modalities. The approach involves augmenting the small segmented dataset and eliminating texture differences between the two datasets. The dataset is augmented by being passed through six different StyleGANs that are trained on six different style images taken from the large non-annotated dataset we want to segment. Specifically, style transfer is used to augment the training dataset. The annotations of the training dataset are hence combined with the textures of the non-annotated dataset to generate new anatomically sound images. The augmented dataset is then used to train a U-Net segmentation network which displays a significant improvement in the segmentation accuracy in segmenting the large non-annotated dataset.
abstract_zh: 医学图像分割是医学图像分析的一个有用应用，包括检测 MRI、CT 等成像模式中的疾病和异常。深度学习已被证明在这项任务中很有前景，但由于缺乏适当的公开可用的注释或分段医学数据集，因此通常精度较低。此外，由于与需要分割的图像不同的剂量值或扫描仪属性，可用的数据集可能具有不同的纹理。本文提出了一种 StyleGAN 驱动的方法，通过以类似的方式使用现成的极小注释数据集来分割公开可用的大型医疗数据集。该方法涉及增强小分段数据集并消除两个数据集之间的纹理差异。通过传递六个不同的 StyleGAN 来增强数据集，这些 StyleGAN 在取自我们想要分割的大型无注释数据集的六种不同风格的图像上进行训练。具体来说，风格迁移用于增强训练数据集。因此，训练数据集的注释与未注释数据集的纹理相结合，以生成新的解剖学声音图像。然后使用增强的数据集来训练 U-Net 分割网络，该网络在分割大型无注释数据集时显示出分割精度的显着提高。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于StyleGAN的数据增强方法，用于提高CT图像分割的准确性。
AI.motivation: 医学图像分割因缺乏足够标注数据集及不同扫描设备导致的纹理差异而面临准确性挑战。
AI.method: 利用StyleGAN将小规模标注数据集与大规模非标注数据集的纹理结合，生成解剖结构合理的增强数据，并训练U-Net分割网络。
AI.result: 在分割大规模非标注数据集时，该方法显著提升了分割准确率。

search_text: Improving CT Image Segmentation Accuracy Using StyleGAN Driven Data Augmentation 使用 StyleGAN 驱动的数据增强提高 CT 图像分割精度 Medical Image Segmentation is a useful application for medical image analysis including detecting diseases and abnormalities in imaging modalities such as MRI, CT etc. Deep learning has proven to be promising for this task but usually has a low accuracy because of the lack of appropriate publicly available annotated or segmented medical datasets. In addition, the datasets that are available may have a different texture because of different dosage values or scanner properties than the images that need to be segmented. This paper presents a StyleGAN-driven approach for segmenting publicly available large medical datasets by using readily available extremely small annotated datasets in similar modalities. The approach involves augmenting the small segmented dataset and eliminating texture differences between the two datasets. The dataset is augmented by being passed through six different StyleGANs that are trained on six different style images taken from the large non-annotated dataset we want to segment. Specifically, style transfer is used to augment the training dataset. The annotations of the training dataset are hence combined with the textures of the non-annotated dataset to generate new anatomically sound images. The augmented dataset is then used to train a U-Net segmentation network which displays a significant improvement in the segmentation accuracy in segmenting the large non-annotated dataset. 医学图像分割是医学图像分析的一个有用应用，包括检测 MRI、CT 等成像模式中的疾病和异常。深度学习已被证明在这项任务中很有前景，但由于缺乏适当的公开可用的注释或分段医学数据集，因此通常精度较低。此外，由于与需要分割的图像不同的剂量值或扫描仪属性，可用的数据集可能具有不同的纹理。本文提出了一种 StyleGAN 驱动的方法，通过以类似的方式使用现成的极小注释数据集来分割公开可用的大型医疗数据集。该方法涉及增强小分段数据集并消除两个数据集之间的纹理差异。通过传递六个不同的 StyleGAN 来增强数据集，这些 StyleGAN 在取自我们想要分割的大型无注释数据集的六种不同风格的图像上进行训练。具体来说，风格迁移用于增强训练数据集。因此，训练数据集的注释与未注释数据集的纹理相结合，以生成新的解剖学声音图像。然后使用增强的数据集来训练 U-Net 分割网络，该网络在分割大型无注释数据集时显示出分割精度的显着提高。 本文提出一种基于StyleGAN的数据增强方法，用于提高CT图像分割的准确性。 Soham Bhosale,Arjun Krishna,Ge Wang,Klaus Mueller eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Nayereh Hamidishad,Roberto Marcondes Cesar Junior
title: An End-to-End Two-Phase Deep Learning-Based workflow to Segment Man-made Objects Around Reservoirs
title_zh: 基于端到端两阶段深度学习的工作流程，用于分割水库周围的人造物体
abstract: Reservoirs are fundamental infrastructures for the management of water resources. Constructions around them can negatively impact their quality. Such unauthorized constructions can be monitored by land cover mapping (LCM) remote sensing (RS) images. In this paper, we develop a new approach based on DL and image processing techniques for man-made object segmentation around the reservoirs. In order to segment man-made objects around the reservoirs in an end-to-end procedure, segmenting reservoirs and identifying the region of interest (RoI) around them are essential. In the proposed two-phase workflow, the reservoir is initially segmented using a DL model. A post-processing stage is proposed to remove errors such as floating vegetation. Next, the RoI around the reservoir (RoIaR) is identified using the proposed image processing techniques. Finally, the man-made objects in the RoIaR are segmented using a DL architecture. We trained the proposed workflow using collected Google Earth (GE) images of eight reservoirs in Brazil over two different years. The U-Net-based and SegNet-based architectures are trained to segment the reservoirs. To segment man-made objects in the RoIaR, we trained and evaluated four possible architectures, U-Net, FPN, LinkNet, and PSPNet. Although the collected data has a high diversity (for example, they belong to different states, seasons, resolutions, etc.), we achieved good performances in both phases. Furthermore, applying the proposed post-processing to the output of reservoir segmentation improves the precision in all studied reservoirs except two cases. We validated the prepared workflow with a reservoir dataset outside the training reservoirs. The results show high generalization ability of the prepared workflow.

Such unauthorized constructions can be monitored by land cover mapping (LCM) remote sensing (RS) images. In this paper, we develop a new approach based on DL and image processing techniques for man-made object segmentation around the reservoirs. In order to segment man-made objects around the reservoirs in an end-to-end procedure, segmenting reservoirs and identifying the region of interest (RoI) around them are essential. In the proposed two-phase workflow, the reservoir is initially segmented using a DL model. A post-processing stage is proposed to remove errors such as floating vegetation. Next, the RoI around the reservoir (RoIaR) is identified using the proposed image processing techniques. Finally, the man-made objects in the RoIaR are segmented using a DL architecture. We trained the proposed workflow using collected Google Earth (GE) images of eight reservoirs in Brazil over two different years. The U-Net-based and SegNet-based architectures are trained to segment the reservoirs. To segment man-made objects in the RoIaR, we trained and evaluated four possible architectures, U-Net, FPN, LinkNet, and PSPNet. Although the collected data has a high diversity (for example, they belong to different states, seasons, resolutions, etc.), we achieved good performances in both phases. Furthermore, applying the proposed post-processing to the output of reservoir segmentation improves the precision in all studied reservoirs except two cases. We validated the prepared workflow with a reservoir dataset outside the training reservoirs. The results show high generalization ability of the prepared workflow.
abstract_zh: 水库是水资源管理的基础设施。它们周围的建筑会对它们的质量产生负面影响。此类未经授权的建筑可以通过土地覆盖测绘（LCM）遥感（RS）图像进行监控。在本文中，我们开发了一种基于深度学习和图像处理技术的新方法，用于水库周围的人造对象分割。为了以端到端的方式分割水库周围的人造物体，分割水库并识别其周围的感兴趣区域 (RoI) 至关重要。在所提出的两阶段工作流程中，油藏最初使用深度学习模型进行分割。建议采用后处理阶段来消除漂浮植被等错误。接下来，使用所提出的图像处理技术识别储层周围的 RoI (RoIaR)。最后，使用深度学习架构对 RoIaR 中的人造对象进行分割。我们使用两年不同年份收集的巴西八个水库的 Google Earth (GE) 图像来训练拟议的工作流程。基于 U-Net 和 SegNet 的架构经过训练来分割水库。为了分割 RoIaR 中的人造物体，我们训练并评估了四种可能的架构：U-Net、FPN、LinkNet 和 PSPNet。尽管收集的数据具有很高的多样性（例如，它们属于不同的状态、季节、分辨率等），但我们在两个阶段都取得了良好的表现。此外，将所提出的后处理应用于储层分割的输出，提高了除两种情况之外的所有研究储层的精度。我们使用训练水库外部的水库数据集验证了准备好的工作流程。结果表明所准备的工作流程具有较高的泛化能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的两阶段工作流程，用于分割水库周围的人造物体。
AI.motivation: 水库周边的非法建设会威胁水质，传统遥感监测方法存在不足，需开发高效分割技术以实现精准监管。
AI.method: 两阶段流程：第一阶段用深度学习模型（如U-Net、SegNet）分割水库并进行后处理去除误差；第二阶段通过图像处理确定感兴趣区域（RoIaR），再用FPN、LinkNet、PSPNet等模型分割人造物体。
AI.result: 在巴西八座水库的Google Earth图像上训练后，模型在多样化数据（不同地区、季节、分辨率）中表现良好，后处理提升精度（除两例外），外部验证显示高泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效分割水库人造物体，后处理优化提升精度，且具备跨数据集的泛化能力，适用于水库环境监测。

authors_text: Mohamed Elsayed,A. Rupam Mahmood
title: Utility-based Perturbed Gradient Descent: An Optimizer for Continual Learning
title_zh: 基于效用的扰动梯度下降：持续学习的优化器
abstract: Modern representation learning methods often struggle to adapt quickly under non-stationarity because they suffer from catastrophic forgetting and decaying plasticity. Such problems prevent learners from fast adaptation since they may forget useful features or have difficulty learning new ones. Hence, these methods are rendered ineffective for continual learning. This paper proposes Utility-based Perturbed Gradient Descent (UPGD), an online learning algorithm well-suited for continual learning agents. UPGD protects useful weights or features from forgetting and perturbs less useful ones based on their utilities. Our empirical results show that UPGD helps reduce forgetting and maintain plasticity, enabling modern representation learning methods to work effectively in continual learning.
summary: Modern representation learning methods often struggle to adapt quickly under non-stationarity because they suffer from catastrophic forgetting and decaying plasticity. Such problems prevent learners from fast adaptation since they may forget useful features or have difficulty learning new ones. Hence, these methods are rendered ineffective for continual learning. This paper proposes Utility-based Perturbed Gradient Descent (UPGD), an online learning algorithm well-suited for continual learning agents. UPGD protects useful weights or features from forgetting and perturbs less useful ones based on their utilities. Our empirical results show that UPGD helps reduce forgetting and maintain plasticity, enabling modern representation learning methods to work effectively in continual learning.
abstract_zh: 现代表征学习方法常常难以在非平稳性下快速适应，因为它们会遭受灾难性遗忘和可塑性衰退。这些问题会阻碍学习者快速适应，因为他们可能会忘记有用的功能或难以学习新功能。因此，这些方法对于持续学习来说是无效的。本文提出了基于效用的扰动梯度下降（UPGD），这是一种非常适合持续学习智能体的在线学习算法。 UPGD 可防止有用的权重或特征被遗忘，并根据其效用扰乱不太有用的权重或特征。我们的实证结果表明，UPGD 有助于减少遗忘并保持可塑性，使现代表征学习方法能够在持续学习中有效发挥作用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Utility-based Perturbed Gradient Descent（UPGD）的优化算法，旨在解决持续学习中的灾难性遗忘和可塑性衰减问题。
AI.motivation: 现代表示学习方法在非平稳环境下难以快速适应，主要受制于灾难性遗忘和可塑性衰减问题，导致无法有效进行持续学习。
AI.method: UPGD通过基于权重或特征的效用值，保护有用信息并扰动低效用部分，从而在持续学习过程中动态平衡遗忘与学习。
AI.result: 实验表明，UPGD能有效减少遗忘并维持可塑性，使现代表示学习方法在持续学习任务中表现更优。
AI.conclusion: UPGD通过效用驱动的扰动机制成功缓解了持续学习中的核心挑战，为相关领域提供了有效的优化方案。
