motivation: 现代表示学习方法在非平稳环境下难以快速适应，主要受制于灾难性遗忘和可塑性衰减问题，导致无法有效进行持续学习。
method: UPGD通过基于权重或特征的效用值，保护有用信息并扰动低效用部分，从而在持续学习过程中动态平衡遗忘与学习。
result: 实验表明，UPGD能有效减少遗忘并维持可塑性，使现代表示学习方法在持续学习任务中表现更优。
conclusion: UPGD通过效用驱动的扰动机制成功缓解了持续学习中的核心挑战，为相关领域提供了有效的优化方案。
search_text: Utility-based Perturbed Gradient Descent: An Optimizer for Continual Learning 基于效用的扰动梯度下降：持续学习的优化器 Modern representation learning methods often struggle to adapt quickly under non-stationarity because they suffer from catastrophic forgetting and decaying plasticity. Such problems prevent learners from fast adaptation since they may forget useful features or have difficulty learning new ones. Hence, these methods are rendered ineffective for continual learning. This paper proposes Utility-based Perturbed Gradient Descent (UPGD), an online learning algorithm well-suited for continual learning agents. UPGD protects useful weights or features from forgetting and perturbs less useful ones based on their utilities. Our empirical results show that UPGD helps reduce forgetting and maintain plasticity, enabling modern representation learning methods to work effectively in continual learning. 现代表征学习方法常常难以在非平稳性下快速适应，因为它们会遭受灾难性遗忘和可塑性衰退。这些问题会阻碍学习者快速适应，因为他们可能会忘记有用的功能或难以学习新功能。因此，这些方法对于持续学习来说是无效的。本文提出了基于效用的扰动梯度下降（UPGD），这是一种非常适合持续学习智能体的在线学习算法。 UPGD 可防止有用的权重或特征被遗忘，并根据其效用扰乱不太有用的权重或特征。我们的实证结果表明，UPGD 有助于减少遗忘并保持可塑性，使现代表征学习方法能够在持续学习中有效发挥作用。 本文提出了一种名为Utility-based Perturbed Gradient Descent（UPGD）的优化算法，旨在解决持续学习中的灾难性遗忘和可塑性衰减问题。 Mohamed Elsayed,A. Rupam Mahmood cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Maximillian Chen,Alexandros Papangelis,Chenyang Tao,Seokhwan Kim,Andy Rosenbaum,Yang Liu,Zhou Yu,Dilek Hakkani-Tur
title: PLACES: Prompting Language Models for Social Conversation Synthesis
title_zh: PLACES：促进社会对话综合的语言模型
comment: In Findings of EACL 2023. 25 pages, 4 figures, 26 tables. Code available at https://github.com/alexa/PLACES
comments: In Findings of EACL 2023. 25 pages, 4 figures, 26 tables. Code available at https://github.com/alexa/PLACES
abstract: Collecting high quality conversational data can be very expensive for most applications and infeasible for others due to privacy, ethical, or similar concerns. A promising direction to tackle this problem is to generate synthetic dialogues by prompting large language models. In this work, we use a small set of expert-written conversations as in-context examples to synthesize a social conversation dataset using prompting. We perform several thorough evaluations of our synthetic conversations compared to human-collected conversations. This includes various dimensions of conversation quality with human evaluation directly on the synthesized conversations, and interactive human evaluation of chatbots fine-tuned on the synthetically generated dataset. We additionally demonstrate that this prompting approach is generalizable to multi-party conversations, providing potential to create new synthetic data for multi-party tasks. Our synthetic multi-party conversations were rated more favorably across all measured dimensions compared to conversation excerpts sampled from a human-collected multi-party dataset.
summary: Collecting high quality conversational data can be very expensive for most applications and infeasible for others due to privacy, ethical, or similar concerns. A promising direction to tackle this problem is to generate synthetic dialogues by prompting large language models. In this work, we use a small set of expert-written conversations as in-context examples to synthesize a social conversation dataset using prompting. We perform several thorough evaluations of our synthetic conversations compared to human-collected conversations. This includes various dimensions of conversation quality with human evaluation directly on the synthesized conversations, and interactive human evaluation of chatbots fine-tuned on the synthetically generated dataset. We additionally demonstrate that this prompting approach is generalizable to multi-party conversations, providing potential to create new synthetic data for multi-party tasks. Our synthetic multi-party conversations were rated more favorably across all measured dimensions compared to conversation excerpts sampled from a human-collected multi-party dataset.
abstract_zh: 对于大多数应用程序来说，收集高质量的对话数据可能非常昂贵，而由于隐私、道德或类似问题，对于其他应用程序来说则不可行。解决这个问题的一个有前途的方向是通过提示大型语言模型来生成合成对话。在这项工作中，我们使用一小组专家编写的对话作为上下文示例，以使用提示来合成社交对话数据集。我们对我们的合成对话与人类收集的对话进行了多次彻底的评估。这包括直接对合成对话进行人工评估的对话质量的各个维度，以及对综合生成的数据集进行微调的聊天机器人的交互式人工评估。我们还证明，这种提示方法可以推广到多方对话，为多方任务创建新的合成数据提供了潜力。与从人类收集的多方数据集中采样的对话摘录相比，我们的合成多方对话在所有测量维度上都获得了更有利的评价。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过提示大型语言模型，利用少量专家撰写的对话作为上下文示例，合成社交对话数据集。
AI.motivation: 高质量对话数据的收集成本高昂且存在隐私、伦理等问题，需寻找生成合成对话的替代方案。
AI.method: 使用专家编写的少量对话作为上下文示例，通过提示机制生成合成对话，并通过人类评估和聊天机器人交互测试验证质量。
AI.result: 合成对话在多维度评估中优于人类收集的对话数据，且在多方对话场景中表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 提示方法可有效生成高质量合成对话数据，为多方任务提供可行的数据生成方案。

authors_text: Xiu-Shen Wei,Xuhao Sun,Yang Shen,Anqi Xu,Peng Wang,Faen Zhang
title: Delving Deep into Simplicity Bias for Long-Tailed Image Recognition
title_zh: 深入研究长尾图像识别的简单性偏差
abstract: Simplicity Bias (SB) is a phenomenon that deep neural networks tend to rely favorably on simpler predictive patterns but ignore some complex features when applied to supervised discriminative tasks. In this work, we investigate SB in long-tailed image recognition and find the tail classes suffer more severely from SB, which harms the generalization performance of such underrepresented classes. We empirically report that self-supervised learning (SSL) can mitigate SB and perform in complementary to the supervised counterpart by enriching the features extracted from tail samples and consequently taking better advantage of such rare samples. However, standard SSL methods are designed without explicitly considering the inherent data distribution in terms of classes and may not be optimal for long-tailed distributed data. To address this limitation, we propose a novel SSL method tailored to imbalanced data. It leverages SSL by triple diverse levels, i.e., holistic-, partial-, and augmented-level, to enhance the learning of predictive complex patterns, which provides the potential to overcome the severe SB on tail data. Both quantitative and qualitative experimental results on five long-tailed benchmark datasets show our method can effectively mitigate SB and significantly outperform the competing state-of-the-arts.
summary: Simplicity Bias (SB) is a phenomenon that deep neural networks tend to rely favorably on simpler predictive patterns but ignore some complex features when applied to supervised discriminative tasks. In this work, we investigate SB in long-tailed image recognition and find the tail classes suffer more severely from SB, which harms the generalization performance of such underrepresented classes. We empirically report that self-supervised learning (SSL) can mitigate SB and perform in complementary to the supervised counterpart by enriching the features extracted from tail samples and consequently taking better advantage of such rare samples. However, standard SSL methods are designed without explicitly considering the inherent data distribution in terms of classes and may not be optimal for long-tailed distributed data. To address this limitation, we propose a novel SSL method tailored to imbalanced data. It leverages SSL by triple diverse levels, i.e., holistic-, partial-, and augmented-level, to enhance the learning of predictive complex patterns, which provides the potential to overcome the severe SB on tail data. Both quantitative and qualitative experimental results on five long-tailed benchmark datasets show our method can effectively mitigate SB and significantly outperform the competing state-of-the-arts.
abstract_zh: 简单偏差（SB）是一种现象，即深度神经网络在应用于监督判别任务时往往倾向于依赖更简单的预测模式，但忽略一些复杂的特征。在这项工作中，我们研究了长尾图像识别中的 SB，发现尾部类别受到 SB 的影响更严重，这损害了此类代表性不足的类别的泛化性能。我们根据经验报告，自监督学习（SSL）可以通过丰富从尾部样本中提取的特征来减轻 SB 并与监督学习互补，从而更好地利用这些稀有样本。然而，标准 SSL 方法的设计没有明确考虑类方面的固有数据分布，并且对于长尾分布式数据可能不是最佳的。为了解决这个限制，我们提出了一种针对不平衡数据的新型 SSL 方法。它通过三重不同级别（即整体级别、部分级别和增强级别）利用 SSL 来增强预测复杂模式的学习，这提供了克服尾部数据严重 SB 的潜力。五个长尾基准数据集的定量和定性实验结果表明，我们的方法可以有效减轻 SB 并显着优于竞争的最新技术。

AI.tldr: 本论文研究长尾图像识别中的简单性偏差（Simplicity Bias）现象，并提出一种新的自监督学习方法以缓解该问题。
AI.motivation: 长尾图像识别中尾部类别因样本稀缺而易受简单性偏差影响，导致模型泛化能力下降，现有自监督学习方法未针对长尾分布优化。
AI.method: 提出一种三层次自监督学习方法（整体级、部分级、增强级），通过多样化特征学习缓解尾部类别的简单性偏差。
AI.result: 在五个长尾基准数据集上实验表明，该方法有效缓解简单性偏差并显著优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过三层次自监督学习有效克服长尾图像识别中的简单性偏差，提升模型对尾部类别的泛化性能。
